C: 女人的协助者从暗处走到了台前，这个外貌年幼的少女似乎已经从空间站的数据库里抓住了自己想要的信息。\n目标是回廊深处的房间。\n「星核就在里面？」「它能告诉我们星核在哪里。」
E: The woman's helper emerges from the darkness and steps forward. This young-looking girl seems to have found the information she was looking for in the space station's database.\nThe target is the room in the depths of the corridor.\n"Is that where the Stellaron is?" "It can tell us where the Stellaron is."

C: 任务的最后，女人向「星核」缓缓伸出了手。\n她很清楚这个故事的主角并不是自己。\n那么，准备已经就绪。是时候醒过来了，即将踏上旅途的你。
E: In the end, the woman slowly reaches out her hand toward the Stellaron.\nShe is well aware she is not the protagonist of this story.\nWell then, the preparations have been made. It's time to wake up and set off on your journey.

C: 你乘上了神奇的星穹列车，现在熟悉一下乘员和设施吧！今后，这里就是你的家了。
E: You boarded the amazing Astral Express, and it's time to get familiar with its passengers and facilities! From now on, this will be your home.

C: 黑塔原来不止一个……仔细想想，倒也合理。这位黑塔要求你前往她的办公室。\n多半是个令人头疼的委托，但不去也不行。
E: So, there's more than one Herta... It makes sense now that you think about it. This Herta wants you to head to her office.\nIt'll probably be an annoying request, but you do have to go.

C:
你们平安着陆雅利洛-Ⅵ，却发现此处只有冷冽的霜风和无垠的雪原向各位表示欢迎。
毫无头绪的你回想起姬子的话：成功的开拓需要「探索」、「了解」、「建立」和「连结」…现在大概是正处于「探索」的阶段吧——
使你惊喜的是，你在这银装素裹的世界中发现了一垛蠕动的雪堆。
这世上还有什么比会动的雪堆更诱人呢？至少现阶段没有。你们决定上前调查看看。
E:
Your group has landed on Jarilo-VI safely, but now find yourselves standing in cold wind among barren snowfields stretching as far as the eye can see.
Feeling stuck, you recall Himeko's words: Successful trailblazers must learn to explore, understand, establish, and connect... Maybe this is what exploring looks like.
You are surprised by a wriggling snow drift in this silvery world.
What else could be more alluring than a moving snow drift? You decide to approach and investigate.

C: 那位戍卫官的言语犹在耳畔：坚定的「筑城者」们建立了这永屹之城；贝洛伯格虽受风雪侵凌，却永远温暖…\n他引用典籍的奇怪语调已经深深烙进了你的脑海…但愿这不会影响你享受高档酒店的床榻。\n话说回来，距离夜幕降临还有段时间，你不妨在这古老的城市中随意游览一番。
E: The Captain's words linger: The steadfast Architects built this Towering Citadel. Belobog remains forever warm in the face of unrelenting cold...\nHis tone was strange, as if he was quoting a historical record, and made a deep impression on you... Hopefully, this doesn't ruin your enjoyment of the fancy hotel's fluffy mattress.\nThere's still some time before nightfall. Why don't you take a tour around the ancient city in the meantime?

C: 你不得不佩服桑博的油嘴滑舌。要不是丹恒不吃这一套，你们三人恐怕又要吃哑巴亏了。\n在丹恒的威逼下，桑博终于提出要将你们引荐给「地火」。\n你不清楚「地火」具体是怎样的组织，但听多了这地下的街谈巷议后，你凭本能觉得他们极有可能了解指向星核的线索…
E: You have to give credit to Sampo — no one can be quite the con man as he is. If it weren't for Dan Heng, the three of you would fall for Sampo's silver tongue again.\nSampo finally agrees to introduce all of you to Wildfire, thanks to Dan Heng's... persuasion.\nYou have no clue what Wildfire is up to, but judging from word on the street, you have a feeling that Wildfire may have leads on the Stellaron...

C:
矿区的危机基本解除，绝大部分「地火」成员已经护送矿民先行撤离现场。
不过，希儿尚未将布洛妮娅押送至首领面前，而你们也没有见到这位大人物——而这正是你们此行的根本原因。
然而，你的去路被一辆报废矿车强行隔断。
「嘭！嘭！轰隆！」你不禁想，「可惜杨叔不在，要不一个黑洞全都给他扬了…」
E:
The crisis in the mines is no more, and most of the Wildfire members have left the spot, escorting miners to safety along with them.
However, Seele has not yet brought her captive, Bronya, to the chief, and you haven't had the chance to meet this important figure, a meeting with whom is the biggest motive behind this journey.
And yet, the way forward is cut off by a mine cart out of order.
"Bang, bang!" You can't help but picture Mr. Yang destroying the cart with his black hole.

C: 你和同伴击退裂界生物，保证了克拉拉的安全。你本想借此机会说服克拉拉将大家带到史瓦罗面前，可惜她是个比三月七更透彻、更坚持自己信念的孩子…因此，这次交涉以失败告终。\n但是，这次交流也并非没有收获：你们觉察到了或许能令她和史瓦罗松口的突破口——接下来，只需找到克拉拉重新交涉即可。\n她似乎乘坐电梯前往炉心之下了，现在立即出发或许还来得及。
E: You and your companions defeated the Fragmentum organisms and secured Clara's safety. You wanted to take the opportunity to persuade Clara into bringing you to Svarog, but she has a firmer and clearer conviction than March 7th... Your persuasion ended in failure.\nHowever, all is not lost. You've noticed a breakthrough that could make her and Svarog talk — all you have to do now is to find Clara and revisit the conversation.\nShe seems to have taken the elevator and headed below the Furnace Core. You can still make it in time if you leave now.

C: 避过城中铁卫的重重眼线，你们终于来到了铁卫禁区的出入关口前。此处的铁卫全副武装、杀气腾腾，城中巡逻的铁卫与之相比只可称为懒散…\n不过，你注意到他们看见希露瓦后显然收敛了敌意。\n这或许就是破局的关键，试试看吧。
E: After avoiding the watchful eye of the Silvermane Guard, you finally arrive at the entrance to the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone. The Silvermane Guards here are armed to the teeth and hostile. In comparison, the Silvermane Guards patrolling the city appear to be extremely lazy...\nHowever, you notice that they seem significantly less hostile after seeing Serval.\nPerhaps this will allow you to turn the tide. Give it a try!

C: 在雅利洛-Ⅵ上旅行至此，你已经充分学会如何以理服人了。大守护者最忠实的戍卫官此刻也终于同你站在一条战线上…只可惜他无法同你一道前进，共同见证贝洛伯格的结局。\n但杰帕德在此处把守着阻隔裂界的大门——只要你一声令下，他和他的亲信铁卫便会迅速结成战阵，为你们开辟前路。
E: Thanks to your time on Jarilo-VI, you have mastered the art of persuasion. The Supreme Guardian's most loyal Captain is now on your side... It's a pity that he cannot go with you and witness what awaits Belobog.\nGepard is guarding the gate to the Fragmentum. He and his best guards will form up and clear the way for you once you are ready.

C: 可可利亚已经战败，星核的影响也随着她的消亡而减弱。\n战斗引发的巨大震动让下层区的居民有些担惊受怕，娜塔莎希望你能去安抚一下他们的情绪，将好消息带给所有人。\n歌德大饭店似乎也受到了影响，去看看歌蒂那边的状况吧。
E: Cocolia was defeated and the influence of the Stellaron weakened with her demise.\nThe great tremors from the battle made the Underworlders very concerned. Natasha would like you to go comfort them and bring the good news to everyone.\nThe Goethe Grand Hotel also seems to be affected. Go see how Gertie is doing.

C: 自截获的通讯中，天舶司找到了卡芙卡下落的蛛丝马迹。\n而后，你们将开始猎手与猎物间的追逐，找到行踪无定的星核猎手卡芙卡。
E: After analyzing the intercepted message, the Sky-Faring Commission has found some clues about Kafka's whereabouts.\nAs for you all, you will begin the hunt for Kafka, the Stellaron Hunter with unpredictable movements.

C: 与卡芙卡一番交谈，你竟得知星核猎手们意图是「弑杀星神」。微尘般的凡人能伤及那有如天体般的神明吗？\n卡芙卡没有回答，她未卜先知般望向远处。枯朽数千年的神迹「建木」在遥远的洞天深处复苏重生，直欲穿破穹窿。星核猎手旋即离去，只余下不知所措的你。
E: You learn from your conversation with Kafka that the Stellaron Hunters aim to "slay Aeons." Can mortals as powerless as dust harm the gods, which appear as grand as celestial bodies?\nKafka does not answer and simply gazes into the distance, as if she had already predicted the current scourge. The divine construct, the Ambrosial Arbor, has been revived in the depths of a distant delve and threatens to pierce the sky after having withered millennia ago. The Stellaron Hunter then departs, leaving you alone in your confusion.

C: 令你感到意外的是，你的老朋友桑博也来到了匹诺康尼。流萤看起来对他不是很信任，但热情如故的深蓝男子还是想要让你们领教一下何为大人的世界。\n触碰这台神秘的机器后，你发现自己变成了一个不怎么爱说话的卡通人物，并成功打倒了石头老板。现在你得再次触碰电视机才能恢复原状。
E: What surprises you most is that your old friend Sampo happens to be in Penacony, too. Firefly doesn't seem to trust him very much, but the ever-friendly and enthusiastic dark-blue gentleman wants to teach you all about the "adult side" of things.\nAs you touch the mysterious machine, you realize that you've been transformed into a taciturn cartoon character and successfully defeat Boss Stone. Now you must touch the television once more to return to normal.

C: 流萤向你解释了此处是为何地：黄金时刻的边境，梦境的更深处，家族的建设改造地（换句话说，梦中的工地），她还补充说，自己的「秘密据点」就在深处…只是「家族」眼线密布，两人得偷偷溜进去才行。\n你们的旅途刚一开始就结束了，因为一名极有原则的猎犬家系成员把守着大门。如果你们想继续深入，恐怕必须得用钟表把戏干点坏事了…愿钟表小子宽恕你。
E: Firefly explains this place to you: It is the edge of the Golden Hour, the inner depths of the Dreamscape, and The Family's construction and remodeling zone (in other words, a construction site within the dream). She adds that her "secret stronghold" is further on... The only problem is that "The Family" has eyes everywhere, and you will have to sneak in to get inside.\nJust as your journey begins, it comes to an end as a Bloodhound Family member with a strong sense of principles guards the door before you. If you wish to continue ahead, you may have to use Clockwork for no good... Let's hope Clockie forgives you.

C: 在银狼的协助下，你成功抵达了真正的梦境——这里看上去和你梦中曾经历的情景简直一模一样…你可能已经有点腻了。但没关系，黑天鹅将在这里担任你的导游，和你一起展开轻松愉快的忆域大冒险——\n——如果真是这样就好了。但无论如何，你都得和她会合才行。
E: With Silver Wolf's assistance, you successfully arrived at the true Dreamscape — This place seems almost identical to what you have already experienced in your dreams... Perhaps you've even grown tired of this. Not to worry. Black Swan will serve as your guide here and take you on a relaxing and enjoyable Memory Zone adventure —\n—If only that is the case. Either way, you must meet with her.

C: 你们发现沙盘模型上有一道明显的缺口——或许这就是前往家族议事厅的关键线索。根据拉帝奥教授的回忆，能够契合这道缺口的积木就在不远处的珍品室里。\n你们抵达了珍品室，开始攻读入室盗窃学学位…呃，意思是你们准备在这里找到那座沙盘模型的一部分。祝你们好运。
E: There is a noticeable gap in the sandpit model, which might just be the key clue to unlocking the council chamber. As far as Dr. Ratio can remember, the block that can fit the gap is kept in the treasure room nearby.\nYou two arrive at the treasure room, all set to pursue a degree in burglary — that is, to look for the missing part of the sandpit model. Good luck.

C: 加拉赫示意各位择地继续讨论。他将你们带到了「惊梦酒吧」，浮华美梦中一处毫不起眼的清冷角落。考虑到案情复杂，他决定浅露一手，调制特饮款待各位，以免交涉过程过于冗长——要是接下来的二十分钟你都将在听故事中度过，没有任何操作，那就没意思了。\n你可以在惊梦酒吧各处寻找调饮用的原材料，加拉赫会用神秘的魔法将它们完美调和。
E: Gallagher gestures for everyone to adjourn the discussion to somewhere else. He brings you to the Dreamjolt Hostelry — A quiet and ordinary corner in this frolicking dream. Considering the complexity of the cases, he decides to showcase his skills by preparing special drinks to keep everyone entertained. Otherwise, the negotiation process would be too boring. It will be dull if you have to spend the next <unbreak>20</unbreak> minutes listening to stories with no gameplay!\nYou can explore the Dreamjolt Hostelry for ingredients. Gallagher will then use magic to make perfect concoctions out of them.

C: 米沙声称流梦礁是自己的家——如果真是这样，那「白日梦」酒店的待遇可真有够糟糕的。不过，天真可爱的小米沙不以为意，反而看出你们遇到了麻烦，提出带领各位寻找走失的同伴，顺便游览这座冷寂的小镇。不仅如此，你们甚至还有机会见到一位老朋友——知更鸟。\n但在那以前，你们首先要和三月七与姬子会合才行。事不宜迟，跟上小米沙的脚步吧。
E: Misha claims Dreamflux Reef to be his home... If that is the case, you can only imagine how bad the treatment must have been at The Reverie. Although, the cute and naïve Misha has not taken that to heart. In fact, seeing that you are in trouble, he offers to lead you on a search for your lost companions and give you a tour of the desolate town along the way. Not only that, you may even have a chance to meet with an old friend... Robin.\nBefore this, however, you need to regroup with March 7th and Himeko. There is no time to lose. Better hurry after Misha.

C: 你们即将面对本届苏乐达™盛会海选最后、也是最难的关卡——「巨星巅峰战」。能成为匹诺康尼下一位盛会巨星的，只有在擂台上笑到最后的那个人……\n那究竟是你？还是那位高大、坚实、热情似火、凭一己之力拿下演技挑战最高分的高贵男子？敬请拭目以待！
E: You are about to face the final and most challenging stage of the SoulGlad™ Festivity Auditions — "The Superstar Showdown"! Only they who laugh last in the ring will be able to become the next Penacony Festive Superstar...\nWill that person be you? Or will it be the towering, strong, passionate nobleman who easily secured the top score in the acting challenge? Stay tuned to find out!

C: 时间回退至你们尚未离开流梦礁的时间点。姬子从黄金的时刻归来，更捎来了一个强有力的推断：「钟表匠」怀中空无一物的梦泡与门童米沙或许有着千丝万缕的联系。\n为了求证，你们携米沙一道，再次进入米哈伊尔的梦泡——如无意外，一切真相就潜藏在这段稚子的长梦中。
E: Time reverses to the point before you left Dreamflux Reef. Himeko returns from Golden Hour with a powerful deduction: There may be some inextricable link between the empty dream bubble that the Watchmaker is holding and Misha the bellboy.\nIn order to prove it, you take Misha back into Mikhail's dream bubble... If everything goes as expected, the truth may be lurking here in this long dream of the child.

C: 尘埃落定，阿斯德纳和整个宇宙最终免于成为「秩序」傀儡的命运。距离击败「齐响诗班」似乎已经过去了一段时间…这期间都发生了些什么？\n你听到熟悉的声音从身后传来。一股莫之能御的力量令你鞋头调转，（自愿）向那声音源头走去——毕竟，谁能拒绝一位慵懒优雅又强大的忆者呢？
E: As the dust settles, Asdana and the entire universe have escaped the fate of becoming puppets to the Order. It seems some time has passed since the Harmonious Choir were defeated... What has happened during this time?\nYou hear a familiar voice approach from behind you. An irresistible force turns you on your heel as you (willingly) walk towards its source... After all, who can resist such a languid, elegant, and powerful Memokeeper?

C: 谐乐大典开幕在即，而「晖长石号」也基本被你扫荡一空……\n什么，你说没有参与感？好吧，距离开幕式其实还有一段时间，你不妨再到处转转，累了再找个座位等待典礼开幕吧。
E: The Charmony Festival is about to begin, and you've pretty much completely cleared out the Radiant Feldspar...\nWhat, you said you wanted a sense of participation? Well then, there's still a while before the opening ceremony commences. You may as well take a stroll around. Find a seat if you're tired and hold tight for the opening ceremony.

C: 然而，在这场美梦之中，去而复返的，却也并非仅有客人——人们安心地谈论着他，只因故乡于重履此地的男人而言，如今几近死地。\n物是人非，在了解这里的近况时，务必小心谨慎。
E: However, it's not just the guests who return to this beautiful dream... People discuss him without concern, for home is now no more than a deathtrap for this man returning to familiar lands.\nThough the place remains as it was, people have changed. Take great care as you investigate the situation.

C: 纵有万分不舍，也还是到了送别停云小姐的时候——眼下发生的不是重逢，这或许也不算坏消息。重逢如此美好，不如留待今后。\n前往晖长石号与姬子会合。
E: Though you wish it wasn't true, the time has come to bid farewell to Miss Tingyun... This is not a reunion, but maybe that is not such a bad thing. When a reunion is so perfect, it gives you something to look forward to in the future.\nGo to Radiant Feldspar and meet up with Himeko.

C: 名为遐蝶与万敌的黄金裔为我们扫清沿途阻碍，我们即将与白厄一同直面「天谴之矛」尼卡多利，成就英雄之名。
E: The Chrysos Heirs named Castorice and Mydei cleared the obstacles in our path. Now, alongside Phainon, we will face Nikador, Lance of Fury, and become heroes.

C: 遐蝶向寡言的斗士格奈乌斯坦露了此行的目的。一行人继续前行，沿途收集情报，誓要将尼卡多利的五瓣神魂归位，阻止不死神躯的诞生、重铸纷争泰坦的荣耀。
E: Castorice reveals the true purpose of our mission to Gnaeus, the silent gladiator. The party presses on, gathering information on the way, vowing to return Nikador's five soul fragments to their rightful place to prevent the creation of their immortal divine body, and to reforge the glory of the Strife Titan.

C: 与盗火行者的最终战场就在悬锋城。面对未知的强敌，众黄金裔必须全力以赴。
E: The final battle with the Flame Reaver takes place in Castrum Kremnos. Against this mysterious mighty foe, the Chrysos Heirs must fight with everything they have.

C: 你决绝地否定了悬锋人千载的荣耀执念，决定独自还乡，接下尼卡多利抗击黑潮的使命。在迈上回乡之路之前，你还需与城中的友人们一一作别。
E: You decisively reject the Kremnoans' centuries-old obsession with glory, opting to return home alone and assume Nikador's duty against the black tide. Before starting your homeward journey, you need to say goodbye to your friends in the city.

C: 重回故乡，缇宁不禁睹物生情，也回想起许多本已忘却的人、事、物。
E: As Trinnon returned to her homeland, familiar sights stirred forgotten memories within her — of people, moments, and treasures she thought time had washed away.

C: 斯缇科西亚，巨龙与海浪的城邦。如今，那冥河却把这凄惨的城池团团围拢。\n阿那克萨戈拉斯提供的「贤者之石」与炼金术能将冥河中的泰坦召唤出来，而那炼金所需的材料应当就在城中。
E: Styxia, the City-State of Dragons and Waves... At present, the River of Souls has encircled this pitiful city.\nThe Philosopher's Stone provided by Anaxagoras and the art of alchemy can summon the Titan lurking with the River of Souls, and the alchemical materials should be found in the city as well.

C: 天空一族的传说、风堇所在意的历史空白，「那段往事」。我们思索着翼兽们诉说的未知，不断追逐着艾格勒，试图利用天象画壁将其逼出。
E: The legends of the Sky people, the historical gaps that concern Hyacine — "the past." We pondered the unknown tales shared by the winged beasts, relentlessly tracking Aquila down, trying to force them out using the celestial mural.

C: 真相十分苦涩——塞涅俄丝早已对族人彻底失望，而风堇一族的血脉，则传承自一位未被肃清的无名黄金裔，好在她并未因此黯然。事已至此，我们将直面「晨昏之眼」艾格勒，为这段天空的因缘画上句点。
E: The truth is extremely bitter — Seliose had long since lost all faith in her kin. Hyacine's bloodline leads back to an unnamed Chrysos Heir who escaped the purge, yet thankfully, she refused to let this black moment shape her. Now, we shall confront Aquila, Eye of Twilight, and bring closure to this saga of skies and predestination.

C: 将{NICKNAME}与白厄接送至树庭后，赛飞儿找来「贼灵」巴特鲁斯，回到冥滩一阵搜刮…
E: After dropping {NICKNAME} and Phainon off at the Grove, Cipher rounded up the "Spirithief", Bartholos, and returned to the Nethershore for a bit of scavenging...

C: 将{NICKNAME}与白厄接送至树庭后，赛飞儿找来「贼灵」巴特鲁斯，回到冥滩一阵搜刮…
E: After dropping {NICKNAME} and Phainon off at the Grove, Cipher rounded up the "Spirithief", Bartholos, and returned to the Nethershore for a bit of scavenging...

C: 将{NICKNAME}与白厄接送至树庭后，赛飞儿找来「贼灵」巴特鲁斯，回到冥滩一阵搜刮…
E: After dropping {NICKNAME} and Phainon off at the Grove, Cipher rounded up the "Spirithief", Bartholos, and returned to the Nethershore for a bit of scavenging...

C: {NICKNAME}的思绪被拉回了创世涡心，回到了再创世的前一刻，与白厄一同，直面最后的来客——那位燃尽的救世之人，与它所践行的意志。
E: {NICKNAME}'s thoughts are pulled back to the Vortex of Genesis, to the moment before the Era Nova, to when they are standing beside Phainon and facing the final visitor: The one who burned to nothingness for salvation and the will they are carrying out.

C:
《钟表惊魂夜》
一二，被音符锁住梦境。
三四，恶狼最爱吃哭泣，
五六，左轮转动到眉心。
七八，钟表正滴答作响，
九十，恶灵马上要来袭。
E: A Haunting of Clocks One, two — notes trap your dreamscape. Three, four — wolves hunger for the tears' taste; Five, six — the revolver clicks between your brows. Seven, eight — the ticking clock won't wait; Nine, ten — the spirits are coming to your face.

C:
船呵，波涛又把你推向海上，
怎么办？毅然停住吧，进港！
难道你没有看见，舷边已没有划桨，桅柱已被强劲的西南风折断，帆杆在嗟怨悲鸣，没有缆绳，船体怎经受得住风浪的猛烈冲击？
风帆已经破碎，神像也已失去。
——你要千万当心呵，不要作风暴的玩具。
E:
O ship, the waves are pushing you back to sea.
What now? Firmly stop. Turn toward the harbor!
Can't you see? The oars are gone from your sides. The mast has snapped in the fierce southwest wind. The rigging groans with sorrow. No ropes remain. How will your hull survive the crashing waves?
The sails are torn, and the divine statue has vanished.
— Beware. Do not let the storm toy with you.

C:
于天地境界之海完成征服，长眠于涛声中。长眠于涛声中，于天地境界之海完成征服。
她们从未恐惧这预言，甚至，还有几分期盼。
那时，她们站在吕奎亚的海岸边，看着还未熄灭的太阳沉入海中，想着预言兑现的那日。
但她不知道，她所梦的海，并非方寸大的池。她不知道，她所愿的海，并非空无人的岸。
她不知道，她其实无心长眠。她不知道，她其实不恋征服。
她们想着错位的光景，一起看太阳慢慢、慢慢沉进海里，像是永远不会再升起。
E:
Complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world, and eternally slumber in the sound of tides. Eternally slumber in the sound of tides, and complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world.
They were never terrified of this prophecy. Rather, they somewhat looked forward to it.
Back then, they stood on the shores of Loukas, watching the yet-unextinguished sun sink into the sea, imagining the day when the prophecy would come true.
But she didn't know that the sea she dreamed of wasn't just a small pond. Nor was it just an empty shore.
She didn't know that she had no desire for eternal rest. And what she truly yearned for was never a conquest.
Thinking of the scenes that were so out of place, they watched together as the sun slowly, ever so slowly, sank into the sea, as if it would never rise again.

C: 归墟埋藏着三千万世的执念与苦果。随着不断深入，万敌、赛飞儿、遐蝶、风堇相继加入队伍。在埋藏着救世之愿的晶体旁，那刻夏等候已久。我们需要启动仪式，尝试带走白厄的愿望，止息他心间沉重的回响。
E: The ruins harbor the obsessions and bitter fruits of <unbreak>30</unbreak> million cycles. As we venture deeper, Mydei, Cipher, Castorice, and Hyacine join the team one after another. Anaxa has been waiting by the crystal that holds the wish to save the world. We need to initiate the ceremony, attempt to take away Phainon's wish, and silence the heavy reverberation in his heart.

C: 倘若世间因果是一条顺流而下的溪涧，那么少女就是被岁月之风吹起、溯流而上的花朵。沿着回望的方向，她踮着脚在水面上播撒着涟漪，圆满了因果、拂留了芬芳，将一切重要的瞬间铭刻于此，慢慢地靠近…那最初的起点。
E: If the world's causality were a stream flowing downstream, then the girl would be a flower, blown against the current by the winds of time. Following her backward gaze, she tiptoes across the water, casting ripples, completing the cycle of cause and effect, and leave a lingering fragrance. Engraving every precious moment here, she gradually draws closer... to that very beginning.

C: 被困于此的科员告诉你，帕梅拉和人群走丢，失散在怪物附近。\n想不到想找「瓜农」竟如此曲折，但事已至此，还是救人要紧。
E: The trapped researcher told you that Pamela went missing near where the monsters gathered.\nFinding Gossipmonger proves to be more troublesome than you thought, but at this point, saving people is more important.

C: 击败被识别程序标记的怪物，收集信标数据。
E: Defeat enemies marked by the recognition system and collect beacon data.

C: 质询结束，你暂时洗清了嫌疑，但真理医生点名要求你一同前往阿兰处寻求协助
E: You have temporarily exculpated yourself by the end of the interrogation, but Dr. Ratio specifically asked for you to go with him to Arlan to ask for help.

C: 一个以奇怪石膏头雕遮蔽面容的男子出现在你面前！他直接指出了阮•梅的谎言：她的野心远比表面上看上去更大！…\n她真正在培育的东西，究竟是…什么？！
E: A man masked by a strange plaster sculpture appears in front of you and pointed out Ruan Mei's lies. Her ambitions are far greater than they appear to be! ...\nThe thing she's cultivating... what is it, exactly?

C: 在列车组离开贝洛伯格的日子里，普通人的生活究竟发生了什么？深藏不露的老歌德或许知道这一切……
E: Just what has happened in the lives of the ordinary people of Belobog since the Express Crew left? Perhaps the secretive Old Goethe has the knowledge you seek...

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n姬子来了。合同没签，布洛妮娅自有妙计。必须找到托帕。
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nHimeko is here. Didn't sign the contract. Bronya has a plan. Must find Topaz.

C: 虽然虎克什么都没有说，但是她那双会说话的大眼睛却毫无隐瞒，她需要你的帮助。\n不必深思，你马上就明白了，小姑娘是想要你帮忙和她一起找回老爹的宝贝，她一点儿都不甘心。
E: Hook says nothing, but her eyes say that she needs your help.\nYou figure out right away that she wants you to help her find daddy's treasure. She won't give up.

C: 你已经做出了自己的判断，接下来就是要去验证它。跟紧虎克，别让真正的犯人逃走了。\n你也不清楚裁缝是否就是真正的小偷，但在寻找真相的路上，不能因为犹豫就止步不前。
E: You've made a clear deduction, and now it's time to prove it. Follow Hook and don't let the criminal run away.\nYou're not sure if the tailor is the thief, but one cannot waver in the search for the truth.

C: 修补好的「菌菌」就在诊所里，也许虎克又免不了被娜塔莎叮嘱几句。\n去拍卖会可没有去裂界那么危险，就算是娜塔莎也会同意的吧。不对！也许不应该给娜塔莎透露实情……
E: To get "Junjun," you have to return to the clinic. Maybe Natasha will teach Hook another lesson.\nBut an auction is much safer than the Fragmentum, so Natasha might agree to let you go. Wait, perhaps you shouldn't reveal the truth to her...

C: 先前娜塔莎确认了是怪物盔甲对科鲁泽的身体带来了不良的影响，并规劝科鲁泽不要再穿戴盔甲尽快修养。但从科鲁泽推脱的样子看，你怀疑他恐怕并不会遵从医嘱。你决定重返搏击俱乐部确认科鲁泽的身体情况。
E: Natasha has confirmed that the monster armor had a negative effect on Kluzer's body and suggested he not wear it again and have some rest. But judging from his hesitant look, you doubt if he would. You decide to return to the Fight Club and check Kluzer's physical condition.

C: 你与克拉拉找到了帕斯卡，发现它似乎被史瓦罗的自动机兵抢先制服了，不过你们与那位自动机兵的沟通过程不甚愉快。\n无论如何，事情基本上算是解决了——换上最后一款外壳后，帕斯卡终于恢复了正常，随后便自顾自地领着你们前往铆钉镇某处。
E: Clara and you found Pascal. It seemed to have been subdued by one of Svarog's automatic robot soldiers. However, you did not have a nice experience communicating with that robot soldier.\nAnyways, the incident is mostly solved — Pascal finally returns to normal after being given the last shell, then walks on its own to lead you somewhere deep in Rivet Town.

C: 技术部职员茉莉正在对着同事大动肝火——热心的你上前询问，这才知道现正有一批危险的次品机器人横行禁区，极有可能对人造成伤害。\n你答应茉莉，协助她回收出机器人的「核心模组」。问题的机器人共三台，在铁卫禁区各处仔细搜索吧。
E: Molly from the Technology Division is angry with her colleagues. You learn from her that a group of dangerous malfunctioning robots is wandering around in the restricted zone, which are prone to harming people.\nYou agree to help Molly retrieve these robots' "Core Modules." There are three robots that have this problem. Search carefully around the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone.

C: 没想到你真的找到了《冒险鼹鼠队》的缺失书页，而且在书页里似乎还提到了解谜的线索。你也许可以解开谜题试试……\n你不知不觉就开始研究起儿童文学里的谜题了，难道说这就是儿童文学的魅力吗？还差一张解谜卡！
E: Surprisingly, you find the lost pages of The Adventurous Moles here, and they contain a clue about the puzzle. Maybe you can try to solve it...\nNow you're working on a puzzle found in a kid's book. How addicting, is this why the kids love it? You just need another puzzle piece!

C: 佩拉窘迫的模样引起了你的好奇，但现在似乎不是拿她打趣的好时候——\n因为，你们已经发现传家宝上写有的线索正指向如今被称为「残响回廊」的旧要塞。和佩拉一同出发，前往探索吧。
E: Pela's embarrassment piqued your curiosity, but now isn't the time to tease her...\nYou've discovered a clue written on the family heirloom that points you towards an old fort called the Corridor of Fading Echoes. Go with Pela to explore it.

C: 会谈进展基本顺利，直到诊所外突如其来的躁动打破屋内融洽的氛围。你的数位同伴立即夺门而出了解状况。「真不愧是上下层区的领袖人物，」你心想，「就我一人是来凑热闹的。」\n但牢骚归牢骚，直觉告诉你接下来要处理的问题很可能属于你的专业领域——战斗，然后顺便拯救世界——总之，还是出门查看一下状况吧。
E: The meeting was progressing smoothly until the sudden noises from outside disturbed the harmonious mood in the room. Your friends instantly rush out the door to see what is going on. "They are indeed leaders of both sides of Belobog," you think, "and I'm just here to fill the seats."\nComplaints aside, you instinctively feel that the problems that follow might be your specialty — fighting, and saving the world on the side — anyways, head outside and check out the situation.

C: 根据铁卫的指示，击败盘踞在矿镇的裂界生物
E: Under the Silvermane Guard's command, defeat the Fragmentum creatures occupying the mining town

C: 檀檀并没有追上肇事星槎，只好回到事故现场通过目击者收集线索。而固执的梅姐似乎也从丹鼎司医馆跑出来回到星槎海了，她的身体没问题吗？
E: Tantan never caught up with the culprit, and could only return to the scene of the accident to interview witnesses. And that stubborn Mei seems to have escaped from the Alchemy Commission apothecary to somehow return to Starskiff Haven. Is she really feeling okay?

C: 你们看到一名男子签收了寄给黛青的包裹，也许这个人知道黛青小姐的信息。走上前去问问，他到底是什么人。
E: You see a man signing for the package sent to Daiqing. Maybe this person knows something about Ms. Daiqing. Go and find out who he is.

C: 很显然梁沐并不知道魔阴身士兵正是半夏，但是他还是愿意回到她的身边。\n你不知道他们两人之前的故事，但是这至少说明了他还是个「不离不弃」的人？
E: Evidently, Liangmu didn't know the Mara-struck soldier was Banxia, but he was still eager to return to her side.\nYou don't know the story between them, but at least this tells you he was a loyal person...

C: 根据名侦探三月七的推理，这种等级的门锁根本就拦不住罗刹。不过一想到罗刹这样一位风度翩翩的绅士，竟然蹲在黑暗的小角落溜门撬锁，还是有点令人忍俊不禁。噗。
E: According to Genius Detective March 7th's deduction, a door lock like this could not stop Luocha, but visualizing a gentlemanly Luocha picking the lock while squatting in a dark corner like this is pretty humorous. Heh.

C: 三月七在见识过大衍穷观阵的神奇之后，一直惦记着用它来帮自己找回过去。为了完成自己的愿望，她决定求太卜帮忙。
E: After witnessing the wonders of the Matrix of Prescience Ultima, March 7th couldn't get the idea of using it to re-discover her past out of her head. She decides to ask for the master diviner's help with fulfilling this wish of hers.

C: 为了降低忧郁诗人的情绪权重，你费了一番功夫。接下来就应该将它带回小聪那里了。\n你听说过不计其数的人饱受抑郁的折磨，要是他们也像阴晴伞一样，只需要调整一下情绪权重就好了。\n至少你明白了，有时情绪也是身不由己的。
E: You went to great lengths to reduce the emotional weight of the Gloomy Poet. Next up is bringing it back to Cong.\nYou've heard about the millions of people who suffer from depression. If only they were like Baroumbrellas, just needing a little adjustment of their emotional weights.\nAt least you understand now that emotions are sometimes beyond your control.

C: 小聪逃走了，丝毫不出意外地逃走了，总之先追上去吧。\n小聪一直都不太有自信，也许他自己开口前就知道了，安慰安慰他，这件事情就这样过了吧。\n再说了，你还没有拿到「重谢」呢。
E: Cong fled, unsurprisingly. Anyway, let's catch up first.\nCong never really had any self-confidence. Perhaps he knew before he opened his mouth. Let's comfort him and let this blow over.\nThat aside, you haven't even received your "Big Reward" yet.

C: 鳞渊境中，故旧重聚。正如景元所说「旧事重提犹如搅乱一潭浑水，徒然惹引不快」。但关于一个时代的过往恩怨，理当有人为之画上句点。
E: Past friends reunite in the Scalegorge Waterscape. It is as Jing Yuan said, "Raising old nets only darkens the water — an exercise in unhappiness." But someone ought to end the grudges lingering from an era past.

C: 鳞渊境中，故旧重聚。正如景元所说「旧事重提犹如搅乱一潭浑水，徒然惹引不快」。但关于一个时代的过往恩怨，理当有人为之画上句点。
E: Past friends reunite in the Scalegorge Waterscape. It is as Jing Yuan said, "Raising old nets only darkens the water — an exercise in unhappiness." But someone ought to end the grudges lingering from an era past.

C: 花火在现场留下了很多东西，并用它们构建出了一场诡异的舞台剧。看起来，「谋杀」只不过是用于招徕观众的诱饵，「谜题」才是她留给黑天鹅的挑战。
E: Sparkle left a lot of items behind at the crime scene and used them to construct a bizarre stage play. It seems that this "murder" was simply a bait to attract the attention of her audience, and this "puzzle" was actually the challenge that she had left for Black Swan.

C: 又一场谋杀、又一出戏剧、又一个谜题。桑博看起来苦恼极了，恨不得马上逃回那与世隔绝的静谧雪国。黑天鹅倒是悠然自得，醉心于花火安排的侦探游戏之中。但他们都不是那种会把真实想法写在脸上的人，所以你也分不清他们是不是真的苦恼、真的悠然。\n不过梦境贩售店好歹也算是个娱乐场所，与其猜测「剧中人」的真实想法，还不如专心研究花火留下的谜题，享受推理的乐趣呢。
E: Another murder, another play, and another puzzle. Sampo seems extremely distressed and ready to escape back into his secluded and quiet Winterland. Black Swan, on the other hand, seems calm and contented, thoroughly enjoying the detective game that Sparkle prepared. However, they are not the type to have their emotions displayed across their faces, so you are uncertain whether they are really distressed or calm.\nHowever, the Dreamscape Sales Store is still a place of entertainment, so perhaps it would be better to focus on investigating the puzzle Sparkle left behind than trying to assess the true thoughts of these "characters." Let's enjoy a game of logic and deduction.

C: 谜题解开了，游戏却并未结束。「捕头」告诉黑天鹅，花火即将再次行凶，而黑天鹅一定赶不及去阻止她。你感受到这段梦境中闪过了一段短暂但剧烈的情绪波动，大概因为黑天鹅并不享受这种被人牵着鼻子走的感觉吧。
E: You have solved the puzzle, but the game is not over. The "constable" has told Black Swan that Sparkle is about to commit another murder, and Black Swan definitely would not have enough time to stop her. You feel a brief but intense surge of emotion flash across the Dreamscape, likely because Black Swan dislikes this feeling of being led on a wild goose chase by others.

C: 演武仪典召开之际，罗浮仙舟成了诸多是非与矛盾的交集处，除却各怀心思的客人，还有遭遇步离人袭击被迫停靠的公司舰船。\n为了解决与公司的纠纷，你们陪同彦卿抵达工造司。
E: At the advent of the Wardance ceremony, the Xianzhou Luofu became a crossroads of conflict among many — not just among guests of ulterior motives, but also IPC ships that were forced to dock after escaping from borisin attacks.\nTo resolve everyone's disputes, you accompanied Yanqing to the Artisanship Commission.

C: 那时候的我，个子可真够小的。\n周围的人们都说，我比同龄人早熟，也比同龄人聪明。但我知道那都是我刻意营造出的假想。我只不过是个打肿脸充胖子的小姑娘罢了，强装出一副聪明世故的模样，来掩盖内心的不安。\n父亲死前对我说，生在帝王家，只有工于心计的人才能幸存。我并不擅长那些政治操弄，但我想活下去。
E: Back then, I was really little.\nEveryone around me said I was mature beyond my years and smarter than my peers. But I'm sure that was just an illusion I created. I was just an insecure little girl, pretending to be wise and smart.\nBefore my father died, he told me — in the royal family, only the cunning survive. I wasn't great at politics, but I wanted to survive.

C: 演武仪典虽有曲折，不过最后也算是顺利结束了。\n三月提出和彦卿一起送别其他仙舟的客人，彦卿也正有此意。现在，不如和彦卿一起等待即将离开的客人吧。
E: Though there were some bumps in the road, the Wardance has successfully concluded.\nAs March suggests going with Yanqing to bid guests from the other Xianzhou ships farewell, Yanqing expresses similar wishes. For now, why don't you await your soon-departing guests with Yanqing?

C: 法政科的创始人古恩有事找你，他想让你来教导一名特殊的学生，授课的内容令你咂舌……
E: Gunn, the founder of the Department of Galactic Geopolitics, comes to you. He wants you to teach a special student, and you're going to teach her some unique lessons...

C: 一只满载着孩子们梦想的「信鸽」正在磐岩镇飞翔，在别人之前找到它，带给阿丽娜吧。
E: A pigeon that carries the dreams of children is flying around above Boulder Town. Bring it back to Alina before others find it.

C: 老吉尔伯特希望你能把他推迟退役的消息转达给女儿莉拉。\n你买好了花——现在，把老吉尔伯特的信和花束一起转交给莉拉吧。
E: Old Gilbert wants you to tell his daughter Lila that his retirement will be delayed.\nYou bought the flowers — Now, pass old Gilbert's letter and the bouquet to Lila.

C: 配音演员塞琳对音乐剧明星塔米拉小姐的处世之道十分感兴趣。\n她委托你去上层区的书店打听和她有关的信息。\n真是一位有事业心的小演员，尽你所能帮她的忙吧。
E: The voice actress, Celine, is very interested in the musical star Tamila's way of life.\nShe asked you to find out about Tamila at the Overworld's bookstore.\nWhat an ambitious aspiring actress. Help her to the best of your abilities.

C: 配音演员塞琳对音乐剧明星塔米拉小姐的处世之道十分感兴趣。\n你听到了一段塔米拉与他人的有趣对话，快去把你的发现告诉塞琳吧。
E: The voice actress, Celine, is very interested in the musical star Tamila's way of life.\nYou overheard a fun conversation between Tamila and another person, so go and tell Celine right away.

C: 消停没多久的棋鬼又开始在镇妖塔附近找人下棋了，看来上次的大败并没有让它吸取教训，你可以看看它还有什么新把戏。
E: The Chess Ghost — who hasn't been quiet for long — has started looking for someone to play chess with near the suppression tower again. It seems that its significant defeat last time wasn't enough to make the lesson sink in. You can check out what new tricks it has up its sleeve.

C: 翁法罗斯的世界残留着一些常理难以解释的遗存，所谓「黄金替罪羊」就是其中之一。一时兴起，你试图破解其中的奥秘，然而它似乎很快就变成了某种闹剧……
E: The world of Amphoreus left behind a number of relics that seem to defy common sense — "The Golden Scapegoat" being one of them. Curious, you attempted to unravel its secret, but it seems this has quickly become a whole separate issue...

C: 翁法罗斯的世界残留着一些常理难以解释的遗存，所谓「黄金替罪羊」就是其中之一。一时兴起，你试图破解其中的奥秘，然而它似乎很快就变成了某种闹剧……
E: The world of Amphoreus left behind a number of relics that seem to defy common sense — "The Golden Scapegoat" being one of them. Curious, you attempted to unravel its secret, but it seems this has quickly become a whole separate issue...

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 你为钟表小子雕像带去了足够多的「金表钞」——吸取了足够多美梦能量的钟表小子决定给你展露一手绝活。
E: You have brought enough Clock Credits to the Clockie Statue — Clockie, having absorbed enough dream energy, decides to showcase a signature trick to you.

C: 地衡司已经判明「模拟云吟术」是次元扑满所为，接下来你和地衡司决定展开「追猎行动」。\n地衡司以行医市集为陷阱布置饵食，希望由你抓住引起异象的扑满……
E: The Realm-Keeping Commission has ascertained that the "cloudhymn magic imitation" is a Warp Trotter's doing. Following this, you and the Realm-Keeping Commission have decided to go on a "hunt."\nThe Realm-Keeping Commission has placed baited traps all over Healer's Market, and they hope you can capture the Trotter causing the abnormalities...

C: 根据梓桥的记录，这艘星槎应该丢失在积玉坊南侧了，去那里仔细找找看吧。
E: Ziqiao's records say this starskiff was lost south of the Trove of Verdure. Go there to have a closer look.

C: 建木生发导致罗浮的货运系统出现了故障，鹤运物流请求你操纵机巧鸟寻回他们失事的星槎。\n和梓桥谈一谈，听听她的具体需求吧。
E: The Ambrosial Arbor's growth made Luofu's logistic system malfunction. Now, Heron Express is asking you to control cycranes to find a starskiff of theirs, which had an accident.\nSpeak with Ziqiao and see what she actually needs from you.

C: 听完双方的争辩，给出一个公正的裁决，这便是「一日塔兰顿」。
E: After listening to both sides' arguments, deliver a fair judgment. This is what it means to be "One-Day Talanton."

C: 阿波罗尼此行的终点似乎就是雅努斯迷津…他想用这台装置得知些什么？
E: The destination of Apollonius's trip seemed to be the Janus' Maze... What was he trying to learn through this device?

C: 温世玲将本次实验需要的材料整理给了你，搜集齐全之后就交给她吧！
E: Wen Shiling compiled a list of required materials for her current experiment. Collect them and hand them over to her!

C: 某种与「住所」有关的…不好说，雷金的灵感真的靠谱吗？
E: Something to do with "residences"... Is Regin's intuition trustworthy?

C: 银狼引起的风波终于告一段落，但伦纳德依旧忧心忡忡。\n为了空间站的网络安全，也为了保住这份工作，他请求你协助进行一项测试……
E: The troubles caused by Silver Wolf have abated, but Leonard still looks concerned.\nHe's asking for your help to carry out a task that will improve the space station's cybersecurity and help him keep his job...

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，鲍里斯希望你为他演示如何使用阿丽萨•兰德的骑枪作战，以便他制作对应的复制品。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Boris hopes that you could show him how you wield Alisa Rand's Lance in combat to help him make a replica.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n大守护者布洛妮娅似乎想要为此找你谈谈——听听她想说些什么吧。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nSupreme Guardian Bronya seems to have something to tell you. Go meet with her.

C: 金人巷商会有意借助「尚滋味」的名气宣传「金人巷复兴」的态度，他们甚至安排了白露担任「推广大使」。\n拍摄宣传材料，也是振兴罗浮夜市重要的一步。
E: The Aurum Alley Merchant Guild wishes to use Spices Supreme's renown to promote their attitudes of "revitalizing Aurum Alley." They even arranged for Bailu to serve as the "Promotional Ambassador."\nShooting promotional material is an important step of reviving the Luofu's night market.

C: 在司辰宫里的商业区开发竞标已经结束了，迄今为止的一切努力是否有结果，就等司辰宫方面的消息了。\n明曦好像不在状态，去向她打听下发生什么事了吧。
E: The open bidding in the Palace of Astrum for the Commercial District has concluded. As for whether all your hard work thus far will pay dividends, that needs to wait until the Palace of Astrum makes its formal announcements.\nMingxi doesn't seem to be herself. Go ask her if anything is going on.

C: 为了重振金人巷，商会希望充分利用码头物流，与金人巷的商户们建立紧密的合作。\n商会派你来劝说「寿考堂」与商会建立合作关系。但「寿考堂」的老板小天此时却碰上了一些麻烦……
E: In order to revitalize Aurum Alley, the merchant guild aims to fully utilize the docks' logistics capacity and establish close collaborations with the stores in the alley.\nThe guild has sent you to persuade Longevity Hall to establish a partnership with the guild. However, its proprietress Little Tian has encountered some troubles at the moment...

C: 一位名叫维尔德的公司员工向你强烈推荐一款名叫《以太战线》的游戏，并对你发出参加「星际决胜庆典」的邀请。\n在维尔德的带路下，你们朝竞技场深处一路走去......
E: An IPC worker named Wilder is passionately promoting a game named Aetherium Wars to you, and sent you an invitation for the Interastral Tournament Festival.\nWith Wilder leading you, you walk deeper into the arena...

C: 《以太战线》的核心玩法便是「对决」——挑战不同的玩家，证明自己的实力吧！
E: The core gameplay loop behind Aetherium Wars is "dueling." Challenge different players and show your true strength!

C: 《以太战线》的核心玩法便是「对决」——挑战不同的玩家，证明自己的实力吧！
E: The core gameplay loop behind Aetherium Wars is "dueling." Challenge different players and show your true strength!

C: 保险箱能关住岁阳？你当然知道这不可能。这说明这并不是一般的保险箱，而是保险箱主人对探秘者的报复……\n问问岁阳，看看它知道些什么？
E: Can safes keep heliobi locked within? You know that's not possible. That means this safe is no ordinary box but the owner's retribution to those who wish to pry into their secrets...\nAsk the heliobus and see what it knows.

C: 你与捉鬼小队的成员再度在绥园聚首。如同上班打卡一般，翻翻「罗浮杂俎」瞧瞧有什么足够怪异的事情，再去探查一番，一天便这么过去了。
E: Once again, you reunite with your fellow ghost hunters at Fyxestroll Garden. Scanning through the posts on Ghostly Grove and conducting investigations have become routine tasks for you.

C: 混乱的梦境卷走了你的同伴们，你必须深入其中、将失散的大伙重新集结起来。
E: The chaotic Dreamscape has swept away your companions. You have to delve into the dream to reunite with your lost companions.

C: 错乱的梦境空间中散落着（在辛格勒看来）家族犯事的证据。\n最后一次进入错乱的迷梦空间，打开空间里的战利品宝箱，收集并拼凑所有线索。
E: According to Singler, evidence of The Family's "crimes" is scattered throughout the chaotic space.\nEnter the space one final time and open the treasure chests in the area to collect and assemble all the clues.

C: 「惊梦酒吧」的管理者舒翁向你提出了委托，希望你能暂时接替调饮师的工作。\n该重新开始营业了。
E: Siobhan, the manager of Dreamjolt Hostelry, offered you an assignment to temporarily take over the job of drinksmith.\nTime to get back in business.

C: 进入了司令的心绪空间，好好陪它玩个痛快吧。
E: You've entered Mr. Bigwig's Emoscape. Have some fun together.

C: 终极挑战就在眼前，但周围似乎发生了一些奇怪的事情。
E: The final showdown is just ahead. But strange things are happening around you.

C: 你收到了一封来自家族的邀请函——鸢尾花家系的缇娜诚邀你去测试一款名为「折纸小鸟对对碰」的三消对战游戏。\n看起来倒不像是诈骗…那么，去看看也没什么损失吧？
E: You have received an invitation from The Family — Tinah of the Iris Family invites you to test a match-3 puzzle battle game called "Origami Bird Clash."\nIt doesn't seem like a scam... So, go take a look? There's nothing to lose.

C: 而那过去了的，就会成为亲切的怀恋。
E: And that which is past will become cherished memories.

C: 没想到冤家路窄，你们再次撞上斯科特胡作非为，三月七与斯科特立下了十五日后剑斗之约。 三月七任命你为「剑术助教」，为她合理安排训练生活，你要和她二位师父一起，在短短十五日里将三月七培养成独当一面的剑术高手。 也许故事还能有其他的走向，请务必试试！ 「十五日后，罗浮之巅，双剑西来，天外飞仙。」
E: Alas, adversaries are wont to cross paths! The both of you encounter Skott, who is up to no good yet again. March 7th and Skott end up making a pact to cross swords in fifteen days. March 7th makes you her "assistant swordplay instructor," leaving you in charge of her training schedule. Alongside her two masters, you have fifteen days to train March 7th into a swordswoman capable of holding her own in a duel. Perhaps the story can go in other directions. Please give them a try! "The ultimate Luofu duel begins in fifteen days. Watch a pair of swords whiz through the skies in a peerless swordplay."

C: 十五日约定的时间已经到了，无论剑法好坏，既然彦卿师父、云璃师父说了三月七可以一战，你也大可相信她有作为胜者的能耐。\n想必斯科特已经在金人巷等候多时了，现在就去会会他吧。
E: The day of the duel has arrived. Putting aside March 7th's aptitude in swordplay, you believe she has the capability to emerge victorious, especially since both of her mentors — Yanqing and Yunli — agreed to let her go to battle.\nSkott is probably already waiting at Aurum Alley. Go meet him now.

C: 你现在是卢卡选手的教练了！\n带领卢卡赢得第一场比赛吧！让素裳好好体验一下来自域外雪国的热情吧！
E: You are now Contestant Luka's coach!\nLead Luka to victory in his first match! And let Sushang have a good taste of the passion from the outworld snowlands!

C: 新闻发布会是体育比赛的特色，不能不品尝。\n准备好应付捕风捉影的、各怀鬼胎的、唯恐天下不乱的媒体朋友们了吗？\n是时候和他们斗智斗勇了。
E: Press conferences are a specialty of sporting events. You've gotta experience it.\nAre you prepared to face the cunning, plotting, devious, and conniving friends working in the media industry?\nIt's time to have a battle of wits against them.

C: 雪国飘摇寒苦愁，孤拳铁铸赴仙舟。\n古来僻壤生豪勇，天下少年第一流。
E: From snowbound sorrow, by his lonefist to the Xianzhou.\nThe barren land birthed a brave soul, the epitome of young morals.

C:
「明知注定失败的比赛，我也要参加到底吗？」
「那老子问你：注定失败的人生，就不活了吗？」
「可如果这注定是一场徒劳的悲剧，又何必看到结尾呢？」
「因为你是个战士啊，蠢材。」
E:
"Should I still participate in a tournament till the end when I know I'll definitely lose?"
"Then let me ask you: Will you stop living if you know you'll life is doomed to fail?"
"But why should I see the end of this story when it's fated to be a tragedy that I can't change?"
"Because you're a fighter, idiot."

C: 卢卡的幻觉愈发严重，你决定带他去丹鼎司看看医生。\n没想到，你们在这里遇到了丹鼎司的灵砂司鼎，直接看上了司鼎大人的专家门诊。真是幸运。
E: Luka's hallucinations are getting worse. You decide to take him to the Alchemy Commission to see a healer.\nWho'd have thought that you'd run into the Alchemy Commission's Cauldron Master, Lingsha? You are lucky to have the Cauldron Master do a specialist consultation!

C: 为了完成每日课题、角逐最终奖项，你作为摄影助理，陪同三月七踏上了摄影之旅。\n依据摄影灵感进行拍摄吧。
E: To complete the daily tasks and compete for the final prize, you, as a photography assistant, accompanied March 7th on a photography journey.\nTake a photo based on the photography inspiration.

C: 在地宫中，每座房间都被封印把守，而这间受制于「扎格列斯之手」。只有完成它的试炼才能继续前进。
E: Every room in the hypogea is protected by a seal, and this one is controlled by the "Hand of Zagreus." You will need to complete its trial before you can continue any further.

C: 在地宫中，每座房间都被封印把守，而这间受制于「扎格列斯之手」。只有完成它的试炼才能继续前进。
E: Every room in the hypogea is protected by a seal, and this one is controlled by the "Hand of Zagreus." You will need to complete its trial before you can continue any further.

E: Reach the railway platform as quickly as possible

E: Look around the Parlor Car

E: (Optional) Investigate the phonograph

E: Search for traces of civilization in the Snow Plains

E: Look for traces of Wildfire

E: Give the supplies to Natasha

E: Try to find the switch and open the mechanism gate

E: Chase Kafka

E: Find out where the Trailblazer and the others are

C: （可选）与殿中众人交谈
E: (Optional) Talk to others in the hall

E: Find Boss Stone's treasure

C: 在房间中继续寻找出路
E: Continue to search the room for an exit

C: 想办法逃离可疑的空间
E: Find a way to leave this suspicious space

C: 寻找前往大堂的路
E: Find the path to the Lobby

E: Interact with Gulliver's Arch

E: Return to the world of Hanu's Adventure

C: 向漫漫长梦的终点前进
E: Advance towards the end of the long dream

C: （可选）与姬子交谈
E: (Optional) Speak with Himeko

C: 根据「花火妙妙藏宝图」找到炸弹（<unbreak>826</unbreak> / <unbreak>999</unbreak>）
E: Find the bombs based on "Sparkle's Wondrous Treasure Map" (<unbreak>826</unbreak> / <unbreak>999</unbreak>)

C: 和陌生的同学对话
E: Talk with the unfamiliar schoolmate

C: 离开…？
E: Leave...?

C: 跟着这个助蕉，看看他想搞啥花招
E: Follow that Assistanana and see what the fudge he's up to

C: 对停云进行调律
E: Tune Tingyun

C: 去吧！直面「天谴之矛」尼卡多利
E: Go and meet Nikador, Lance of Fury!

C: 收集有关悬锋城的记忆碎片
E: Collect the memory fragments related to Castrum Kremnos

C: 收集有关悬锋城的记忆碎片
E: Collect the memory fragments related to Castrum Kremnos

C: 回私人浴宫好好休息
E: Return to the private bath chamber and rest

C: 向商人了解情况
E: Find out about what's happening from the merchants

C: 击退黑袍剑士
E: Defeat the black-robed swordmaster

C: 找到「番红蕊」，觐见欧洛尼斯
E: Find "saffron" and have an audience with Oronyx

C: 继续跟随缇里西庇俄丝，前往雅努斯宝库
E: Keep following Tribios to the Janus Vault

C: 前往根石之间，寻找那刻夏的实验室
E: Search for Anaxa's lab between the cornerstones

C: 倾听黑塔的自说自话
E: Listen to Herta talking to herself

C: 乘坐浮台，回到云端遗堡的穹顶
E: Ride the platform and return to the domed roof of the Cloudedge Bastion Ruins

C: 前往高处，引诱「盗火行者」前来
E: Go to a high ground and lure the Flame Reaver over

C: 前往创世涡心，完成「再创世」
E: Head to the Vortex of Genesis and complete the "Era Nova"

C: 见证「贼灵」巴特鲁斯盗走火种
E: Witness Spirithief Bartholos stealing the Coreflame

C: 尝试借助命途的力量求援
E: Try to seek help through the power of Paths

C: 重返翁法罗斯
E: Return to Amphoreus

C: 前往客房车厢
E: Head to the Passenger Cabin

E: Continue forward deeper into the Great Tomb

C: 调查奇怪的画框
E: Investigate the strange picture frame

C: 与艾丝妲共商「宓堂传语」
E: Discuss the Letter From Locus Silentii with Asta

C: 收集斥力桥僻处的旧零件
E: Collect the old parts in the crevices of the repulsion bridge

C: 击败怪物，救出帕梅拉
E: Defeat the monster and save Pamela

C: 与维修工程师对话，上报故障记录
E: Talk to the maintenance engineer and report the bug

C: 通过光学身份校验程序
E: Pass the optical identity verification

C: 完成「封锁扇区•难度三」
E: Complete Sealed Sector: Difficulty 3

C: 得到阿兰的协助
E: Get Arlan's assistance

C: 得到阿兰的协助
E: Get Arlan's assistance

C: 与黑塔交谈
E: Talk to Herta

C: 探寻线索
E: Continue searching for clues

C: 寻找犯人的线索
E: Search for clues regarding the culprit

C: 回收「核心模组」
E: Retrieve the Core Modules

C: 与希莉儿交谈
E: Talk to Cyrille

C: 监听诺尔伯特和铁卫的对话
E: Listen to the conversation between Norbert and the Silvermane Guard

C: 与陶德对话，听听陶德想要干什么
E: Talk to Todd and see what he wants to do

C: 与檀檀对话，分析出肇事星槎去向
E: Chat with Tantan and try to deduce the whereabouts of the offending starskiff

C: 启动并继续跟随物流机巧鸟
E: Start up and follow the courier cycrane

C: 前往地衡司公廨，与大毫对话
E: Go to the Realm-Keeping Commission Chancery and speak with Dahao

C: 绕过云骑军，前往下一处见面地点
E: Bypass the Cloud Knights and go to the next meet-up point

C: 与净砚对话，确认她的新发现
E: Talk to Jingyan and confirm her new finding

C: （可选）与队友谈谈，了解现状
E: (Optional) Talk to your teammates and gain an understanding of the situation

C: 拍摄一张铖杰与星槎的合照
E: Take a photo of Chengjie with a starskiff

C: 前往迴星港，帮助雪衣活捉要犯
E: Head to the Stargazer Navalia and help Xueyi capture the criminal

C: 与景元告别
E: Bid farewell to Jing Yuan

C: 寻找幻障迷境的出口
E: Find the exit of the Illusory Maze

C: 赶往花火即将行凶的地点
E: Hurry to the scene of Sparkle's upcoming crime

C: 进入花火藏匿谜题线索的房间
E: Enter the room where Sparkle hid the clues to the puzzle

C: 找到三月七与丹恒
E: Look for March 7th and Dan Heng

C: 与驭空汇合
E: Meet up with Yukong

C: （可选）关心三月七的情况
E: (Optional) Check up on March 7th

C: 见证呼雷的落败
E: Witness Hoolay's defeat

C: 经历柯柯娜的第三份回忆
E: Relive Cocona's third memory

C: 找到第一块拼图
E: Find the first puzzle piece

C: 找到第三块拼图
E: Find the third puzzle piece

C: 和前方的折纸小鸟接触
E: Interact with the Origami Birds before you

C: 营救青雀
E: Rescue Qingque

C: 与帕里斯和天谴猎手交谈
E: Speak with Paris and the Furiae Archer

C: 寻找独处的天谴猎手
E: Go and find the lone Furiae Archer

C: 搜集奇怪的痕迹
E: Collect strange traces

E: Report what you found to Celine

C: 与黑塔交谈
E: Talk to Herta

C: 指挥佩佩，寻找奇物的线索
E: Control Peppy to search for clues about Curios

C: 继续前进，与「管家」对话
E: Move forward and talk to the butler.

C: 完成拼图，实现莫里斯的心愿。
E: Complete the puzzle and fulfill Morris' wish.

C: 前往黄金中央车站寻找波波特。
E: Head to Golden Central Station to look for Popott.

C: 前往黄金中央车站寻找波波特。
E: Head to Golden Central Station to look for Popott.

E: Defeat the emerging Dreamjolt Troupe.

E: Find the arbitrator

E: Speak with the guard to ask for entry

E: Clear this area

E: Place the exhibit at the specified spot

E: Confirm the negotiation materials and speak with Mingxi

E: Speak with Sushang

E: Deliver the goods to the specified location

E: Provide your tea tasting feedback to Boss Du

E: Go to Elegance Pagoda and inquire with Boyang about the situation

C: 向泊阳复命
E: Report back to Boyang

C: 向浮烟探问情报
E: Get information out of Cirrus

C: 前往丹鼎司，寻找发帖人
E: Head to the Alchemy Commission and find the poster

C: 与可疑人物交谈
E: Speak with the suspicious person

C: 为规划中的「进食区」寻找合适区域
E: Find a suitable place to plan out the Dining Area

C: 调整路径，将球笼运送到终点
E: Reroute and transport the Spheroid to its destination

C: 离开错乱的空间，与辛格勒交谈
E: Leave the chaotic space and talk to Singler

C: 前往「惊梦酒吧」
E: Head to the Dreamjolt Hostelry

C: 去吧台取舒翁的特调
E: Go to the lounge counter and get Siobhan's special drink

C: 向引导员了解挑战内容
E: Learn about the challenge from the guide

C: 向引导员了解挑战内容
E: Learn about the challenge from the guide

C: 完成约定的决斗
E: Engage in the promised duel

C: 帮卢卡准备第一场比赛
E: Help Luka plan for the first match

C: 举行新闻发布会
E: Hold the press conference

C: 回到休息室，准备下一场擂台赛
E: Return to the lounge and prepare for the next Faceoff Match

C: 准备最后的战斗
E: Prepare for the final fight

C: 查看完整的记忆
E: Review the complete memory

C: 见证旅程的尽头
E: Witness the end of the journey

C: 完成「枘凿六合•Remake」简单模式II
E: Complete Hexanexus: Remake Easy Mode II

C: 询问现场观众对乐队演出的评价
E: Ask the live audience for their reviews of the band's performance

C: 查看「阮•梅」造物的情况
E: Check on how Ruan Mei's creations are doing

C: 抓拍扑满出现的瞬间
E: Capture the moment the Trotter appears

C: 三月七有话对你说
E: March 7th has something to tell you

C: （可选）与阿波菲斯交谈，定位贼灵
E: (Optional) Speak with Apophis to pinpoint the Spirithief

C: （可选）和周围的人聊聊
E: (Optional) Chat with the people around you

C: 招待下一位客人
E: Welcome the next guest

C: 招待客人
E: Welcome the guests

C: 带驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大练习欧洛尼斯祷言吧！
E: Go practice Oronyx's Prayer with Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas!

C: 与那刻夏对话，完成最终考核
E: Talk to Anaxa to complete the final assessment

C: 带驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大练习欧洛尼斯祷言吧！
E: Go practice Oronyx's Prayer with Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas!

C: 坚韧训练
E: Tenacity Training

C: 灵敏训练
E: Dexterity Training

C: <color=#f29e38ff>力量训练</color>的效率提高#1%
E: Increases <color=#f29e38ff>Strength Training</color> efficiency by #1%

C: 训练额外提高#1点灵敏与感知，进行<color=#f29e38ff>游历后失效</color>
E: Training additionally increases Dexterity and Acuity by #1. This effect is <color=#f29e38ff>lost after performing an Excursion</color>

C: 陈皮果酱
E: Tangerine Peel Jam

C: 高段
E: Culmination

C: 略窥堂奥•高段
E: Gaze into Gnosis: Culmination

C: 请选择本日想要银狼提供的协助
E: Please select the assist you want Silver Wolf to provide you today

C: 通过最终试剑
E: Pass the Final Sword Trial

C: 通过最终试剑
E: Pass the Final Sword Trial

C: 第一次试剑
E: First Sword Trial

C: 六出玉尘
E: Hexaflake of Jade

C: 基础剑法
E: Basic Swordplay

C: 手眼身法
E: Corporeal Maneuver

C: 噢，你不用担心我。我就想试试能不能站稳了～
E: Oh, don't worry about me. I just wanna see if I can stay on my feet this time~

C: 坐稳扶好，等待跃迁完成。
E: Hold on tight and wait for the jump to finish.

C: 雅利洛-Ⅵ之所以会变成这样一颗冰封的星球…和「星核」的影响脱不开关系。
E: There must be an inextricable connection between the Stellaron we're dealing with here, and Jarilo-VI becoming a frozen planet.

C: 记住，「探索」、「了解」、「建立」、「连结」——这是我们每到一个世界都要做的四件事。
E: Remember, there are four things we do when we arrive at a new world: Explore, understand, establish, and connect.

C: …你记得我么？
E: ...Do you remember me?

C: 准时是我的优点。
E: Punctual is my middle name.

C: 联盟和列车过去没什么来往，我们的到来并不一定受到欢迎。但开拓者并不图名利，我们要为仙舟提供力所能及的帮助，尽可能地消弭祸端。
E: The Alliance and the Express haven't had any previous dealings, so our arrival might not receive the warmest welcome. But as Trailblazers, we're not in this for fame or gain — we just need to do everything in our power to assist the Xianzhou and eliminate the source of disaster.

C: 保持住这一本心，贯彻「探索」、「了解」、「建立」、「连结」的开拓之道吧。
E: Always keep that in mind, and don't forget the way of the trailblaze: Explore, understand, establish, and connect.

C: 那位大守护者，可可利亚——她恐怕彻底放弃了践行「存护」的命途。和她相反，你在那场战斗中展现出了坚定不移的「存护」意志。
E: And one particular guardian, Cocolia, abandoned the Path of Preservation altogether. In contrast, you stood your ground and proved your faith in the Amber Lord.

C: 和你聊天总能有所收获。注意休息，旅程很快就要重启了。
E: Likewise. Get some sleep, we'll be heading off again soon.

C: 嘿！银狼，看，是螺丝咕姆！你的老对手！
E: Hey! Silver Wolf! Look! It's Screwllum, your good old opponent.

C: 禁止在研究室外以科员身份对于光锥技术发表评论，禁止在研究室外以任何身份对流光忆庭发表评论。
E: It is forbidden to comment on Light Cone technology as a researcher outside the research laboratory. It is also forbidden to comment on the Garden of Recollection outside the research room under any identity.

C: 啊？！我…我没什么经验！丹恒你来吧！
E: Huh!? Hehe... I—I've never done it before! Dan Heng, you do it!

C: 投射雷达跟踪正常，遥测信号频率偏高！必须维持在平均水平！
E: Projectile radar tracking, normal. Telemetry signal frequency unusually high! Maintain at normal levels!

C: 「人总是要死的，但不是现在。」谢谢，素未相识的好心人。
E: Life is but a path to death, but not today... Thank you, kind stranger.

C: 母星？我的母星？…我不明白您所说的意思。
E: Home planet? My home planet? ...I do not understand what you are saying.

C: 忽然，眼睛一动不动，「<unbreak>0.09</unbreak>分…<unbreak>0.4012</unbreak>分…<unbreak>0.7007</unbreak>分…」。它沉浸在数据的海洋，不断推翻、重置，仿佛时间已然停滞成了永恒。
E: Suddenly, the eye stops moving. "<unbreak>0.09</unbreak> points... <unbreak>0.4012</unbreak> points... <unbreak>0.7007</unbreak> points..." It drowns in a sea of data, constantly updating and reset, as if time was frozen, locked in perpetuity.

C: 或许世间因果也是如此，选择众多，结局却只有一种。但你相信，偶然寓于必然之中，终有一日，你会找到命定之外的解答。
E: Perhaps this is how causality works. We have thousands of choices, but there is only one outcome. And yet, you believe that happenstances are etched in inevitability. One day, you'll find the answer beyond your guaranteed destiny.

C: 趴着吧您嘞！看见没，这就是挑衅本姑娘的下场！
E: Gotcha! See, that's what you get for annoying me!

C: 时间差不多，我等的人应该快到了。
E: It's almost time. She should be arriving any moment now.

C: 是啊，你好好考虑一下。
E: Yes, give it some good thought.

C: 空间站的站长是艾丝妲，严格来说她才是主人。我拒绝「拥有」这个概念，因为我不想负任何责任。
E: Asta's the lead researcher of the space station, so for all intents and purposes, she's the master. I reject the concept of ownership because I don't want the responsibilities that come with it.

C: 黑塔女士给了我代码——据说是她在来的路上写的，我刚刚试了下，防护罩的修复速度比之前快了三倍。
E: Madam Herta gave me a piece of code, which she apparently wrote on the way here. I just tried it out and the defense shield's regenerating three times faster than before.

C: 「开拓」往往意味着「未知」，无论是未知的风险，还是未知的乐趣。
E: Trailblazing implies the unknown, be it unknown risks or unknown rewards.

C: 我明白。
E: I understand.

C: 哈哈，早就打点完了。我已经来过这儿好多回了，对我来说，这本来只是一场普通的旅途而已。
E: Haha, I was ready ages ago. *sigh* I've been here so many times before, it should've been just an ordinary trip for me.

C: 经过慎重考虑，你决定谢绝姬子的邀请。汽笛嗡鸣，星穹列车即将启航，萍水相逢的友人们向你挥手致意。离别正如相遇一般突然而坚定。
E: After careful deliberation, you decide to decline Himeko's invitation. With a long whistle, the Astral Express prepares to go ahead on its journey. The friends you just made wave goodbye to you, and your farewell is as sudden and final as your meeting.

C: 哎呀，是有点抽象，但是你用心理解一下就好啦。
E: Well, it is a little abstract, but basically you just need to pinpoint what's bothering you.

C: 心理暗示哪里不好！能消除担心和不安，就是好方法。
E: That doesn't mean it won't work! The best method for relieving anxiety is the one that works, right?

C: 目前有一种较为主流的观点认为，是「星核」催生了「裂界」。
E: The mainstream school of thought is that Stellarons catalyzed the appearance of Fragmentums.

C: 你很确定墙上某些照片的拍摄现场没有照相机。
E: You're pretty sure some of the pictures on this wall have been captured without a camera.

C: {RUBY_B#星神}克里珀{RUBY_E#}是「存护」的象征。筑城者们在祂的感召下建立起了贝洛伯格，从天灾和寒潮之中保护了文明的火种。
E: {RUBY_B#Aeon}Qlipoth{RUBY_E#} is the symbol of Preservation. Under Qlipoth's impulsion, the Architects constructed Belobog, thus protecting the spark of civilization from disaster and the Eternal Freeze.

C: 不必感到拘束，守护者大人并不在意那些繁文缛节。何况你们初来乍到，不熟悉贝洛伯格的礼数也再正常不过。
E: Rest easy, the Madam Guardian doesn't care about formalities. Not to mention, you've only just arrived, it would be unexpected if you were familiar with Belobog customs.

C: 星核？
E: A Stellaron?

C: 对，我们可是很厉害的！
E: Yeah! FYI, we're pretty awesome.

C: 看啊，是杰帕德大人回来了！
E: Look, Captain Gepard's back!

C: 我们是盟友…世代陪伴守护者的盟友。
E: We are allies... allies of the guardians through generations.

C: 桑博不见了——
E: Where's Sampo...

C: 这八成是销毁莎草纸的醋呢。就是那种，呃…如果强行打开，就会自动销毁文件的小机关。
E: It is probably some kind of vinegar that is used to dissolve papyrus. It's sorta like those kinds of mechanisms where the file would be automatically destroyed if it were forcibly opened.

C: 在上次那件事之后，我请了个长假。我觉得自己需要别的事转移一下注意力。
E: After that incident last time, I took a long vacation. I feel like I need to switch my mind to something else.

C: 祖先没留下打开盒子的钥匙吗？
E: Don't they leave a key as well?

C: 对啊，佩拉！我怎么把她忘了呢——她不就是情报专家嘛！
E: You are right, Pela! How could I forget. She's an intelligence expert!

C: …希露瓦。
E: ...Serval.

C: 不听姐姐言…
E: Your sister knows what's up...

C: 不是很好…但布洛妮娅大人坚持要尽快完成宣讲，给城中的人民一个交代。
E: Not really... But Lady Bronya insisted on delivering the speech as soon as possible. She wants the people to understand what happened.

C: 布洛妮娅•兰德大人的上任宣讲即将开始——请各位市民保持安静，协助维持现场秩序！
E: Citizens of Belobog, I kindly ask for your attention! Lady Bronya Rand's inaugural address will begin shortly. Please remain orderly!

C: 领袖论迹不论心。
E: It's what you do as a leader that matters.

C: 「在旅途的尽头，所有困扰你的谜题都将会解开。」
E: "At the end of your journey, all that perplexes you and troubles you will resolve."

C: 封锁的这十几年里，我的精神没有一秒不处于紧绷的状态。倘若我有丝毫松懈，「地火」的根基就有可能动摇…下层区就有可能陷入万劫不复的境地。
E: I haven't been able to sit back once over the past ten years — a moment's negligence could have brought Wildfire crashing down... and the Underworld would've been beyond saving.

C: 你在现场吗？我没看到你。
E: Were you there? I don't think I saw you.

C: 不愧是见过大世面的人，真大方！弄得我怪不好意思的……
E: Well, you're clearly better traveled than I am, and I know how generous you are... I feel embarrassed to ask now...

C: 你应该知道，姐姐曾经是银鬃铁卫技术部的研究组长之一——「星核」是她的主攻课题。
E: As you know, my sister used to be one of the research team leads in the Silvermane Guards Technology Division. Stellarons were her main area of research.

C: 是的，但……
E: That's true, but...

C: 什么？
E: Huh?

C: 可可利亚也喜欢摇滚吗？
E: Did Cocolia like rock 'n' roll too?

C: 哈哈，那可是我亲生弟弟啊，怎么会舍得扔下他一个人走呢？不过…我也别无选择就是了。
E: Haha, he's my little brother, of course I don't want to leave him alone. But... I don't have any other choice.

C: 这只是一次路边野餐，在贝洛伯格郊外的某条小路上，地鼠们却在好奇着安东会不会回去。
E: For the humans, it was nothing more than a roadside picnic somewhere in the Belobog's suburbia. However, the gophers are stuck wondering if Anton will ever return.

C: 组织内部会互相掩护，帮助成员在周末（甚至工作日）逃离家庭或公司，享受完全由自己主宰的一天。该组织称之为「伸张正当权益」。
E: Members of the organization cover for one another and help each other get away from family or work on weekends (and even weekdays) in the pursuit of individual freedom. They call it "upholding our rightful rights."

C: 这扇铁门仿佛隐藏着全宇宙最重大的秘密。
E: This iron gate looks like it's concealing the biggest secret in the universe.

C: 垃圾桶里躺着一张皱巴巴的手写传单，上面的字迹隐约可辨：
E: A wrinkled handwritten flyer is lying in the trashcan. You can just make out the following:

C: 上面写着：「今天是守护者阿丽萨的生日，收到这封信的人必须在一天内将此信转寄给三个人，否则一年霉运缠身。」
E: It reads: "Today is Guardian Alisa's birthday. The recipient of this letter must forward it to three other people within a day, or bad luck will follow them for a whole year."

C: 桑博到底是什么人？
E: Who is this Sampo anyway?

C: 丹恒说得对，不能放着不管。
E: Dan Heng's right, we can't ignore this.

C: 你说克拉拉？不用在意，那丫头似乎跟史瓦罗关系很好，总是跟在他身后。史瓦罗不会伤害她的。
E: Clara? Don't worry about her. That girl is best pals with Svarog — she's always following behind him. He wouldn't harm her.

C: 喂，你们还要说悄悄话到什么时候啊！鼹鼠党的时间可是很宝贵的！
E: Hey, are you done with your secret talk!? The Moles' time is precious!

C: 我又不是杠精。
E: I don't try to disagree.

C: 正好，这里没有旁人…我能问你些事吗？
E: Actually, seeing as there's no one around... can I ask you some things?

C: 帮我让守护者大人改变主意？她不是那么容易回心转意的人，这点没人比我清楚。
E: Help me change the mind of the Madam Guardian? Not easy. Nobody knows that better than I do.

C: 等等，布洛妮娅呢？
E: Hold on. What about Bronya?

C: 自从来到磐岩镇以后，老爹的工作就更辛苦了，每天都要很晚才回家。所以，虎克不想再用老爹给的零花钱买礼物了！
E: Daddy's job has been more difficult since moving to Boulder Town. He gets home really late every day. I don't want to use his hard-earned money to buy a gift!

C: 想骗我帮你打白工？
E: Are you trying to trick me into free labor?

C: 你要的盔甲。
E: Here's your armor.

C: 哎，你既然帮了我的忙，我就直接告诉你吧——我打算找个拳手，让他打扮成怪物的样子上擂台打拳。
E: Hey, since you helped me, I'll let you in on my plan. I'm going to have a boxer dress up as a monster to fight in the ring.

C: 我史考特也不是黑心老板，看在你确实帮了我个忙，而且也有点实力的份上，我额外送你个「特殊礼遇」。
E: Scott is no cruel boss, you know. Since you've really helped me, and proven yourself capable, I'll give you a little extra "house special."

C: 医生还没说话呢…不过，你这一身情况确实不能回去。
E: The doc hasn't spoken yet... and you really can't go back like this.

C: （给诊所寄送物资的好心人就是科鲁泽？）
E: (So Kluzer is the anonymous donor who sent supplies to the clinic?)

C: 他应该在家休养。
E: He should just take a break.

C: 哈哈，欢迎我们的贵宾——{NICKNAME}！您准备好参加下一场比赛了吗？
E: Haha, welcome our guest of honor— {NICKNAME}! Are you ready for your next game?

C: 我去，我去，我去！赛场上的场面已经彻底失控了！「灰背鲸」竟然在关键时刻掉了链子，在这最后关头将冠军的宝座拱手相让——
E: Oh gosh oh gosh oh gosh! The battlefield is completely out of control! The Grayback Whale lost it at the very last moment and kissed the championship a regretful goodbye—

C: 看，诊所附近聚集了好多人呀！
E: Look! There's a big crowd around the clinic.

C: 啊——他们回来了！
E: Oh! It's them!

C: 很期待人们的表情。
E: I can't wait to see their faces.

C: 哎哟，我这老腰…刚才睡得正香呢，怎么突然就……
E: Argh, my back... I was having such a great nap, how did I...

C: 你、你没受伤吧，哥们？我、我还是带你去娜、娜塔莎医生那儿看看吧……
E: A—Are you okay, bro? L—Let me take you to N—Natasha's clinic...

C: 刚才那是什么动静？
E: What was that shaking just now?

C: 我们走。
E: I'm ready.

C: 弟弟年纪还小，要他一个人在下层区生活下去…唉，我想都不敢想。
E: My brother is too young to survive in the Underworld. To think he might have to live on his own ...

C: 你看见一间简陋的居室：一条起皱泛黄的铺盖，麻袋做成的枕头，两瓶已开封的面包味汽水，一双矿工靴，一本书，书页已经烂了，你看不清上面写了什么。以及，一把小刀。
E: You see a shabby room with a set of wrinkled yellowish bedding, a pillow made from a gunny sack, two opened bread-flavor soda, a pair of miner's boots, a torn out book whose words can no longer be distinguished, as well as a knife.

C: 星际和平公司与仙舟联盟再次重新签署互惠贸易协定，利好双边经济。
E: The IPC and the Xianzhou Alliance have renewed their trade agreement, bringing great economic benefits to both parties.

C: 著名歌者知更鸟受邀莅临匹诺康尼谐乐大典献唱颂歌。
E: Renowned songstress, Robin, has received an invitation to perform at Penacony's Charmony Festival.

C: 据信，此次庆典中，知更鸟将以「家族」名义为「同谐」星神唱响颂歌，揭开大典的序幕。
E: It is believed that during the celebrations, Robin will sing a hymn for the Aeon of the Harmony in the name of The Family.

C: 该世界毁于反物质军团的入侵，但在公司与忆庭的通力合作下，对该世界的信息提取工作于近日宣告完成。按照忆者们的规划，它将在「记忆」的净土中得到重生。
E: Moonshield was destroyed during an invasion by the Antimatter Legion, but with the combined efforts of the IPC and the Garden of Remembrance, the collection of information about the fallen world was recently declared a success. The Memokeepers plan for it to be reborn in the pristine land of the Remembrance.

C: 仙舟联盟：罗浮将举行演武仪典，邀请众多友好世界的宾客前往观礼。
E: The Xianzhou Luofu is set to conduct a Wardance ceremony, welcoming attendees from numerous allied worlds to observe.

C: 谈不上狡猾吧，她的考虑都以利己为第一出发点。
E: That might be a little harsh, but she does put her own interests first.

C: 咱们又没做亏心事，对什么供词呀！
E: Ugh... But we haven't done anything wrong!

C: …{NICKNAME}，你认为呢？
E: ...{NICKNAME}, what do you think?

C: 他说这是仙舟内部事务，不容其他势力插手。理由确实站得住脚。
E: He says he doesn't want outsiders getting involved in the Xianzhou's internal affairs, which is understandable.

C: 啊，我、我可不是在说驭空大人的坏话……
E: Ah! I—I mean... not that Madam Yukong doesn't have her merits, hehe...

C: 没事的，很快就会好起来的。等解封了请你吃饭。
E: It's all right, it will get better very soon. I'll treat you to a meal when the lockdown is lifted.

C: 您好，我受命把守此处的进出。您可以换走别的路。
E: Hello, I've been assigned to guard the entrance here. You can take another route.

C: 唉，在贝洛伯格被追得上奔下跑，连喘口气的功夫都没有。这次到了仙舟上，时间倒是一大把，都花在等待上了。
E: *sigh* We've gone from being chased through every street in Belobog, to waiting on every corner in the Xianzhou.

C: 杨叔，现在是办正事的时候吧！
E: Mr. Yang! Is this really the best time?

C: 你不像仙舟人，从哪儿来的？
E: You don't seem like you're from the Xianzhou. Where have you come from?

C: 咳，这什么宝贝？它能干嘛，扑上去咬紧卡芙卡不放么？
E: Uh, ahem, I mean... what can he do exactly? Are we gonna set him loose on Kafka?

C: 不妨以我的香水味作为目标，各位拿「谛听」来试试身手吧。
E: Tell Diting to follow the scent of my perfume and see what he can do!

C: 咱店里全是贵重物品…
E: My store is full of treasures...

C: 虽然迴星港停转了，但警铃倒是没有停摆……她是怎么闯过这里的呢？
E: Stargazer Navalia may have come to a standstill, but the alarms are operational... How did she get through here?

C: 「仙人快乐茶」？！
E: "Immortal's Delight"!?

C: 比起害怕死亡，仙舟人对「不死」的恐惧反而更深呢。
E: Xianzhou natives are more afraid of immortality than they are of the days coming to an end.

C: 本座会竭力维持神智，剩下的便靠你们了。
E: I'll focus on keeping my sanity. The rest is up to you.
...Huh?

C: 罗浮之危机就算与星核无关，以我的个性也不会坐视不理。但我一人的意愿，并不能代表星穹列车。
E: Even if the crisis on the Luofu had nothing to do with the Stellaron, I would be willing to help... but I can't speak for the other members of my crew.

C: 水底竟有这么多建筑…难怪典籍记载鳞渊境曾是持明龙宫的所在。
E: The annals mention that Scalegorge Waterscape was once the location of Dragon Palace. Small wonder — look at all these submerged structures...

C: 还撑得住。
E: I'm still alive.

C: 停云小姐留下的东西总算有了各自的去处。
E: The things Miss Tingyun left behind have finally found their homes.

C: 在这一次灾难中，有数不清的云骑殉职或堕入魔阴身。因果殿来不及收纳彼等生平，他们便逝去了。
E: Countless Cloud Knights lost their lives or became mara-struck during the crisis. The Hall of Karma couldn't take them all in, and so they passed away.

C: 你们向梦茗简单讲述了停云一事的经过……
E: You tell Mengming about what happened to Tingyun...

C: 我想，若是能让停云再次飞起来，她应该会很高兴。
E: For her to be able to take wing once again... would make her very happy.

C: 多谢将军的厚意。
E: Thank you for your generosity, General.

C: 看着这些星槎，它们飞离玉界门的瞬间，有种不真实的梦幻感。这些船会花上多久，飞向哪一颗星星呢？
E: There's a dreamlike quality to watching these starskiffs depart through the Jade Gate. How long will these ships sail, and which stars are they traveling to?

C: 你们…这就要走了嘛？
E: So soon?

C: 既然你出现在这里，说明事情都已经顺利解决了吧。
E: The fact you're standing here right now must mean things are pretty much taken care of?

C: 放松之余，也别忘了帕姆的请求——列车长为我们做了许多，现在是时候回报它了。
E: Rest and recuperation aside, don't forget Pom-Pom's request. The conductor has done plenty for us, and it's time to return that favor.

C: 你是酒店的服务生？
E: Do you work at this hotel?

C: 别停下，别回头，别往下看，也别往上看。
E: Don't stop, don't turn back, don't look down. Or up, for that matter.

C: 因为你一路上都睡得死死的，没机会和你说嘛。
E: That's because you were zonked out the whole ride. No one had the chance to tell you.

C: 暂时，我不认为这封邀请函真的和钟表匠有关，他的遗产…更像是一种引人耳目的说辞。
E: For now, I do not think this invite is linked to the Watchmaker. His legacy... It sounds more like a marketing hook to drum up more traffic, if nothing else.

C: 先聊到这吧。
E: That's enough chit-chat for now.

C: 和声响起。「吸气。」{RUBY_B#他们}它们{RUBY_E#}歌唱。「呼气。」{RUBY_B#她们}它们{RUBY_E#}歌唱。本能令你照做，你感到胸腔中凝滞的流体重新流动。
E: The choir starts. "Inhale." They sing. "Now Exhale." They chant. Instinct compels, and the stagnant fluid in your chest begins to flow again.

C: 沿着这条路走就能到客房区了。
E: Our rooms are down this way.

C: 如果我没猜错，您是第一次来到匹诺康尼，对吗？
E: If I'm not mistaken, this is your first visit to Penacony, isn't it?

C: 不，您是！
E: It is!

C: …我承认。
E: ...Yes, I plead guilty.

C: 当然有。
E: Of course there is.

C: 这跟阿基维利有半点关系？
E: What do all these have to do with Akivili?

C: 而在一纪一度的谐乐大典上，家族成员会在剧院中齐聚，恭迎{RUBY_B#「同谐」的化身}「齐响诗班」{RUBY_E#}降临，为匹诺康尼带来恒久安宁的祝福。
E: During the once-in-an-era Charmony Festival, Family members will gather at the theater to welcome the {RUBY_B#Embodiment of Harmony}Harmonious Choir{RUBY_E#} that blesses Penacony with everlasting peace.

C: 两人不约而同地看向你——准确地说是三人——也包括了屏幕里那正抖动不已的大鼻子墨镜酷哥。
E: The two almost synchronously turn their gaze towards you. Or perhaps more precisely, it was three of them — including the guy with a trembling oversized nose and sunglasses on the screen.

C: 你深呼吸，闭眼，鼓起极大的勇气，怀抱着足足有三个感叹号那样沉重的决心，将手伸向了面前这台可疑的电视……
E: You take a deep breath, close your eyes, muster great courage, and with a resolve as weighty as three exclamation marks, you reach out to the suspicious screen before you...

C: 我想再带你去个地方，可以吗？这次不是什么旅游景点，恰恰相反…大概算是我的「秘密据点」。
E: Can I bring you to one more place? It isn't another tourist attraction — it's my very own secret base.

C: 「同谐」包容所有的人，也包括那些远道而来的漂泊者。家族接纳他们，但他们…终究不属于这里。
E: The Harmony accepts everyone, including wanderers from afar. The Family takes them in, but they... don't belong here.

C: 两位，劳驾。前方是施工重地，闲人免进。
E: Excuse me, there's a construction site ahead. Unauthorized personnel are not allowed in.

C: 我来吧。
E: Let me try.

C: （空间竟然连在一起了…？！）
E: (Different points in space are... linked together!?)

C: （我回到酒店了？不对，感觉…氛围有点像刚入梦时的风景……）
E: (I'm back at the hotel? No, this feeling... The surroundings look a little like I just entered a dream...)

C: 我不敢肯定，这个发现太突然了。但无论如何，家族一定隐瞒了什么，关于梦境的真相……
E: I'm not sure. Everything happened so quickly. But regardless, The Family must be hiding something — something about the truth of the Dreamscape...

C: 滴答…滴答…
E: Tick tock... Tick tock...

C: 你们看着黄泉转身走去。你记得，她正是在那里化成了泡影。
E: You watch as Acheron turns away. You remember that it was there that she dissolved into a mere illusion.

C: 我承认和那位先生做了交易，把你带到他的身边。但…这里同样是安全的地方。
E: I admit I'd made a transaction with that gentleman to bring you before him. But... this is also a safe place.

C: 既然如此——
E: If that's the case—

C: 这里也不是案发地，我为你展现的是一段「记忆」——最简单的光锥呈现技术，忆庭授权，公司所有。
E: This is not where the crime happened. What I showed to you was a "memory" — the most basic Light Cone manifesting tech, authorized by the Garden of Recollection and owned by the IPC.

C: …「我的时候」？
E: ..."My time"?

C: 与此同时，另一边……
E: At this moment, on the other side...

C: 砂金却在提防黄泉。
E: Aventurine is on guard against Acheron.

C: 不过，前来赴约的泯灭帮失去音讯一事，我向留守列车的丹恒求证了…不是砂金凭空编造。
E: However, I asked Dan Heng back on the Express to confirm that story about the Annihilation Gang and the lost messages... It wasn't something that Aventurine made up out of thin air.

C: 可这不是你去找卡提卡人硬碰硬的理由，他们嗜血、残忍，贪得无厌——别忘了爸爸妈妈……
E: But that's no reason to push your luck by going up against those... those bloodthirsty, CRUEL Katicans! Have you forgotten how Mom and Dad...!

C: 将「格列佛拱门」置入插槽。
E: Insert Gulliver's Arch into the slot.

C: 教授，你变得好高！我竟然来到了沙盒里，还变得这么小……
E: Doctor... you're huge! It's me! Down here in the sandpit!
You...

C: 废话！梦主来了也不能……
E: Did you not hear me? Even if the Dreammaster was here...

C: 但我的子弹马上就会找到你了——在那之前，你最好赶紧在匹诺康尼找个棺材铺，让老板留一副质量好的给自己，冒牌货。
E: My bullets will find you — until then, you best find a casket store on Penacony, and ask the owner to reserve a good quality casket for you, imposter!

C: 我是流光忆庭的忆者。
E: I'm the Garden of Recollection's Memokeeper.

C: 嚯！不错，我就喜欢这种硬茬。你是那个冒牌货的保镖？还是别的什么人？算了，无所谓。我也会留一发子弹给你的，洗干净脑门等着吧。
E: Heh! Not bad. This is the kind of tough challenge I like. Are you that imposter's bodyguard? Never mind. It's fine. I'll leave a round for you, so get that forehead clean and wait for me!

C: 行吧。别硬撑着，有需要就来找我们猎犬。
E: Alright then. If you ever need help, don't hesitate to reach out to us Hounds.

C: …确实很有趣。谢谢你。
E: ...Yeah, very funny indeed. Thank you.

C: 确实帅。
E: She's cool, indeed.

C: 哈哈，这个比喻巧妙。
E: Haha, that's a clever metaphor.

C: …你就这么喜欢钟表小子嘛！那只是个动画形象啦，又不是本人！
E: ...You're really into Clockie, huh? He's just a fictional character, not a real person!

C: 看来朝露公馆的工作人员被分配了其他任务…并且这事早在知更鸟死前就开始了。
E: Seems like the mansion's entire workforce were assigned other tasks... before Robin's death.

C: …这里依然没有人。
E: ...No one here either.

C: 呵，「同谐」？别傻了，我们又不是第一次见面，不用这么见外吧？
E: Heh, the Harmony? Don't play the fool — it's not the first time we've met. No need to be so polite.
— Ugh!

C: 深不见底，就和匹诺康尼一样，对吧？
E: Only on Penacony, am I right?

C: 「基石的色泽和克里珀圣体的光芒如出一辙」…亏你能编出这种荒唐的借口。但凡他多长个心眼，你的谎言便一触即溃。
E: "The cornerstone's hue is the same as the radiance of Qlipoth's body"... I've got to give it to you, I've heard a lot of baloney, but that lie deserves a prize for sheer nerve. If he were just a little bit smarter, the jig would've been up right there.

C: 你确实勾起了我的兴趣…我承认你身上还有些我不完全了解的地方。
E: You've piqued my interest... I'll admit that there are still aspects of you that I don't completely understand.

C: 不错，你是喜欢铤而走险…却偏偏不肯放下某些多余的东西。就算在这片美梦中，你也只敢在自己身上尝试*死亡*。
E: That's right. You love the thrill of danger... but you refuse to let go of meaningless sentiments. Even in this beautiful dream, the only thing you "dare" allow yourself is death.

C: 「最后，他表示：『存护的巨锤必将为所有生命落下，无论生死，无论种族，无论思想，以捍卫我等与生具有之基本权利』……」
E: "Finally, he proclaims: 'The hammer of Preservation will fall for all beings, regardless of life or death, regardless of race, regardless of ideology, to uphold the basic rights we inherently possess.'"

C: 如此一来，星穹列车在他的计划中处于什么位置就至关重要了。最坏的情况下…他可能会利用我们做些出格的事。
E: In that sense, the Astral Express' role in his plans would be imperative. In the worst case scenario... he may use us to do something unexpected.

C: 你不会是有心理阴影了吧…放轻松，没事的。
E: Your trauma isn't getting to you, is it... Take it easy. It'll be fine.

C: 是你…你做了什么？
E: It's you... what have you done?

C: 回忆逐渐浮现，时间倒流至几分钟前：砂金发动最后的攻势，闪闪发光的筹码雨倾盆而下，黄泉紧接着拔刀，然后，*砰*——
E: Memories gradually resurface as time rewinds to a few minutes ago: Aventurine unleashes the final assault, pouring down a dazzling shower of chips, followed closely by Acheron drawing her blade, and then, *crash*—

C: 你很幽默，治安官先生。希望这份幽默感已经帮助你找到了连环杀人案的凶手。
E: You're so funny, Mr. Security Officer. I hope that sense of humor of yours has helped you find the serial killer.

C: 我欣赏你。但所以呢？这就能证明是我杀了你的妹妹和那位偷渡犯吗？
E: Admirable. But so what? Can this prove that I murdered your sister and that stowaway?

C: 那个冒充巡海游侠的人…是谁？
E: That Galaxy Ranger imposter... Who is it?

C: 家族需要给出一个合理的解释，否则我会立即带上爱人返回现实。如果梦境不再是乐园，继续留在这里也没有意义。
E: The Family needs to provide a reasonable explanation, or I'll take my loved ones and return to reality. I thought the Dreamscape was supposed to be a paradise. If it's not, then there's no point staying here.

C: 怪不得。我听说公司员工被禁止进入梦境，原来这才是主因。那个闹事的混蛋呢，有被抓住吗？
E: No wonder. So this is the main reason why the IPC staff are banned from entering the Dreamscape. Did they apprehend the troublemaker in the end?

C: 那就是你的下一站。
E: That's your next stop.

C: 梦想之地，匹诺康尼。
E: Land of the Dreams, Penacony.

C: 咦，是先前的客人，我们又见面了！还有位新朋友…忘、忘记自我介绍了，我是酒店门童米沙。
E: Ah? You're the guest from before. We meet again! And a new friend... F—Forgot to introduce myself, I'm the hotel's bellboy, Misha.

C: 瓦尔特先生看得见它？
E: Mr. Yang, you can see him?

C: 重要的客人？难道就是……
E: An important guest? Who could it be...?

C: 那真的是…知更鸟小姐！
E: It really is her... Miss Robin!

C: 哼，开心吗？
E: Yeah, happy about that?

C: 我猜，家族恰好掌握着封印星核的知识？
E: And I suppose The Family happened to possess the knowledge to seal the Stellaron?

C: 如果你要把星核当做遗产，我也没意见。
E: If you want to consider the Stellaron as the legacy, I'm totally fine with that.

C: 不过…无所谓！咱们匹诺康尼的大剧院可比月亮亮堂多了…好看！养眼！
E: But... it's no big deal! The Grand Theater here looks much better than the moon back home... It's just... magnificent!

C: 为什么？还能为什么…老家日子太苦，活得连个人样都没了。
E: Why? Can't you see...? Life back home is miserable... It's not really living at all.

C: 所以…你要永远活在这片梦境里了，对吗？
E: So... you'll be living forever in this Dreamscape, right?

C: 怪了…难不成那忆者买不起？
E: That's strange... could it be that the Memokeeper couldn't afford it?

C: 顺便一提，本关的最高记录由一位红发选手创造！他击败全部三座舞台上的敌人，竟然只用时——5分钟！
E: It's worth mentioning that the fastest time for this stage was achieved by a contestant with fiery red hair. Astoundingly, he overcame all enemies across the three stages in only five minutes!

C: 哼？哼。
E: Hmph? Hmph.

C: 在美梦小镇，钟表小子可是无处不在、无所不能的！比如…我现在可以担任你的翻译，滴答！
E: In Dreamville, Clockie is everywhere and can do anything! Like... right now, I can be your translator, tick-tock!

C: 不客气，身为美梦小镇的守护者，这是我应该做的！
E: No problem at all! As the guardian of Dreamville, it's what I'm here for! Tick-tock!

C: 好了，让我们说回正题吧。既然相聚于此，想必两位也一定是为了争夺海选冠军而来，对吧？
E: Okay, let's get back to business. Since fate has brought us together, it stands to reason that you both seek the accolade of the audition's victor, correct?

C: 没错，这座富丽堂皇的美梦就建立在星核和无数人的牺牲之上。
E: That's right. This magnificent dream is built upon the Stellaron and the countless sacrifices of many people.

C: 只有「诚挚祝贺」？我星琼呢？
E: All I get are "sincere congratulations"? Where are my Stellar Jades?

C: 你想和我们谈条件？
E: You want to talk terms with us?

C: 但最后你们还是找到了我。言归正传，各位寻到这儿，想来一定也很关心「『钟表匠』的遗产」究竟是什么，我的猎犬应该提到了星核，还有大亨的财富……
E: But in the end, you've found me. I'm sure you're all wondering what my legacy is. I believe my hound has mentioned the Stellaron and my wealth...

C: 你、你怎么怂了？！咱们连「毁灭」的绝灭大君都收拾过了，区区「秩序」肯定也不在话下！
E: A—Are you backing out now!? We've even dealt with a Lord Ravager of the Destruction, so a follower of the Order won't be a big deal!

C: 如果现在死去，我就只是一件「兵器」。但我想…我应该要以一个「人」的身份死去。
E: If I were to die now, I would only be a weapon. I believe... I should die as a human.

C: 你不会是要用「结盟玉兆」吧！
E: Hold on, are you thinking of using the Jade Abacus of Allying Oath?

C: 这也在您的设计之中么？
E: Is this part of your plan?

C: 这人偶好像没反应诶…你是不是弄错了？
E: This puppet isn't responding at all... Did something go wrong?

C: 噫…本、本姑娘对这种场合有点过敏，我还是先回房间打包行李好了。
E: ...I'm a kind of allergic to those types of situations. I think I'll just head back to my room and start packing.

C: 你也来，快和我一起祈祷！希望这次旅行平安无事，希望这次旅行平安无事，希望这次旅行平安无事……
E: Come on, start praying with me! ! Please let this trip be uneventful. Please let this trip be uneventful. Please let this trip be uneventful...

C: 还记得我们初入梦境酒店时，我向你的伙伴分别索取了几样饰品么？它们的功能是类似的。
E: Remember when we entered the hotel in the Dreamscape for the first time, and I procured a few trinkets from your companions? Their functions are similar.

C: 别说谜语啦！
E: Stop speaking in riddles!

C: 江户星四票，弃权一票……
E: Four votes for Edo Star, one vote abstained...

C: 主演
E: Starring

C: 我们真的要把它关在笼子里吗？我希望它能自由地在天空飞翔。
E: Are we going to lock it up in a cage? I want to see it fly freely in the sky.

C: 你会一起来吗？
E: Will you come with us?

C: 很高兴再次听见你的声音，恭喜你成为这场盛会…最大的幕后赢家。
E: It's a pleasure to hear your voice again. Congratulations, you've become the... biggest winner of this festival.

C: 是一艘巨大的空中飞艇，可厉害了！听说它从来不在公众前露面，只有家族的贵客才有资格登上船首，一览匹诺康尼的美丽风光。
E: It's a massive airship, and it's awesome! I heard it's never shown to the public. Only VIP guests of The Family get to board it and enjoy the breathtaking views of Penacony.

C: 你问过这个问题的，在我们刚来到这里的时候。
E: You already asked that when we first got here.

C: 翡翠女士，好久不见。能有机会和您合作，我非常荣幸。
E: It's been a while, Madam Jade. I'm honored to have the opportunity to work with you.

C: 星穹列车打算什么时候离开匹诺康尼？
E: When will the Astral Express leave Penacony?

C: 恐怖袭击？！
E: Could it be a terrorist attack!?

C: 你是不是见谁都一顿夸，砂金？
E: Do you always compliment everyone you meet, Aventurine?

C: …你也会变身吗？
E: ...Are you also able to transform yourself?

C: 我没能通过此次「纯美」的历练，花了许多时间为自己的动摇自省。但愿伊德莉拉还愿为我作旌旗，砥砺我「纯美」的决心。
E: I didn't pass the trial of Beauty this time, spending much time in self-reflection over my own hesitation. Yet I wish for Idrila to remain my beacon, a banner for me to strengthen my determination for the Beauty.

C: 这很重要吗？我甚至不是一颗真正的炸弹！
E: Is it really that important? I'm not even a real bomb!

C: …仪式准备好了。竖起耳朵吧，仔细聆听那最古老、最原始、他宝贝的人类刻入基因的战栗——
E: ...The ritual is ready. Perk up your ears and listen closely to the most ancient, primal fear etched into the very fudgin' genes of humanity—

C: 你的心愿，一直有人记着。
E: Your wishes will always be remembered by someone.

C: 结果到头来，我们仍未知晓他的真身，甚至无法分辨他是不是一个「活生生的人」。
E: In the end, we still failed to figure out his true identity, or if he was even a "living person."

C: 想回到过去的愿望。
E: The wish to return to the past.

C: …或者，各位也可以听听我的提议。
E: ...Or, perhaps you might consider a suggestion.

C: 是、是你？！你怎么会从我的房间里……
E: I—It's you? Why were you just in my room...

C: 一个难以从外部被观测到，只能被忆庭之镜照映出来的世界……
E: A world hidden away from outside observation, its presence only revealed by the light from the mirror of the Garden of Recollection...

C: 与米哈伊尔道别
E: Bid farewell to Mikhail

C: 我们不会还在梦里吧…
E: Are we all still in a dream?

C: 匹诺康尼还有猴子？
E: There are monkeys in Penacony!?

C: 蕉蕉蕉蕉~
E: Ba na na na~

C: 蕉蕉？
E: Bana?

C: 蕉蕉！蕉蕉蕉！
E: Bana! Bana bana!

C: 小东西长得挺别致。
E: It sure looks unique.

C: 那位家族成员的反应有些奇怪，就像是突然改变了想法。
