E: That Family Member's reaction was strange. It's as if she suddenly changed her mind.

C: 嗯…感觉不太好。
E: Hm... This doesn't look right.

C: 那也不用把我弄坏合成机的事也写进去吧…
E: But why did she have to mention that I broke the Synthesizer...

C: 我买，给我来一只吧！
E: I'll buy it. Give me one!

C: 过于夸张的
E: Overdramatic stuff.

C: 这可说不好，你看上去多可爱呀。
E: Well, you never know! You look really cute, after all!

C: 你不说我都没觉得，无名客姐们。
E: Pfft. I wouldn't have thought that until you said it.

C: 选择？你难道觉得他们变成猴子是心甘情愿？
E: Choose? Don't tell me you believe they chose to become monkeys?

C: 挺顺利啊，算了，就不插一脚了。
E: He's getting the hang of it. Guess I'll just stay out of it then.

C: 也许「同谐」真正的问题在于灯光，而非观众。就像此时此刻……
E: Perhaps Harmony was never about its audience, but about the light it provides. Much like how we see it now...

C: 一段时间前……
E: A while ago...

C: ——这一切，值得吗？
E: —Is all this worth it?

C: 若阁下心中已有决定，不妨怀着信念发出呐喊吧！
E: If your decision is firm, don't hesitate to roar with conviction!

C: 先严刑拷打一番吧。
E: Torture a confession out of him!

C: 蕉蕉蕉……
E: Bana bana bana...

C: 钟表•忍法！银枪•修罗殿下曾向我描绘过它的壮绝玄妙，请务必让在下领教一二。
E: Clockwork ninjutsu! Silvergun Shura once recounted its magnificence to me. Please, it will be my honor to witness it with my own eyes.

C: 是这样的，谐乐学院正在拍摄校庆宣传片，但一直没能找到蕉师满意的演员，所以我就来物色更有潜力的同学了——
E: Ah, yes. Charmony Academy is filming a promotional video for their anniversary, but the BananAdvisor hasn't found anyone that makes the cut. That's why I'm here: To recruit students with greater acting potential—

C: 说出进攻的忍•真言
E: Speak the ninja mantra with an offensive twist

C: 杂鱼小猴，又来讨打啦？不会真有猴子这么不知轻重吧？不会吧不会吧？
E: Aww, look who's back another whooping? You really don't know when to stop, do you? Is that it, rinky-dink dink dink monkey???

C: 搞什么！我说了关机、关机！
E: What are you even... I said to stop filming! STOP, FILMING!

C: 那接下来还有我的戏份吗！
E: Ooh, what about my part? Do I still have any scenes coming up?

C: 刚从你脚边爬过去的猴子，几年前还是个水手，平日里总是自己酿酒喝。
E: The monkey that scurried past you was once a sailor. He knew how to ferment his own wine, and would do so regularly.

C: 但从今以后，他们就只是猴子。
E: But from now on... they're monkeys. Just monkeys.

C: 还是说正事吧。你说睡蕉社今天有大人物的讲座，怎么样，我们赶上了吗？
E: Let's talk about the Slumbernana Association. There's an important seminar scheduled for today, right? Are we in time for that?

C: 这是恩典，无名客小姐。
E: This is my grace, Miss Nameless.

C: 好了，牛仔先生，请到这里来吧。现在我们来完成你最后的课题——
E: Alright, Mr. Cowboy, come to me. Let's finish your final lesson now...

C: 喂，千万别过去啊！
E: Hey, don't go over there!

C: 伟大在哪儿了？小可爱？
E: Grand...? Grand in what way, muddle-fudger?

C: 所以，对于你在校长室的所作所为，我可否理解为背叛只是一场表演，真实目的是为了将我们带来这里？
E: So, am I right to see your act of betrayal at the Dean's Office as a ruse to teleport us to safety here?

C: 或者，我更愿意称它为一场自救。
E: Perhaps I was just trying to bail myself out of the situation.

C: 答案正在于此，*蕉声*的影响已经深入你我肺腑。
E: Well, this seems to be the answer for everything. Banagibberish has long infiltrated every cell and organ of our body.

C: 普利蒙蕉授曾这么称呼你——「博士的失败品」。
E: Profnana Primon once called you... "the Doctor's failed creation."

C: 钟表•忍法，开！
E: Clockwork ninjutsu, activate!

C: 你将接过忍侠的遗业，清算邪忍的罪孽，终结忍之都的长夜，还百姓一个清平世界。
E: Inherit the legacy of the Ninja Hero and wipe clean the sins of Osaru. End the suffering wrought upon the Ninja Capital and bring peace back to its people.

C: 正是如此…忍之都的未来当由缭乱•忍侠开创。在下定会履行承诺。
E: Yes, that is the plan... The future of the Ninja Capital shall be shaped by the Dazzling Ninja Hero. I will definitely fulfill my promise.

C: 她用两个系统时就能解开改造仓的密码，也没法像猩猩一样关在笼子里啊……
E: She's able to decipher the password to the modification cabin in just two system hours. There's no way we'll be able to cage her up like any old gorilla...

C: 能人<unbreak>22</unbreak>，这到底是怎么回事？！
E: Denisovan <unbreak>22</unbreak>! What is all this!?

C: 警告：C<unbreak>11</unbreak>通道有未授权人员出现，请安保人猿开启防卫装置。
E: Warning: Unauthorized personnel detected in Corridor C<unbreak>11</unbreak>. Security Apes to activate security measures at once.

C: 虽然不知道他想做什么，但还是尽量解决掉周围的睡蕉小猴吧——毕竟最大的威胁还是模因病毒。
E: I can't tell what's up his sleeve, but we should take care of these Slumbernana Monkeys as soon as possible. Stopping the memetic virus is still our priority for now.

C: 等等，它好像在刻意把我们引向那里……
E: Hold on, it seems to be intentionally guiding us toward there...

C: 诸般迷失的邪祟啊，速速惊觉…继而寻回自己的忍道吧！
E: Oh, disillusioned fiendlings... Awaken now and continue down the path to seek your own way of the ninja!

C: 时钟的指针拨回匹诺康尼之旅起点：星穹列车应「钟表匠」邀请，前往银河度假胜地「白日梦」酒店赴宴，却在美梦乐园意外被卷入两起离奇的「杀人案件」。
E: The clock winds back to the start of the journey to Penacony — the Astral Express, upon invitation from the Watchmaker, heads to a Cosmic vacation spot, The Reverie hotel, for a banquet. However, in this Sweetdream Paradise, they unexpectedly become entangled in two bizarre "murder mysteries."

C: 这深不见底的杀意…是{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的怒火啊。
E: This insatiable bloodlust... is a product of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s wrath.

C: 耳边的战吼…似乎越来越喧嚣了。
E: The battle cries... seem to be getting a lot louder.

C: 大道肯定有人把守…怎么办？
E: The main path is likely well-guarded... What do I do?

C: 果然…快进门…！
E: Just as I thought... Inside!

C: 备用计划——一旦发生变故，我们就把他揪出来。
E: Plan B. We pull him out when something goes wrong.

C: 「——不应存于此世的灵魂，待锻造的战士。」
E: "...Souls foreign to this realm and warriors in the making."

C: 是让翁法罗斯众生陷入疯狂的元凶之一。自纷争世起，此种不可名状之物便如同瘟疫，随{RUBY_B#死亡、纷争与诡计}灾厄三泰坦{RUBY_E#}一同降临大地……
E: It is one of the culprits that drives the people of Amphoreus to madness. It was during the Era Bellica that this... unspeakable thing first appeared, like a plague, alongside the {RUBY_B#Death, Strife, and Trickery}Three Titans of Calamity{RUBY_E#}.

C: 我方才说了，这只是试炼的影子。
E: I told you, this is only a mirror of the trial.

C: 呵，果不其然。这里就是战吼的源头……
E: Heh. Just as I thought. This is where the battle cries were coming from...

C: 看来一场恶战在所难免了。
E: This is gonna be one fierce battle we won't be able to get out of.

C: 阿格莱雅大人遣我来向阁下转达：她为二位开拓者备了礼物，希望能当面交付。
E: I bring a message from Lady Aglaea. She has prepared a gift for you and Dan Heng, and wishes to present it to you in person.

C: （沉默着盯着她。）
E: (Glare at her in silence.)

C: 这位是？
E: Who is this...?

C: 灰宝、蝶宝、还有缇安老师，麻烦你们先行赶赴树庭吧？待伤者情况转好，我会和克莱门汀赶上你们的。
E: Grayie, Cassie, and Trianne. Would you mind making your way to the Grove first? Once this man is out of danger, Clementine and I will join you.

C: 拍摄很大的树。
E: Take a photo of this big tree.

C: 即便不是求学者，都已经走到这里了，还是没见人出来接引我们呀……
E: Even though we're not scholars, someone should've come forward to receive us by now...

C: {M#他们}{F#她们}能感知到火种如今身在何方么？
E: Can they tell where the Coreflame is right now?

C: <size=40>哼——哼啊——！</size>
E: <size=40>Haaa—Haaaaaah!</size>

C: 看来确实行不通，算了。
E: Forget it. That doesn't seem like it's going to work.

C: 你将（疑似）在体内飞速运转的「开拓」之力倾泻而出。那么，水车动了么？
E: You unleash the (presumably) surging force of Trailblaze within you. So, has the waterwheel begun to turn?

C: 呵呵，一试便知。
E: Hehe, we'll know once we test it.

C: 哇，小小灰、小小蝶，还有粉色小狗！
E: Woah, it's Little Gray, Little Cas, and the pink puppy!

C: 唔，原来大家找到幸存者啦！不过，金丝似乎一直没感应到你们说的人呢。
E: Oh, so you found a survivor! But the golden thread doesn't seem to be able to sense the person you're talking about.

C: 唔，原来大家遇到好心人帮忙啦！不过，金丝似乎一直没感应到你们说的人呢。
E: Oh, so you received help from a kind-hearted person! But the golden thread doesn't seem to be able to sense the person you're talking about.

C: 拿起花瓣在蝴蝶面前晃晃。
E: Pick up the petal and wave it in front of the butterfly.

C: …蝴蝶依旧纹丝不动。
E: The butterfly still didn't move one inch.

C: 化作…死灰！
E: Be reduced to... ashes!

C: 噢，人多力量大，对吧？不过半神的试炼终究要落到个人身上……
E: Ah, I see — there is strength in numbers. But you must know that the trial to become a demigod is ultimately meant for only one individual.

C: 看来无人提出异议。基于悬锋元老院「一致沉默」之原则，此事已无复议必要。
E: It appears there are no objections. Then, in accordance with the Kremnoan Council's principle of tacit consent, the decision is final.

C: 说吧。看在你我同出生、共入死的份上…朕给你最后一次机会。
E: If you have more to say, then speak. On account of the life we have shared together, I grant you this one final chance.

C: 于是，数万年如一日地，两头野兽在荒野中开始了角逐和追逃——
E: For tens of thousands of years, without respite, the two creatures thus continued their relentless pursuit and rivalry...

C: 你穿得…比我…清凉多了……
E: You are wearing... way less... than I am...

C: 恼羞成怒的敌军不惜点燃大火，将我军和整座城池一道焚烧殆尽…他的遗言只留在一小块被烈火烧裂的泥板上。
E: Our enemies, consumed by indignation when they discovered the trick, set the entire city and my soldiers on fire... His final words were recorded on a small clay tablet, fractured by the flames.

C: 为什么是面见阿格莱雅前？
E: Why do you have to do it before meeting Aglaea?

C: 什么事？我正忙着，最近城里可不太平，大小事务弄得我头昏眼花……
E: What's wrong? I'm busy. There's a lot going on in the city, and I've got my hands full...

C: 亲爱的朋友，我想死你啦！
E: I missed you so much, my dearest friend!

C: *我们*会请求{M#他}{F#她}的帮助。明日，在命运重渊，雅努萨波利斯的神殿…克拉特鲁斯，*我们*愿意为你展示那段久远的记忆，毫无保留。
E: We will ask for {M#his}{F#her} aid. Tomorrow, at the Abyss of Fate in the Temple of Janusopolis... we will show you everything from that distant memory, Krateros.

C: 要从冥海中捞出一枚小小的印戒，我无法想象需要多少耐心和勇气。我欠你一个人情。
E: I can hardly imagine how much patience and courage it must have taken to find such a small signet ring in the Sea of Souls. I owe you one.

C: 傻孩子，你是雅努萨波利斯的圣女。战斗不是你的职责，会有许多人来保护你的。
E: Silly girl, you're Janusopolis' Holy Maiden. It's not your duty to fight. There will be many others to protect you.

C: （以前总在这里，听妈妈讲故事……）
E: (I used to sit here and listen to Mama tell stories...)

C: 比起与一人道别…看着许多人在眼前陆续消逝更令人伤怀。
E: Compared with saying farewell to one person... watching many fade away before me is even more sorrowful.

C: 阿雅，你早餐想吃什么？
E: So, what would you like for breakfast, Agy?

C: 以及，和阿雅第一次见面时，*我们*为她做的粥里就放了这个，她很爱吃。
E: And when we first met Agy, we added that to the porridge we made for her, and she really loved it!

C: 先找个地方藏起来。无论对方是谁，*我们*都不能被看见。
E: Come on, we need to hide! Whoever they are, we can't let them see us!

C: 又来这套…万敌，我配合你进攻。
E: Not the same trick again... Mydei, I'll follow your lead.

C: 他视力挺好啊，我相信白厄。
E: He can see just fine. I have faith in Phainon.

C: 不，我赐予了你们新生。
E: No, I am granting you a new beginning.

C: …我向她许下承诺，会将自己的一切，献予逐火的征途。
E: ...I promised her that I would dedicate all I have to the Flame-Chase Journey.

C: 又要口出狂言了么，开拓者？
E: Are you going to say something insane again, Trailblazer?

C: 哼，怎么说呢…怪怪的？不是说拍照技术，是我很少给自己拍照……
E: Hmph, well... It feels peculiar, I suppose? I'm not talking about your photographic skills. It's just that I rarely take photos...

C: 我不会那么做的，万敌阁下。死亡不是游戏。
E: I would never do that, Lord Mydei. Death is not a game.

C: …那着实出人意料。
E: ...I admit, that took me by surprise.

C: 别忘了，你身后还有一整个世界等着被拯救。
E: Remember that there is a whole world behind you waiting to be saved.

C: 嗯。
E: Yes.

C: 小敌都已经身体力行了…我们还有什么理由瞒着大家呢？走吧，各位——
E: De is already doing what he has to do... What reason do we have to keep it from them? Let's go, everyone...

C: 一件小礼物，本想当面交给她…可惜，命运跑得太快。
E: A little gift that I had hoped to deliver to her personally... though Fate had other plans.

C: 因为这份记忆属于*我们*，知觉也与当年的缇里西庇俄丝相连。
E: This is our memory, so your senses are also aligned with the Tribios' of that moment.

C: 这或许是我们最后一次交谈了，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}。我会尽我所能…从黑潮中保护你。
E: This might be our last conversation, {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}. I will do everything I can... to protect you from the black tide.

C: 那我们的约定就依然还在。
E: Then our promise still stands.

C: 因为人们相信它会实现。人们试着相信它会实现。
E: Because people believe it will come true, and they are trying hard to hold onto that belief.

C: 「命运」不是结果，而是过程。它不是生长在道路尽头的花朵……
E: "Fate" is not about the outcome, but the journey. It's not the flowers that bloom at the end of the road...

C: 也该升升级了，合情合理。
E: It's about time for me to level up.

C: 未完待续。
E: To be continued?

C: 还不是你非得将火种植入我体内…算了，有话说话，别阴阳怪气。
E: It was you who insisted on implanting the Coreflame in me... Forget it. Cut the sarcasm and just say what you need to say.

C: 那，缇安大人……
E: Then, Lady Trianne...

C: 我就知道你不会忘记的。即便生活在匹诺康尼这样的梦中世界，这样的体验也很稀奇。
E: I knew you wouldn't forget. Even in a dreamland like Penacony, that was a once-in-a-lifetime experience.

C: 有花不完的钱。
E: I want to swim in money!

C: …前景不容乐观，但场面一定精彩。
E: Doesn't look promising. But it'll be one hell of a show.

C: 好！好！好！嚯嗬嗬嗬嗬！你不择手段的样子有我年轻时的风采！
E: Good! Good! GOOD! Hohohohoho! That ruthless streak of yours reminds me of my younger days!

C: 有什么关系？这是个没人认得你我的世界，没人知道{RUBY_B#爱尔兰}艾林{RUBY_E#}，也没人听过「库兰的猛犬」的大名。
E: What's the big deal? No one here knows us. No one's ever heard of {RUBY_B#Ireland}Erin{RUBY_E#}, or the Hound of Culann.

C: …我俩绝不会陌生的Saber。
E: A Saber we're very familiar with.

C: 按照我的猜想，也许「圣杯」调用了与「魔术」性质类似的存在，构成了一场「拟似圣杯战争」。
E: If I had to guess, the so-called "Grail" must have tapped into something similar to magecraft to create this pseudo Holy Grail War.

C: 即便如此，你作为英灵受到圣杯的召唤已是事实，这证明了你一定曾在历史上留下过独属自己的故事。而在圣杯战争中，英灵的力量也并非胜利的绝对条件。
E: Even so, the fact that you were summoned by the Holy Grail means that you must have left behind your own story in history. And in the Holy Grail War, the strength of a Heroic Spirit is not an absolute condition for victory.

C: 拔出选定之剑，成为王；或者放弃，留在故乡，安度余生。
E: To pull out the sword and become king, or to give up and stay in my homeland to quietly live out my days.

C: 别大惊小怪，在空间站，我们地概科是食物链的底端，这种事情都是家常便饭啦。
E: Don't be so surprised. Our department is at the bottom of the food chain on the station... this work happens all the time.

C: 也许，这里就是你的理想乡。
E: Maybe, this is your utopia.

C: 我想离开。
E: I want to leave.

C: 这不是我们的星核{F#小姐}{M#小哥}嘛，原本打算给你调一杯酒的，看在你未成年的份上，还是算了。
E: Isn't that our Stellaron {M#boy?}{F#girl?} I was about to mix you a drink, but since you're still underage, I'll hold off for now.

C: 所以，你是哪一种？
E: So, what do you really want?

C: 我要出发了。
E: I must set off.

C: 这话说的倒也不错，只是，我对老奥帝先生的盘算也很感兴趣。
E: Good point, but I'm still very curious about your little scheme.

C: 银河最好的酒吧吗？那可真令人期待。行啦，咱俩就不说什么告别的话了，别让这场难得的相聚染上悲伤的颜色。下次见，兄弟。
E: Finest in the cosmos, huh? That's something to look forward to. Alright, no need for a tearful farewell for us bros, let's not ruin the good run we've had together. Till we meet again, buddy.

C: 我不擅长说再见…
E: I'm not great at farewells...

C: {F#姐们}{M#兄弟}，看你们都挺忙的，我就带着虎克先走了。还得感谢老奥帝先生啊，他愿意买下我搞到手的这个稀罕货，咱们这才能有钱来一趟说走就走的旅行。
E: Hey {M#brother.}{F#sister.} Since you all looked pretty busy, I've headed out with Hook. Big thanks to Mr. Oti for buying this rare trinket I got my hands on. That's how I could afford this spontaneous trip.

C: 莫非，我们这位老朋友对{RUBY_B#我}公司成员{RUBY_E#}的出现有了警惕心，打算躲在暗处观察我们的来意？
E: Or maybe our old friend is concerned about {RUBY_B#my}an IPC employee{RUBY_E#} showing up, so they're lurking in the shadows to assess us?

C: 等到我赢下圣杯，所有人都要看我的脸色行事！我要让你们跪在地上向我求饶，然后学狗叫，学猪叫，不！学蛤蟆叫！
E: After I win the Holy Grail, I will make everyone do as I say! I'll make you all kneel before me and beg for mercy, then have you bark like dogs, oink like pigs... no! Croak like frogs!

C: 瞧，又急。
E: See? Always so hasty.

C: 这孙子连招都不带变的。
E: That punk doesn't even bother switching up his tricks.

C: 你的阅片内容好狂野…
E: You watch rather wild films...

C: 没错，正是本人在匹诺康尼草创时期拍摄的第一部电影为后世留下了如此宝贵的天才创意。
E: That's right! I was the one who gave the world my genius vision with my first film in Penacony's early days!

C: Assassin你这个白痴！怎么把真名给暴露了？说好了真名对英灵来说意味着弱点呢？
E: Y—You fool! How did you let your True Name slip like that? Isn't that supposed to be a Heroic Spirit's greatest weakness? Assassin!?

C: 是要牺牲自己？还是在我的面前刀剑相向？你们大可利用最后的时间商量一番。不过，再纠结的话，炸弹可就要爆炸喽？
E: So, what will it be? Self-sacrifice? Or will you turn your blades at each other right before my eyes? Take what little time you have left and talk it over. But keep stalling, and well — tick, tock... BOOM.

C: 这话怎么讲？
E: What makes you say that?

C: ♪你已～做到了最好～～啊～～～恰似水畔的鸢尾花！♪
E: ♪ You've already~ done your~ best~~ Just like an iris by the riverside! ♪

C: 哼哼哼哼哼，背叛者没有资格对我们指手画脚。
E: Heh heh heh heh heh... traitors don't get to boss us around.

C: 废话少说，来感受匹诺康尼最恐怖的折磨吧！
E: Enough chit-chat. Time for the most terrifying torment in all of Penacony!

C: 我能看出你仍心存犹豫，在我拔出剑以前，还有回头的余地。
E: I can tell you're still hesitating. Before I draw my blade, there's still time to change your mind.

C: 御主，如果你只是在开玩笑，现在道歉我还能替你解释两句。但你要是一意孤行，这可不是不流血就能结束的剧情。
E: Master, if you're just joking, I can still cover for you if you apologize now. But if you're serious, this won't end without blood being spilled.

C: …我的御主，就拜托你们了。
E: My Master... I'm counting on all of you.

C: 为什么你接受得这么自然……
E: How do you accept such things so easily...

C: 说得轻巧，你刚才不也被打得吱哇乱叫？
E: Shut it. Weren't you just getting your butt kicked a moment ago?

C: 哦，情况我大概了解，不用再汇报一遍了。
E: Ahem. I'm aware of the situation. You can skip the report.

C: 所以为什么要来这儿，你在这当过园长？
E: So, why are we here? You managed this park before?

C: 这是什么樵夫的垃圾桶吗？
E: What is this, a woodcutter's trashcan!?

C: 不错。所以此事多半和令使，甚至和星神有关，我才好奇天才是否会有线索。
E: You're right, so this has to be related to the Emanators, or perhaps even the Aeons. That's why I wanted to know if the geniuses had any clue about it.

C: 三月？
E: March?

C: 呃，这倒也不必…你这么坦诚，反倒给我整不会了。
E: Um, there's no need for that. You're acting so sincere. I'm actually surprised.

C: 真该让你自己来的。这姑娘根本没看起来那么简单……
E: I should have let you handle it yourself. This girl is not as ordinary as she appears...

C: 维生舱搞定了，都是小问题。
E: The life support pod is ready. There were only minor issues.

C: 只是举手之劳。既然停云女士的问题已经解决，接下来是随你们去见另两位同伴么？
E: It was nothing. Now that the matter with Miss Tingyun is resolved, are we meeting your other two companions next?

C: 现在也未尝不可，您试试无妨。
E: You probably still can! Want to give it a try?

C: 如今，停云也能再次启程，以一介「忘归之人」的身份，行向更远的天际了。
E: Now, I can embark once more on my journey as a "Traveler of No Return," exploring the paths that lie beyond.

C: 承蒙大君「厚爱」，这回停云做得了局中人。
E: Thanks to the "favor" of the Lord Ravager, I've become a player in this game.

C: 但想要鼓励一个人的时候，还是得多花些心思才对吧？
E: But don't you think we should put in some effort when we want to encourage someone?

C: 你根本不是这种人，脑子被列车撞傻了？还是被公司的赌徒夺舍了？
E: This isn't like you at all. Did you lose your mind after being run over by the Express, or were you possessed by that IPC gambler?

C: 我似乎也没什么好说的。但既然要说再见了，给你最后一个建议吧。
E: I don't have much to say. But as it's time to part ways, here's one last piece of advice.

C: 送去洗车星吧！
E: Send him to a Washtopia!

C: 好诶！那就等列车长的跃迁通知啦。
E: Great! I'm looking forward to the conductor's jump announcement!

C: 才没有…我跃迁的次数比你多多了……
E: Of course not! I've been through way more jumps than you ever have!

C: 翁法罗斯这一站意义特殊，车上的每位乘客都不可或缺。开荒世界的工作交给年轻人正合适，相信你和丹恒能成为彼此的照应。
E: Amphoreus is a crucial stop, so everyone on the Express has been roped in to help in some way or another. Venturing into the unknown world is a task perfect for you youngsters. I'm sure you'll both have each other's backs.

C: 咯咯咯…这「能源区」…怎么这么冷啊？咯咯咯…我的镜面，都快要结霜了！
E: Brr... Why is this Energy Supply Zone... so cold? Brr... I—I'm already frosting up!

C: 等等…这道门好像没锁。
E: Wait a minute. This door... isn't locked?

C: 咦嘻嘻嘻…黑塔女士，外面的家伙…好像在说些很有趣的话哦？
E: Hyuk hyuk hyuk... Madam Herta, those lads outside... seem to be discussing something interesting...

C: 丹恒靠坐在废墟的角落，生死未卜。
E: Dan Heng is slumped in the corner of the wreckage, his well-being uncertain.

C: （还不错，这几张照片值得摆在照片墙最前边。）
E: (These turned out great. Heh, they deserve the most prominent spot on the photo wall.)

C: 我还是喜欢你桀骜不驯的样子。
E: Meh, I preferred it when you were being combative.

C: 但枯燥又冗长的讲解也不好。让我想想……
E: Yet, a tedious and overly long explanation isn't ideal either. Let me think...

C: 就像此时此刻，两位的美德化作一股暖流，取悦了我的肌肤。
E: Just like how at this present moment, the virtues possessed by the both of you have turned into a warm current that pleases my skin.

C: 自然。我们对这场袭击早有预知，也不打算浪费一个绝好的机会。
E: Naturally. We have long foreseen this attack and didn't intend to waste such a golden opportunity.

C: 按计划撤离，不要慌张。
E: Don't panic. Retreat according to the plan.

C: 「起初，翁法罗斯是一团混沌！」
E: "Amphoreus started off as a ball of chaos!"

C: 我是一名士兵，从小就被教导如何战斗。从被预言选中的那一天起，我便把{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}「天谴之矛」{RUBY_E#}视作自己的终点。
E: I'm a soldier who was taught how to fight at a young age. From the day I was selected by the prophecy, I've regarded {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}the Lance of Fury{RUBY_E#} as my goal.

C: 搞得我也有点好奇。
E: I'm starting to get a little curious too.

C: 两位，打扰了。我们不是故意偷听，但你们方才提到的辩论场…我们也想了解一下。
E: Excuse me, we accidentally overheard something about a forum just now... We would like to find out more.

C: 你见过达米亚诺斯吗？
E: Have you seen Damionis?

C: 快问正事。
E: Let's get to the point.

C: 上面还有一只…蝴蝶？是装饰物吗？
E: There's also a... butterfly? Is that a fashion accessory?

C: 没办法呀。往日无法重现，但*我们*可以追随着神谕向前。
E: Ah well, the past cannot be recreated. All we can do is follow the prophecy and move forward.

C: 先看看能不能直接前进吧。
E: Let's see if we can move straight ahead first.

C: 若要留在奥赫玛，两位自然需要一处落脚之地。
E: If you are to stay in Okhema, you'll need a place to rest.

C: 金色的丝线微微地颤动。
E: The golden thread trembles slightly.

C: 遐蝶。为我们的客人呈上仁慈的送别。
E: Castorice, please give our guests a merciful farewell.

C: 重生之我在翁法罗斯？
E: I've been reborn on Amphoreus?

C: ……火焰节节攀升，鼓点如雨骤降……
E: ...Flames rise higher, and drums fall like rain...

C: 我相信白厄，但更相信你的决断。
E: I trust Phainon, but I trust your judgment more.

C: 我累了，我要走。
E: I'm tired. I just want to go.

C: 所以，我们必须做好准备。你我身着褴褛又何妨？专心为「救世主」编织战衣便好。
E: Hence, we must be prepared. When our task is to craft the armor for the Deliverer, what harm is there if you and I don humble attire?

C: 你会否向{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的神躯发誓，将黄金裔的使命视作至高的职责？
E: Do you swear upon {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s body to make this mission of the Chrysos Heirs your foremost duty?

C: 是神，是神！
E: Slay, slay!

C: 既然你自告奋勇，那就麻烦露两手了。
E: But since you've volunteered, please be my guest.

C: 败给阴谋和毒计并不可耻。应当为此蒙羞的，是那些孱弱的卑劣之徒。
E: There's no shame in losing to those who conspire and plot in secret. Those weak and despicable individuals are the ones who should be ashamed.

C: 「挚友，我一定会把你最后的话带给丹恒！」
E: "I'll be sure to pass on your last words to Dan Heng, my friend!"

C: 那也没差多少，我们还有机会。
E: That's not too far off. We still stand a chance.

C: 与万敌比较了徽记总数……
E: Compare the total number of crests you obtained with Mydei's...

C: 这个给你们，一定要拿好——<color=#dbc291ff>这是象征雅努斯祭司身份的石符</color>，只要在万径之门前举起它，大门就会为你们敞开。
E: Here, keep this with you. <color=#dbc291ff>This token is proof of a Janus priest</color>. Hold it up to the Gate of Infinity, and you'll be able to walk through unimpeded.

C: 现在看来，那也是{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的手笔。
E: Upon reflection, that was probably {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s doing, too.

C: 看，破损的天秤变得完整了。
E: Look, the broken scales have been restored to their full form.

C: 你卖力地用棒球棍击打天秤的托盘……
E: You swing the baseball bat hard at the scale's tray...

C: 一定还有其它办法…更周全的办法。即使时间紧迫……
E: There must be some other way... A more comprehensive way. Even if our time is tight...

C: 那就是与我们一同旅行至今的「同伴」。
E: And that's the companions that we have traveled with.

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: 别怕，一切都会尘埃落定的。我们再通读一遍「剧本」吧……
E: Don't worry, the dust will eventually settle. Let's go through the "script" one more time...

C: 不，他们是敌人。
E: No, they are enemies.

C: 那就是说，我会失而复得。
E: That means you'll come back to me.

C: {RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}…你睡下了吗？
E: {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}... Have you fallen into a slumber?

C: 看来想获得{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的帮助绝非易事。
E: It's not going to be easy getting {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s help.

C: 放心吧，我最擅长的事就是「大难不死」。
E: Don't worry about me, surviving the impossible is my specialty.

C: 「千年的战争进入尾声，世界即将遁入混沌长夜；骁勇英武的泰坦啊，你金黄的心灵因何变得支离破碎？」
E: "The war of a thousand years has drawn to its close. And now the world descends into a long night of chaos. O valiant Titan, tell me, how did your golden heart shatter into a thousand fragments?"

C: 非常抱歉，之前都是我的错，我一心只想证明「天外之界」的存在……
E: My apologies, that was entirely my fault. I was determined to prove that a world beyond the sky exists...

C: 我只是不想看见她失落的样貌。
E: I just don't want to see her disappointed.

C: 往世…由我，复现。
E: Past... I, recreate.

C: 时代在剧变，人亦需要适应，我不是唯一一个下定决心改变的人，元老阁下。
E: Times are changing drastically, and people must adapt. I'm not the only one committed to making a difference, Elder Caenis.

C: （下城…渗透还未殃及浴场，很幸运。风险尚在可控范围之内。）
E: (The lower city... It's good that the infiltration hasn't reached the baths yet. The risk remains manageable.)

C: 污秽之物，显形吧——
E: Filth, show yourself —

C: 你好，孩子。
E: Good day, child.

C: 省下那些油嘴滑舌吧，贼灵…你知道我能读出你的不安。
E: Save the smooth talk, Spirithief... I can tell you're feeling nervous.

C: …要论阴谋心计，{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}与元老院相比亦捉襟见肘。
E: ...When it comes to schemes and manipulation, {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#} can't hold a candle to the Council.

C: 王欧利庞……
E: King Eurypon...?

C: 让注定赴死之人浪费时间，用意何在？
E: Why stall those charging for Death's door?

C: 你们对那庸王编造出来的虚伪荣光毫无兴趣。我无意过问你们的目的，只要不妨碍到我……
E: I know you have no care for that fatuous king's contrived glory. You can keep your motive to yourselves, so long as you stay out of my way...

C: 哈…跑得可真快，一袋都快装不下了……
E: *pant* They sure are quick on their feet. One bag won't be enough to hold everything...

C: 还有路要赶…走吧。
E: This trial isn't over... We should keep going.

C: 未能安眠者…请告诉我们，你听到了什么？
E: O, ye who cannot rest in peace... Tell us, what have you heard?

C: 它此刻在与无形之物战斗，无暇顾及凡人的愚蠢。
E: They are fighting against the unseen, they have no time for the folly of mortals.

C: 亡魂…告诉我，你听到了什么？
E: Lost souls... Tell us, what have you heard?

C: 此处的铸魂雕像只有四尊。假使他们的确将{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的神性分成了五份，也仍旧有一瓣灵魂不知所踪。
E: There are only four soul-forged statues here. If they did split {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s divinity into five parts, there is still one fragment of the soul that is missing.

C: 声音…开始涌现了。
E: The voices... are starting to pour in.

C: 我会如你所愿。
E: I will do as you wish.

C: 泰坦的造物？何时变得如此软弱……
E: The Titan's creations? When did they become so weak...?

C: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}「天谴之矛」{RUBY_E#}已然不再，黄金裔距离神谕中的创世更近了一步。
E: Now that the {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Lance of Fury{RUBY_E#} is no more, we Chrysos Heirs are one step closer to the genesis as foretold in the prophecy.

C: …的确，之前发生的一系列事件过于紧凑，甚至没时间供我们思考眼下的困局。
E: ...You're right. So much happened in so short a time that we haven't had the time to consider our own predicament.

C: 等等…似乎有什么地方不对……
E: Wait... Something seems off...

C: 你的意识沉入了睡意中，在梦境的边缘，你闻见低语传来——
E: Your consciousness sinks into dreams, and at the edge of the dreamscape, you hear a whisper...

C: 我时常会想，「像我这么凡庸的人也能成为英雄吗」？本以为击败{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}能平复脑海里的质疑之声…没想到它却变得越发聒噪了。
E: I often wonder if someone as ordinary as me can really become a hero. I thought defeating {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} would quell the voice of doubt in my mind... but it has only grown louder.

C: 为什么涡心如此沉默？你们也面临过类似的处境吗？
E: Why is the Vortex this silent? Was it also like that in the past?

C: 呼…呼……
E: Zzz... Zzz...

C: 但除去令人难以忍受的自傲，我尊敬他作为学者的本色。为了内心恪守之物，他不惧与世界为敌，这需要决心。
E: Despite his insufferable arrogance, I do hold a certain respect for his nature as a scholar. To remain true to his principles, he is unafraid to stand opposed to the world — and that requires considerable resolve.

C: 拥有资质的黄金裔稀世难寻，如果这条路走不通，我也只能放低标准。
E: It's exceedingly rare to find a capable Chrysos Heir. If this path proves unattainable, I am willing to lower my expectations.

C: 别叹气啊，丹恒…
E: Don't sigh, Dan Heng...

C: 关键在于那位去向不明的{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}「灰黯之手」{RUBY_E#}。
E: The key seems to lie with the {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Hand of Shadow{RUBY_E#}, whose whereabouts are unknown.

C: 你的想法早有人尝试过，如果有效，{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}就不会全无音讯。
E: Many have had this idea, but so far, there have been no results. If it were successful, {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} wouldn't have disappeared without a trace.

C: 汝的灵魂在颤抖哪，少见。那玩具背后，想必有一段不为人知的秘辛吧？
E: How unusual, your soul is actually trembling. This must mean that behind this toy hides a secret that nobody knows, right?

C: （不可能，如果真是七贤人，我应该记得才对……）
E: (No, she can't be. I would know her name if she really were one of the Seven Sages...)

C: 我一直把你当成女儿，悉心培养，因为你生来受赐如此{RUBY_B#诅咒}祝福{RUBY_E#}，这世上没有人比你更明白生命和死亡的重量。
E: I've taught you and cared for you as my own daughter all this time... because of this {RUBY_B#curse}blessing{RUBY_E#} that's been with you since your birth. I know no one else in the world would understand the weight of life and death more than you do.

C: 这才是对的。
E: This is the right one.

C: 这就是怪盗信中提到的「黄金短矛」。
E: This is the "Golden Short Spear" mentioned in the thief's letter.

C: 能探到你的魂息就够了…轻而易举。
E: Piece of cake... I can do that even if I can only sense your soul.

C: 不，这不是价值的问题。如果我们无法找到死亡泰坦，{NICKNAME}的灵魂就会……
E: It's not about the value of the reward. If we don't find the Death Titan, {NICKNAME}'s soul will...

C: 莫非，亡魂滞留于此，是受到了某个人的诓骗？
E: Could it be that these souls are stuck here due to someone's deceit?

C: 我们也是来冒犯它的。
E: We're also here to trespass upon the Titan.

C: 欸？这个人…好像知道自己已经死了。
E: Huh? This one... seems to know that she's already dead.

C: 瑟希斯在上，这是否算作…思考到了最后一刻呢？
E: Cerces above... Does this count as thinking till the moment I die?

C: 这是我秉持千年的心愿，阁下。或许曾有人接近令我改变想法……
E: This is a wish that I've held for almost a millennium. My mind might have changed once upon a time if people managed to strike up a friendship with me...

C: …这可难办了。
E: ...This is going to be difficult.

C: 这幅五彩缤纷的画…已胜过人世间任何一张留影了。
E: This vivid drawing surpasses any photograph from the world of the living.

C: …往昔？
E: ...The past?

C: 我想…那或许正是巨龙玻吕刻斯的遗愿实现的征兆吧。
E: I think... it's probably the sign of Pollux's wish being fulfilled.

C: …缇安大人已将它完整描绘，并交到我的手中了。
E: ...Lady Trianne has already drawn a picture of my entire life, and it is now in my hands.

C: …罢了，为时尚早。
E: ...Nevermind. Now's not the time.

C: …伙伴…怎么…？！
E: Huh...? What's wrong...!?

C: 那边便是「高塔」……
E: The "tower" is right over there...

C: 好，我为您带路。
E: Alright. This way, please.

C: 愿瑟希斯捍卫你的思想。
E: May Cerces safeguard your thoughts.

C: ——愿我们在真理前相会，吾师。
E: May we meet again with the truth before us, Empedocles.

C: *观众议论纷纷*
E: *crowd chatter*

C: <color=#ff3a3e>不要害怕。在那道路的尽头，始终会有一抹红色。</color>
E: <color=#ff3a3e>Fear not, as a touch of red will be awaiting you at the end of the path.</color>

C: 「为肉身灌注黄金之血，为神谕甘愿枯竭干涸……」
E: "Fill our bodies with blood of gold, till we wither in willing service to the prophecy..."

C: 「别忘记……」
E: "Do not forget..."

C: …我不会阻止你。
E: I won't stop you...

C: 那末…最初的智种，又要在谁人的记忆中生根发芽呢？
E: If that is the case, whose memories did the very first Nouspore sprout from?

C: 劫持？
E: Hijacked?

C: 挟持三月七的人，会是他们么？
E: So what you're saying... Could they be the ones who hijacked March 7th's memories?

C: 诸位，欢迎来到「半神议院」。
E: Welcome to the Demigod Council, esteemed guests.

C: （{NICKNAME}…谁能想到，早在降落翁法罗斯时，{F#她}{M#他}就已经遭遇不测。）
E: (Nobody could've ever imagined that {NICKNAME}'s life would be forfeited the moment we landed on Amphoreus...)

C: 但偏偏是这样一位「渎神者」，却成了{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的神选。命运真是捉摸不透啊。
E: Yet, it is also this very "blasphemer" that {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} favors. Fate sure works in mysterious ways.

C: 可现在看来，老师的目标绝不是制药，是在究明「金血」的由来与原理？
E: But now, it seems Anaxa's objective was never to create medicine but to identify the origin of the golden blood and figure out its inner workings.

C: 这不就是幸存者偏差吗…
E: Isn't this just survivorship bias?

C: 那就在公民大会上见分晓吧。
E: Well then, I guess we'll find out if that's true at the citizens' assembly.

C: 不。吾只是发觉，吾之所想与汝是同个道理：生命乃无价之宝，世间难能有相抵者，对吧？
E: No, I merely realized that we're both thinking of the same principle: If life is priceless, then there is hardly anything else in this world that is of equal weight to it, right?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「汝将凋零，令逝者自残余中发芽，一同死去的火新生」……</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"You shall wither, and through that, the dead will sprout again from the remains, and be reborn with the dead flame"...</color>

C: 现在…该轮到我们履行诺言啦。
E: Now... it's time for us to fulfill our promises.

C: 喂，人子啊……
E: Hey, child of humanity...

C: 而人子却私自误读神明的意图，将之铸成自相残杀的锐器……
E: Yet humanity misinterpreted the god's intentions, forging them into weapons for fratricide...

C: 「我曾深爱的，却无力拯救的同胞们啊——」
E: "To my once beloved, yet now unsavable kin —"

C: 说实话，能理解她。
E: Honestly, I understand her.

C: 时候到了，凡人——
E: The time has come, mortal —

C: <color=#dbc291ff>凡人能够接受改变…人性值得被拯救！</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Mortals are capable of change... and humanity is worth saving!</color>

C: 这座平台就像一座牢笼…但愿不会出什么故障。
E: This platform feels like a cage... Let's hope nothing goes wrong.

C: Dite...Finis！
E: Dite... Finis!

C: 停下吧，塞涅俄丝大人！
E: Stop, Lady Seliose!

C: …<color=#dbc291ff>没错！刻法勒的火种就在我身上。</color>
E: ...<color=#dbc291ff>That's right! I have Kephale's Coreflame.</color>

C: 我会将其呵护，直到最后一刻。
E: I'll guard them, until the very end.

C: 克莱门汀小姐的医术，很厉害哦——*我们*也觉得，你一定能担得起昏光庭院的牌面！
E: Miss Clementine's medical skills are amazing! We believe you'll make the Twilight Courtyard proud!

C: 哈…所以我才让你在路上吃饱睡足嘛。
E: Ha... That's why I made sure you were well-fed and rested on the road.

C: 先看到这儿吧…
E: Let's stop here...

C: 好啦好啦，不开玩笑了。这里…这里什么都没有！人家去别处看看。
E: Well, no more jokes. There's... there's nothing here! I'll go look elsewhere.

C: 偶尔信一下也没什么不好。
E: A little faith in these things isn't bad sometimes.

C: 坏的征兆也是一种指引，至少能勾起人们的警觉，对吧？
E: Even bad omens serve as guidance. They can help keep us alert, right?

C: …谁在那？！
E: ...Who's there!?

C: 仁慈？何必用这个惺惺作态的词，来掩饰你们的……
E: Kind? There's no need to use such a word to cover up your...

C: 我问你，赛法利娅——你是自何处，又是以何种手段得到这些财宝的？
E: Tell me, Cifera, where did you come from, and how did you acquire these treasures?

C: 不过，呃…大姐头，也有一种可能，阿格莱雅不是故意想要骗你的……
E: But, uh... Boss Lady, there's a chance Aglaea wasn't trying to trick you...

C: 「…恐怕也不会再有机会了。再见，赛法利娅。」
E: "...it seems that chance will never come. Goodbye, Cifera."

C: 你腿长、我腿短！
E: Your legs are long and mine are short!

C: 但他们还是作为一个组织延续至今，甚至还在设法阻挠逐火。
E: And still, they endure. An organization persisting through time, now working tirelessly to obstruct the Flame-Chase.

C: 那么，白厄阁下…有缘再会。
E: So, Lord Phainon... until next time.

C: 白厄……
E: Phainon...
Mmm...?

C: 「…请带我经历命运的最后一次淬炼吧。」
E: "...please take me through the last tempering that fate has to offer."

C: 我没事…事发以后，我就一直陪在缇宝和缇宁老师身边。
E: I'm fine... I've been staying close to Lady Tribbie and Lady Trinnon after the incident.

C: 这是…你已经完成了？
E: Is this... You've completed it?

C: 因为我很清楚——那场表面上的胜利掩盖了更大的失败。在我为了胜利不顾手段地挑唆对立的情绪时，我已经和自己加入逐火事业的初衷背道而驰。
E: I realized — that apparent victory masked a deeper failure. In my pursuit of success, I fueled division and strayed far from my very purpose that led me to the Flame-Chase Journey.

C: 逐火之旅已经接近尾声，黄金裔唯一需要征服的泰坦仅剩{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}一尊。
E: The Flame-Chase Journey is nearing its end, with only one Titan left for the Chrysos Heirs to conquer: {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}.

C: 因为…我猜你也需要一段时间来整理好心情，悼念她的离开。
E: Well... I thought you'd need some time to yourself... after she passed away.

C: 吾师，我的一生中经历了太多的改变。但惟有对一件事的追求，我千年如一……
E: Teacher, I have faced too many changes in my lifetime. But in the pursuit of one thing alone, I have remained unchanged for a thousand years...

C: 以及，根据法吉娜祭司们的设计——「入口亦为出口」。待你见完先祖的灵魂，就通过涡心回到这里吧——我和小伊卡会在原地等你。
E: And as Phagousa's priests designed it — "the entrance serves as the exit." You'll need to come back through the vortex once you've met your ancestor's spirit. Little Ica and I will be here waiting.

C: 不用了，缇宝阿姐！我早就过惯了四处漂泊的日子，让我在这熙熙攘攘的大城市留守反倒有些不自在。
E: That's alright, big sister Tribbie! I've gotten used to life on the road. Staying in this bustling city actually feels off.

C: 那就说明，他还没有被黑潮的疯狂吞没。
E: That means he hasn't been consumed by the black tide's madness yet.

C: 历经千年的时光，那位泰坦，和与它共生的英雄…一直在这里俯瞰着大地么？
E: Has that Titan... and that fused hero... been looking down on the world from here for a thousand years?

C: 对呀！差点忘了——灰宝，迷宝，能借用两位的力量吗？
E: That's it! I almost forgot — Grayie, Memmie, can I borrow your powers?

C: 神的选择已经明朗，只有我等烈阳之子才是天空的正统…这场战争，注定将以晖之民的胜利作结……
E: The god's choice is clear: Only we, the Sunborn, are the true heirs of the sky... This war is destined to end in the victory of the Sunfolk...

C: …呃啊啊啊！！
E: ...Uwoahhhhhhh!!!

C: 看吧…你们果真懦弱至极。
E: See... You are all truly weak beyond measure.

C: 好大个眼睛。
E: What a big eye.

C: 我想，正是那比命运更坚实的誓约将我和索拉比斯留在了这里，一直守望着这座孤寂的堡垒。
E: I think that oath, stronger than fate itself, kept Solabis and me here to watch over this abandoned fortress.

C: 让它获得体面的解脱，或许就是最温柔的做法。
E: Granting it a dignified end may be the most compassionate act of all.

C: 等等，{NICKNAME}。
E: Hang on, {NICKNAME}.

C: 因为我看清了泰坦的冷漠，也看厌了凡人在它的漠视之下跳起的悲哀舞步。
E: I've seen through the Titan's indifference, and grown weary of the tragic dances mortals perform under their neglect.

C: 那些在这里游荡的记忆，他们似乎在祈求什么…好痛苦，好委屈……
E: The wandering memories here seem to be pleading for something... heavy with pain and grief...

C: 所以，在遇到困难的时候…如果你有什么难以启齿的话想要与人分享，就写信给*我们*吧？
E: When times get tough... if there's anything you can't bring yourself to say to others, just write to us.

C: 弑神的猎手，能从猎物的声音判断其状态。
E: A god-slayer can tell the state of their prey by its sounds.

C: 黑潮…它的力量恐怕凌驾于泰坦的权能之上。
E: The black tide... its power probably surpasses even that of the Titans.

C: 放眼看看这片狼藉的大地吧…这一切，都是你等不敬神明的异端犯下的罪孽……
E: Cast your eyes on this ravaged land... All of this, sins committed by you blasphemous heretics...

C: 大、大家！
E: E—Everyone!

C: 现在不是恋战的时候…
E: Now's not the time for a fight...

C: 有人在呼救…那边！
E: Someone is calling for help... Over there!

C: 这里也有那些虚浮的建筑结构……
E: Those translucent structures are here too...

C: 圣城中的灵水已经干涸…不过，*我们*可以尽力突破法吉娜祭司的封印法术…用「百界门」把你送入创世涡心。
E: The spirit water in the holy city has all dried up... We can try to break the sealing magic of Phagousa's priests... and use the Century Gate to send you into the Vortex of Genesis.

C: 我们应白厄阁下的请求，要不计代价护送两位平安离开！
E: We are under Lord Phainon's orders to escort both of you to safety, no matter the cost!

C: 绝灭大君…类似「幻胧」吗？
E: A Lord Ravager... Like Phantylia?

C: 请相信他拯救奥赫玛的决心。
E: Believe in his resolve to save Okhema.

C: 我都长大了，只有你还把我当小孩子……
E: Come on, I'm not a kid anymore, you're the only one who still treats me like one...

C: 报告老师，是白厄的玩具！
E: Mrs. Pythias, it's Phainon's toy!

C: 童年的回旋镖还是飞回来了。
E: Funny how the past finds its way back.

C: 但，即便命运确凿不移，无论它要将世界带向何方，只要我们能够共同面对，那就没什么好害怕的，对吧？
E: But you know what? Even if fate is set on its path, no matter where it steers the world... If we're together, there's nothing to worry about, right?

C: 啊，原来只有一张么？听着倒像是十几张……
E: Oh, there's just one card? With all those titles, I was expecting a whole deck...

C: 或许是他们来到了哀丽秘榭。
E: Perhaps they'll come to Aedes Elysiae?

C: 不会错了…灾难已经萌芽，比我们预想中更快。
E: It's here... The seeds of disaster have already taken hold, sooner than we had foreseen.

C: 看来，我们心里都已经得出答案了。
E: Then we know what we must do.

C: 我们还小的时候，我对他说过：希望这个世界永远都不需要救世主……
E: When we were little, I told him I wished this world would never need a Deliverer...

C: 莉维娅……
E: Oh, Livia... I'm so sorry...

C: 我…不知道。
E: I... I don't know.

C: 阁下，请。您所探寻的真相，就在这未至的岁月中。
E: Please, esteemed one, the answers you seek lie in these nonexistent times.

C: 呵…竟然还有人愿意陪我作伴。但，既然你还是出现在了这里……
E: Hehe... Looks like I've got company after all. But since you've made it here...

C: 去吧，这里交给我。如果黑潮造物足以淹没天际，那我们悬锋人就会在黑夜下作战——
E: Go, leave this to me. If the black tide creatures block out the sun, then we Kremnoans will fight in the shade—

C: 「我将最后一次沐浴，在温热耀眼的黄金中」——现在，是时候将其兑现了。
E: "I shall have my final bath in warm and radiant gold." — Now, the hour of fulfillment has come.

C: 纳努克，你这傲慢的蠢货！你觉得化作薪柴就是我们的命运？好啊，那就如你所愿，让薪柴燃烧吧——
E: Nanook, you arrogant fool! You think we were born only to serve as fuel for the fire? Fine, then — just as you wish, let the fire burn!

C: 我相信，在那段故事里，又或者无数段相似而不相同的故事之后，大家…所有牺牲的伙伴，都能和我们儿时憧憬的「救世主」一起，在更辽阔的星空下相聚。
E: I believe that in that story, or in countless stories, each alike yet unique, everyone... all the companions who sacrificed themselves, alongside the Deliverer we once dreamed of as children, will reunite beneath a vast, endless sky.

C: 即便那是一条无法回头的路？
E: Even if it's a path with no turning back?

C: 你认识她们？那就好说了。
E: You know them? Good, that makes things easier.

C: 但你说得对。愤怒，此时此刻，它是我唯一能仰仗的武器。所以……
E: But you're right. Anger, at this moment, is the only weapon I can rely on. So...

C: 那一天，是谁倒在剑下，留在过去；又是谁前往未来，我已经记不清了。
E: That day, who fell to the sword to be left in the past, and who went into the future? I can't remember anymore.

C: 够了，我只是在抒发自己的无奈，懂吗？对此我早有预期——「『黑潮』源于天外」，这事也不例外。
E: Enough, I'm just expressing my frustration. Don't you understand? I was already expecting this. "The black tide came from beyond the sky," and everything else is no exception.

C: 哼，敬拜学派的愚蠢发明也算是派上用场了。
E: Heh, the Venerationists' foolish inventions finally come in handy.

C: 金血…出自「毁灭」。我们早已失去…奢求温暖的权利。
E: Golden blood... is born from the Destruction. We have long since lost the right to seek warmth.

C: 他们也都和你一样，需要在此驻足片刻，消化那千万次循环中沉积的悲伤、痛苦和挣扎。
E: They all needed a moment, just like you do, to stop, to breathe, to process the weight of a million lifetimes' worth of sorrow, pain, and struggle.

C: 假如，我决定穿过那道门扉，去拥抱一个更适合「毁灭」的结局：<color=#dbc291ff>以这数亿颗火种点燃的烈阳，与「毁灭」的神明和祂的走卒，一同燃烧殆尽……</color>
E: If I choose to step through that door and embrace an end fitting of the Destruction, <color=#dbc291ff>let this sun forged from millions and millions of Coreflames burn me up along with the god of Destruction and THEIR minions...</color>

C: 方才冲洗完毕，却又滚滚而来……
E: We just washed it away, and here it comes again...

C: 就这样…让我们厮杀至时间尽头…！
E: Just like that... Let us battle till the end of time!

C: …但我仍会抗争，尽力捍卫希冀之物！
E: ...Yet I will still fight, defending what hope remains!

C: 令阳光驱散阴影吧。
E: Let the sunlight drive back the shadows.

C: 果然是你呀♪
E: I knew it was you ♪

C: 光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年，记得这个时间，塔兰顿已经陨落了，继承火种的黄金裔名叫「刻律德菈」。这是书本上的历史，也是我们要前往的岁月。要找到「律法」，阻止来古士……
E: Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>... I remember that Talanton had already fallen by then, and the Chrysos Heir who inherited that Coreflame is named "Cerydra." That's what's recorded in history and the period we'll be heading to. We'll need to find Law and stop Lygus...

C: （这座村庄就是白厄的起点。三千万次轮回，三千万次失败，如今他的重担交到了我手中。）
E: (This village is where Phainon's life started. After thirty million cycles and thirty million failures, his burden is now in my hands.)

C: 这位「冬霖爵」好像没那么向着凯撒，又身居高位。旁边的「断锋爵」…语言系统也有些特别……
E: This "Dux Brumalis" doesn't seem to like the Imperator very much, but she holds a high rank. As for this "Dux Fragoris," his way of speaking seems rather unusual too.

C: 代价微不足道。只需将那脆弱、残缺的人性于「毁灭」中献祭——
E: The price is insignificant. All that is needed is for you to sacrifice that fragile, incomplete humanity to the Destruction...

C: 该和天才们商议下现状了。
E: We should consult with the geniuses about the current situation.

C: 接下来，就该去享受圣城声名远扬的沐浴文化，好好放松一下啦！这一路上，人家最期待的就是这个了！
E: Then, we should go enjoy the renowned bathing culture of the holy city and relax! It's the thing I've been looking forward to most on this journey!

C: 两位英雄…就是凯撒所说的神谕之子吧？此前未能向两位致意，不周之处还请见谅。
E: You two heroes... must be the Children of the Prophecy that the Imperator spoke of? I didn't get a chance to greet you earlier, my apologies.

C: 好吧，也有道理。
E: Fair enough.

C: 对了，你们还不知道呢。每次战前胜后，凯撒都会举办一场属于黄金裔的盛会，鼓舞士气。
E: Oh, right, you don't know. Every time before a battle or after a victory, the Imperator holds a grand feast for the Chrysos Heirs, to lift our spirits.

C: 别苦着脸了。大局已定，又是为{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}摆的盛宴，何不学学泰坦，活在当下，及时行乐？
E: Don't look so grim. All has been decided. Since it's a banquet for {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#}, why not take a leaf out of the Titan's book, live in the moment and enjoy life to the fullest?

C: 我还没说呢，你都知道了？
E: I haven't even said anything, and you already know everything?

C: 欸？那不是……
E: Wait, isn't that...?

C: 看吧，十分安全。
E: See? It's completely safe.

C: 得先换一只杯子。
E: I want a new cup for myself.

C: 恰恰相反，它能让你更加清醒。
E: On the contrary, it can make your mind... even sharper.

C: 咕…咕……
E: Glug... glug...

C: 清洗者之首凯妮斯：她是第一个将利刃刺向凯撒的人，亲身为我的敌人们做了表率。
E: It was Caenis, the head of the Cleaners. She was the first to draw a blade against the Imperator, and personally made herself an example for my enemies.

C: 现在，他们无话可说。他们敬畏我如同敬畏律法：我就是刻律德菈，我就是凯撒——
E: But now, they all lie silent. They now fear me as they fear the law, for I am Cerydra, and I am the Imperator!

C: 我必须指出：论演技之精湛，您也不遑多让。这场宴会从一开始就是您的布局……
E: I must point out that you are just as impressive an actor. This banquet was always going to be a game of chess...

C: 唉，在这个地方等你真是太无聊了！没人陪我聊天，没有网，连吃的喝的都没有——简直跟坐牢一样！
E: It's been so boring, waiting for you in this place! There's no one to chat with, no internet, and not even anything to eat or drink. It's basically a prison!

C: 嗯？翁法罗斯不就是黄金裔和英雄之旅的世界嘛，用小拇指想想都知道啦。
E: Huh? Isn't Amphoreus the world of the Chrysos Heirs and their Hero's Journey? I could figure that out in an instant.

C: 多一个保底方案，不是很好吗？只要你帮助忆庭取回想要的东西，哪怕一切都被铁墓格式化了，我们也能用「记忆」重建世界…甚至宇宙哦。
E: Wouldn't it be better to have an additional failsafe? As long as you help the Garden retrieve what we want, even if Irontomb reformats everything in the physical plane, we can use Remembrance to reconstruct the entire world... or, should we say, the entire universe.

C: 小家伙…听得到吗？
E: Can you hear me... little one?

C: 你就「嘭」地发动炼金术，把他变成笼中困兽。
E: You trigger your alchemy with a BOOM and turn him into a caged beast.

C: 走吧，该去完成「再创世」了。
E: Let's go. It's time to complete the "Era Nova."

C: 于是，「海洋」的半神，剑旗爵海瑟音，妄图用歌声令我陷入幻境，试图让一位天才沉沦……
E: So, the demigod of Ocean, the Dux Gladiorum, Hysilens, sought to bring me into a fantasia with her voice and drown a genius in slumber...

C: 我们会接过您的职责，驱散黑色的潮水。
E: We'll take up your mantle and drive back the black currents.

C: 你不愿游向群星了么，剑旗爵？
E: So you'll stop swimming toward the stars, Dux Gladiorum?

C: 你是个聒噪的囚徒，吕枯耳戈斯。
E: You talk too much for a prisoner, Lycurgus.

C: 这将是我最后一次履行你的律令了。
E: This will be the last time I carry out your decree.

C: 现在，亲手摧毁它，粉碎这场幻梦吧。就此，神礼观众将暂时离场，而当我们再次相遇——
E: Now, destroy it. End the illusion. The Theoros will take his leave for now. And when next we meet...

C: 熟悉的英雄们洋溢着微笑，庆祝你的归来…然而，你知晓这一切仍是记忆中的虚妄。
E: Familiar heroes beam with joy, celebrating your return... yet you know this, too, remains a hollow memory.

C: 祝福我吧，{NICKNAME}。然后……
E: Give me your blessings, {NICKNAME}. Then...

C: 嗯！我相信您一定会满意的，毕竟…迈向未知的前路，从来都是人的本能呀。
E: Got it! I'm sure you'll find this to your liking. After all... It's human nature to want to embark on a journey into the unknown.

C: 正如翁法罗斯，一同你我二人的命运，像那回环的海流。
E: Like the circulating ocean current. Like our two fates. Like Amphoreus itself.

C: 愚蠢？不，它是{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}所有造物里最具智慧的，只有它能看清时代的流向。
E: Stupid? No. They are the wisest of all of {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#}'s creations. Only they can perceive the currents of time.

C: 因为，「律法」既不可能永恒，也不可能唯一……
E: Because the "Law" can be neither eternal nor unchallenged...

C: 你果然不是她。三月七不可能记得这事。
E: You are not March 7th. There's no way she would remember that detail.

C: 一直以来，我潜藏在「岁月」的罅隙。要欺瞒一位天才并不简单。但我可以做到。
E: I've been hiding within the cracks of Time all these years. It isn't easy to deceive a genius, but I can do it.

C: 我不意外。但此刻，我不需要这份信任。
E: I'm not surprised at your answer. But I don't need your trust right now.

C: 这座深埋在地底的遗迹，在「智识」的语言中，被称作内核层。但我为它取了个更亲切的名字……
E: This ruin buried deep underground is called the "kernel" in the language of Erudition, but I gave it a friendlier name...

C: 和你无关，是权杖的安全协议。证明我们来对了地方。
E: It's got nothing to do with you. That's the Scepter's safety protocol. It means we're in the right place.

C: 有啦。就从「曳石贤人」迈德漠斯……
E: There. Shall we start with the meeting between...

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>执行协议λ<unbreak>003</unbreak>-<unbreak>097</unbreak>：格式化对象。</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Executing Protocol λ<unbreak>003</unbreak>-<unbreak>097</unbreak>: Format object.</color>

C: 过去，这道机制是「岁月」和它的半神。但在翁法罗斯进入死循环后……
E: This mechanism was previously the Time Titan and their demigod, but after Amphoreus entered an endless loop...

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>格式化进程已完成。</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Formatting complete.</color>

C: 当然。
E: Indeed.

C: {NICKNAME}，我越发觉得，陪伴她的「听众」是某种具象的存在。
E: {NICKNAME}, I'm increasingly certain that her "audience" and companion isn't some figurative entity.

C: 因为你无论如何都无法忽视她，对吧？
E: Because there's no way for you to ignore her, right?

C: 只有这样，我才能在这场名为「翁法罗斯」的英雄之旅中……
E: Only then can I pen the name "March 7th"...

C: 无论如何，我们都会重逢。
E: One way or another, we will always find our way back to each other.

C: 谁在那？！
E: Who's there!?

C: 不记得我了么？
E: Do you not remember me?

C: 嘿咻，这下就好了，{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}祝福满满，密径可以重新使用啦！
E: Phew, it's all good now. {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}'s blessing is full, and the Hidden Passage can be used again!

C: 我看，不必多费口舌了。她们和我一样，不过是你的一簇记忆。
E: There is no need to elaborate further. They are merely a collection of your memories, just like me.

C: 「…唤起灵水的记忆。」
E: "...Calls forth the spirit water's memories."

C: 我都会带你回家。
E: I will bring you home.

C: 说回荒笛。方才的挑衅，恐怕只是佯攻。
E: Speaking of Terravox, his aggression just now was probably some distraction.

C: 既是保护，也是惩罚。在一位天才的镜子里，你们能够与同伴重逢，好好反省自己的作为。
E: It'll serve as both protection and a punishment. You'll reunite with your peers in a genius's mirror, where you can reflect long and hard on your past actions.

C: 我能够从她面前，全身而退。
E: I can survive my encounter with her.

C: 其中缘由，正与我们的目的地有关。
E: The reason has to do with our destination.

C: 黎明云崖……
E: Dawncloud...

C: 正如烈日只在长夜的尽头升起。
E: Just like how the blazing sun can only rise at the end of the evernight.

C: 「赞达尔」将丹恒送入了「神话之外」……
E: "Zandar" sent Dan Heng into the Exomyth...

C: 您果然理解了。
E: You've got it. I knew you'd understand.

C: 以「负世」之名，我向你保证：刻法勒永志不忘。
E: Then in the name of "Worldbearing," I promise you: Kephale will never forget this.

C: 这一战事关寰宇，容不得任何闪失。我建议——除帕姆外——全员出动。
E: The fate of the universe hangs in the balance. We can't afford any slip-ups. I suggest everyone, except Pom-Pom, join the fight.

C: 轮到我登场啦！终于不用坐冷板凳了！
E: It's my time to shine! Finally off the bench!

C: 那…交给各位了。我不便在流光忆庭面前现身。
E: ...I'll leave it to you then. It'd be better for me to not show myself in front of the Garden of Recollection.

C: 未免太不把匹诺康尼的独立董事放在眼里了。好久不见，姬子小姐。
E: That's a pretty blatant disregard from the Family for Penacony's independent director, I'd say. Long time no see, Miss Himeko.

C: 你的意思是，铁墓还会感染有机生命？
E: You mean Irontomb can infect organic life too?

C: 直到「铸王」这位大君进入董事会的视线——多的我就不说了，涉及机密，还请理解。
E: Until the Lord Ravager Archforger caught the Board's attention... I'll leave it at that, as it's confidential information. Hope you can understand.

C: 歌颂「晨昏之眼，雅辛忒丝」，您洒下的彩虹，让晨曦与晚霞都变作「存护」的微光。
E: Praise be to "Hyacinthia, Eye of Twilight," for the rainbow you cast turns the light of both dawn and dusk into the glimmer of Preservation.

C: 别聊那么远的话题，凡事都得一步一步来。走了，别让外面的人等太久。
E: There's no point worrying about the end just yet. One step at a time. Let's go. We don't want to leave the others waiting.

C: 你的花园怎么都带点毒？
E: Every flower in your garden's got a bit of poison, huh?

C: 别提专有名词了，螺丝。那玩意只有一个名字……
E: Skip the science talk, Screwy. That thing only goes by one name...

C: 又回来了。
E: We're back.

C: 我侦测到数个独立信源，数据结构与屏障相似。
E: I'm picking up multiple independent signals, with the same data structure as the barrier.

C: 准备好迎接世人的召唤了吗，{NICKNAME}？
E: Are you ready to answer the call of the world, {NICKNAME}?

C: 身为一团火，燃烧是白厄的本能。
E: To be a flame is to burn. It is simply in Phainon's nature.

C: 你愿意跟上我们，去追逐自己的愿望吗？
E: Will you come with us to chase after your own wish?

C: 「粉色」的光，终于齐聚了呢。
E: All the "pink" lights have finally come together.

C: 「冲破阴影后，是黎明的轮廓。」
E: "Beyond the shadows... lies the outline of dawn."

C: 「惟有…助长火焰。方能烧熔…那绝望的未来。」
E: "Only by... feeding the flames... can we melt... that hopeless future."

C: 那结果，未免太过残酷…
E: That outcome seems way too cruel...

C: 「再创世」的进程，中断了？
E: The progress of Era Nova has been interrupted?

C: 意思是，属于你的舞台快搭好了。要不学习下刻法勒，先去发表一番神谕再入睡？
E: In other words, your stage is almost set. Do you wanna take a leaf out of Kephale's book and make some prophecies before your nap?

C: 该去接过白厄背负的重担了…
E: It's time to take over the burden that Phainon has been carrying...

C: 对不起呀，{NICKNAME}。这一路上，取回的记忆越多，我心中的违和感就越是强烈。
E: My apologies, {NICKNAME}. The more memories I got back along the way, the more I felt that something wasn't right.

C: 谢谢，{NICKNAME}。「每一个你」…听着真温柔呢。
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. "Every single Cyrene"... That sounds so kind.

C: 因为，这就是「开拓」的意义。
E: Because that's what the Trailblaze means.

C: 终点站：「开拓」！
E: Final destination: the Trailblaze!

C: 在铁墓的恨意吞没一切的瞬间，一道目光看向了我。
E: In the instant Irontomb's hatred devoured everything, a gaze fell upon me.

C: 所以现在，我想为这个故事，还有你我，再添一笔。
E: So now, I want to add something more to this story and us.

C: 你已经完全学会啦。
E: You really have learned everything now.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>别害怕，我会和你一起，为故事写下新的结局，和新的开始！</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Don't be afraid. I'll be with you, writing both a new ending and a new beginning to this story!</color>

C: 平衡月，我让「秩序」成为自由的基石——
E: In the Month of Balance, I make Order the foundation of freedom...

C: 请、请等等！阁下，这不是你想的那样……
E: W—wait! Please! This isn't what you think...

C: 话说回来，你们这「星穹列车」还真是豪华。听说你们会跑到不同的世界去旅行？那想必收集了不少新奇的宝贝吧，嘿嘿……
E: Speaking of which, your "Astral Express" is quite luxurious. I hear you travel to different worlds? Must have collected quite a few interesting treasures, hehe...

C: 不放心的话就去看看吧，{NICKNAME}阁下。
E: If you're worried, feel free to check everything out yourself, {M#Mister}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}.

C: 不过，从刚才起，我就很好奇…这包红色的辣椒油，怎么会放在浴池边上？
E: But I've been wondering... Why is there a pack of red chili oil sitting by the bath?

C: 连小小灰都这么说…可恶，缇安绝不屈服！
E: Even Little Gray's saying that... Darn it. Trianne won't give in!

C: 呀，缇安溜了…缇宁会尽到伏兵的职责。
E: Ah, Trianne ran away... Trinnon will fulfill the ambush duty.

C: 谢谢你，白厄。
E: Thank you, Phainon.

C: 就如卡厄斯兰那以三千万世的愤怒，令「毁灭」流下了一滴金血……
E: Just as Khaslana's rage of thirty million cycles made the Destruction shed a drop of golden blood...

C: 各位可要为我们所有人挺身而出呀♪
E: You'll all have to stand up for us ♪

C: 诶？我还觉得该由你来做最后的总结哪。不过……
E: Huh? I actually thought you should be the one doing the final wrap-up. But...

C: 「然后，是你治愈了天空。」
E: "It's you who healed the sky."

C: 不愧是树庭的教授…即便对于从未亲眼见过的事物，竟也能如此笃定。
E: As expected of a professor from the Grove... To be so certain even about things you've never seen with your own eyes.

C: 我们赢下了这场战役呢。感谢您，黑塔女士。如果没有您，胜利根本无从谈起。
E: We won the battle. Thank you, Madam Herta. Without you, we never would've stood a chance.

C: 怎么可能？！呼吸……
E: No, how is this possible!? Breathe... breathe...

C: 可以…回家了呀。
E: We can finally... go home.

C: 但是啊。当人们看向夜空，去以赞美星星的决心，爱着正在消逝的一切时——我希望用那温柔的粉色告诉他们，「爱」总会得到回应。
E: But when people gaze into the night sky and love what is fading with the same resolve they have to praise the stars, I want that soft, gentle pink in the sky to tell them: "Love" will always be answered.

C: 你也是这么想的，对吧♪
E: You think so too, right? ♪

C: 飞向粉色的明天♪
E: And takes flight toward a pink tomorrow ♪

C: 「粉色的头发，还有尖尖的耳朵，她生来就是『岁月』的祭司。」
E: "Pink hair and sharp ears... She was born to be the priest of 'Time'."

C: 这一次，我想和你分享个小故事：来这里的路上，我看见一只小小的若虫。它停在一根倒下的麦穗上，在阳光下闪闪发光。
E: I want to share a story with you this time. I saw a little nymph on my way here. It was on a fallen wheat stalk, and it glowed under the sunlight.

C: 我在想，过去的每一个「昔涟」，会不会也觉得它很美呢？
E: I wonder... did every "Cyrene" in the past feel that the nymph was beautiful?

C: 记录：桃子。不喜欢眼泪。
E: Record: Peach. Doesn't like tears.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>错误进程：解析中……</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Process error: Analyzing...</color>

C: 「比如我的身高，缇宝老师的童真，还有阿格莱雅的美貌♪」
E: "Like my height, Tribbie's innocence, and Aglaea's beauty ♪"

C: 嗯…虽然还是不懂。但人家相信桃子。
E: Mmm... I still don't get it, but I trust Peach.

C: 对不起，我不知道。如果自己都不愿相信，要如何给出回答呢……
E: I'm sorry, I don't know. If I don't even want to believe in the answer, then how am I supposed to answer you...

C: 与「开拓」共同前进吧。
E: Let's move forward together with the Trailblaze.
("Curiosity.")

C: <color=#dbc291ff>2纳秒前，我已将黑塔的决定传达给所有「赞达尔」——</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>As of two nanoseconds ago, I have passed Herta's decision to all the "Zandars" in the universe.</color>

C: 诸位不必再以「赞达尔」称呼我。
E: You no longer need to address me as "Zandar."

C: 请你们接受战略投资部最为诚挚的感谢，姬子小姐。
E: Miss Himeko, the Strategic Investment Department extends its deepest thanks.

C: 你谁啊？没看我唱歌呢嘛，没礼貌。
E: Who are you? Didn't you see I was singing? Where are your manners?

C: 损毁的机器人。
E: The broken robot.

C: 下面的话你可听好啦。我要给你的是……
E: Listen carefully now. What I am going to give you is...

C: 他还在空间站的时候，就整天夸耀自己发明的<color=#dbc291ff>勘星钎、星域导影图、特殊显影法、各种软饮专利</color>有的没的，恃才傲物，谁也不服。
E: When he was still in the space station, he would boast about his inventions all day. <color=#dbc291ff>Astro Rod, Cosmos Guide chart, the Special Autoradiograph, various soft drink patents.</color> He was so arrogant and refused to obey anyone.

C: 而且，说到底，我记恨他，那都是气话。
E: And besides, when I said I hated him, I said it in the heat of the moment.

C: 让我看看，这些香料，在仓库里耐心找找不成问题……
E: Let me see, these ingredients... I suppose I can find some in the warehouse if I look hard enough...

C: 不好意思，除了大名鼎鼎的勘星钎与星域导影之外，毋庸置疑，那也是我何塞•拉萨罗的手笔。
E: Oh, sorry! Besides my other famous inventions, like the Astro Rod and Cosmos Guide, this is another one of my masterpieces.

C: 不不，那可不是一回事……
E: No, no... that's not what I meant...

C: （流言已经开始发酵了，先在周围收集一下情报吧。）
E: (The rumors are already circulating. Let's gather some intel first.)

C: 那里有一些突发情况，现在很危险。
E: I'm afraid this is a live situation. It's too dangerous.

C: 是什么原因我不管。我只知道，怪物破坏了这里的电源设备。
E: Good luck figuring that out. All I know is that monsters have destroyed the power supply installations here.

C: 那当然！我敢爆料，难道还造假不成？
E: Of course it is! If I had any doubt, I'd have kept it quiet.

C: 未识别到权限认证卡，请确保已携带权限认证卡后再启动。
E: Authentication verification card not detected. Please re-initiate after making sure you have the authentication verification card.

C: 同步程序激活中…激活成功！确认坐标信息来源于<color=#dbc291ff>主控舱段</color>。
E: Activating synchronization program... Activation successful! Beacon signal is coming from the <color=#dbc291ff>master control zone</color>.

C: 嘘…你果然来找我<color=#dbc291ff>第二次</color>啦。「无敌宇宙核弹头协会」，有没有兴趣了解一下？
E: Hush... So you did come back for a <color=#dbc291ff>second</color> conversation with me. Are you interested in learning about the Invincible Space Warhead Association?

C: 你是不知道，这封复信里她的语气有多快乐，连中继器的信号都那么快乐！
E: You have no idea how happy she sounded in her reply. Even the Airwave Repeater signal was cheerful!

C: 我去调查过，有一帮「军团」怪物占领了收发讯号的区域，你能帮我去看看到底出了事吗？
E: In my investigation, I found out that a group of Legion monsters occupied the area where the signals are transmitted. Can you help me find out what happened?

C: 医疗舱。
E: Medical cabin.

C: 蓝色转译录是我的伪造记录——莱斯莉会拒绝洛奇。别以为这样残忍，以后洛奇就不必再等她的回信，他的人生还有机会。
E: The blue log is forged — in which Lesley refuses Rocky. Don't think about this as cruel. This way, Rocky won't have to wait for her reply in the future. He can just move on with his life.

C: 多少都是情。
E: We can't put a price on our friendship.

C: 发、发抖？我没、没有，你一定是搞错了。
E: Shaking? It i—is not. You must've misheard.

C: 谢谢你，善良的人。
E: Thank you, you're very kind.

C: 它仍然在叫着一个你无法听清的名字。
E: It is still calling the name you cannot hear clearly.

C: 怎么在这种事上你的记性倒是好得很啊！
E: How come you remember this so well?

C: 听起来玄之又玄…
E: This sounds mysterious...

C: 年轻人，你何出此言？别着急，我们之间也许有着什么误会。
E: Young {M#man}{F#lady}, why would you say that? Calm down, there seems to be some misunderstanding between us.

C: 你不会异想天开，怀疑跟你眼前所看到的景象有关吧？
E: Surely you can't be so naive as to think this has anything to do with what you see here right now, are you?

C: 「修正」的结果是什么？
E: How did this "fix" go?

C: 好了，我先跟你说下三位可疑人员吧——分别是密卷科的梅厄、法政科的克里斯，还有医疗科员乔安。
E: Well, let me tell you about the three suspects — Mare from the Department of Insight, Chris from the Department of Galactic Geopolitics, and Joanne from the Medical Department.

C: （等等，我在胡思乱想些什么——好险，差点就被模因病毒感染了！）
E: (Hold on. What was I thinking? That was close! I almost got infected by the memetic virus!)

C: 诶？
E: Huh?

C: 前方侦测到多个敌方反应，有不少信标数据落在了它们手里，识别程序或许能够派上用场。
E: Multiple enemies detected ahead. They possess a large amount of beacon data. The scanner program might come in handy here.

C: 将镜头对准呜呜伯，按钮发光的时候就提取信标数据。
E: Point the camera at the Wubbaboo and extract data once the button lights up.

C: （清醒一点！回忆起来我来这里的目的是什么！）
E: (Wow, the cringe is strong... I need to remember what I came here for!)

C: （刚才提到录音稿的，好像是这个人…）
E: (This is the one who mentioned the transcript just now...)

C: 但这是属于他一个人的修行，最好别去打扰。
E: But I suggest you don't bother him. He's given himself a personal trial.

C: 佩佩，咱们走。
E: Peppy, let's get going.

C: 直觉告诉我你知道内情。
E: My guts tell me that you know the inside story.

C: 但它们一向与幼童磁场相投，关系尤其密切。
E: However, they somehow have a connection with children and often share a close bond.

C: 从照片上来看，「呜呜伯」出没于各处，它们行动的具体路径，恐怕只有专门照拂它们的研究员才会知道。
E: Just based on these photos, Wubbaboos can appear anywhere and everywhere. Likely, the specific pathways of their movement can only be discerned by those who take care of them.

C: 我完全理解你的打算，阿兰大人。可我们的确不知道「呜呜伯」的具体行踪。
E: I do fully understand where you are coming from, Captain Arlan. But we really don't know where the Wubbaboos are.

C: 但是最近，它们突然集体出动，好像是因为某个共同目标…就连它，我最要好的朋友，也拜托我寻找东西——全跟某位科员相关。
E: However, recently, they have been mobilizing en masse for a certain collective aim... Even this one, my best friend, wanted me to find some things for them — all of which seem to have a connection with a certain researcher.

C: 呜！
E: Woo!

C: 是阿兰做的炒饭。
E: You made me some fried rice!

C: 是星穹列车？
E: The Astral Express?

C: 这次我打算从空间站内部入手，看看能不能找到一些线索，还原入侵者当时的行动路线，说不定就能发现之前错过的盲区。
E: This time, I plan to start from inside the space station and see if I can find some clues to trace the intruders' steps. Maybe I can find the blind spot I missed before.

C: 看这个方向，她接下来和同伴一起去了监控室。
E: They seem to be heading toward the monitoring room.

C: 只…只剩压缩机了……
E: J—Just a few compressors left...

C: 原来如此，自己先潜入，然后帮同伴走正门，很经典的骇客操作。我看看，登录的名字是…「卡里维尔•伦纳德」？！
E: So, that's what happened! She sneaked in first, then helped her partner in through the main door. It's a classic hacking operation. Let's see... The registered name is... "Leonard Calliwell"!?

C: 但我也要指出，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，这些都是我的一己之见。对于黑塔，你们应该有自己的判断。
E: Nevertheless, I must also clarify that this is my opinion alone. You should form your own judgment on Herta, {F#young madam}{M#young sir}.

C: 那只是一份复制而已。更正：不止您手中那张，存放在这里的也是。真正的奇物在计划之初就转移走了。结论：您可以自由分享这份数据。
E: That's just a duplicate. Correction: Not only is the one in your possession a duplicate, but so is the one here. The real curio was transferred elsewhere at the very beginning. Conclusion: You may share that data freely.

C: 没了，全都没了，真的一点都没留下…太过分了、太过分了！
E: It's gone, it's all gone! They seriously left nothing behind... They went too far this time... too far!

C: 骑士，还有他的虫子骑士。似乎没什么特别的。
E: A knight and his bug knight. Nothing to see here.

C: 我会在此后，独自寻找办法出逃。即使被虫角贯穿也无妨，越接近死亡，或许就越接近「纯美」的道途……
E: I shall find a way to escape. It matters not if my flesh is pierced by the insect's horns. The closer I get to death, the closer I may get to the Path of the Beauty.

C: 我仍然反对。
E: I'm still against it.

C: 非常好，{NICKNAME}，纯美骑士的使命完成后，就将去寻找下一片亟待守护之地…
E: Excellent, {NICKNAME}. After completing my mission here, I shall find somewhere else that requires my protection.

C: 唉…维利特刚刚也自己下车走了，他看起来好难过啊。大概他也搞不懂银枝在想什么吧……
E: *sigh* Velite just left the Express too — he looked really upset. I guess he didn't know what Argenti was thinking, either...

C: 来碰瓷的？
E: Are they trying to extract compensation?

C: 要是来找列车麻烦，本姑娘可要出手了！走啦，{NICKNAME}，我们快去看看是什么情况。
E: Hmph, if they're here to stir up trouble, I'll teach them a lesson! {NICKNAME}, let's go check it out.

C: （那人应该是<color=#dbc291ff>密卷科</color>的人，不是这里……）
E: (Not here... That person is probably with the <color=#dbc291ff>Department of Insight</color>.)

C: 抽象也有抽象的美。
E: Well, there's beauty in the abstract I guess.

C: 据温世玲所说，阿德勒在消失前始终念叨着「香味」一词。
E: Wen Shiling said Adler kept muttering about a "phrase" before he disappeared.

C: 拉帝奥先生，请你和{NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#女士}同行，将其收容。
E: Mr. Ratio, please go with {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME} and contain the fire.

C: …就会满身破绽。
E: ...you'll be full of weaknesses that others can see through.

C: 但世上没有不透风的墙，我很难信任自己之外的人。缜密研究中有任何一个数据出错，都会产生问题。我讨厌不受控制的问题。
E: I find extending trust beyond myself is challenging. A single error in detailed research can generate issues, and I despise matters that escape my control.

C: 作为当助手的回报，我可以给你「奖励」，任何你想要的我都可以满足。
E: I can also reward you as compensation for being my assistant. I will fulfill your every wish.

C: 嘿，银河球棒侠来也！
E: Never fear, the Galactic Baseballer is here!

C: 不知道，我都用收音机听相声。
E: No idea. I just listen to comedy skits.

C: （呼噜呼噜…）
E: (Purring)

C: （热情地欢呼！）
E: (Cheer passionately)

C: 波尔卡•卡卡目应该不会回应。她失去音讯很久了。
E: It's unlikely we'll hear from Polka Kakamond. She's been off the grid for quite some time.

C: 它看起来十分忧愁，泪水倾泻而出。
E: It looks deeply distressed, crying profusely.

C: ——当然存在。
E: Of course there would be.

C: 是，我以此屏蔽嘈杂的噪音。不得不承认，研究曾令我过分痴迷——那不是段很好的时间。但现在，我更加得心应手了。
E: Indeed, this is how I keep the distractions at bay. I have to admit that research once made me obsessive — that wasn't a good period in my life, though I now navigate it much more smoothly.

C: 跟着我吧，没事的。
E: Follow me. It'll be okay.

C: 嗐，她一个人在家生闷气呢。
E: Hah, she's sulking at home alone.

C: 建议前往诊所前，寻找当事人「尤利安」，他对您印象深刻，拒绝和您沟通的概率为0。
E: Suggestion: Search for "Julian" before heading to the clinic. You left a deep impression on him. There is a 0% chance that he will refuse to communicate with you.

C: 哎，昨天学校发了新的练习册，他想抄近路带给其他同学，也不知道在路上看到什么东西，就变成这样了。
E: *Sigh* The school distributed a new batch of practice question booklets yesterday. He took a shortcut to deliver them to some of his classmates' homes. I have no idea what he saw on the way, but he's been like this ever since.

C: 昨天…在靠近裂界的时候，我本想抄近道，可是一抬头…一抬头就看到他们了。
E: Yesterday... When I was approaching the Fragmentum, I was going to take a shortcut. But... I looked up... I looked up and I saw them.

C: 嘟嘟嘟噜——该回去充电咯。
E: Beep beep beep — it is time to return and charge my batteries.

C: …喂，别躲啦，你冻得都打颤了。
E: ...Hey, get outta there or you'll shiver to death.

C: 这已经不是我们能裁定的事了，如果他们所言属实，那就只有「大守护者」才能决定该怎么做。
E: This decision is beyond us. If what they say is true, then only the supreme guardian may decide their fate.

C: 丹恒这家伙，好歹也搭理布洛妮娅一下嘛……
E: That Dan Heng — he can't just ignore Bronya...

C: 好耶！贝洛伯格，准备好再欢迎本姑娘一次吧！
E: Belobog, here we come!

C: 数额是多少？
E: How much is owed?

C: 那就是九百一十八万……
E: That comes to <unbreak>9,180,000</unbreak>...

C: 那个，托帕小姐…其实我们是来为布洛妮娅求情的。你也看到贝洛伯格现在的状况了…他们根本没能力偿还那么巨额的债务嘛。
E: Ahem. We're actually here on behalf of Bronya. It's just, you know... Given Belobog's circumstances, it isn't exactly awash with money right now. The Belobogians don't have the means to pay off such a huge debt.

C: 别掉以轻心。听报信的说，矿区里的家伙们相当不好对付。
E: Let's not get ahead of ourselves. I've been warned that the ones in the mine won't go down without a fight.

C: 公司的人嘛，黑科技就是多，养只扑满当宠物也不稀奇啦。我们过去瞅瞅它吧？
E: The IPC are all about their sci-fi sorcery, so it's not that surprising. Wanna go take a look?

C: 应该收集所有人的看法。
E: Perhaps you should gain some insight from others first?

C: 六成多的概率？听起来确实不怎么靠谱呀……
E: Only <unbreak>63%</unbreak> of planets succeed? That's not exactly comforting...

C: 走吧，账账——我们下去仔细评估一下。
E: Come on Numby, we've got some assessing to do.

C: 也正是出于这份共情，我至今还抱着一丝希望——即便经历了这些不愉快，我认为我们之间依旧可以达成共识…通过和平的方式。
E: It's because of this empathy you have, that I still hold out a glimmer of hope. Despite all that's happened, I hope we can still find common ground... through peaceful means.

C: 完全没有。所以我才觉得不可思议…这么庞大的工程，居然在战略投资部的调研报告里完全没有提及。
E: Not at all... which is why I find it so incredible... Such a massive feat of engineering, yet there's not a single mention of it in any of the Strategic Investment Department's reports.

C: 一定要提醒守护者大人，不能主动踩进对方设好的陷阱里！
E: You must warn the Madam Guardian not to allow herself to fall into their trap!

C: 哇…没想到，下层区居然还有这种地方？！
E: Wow... I didn't expect to find a place like this in the Underworld!

C: …你听说过「疑难重症患者互助会」吗？
E: Have you heard of the Complex Illness Mutual Aid Society?

C: 我知道他在上层的研究并不顺利，所以经常给他写信，让他到下层来看看，和孤儿院的孩子们待上一段时间——权当是一种调剂。
E: I knew his research in the Overworld wasn't going well. I used to write to him and ask him to come down and stay with the kids in the orphanage for a while. I thought it might help take his mind off his research.

C: 若您想要了解详情，或是参加比赛，都请随时告诉我！掘掘博士竭诚为您服务！
E: If you want more information or to join the matches, feel free to ask me about it! I will do my best to give you all you need!

C: 那么，又是哪位选手如此倒霉，竟然碰上如此恐怖的对手？没错，正是那位近期在俱乐部天梯榜上高歌猛进的新秀——
E: And who's the unlucky one to be facing such a fearful opponent? That's right. It's the rookie who has made great strides on the club Leaderboard recently!

C: 你看这下阙，「细问魈魅踪迹，偏看收容一隅」明显是在指引我们去查探水魈的活动范围；而「戚戚与之同谋」，则点明了共犯的存在。
E: Look at this sentence. "An inquiry into spirit traces, a glance into the site of storage" is obviously leading us to investigate the Xenohydro's range of activities, and "to be an accomplice" implies the existence of an accomplice.

C: 可这句话的确是在陈述事实啊……
E: But I was just stating a fact...

C: 拉明娜怎么看自己的？
E: How do you see yourself, Lamina?

C: 要我说，就是这空间站里帅哥太少了，个个儿才把他捧上天去。
E: If you ask me, there are just not enough good-looking guys in the station. That's why they treat him like a god around here.

C: 有个怪物在开关附近打转，得先解决它。
E: There's a monster in the area. We'll need to deal with it first.

C: 逃亡游戏结束了，放下武器，跟我回去吧。
E: Enough cat and mouse — drop your weapons and come with me.

C: 我就说吧——你肯定是睡眠质量太差导致出现幻觉了！
E: Well, then, I will say it out loud for you. You are definitely suffering from hallucinations due to a lack of sleep!
...Huh?

C: 哇，你看，前面这块地砖浮出来了——这是什么，暗格吗？里面还有枚椭圆形的……
E: Wow, look, the tile up ahead is floating — what's this, a secret compartment? There is also an oval...thingy...?

C: （附近似乎有怪物在游荡…小心前进吧。）
E: (There seem to be monsters roaming nearby... Let's proceed with caution.)

C: …太好了，这样我就能安下心来了。
E: ...Wonderful, that's such a relief.

C: 看看这忙碌的人流，{NICKNAME}——上层区的生活还是一如既往，就好像什么都未曾发生。
E: {NICKNAME}, look at the busy flow of people — life in the Overworld carries on as usual, as if nothing has happened.

C: 我…对不起，小姐，我出于好奇打开了其中一封。瓦赫少爷在信里嘱咐您，一定不要让老爷和夫人知道他的事……
E: I... I'm sorry, Miss. I opened one of them out of curiosity. Master Vache stressed in the letter that your parents must not know what happened to him...

C: 如此严寒…实在难以想象有人能在这种环境下生存。
E: Such harsh cold... It's hard to imagine anyone surviving in these conditions.

C: 虽然进展不算太快，但至少还是追查到了一些新线索。
E: Progress was really slow, but they managed to hunt down some new clues.

C: …啊，你说那个红衣服的小姑娘？我想起来了。布洛妮娅大人继任仪式的时候，我在上层区见过她。
E: ...Ah, you mean the little girl in red? I remember her — I saw her in the Overworld at Lady Bronya's succession ceremony.

C: …没用的零件？能给我们看看吗？
E: ...Suspicious components? Can we have a look at them?

C: 一有消息我马上通知你，{NICKNAME}。我有很强烈的预感，我们就快揪出幕后黑手了。
E: I'll let you know if we get any new leads, {NICKNAME}. I have a hunch that we're close to uncovering the culprit behind the curtain.

C: 你们是来查案的？那正好，我这就给你们列举一下那个骗子的罪行——
E: You guys are here to investigate the case? Perfect, I'll give you a list of the culprit's scams, too—

C: 你怎么怂得跟个新手一样，就这点出息还想挣大钱？
E: Stop acting like a wimp! You think you can make a fortune with that kind of attitude?

C: 嗯哼，这下可以放我们进去了吧？我们要和诺尔伯特少爷聊要紧事，和生意有关。
E: Mm-hmm! So, you are gonna let us in now? We need to talk to Mr. Norbert about some important business-related matters.

C: 素质教育这一块还有待提升。
E: Kids these days...

C: 那么，我该如何成为博物馆的志愿者呢？我很乐意帮忙，但肯定免不了要提交申请材料一类的东西吧。
E: So then, how do I become a volunteer? I'd love to help out, but surely there's an application form of some sort to fill out?

C: 嗯，谢谢你。那我们就在博物馆会合吧。
E: Okay, thank you. Let's meet up at the museum.

C: 呵呵，看来你们的关系不错。那么，接下来的流程是怎样的呢？
E: Hehe, looks like you two are quite familiar. So then, what's the next step?

C: 嗯，那就由我来负责说明吧。野战治疗医院是隶属于银鬃铁卫后勤部的医疗机构，主要负责对战场伤员的随行医护工作，但也会定期面向全体公众开放。
E: Well, then allow me to explain. Field hospitals fall under the Silvermane Guards' Logistics Department, and are mainly responsible for providing on-the-spot medical care for those wounded in battle — but they're also often available for the masses, too.

C: 没记错的话，我先前已经向佩拉提交了申请表…是她没收到吗？
E: If I'm not mistaken, I submitted my application to Pela a while ago... Didn't she receive it?

C: 可以修改「技能特长」这栏…
E: You may make changes to the "Skills & Expertise"...

C: …咳咳。那么，请做好准备，希露瓦小姐，面试即将开始——
E: ...Ahem, very well. Please get ready, Miss Serval. The interview is about to begin...

C: 关于名字这栏——「贝洛伯格唯一指定摇滚巨星兼机械天才希露瓦•朗道」——可以请您解释一下这个复杂的名字吗？据我所知，您的名字并不是这样的……
E: Could you tell me more about your complicated name, "Belobog's one and only rock'n'roll superstar and mechanics genius, Serval Landau"? As far as I know, that's not your real name...

C: 难道是{NICKNAME}带你过来的？
E: Did {NICKNAME} bring you here?

C: 咳咳…现在该轮到我问问题了吧？
E: Ahem... I guess it's my turn to ask questions now?

C: 呜…呜哇！
E: Wh—Whoa!

C: 别说的好像你来过一样。走，离近点看看。
E: ...I'll be the judge of that. Come on, let's take a closer look.

C: 我有权保持沉默。
E: I have the right to remain silent.

C: 你怎么看待费斯曼大叔？
E: What do you think of Mr. Fersman?

C: 算了算了，我们再去找找犯人的线索吧！
E: Forget it, let's keep looking for the culprit!

C: 避难所中的物资品箱子，经过长途跋涉搬运到这里。通过箱子上的印刷文字勉强可以认出是：铆钉镇。
E: The supply crate from the shelter, transported here after a long journey. Barely recognizable, some text is printed on the box: Rivet Town.

C: 如果他和小偷是一帮的…那他也是坏家伙！
E: If he's working with the thief... then he's also a bad guy!

C: 你谁啊，见到我也不打声招呼，懂不懂这里的规矩？
E: Who are you? Why didn't you give me a proper greeting? Don't you know the rules around here?

C: 感谢你的情报，我们一定会谨慎应战。
E: Thanks for the intel. We'll be careful.

C: 那怪物…在说话！
E: The monster... it's talking!

C: 的确。好在你战斗经验丰富，能够见招拆招。
E: Indeed it was. We're lucky to have an experienced fighter like you who can adapt to different enemies.

C: 哦，对了！你要去找玲宝的话，还得知道她长什么样吧？
E: Oh, right! If you're gonna go find Lynxy, you gotta know what she looks like!

C: 佩拉情报官刚才好像和什么人向雪原的方向去了……
E: Intelligence Officer Pela just left for the Snow Plains with somebody...

C: 不出意外的话，雪在入夜前还会越下越大…你有好好准备防寒的衣物吗？
E: The snow is supposed to get heavier later in the day... Have you got enough warm clothes?

C: 嗯，都按你说的准备好啦。多亏了你的露营手册。
E: Yep, I brought everything you told me to — all thanks to your camping guide.

C: 而且，这个季节的山风通常是北风，这两座矮崖正好可以为我们挡住雪原的强风——这也是不能在刚才坡道上扎营的原因之一。
E: Also, the mountain wind during this season usually comes from the north, which is another reason why we couldn't camp on that previous slope. These two hills can block the Snow Plains gales for us.

C: 埃里克，对吧？这个给你，拿着。
E: It's Eric, right? Here, you can have this.

C: 你们，你们也要小心！高处的房子那里，好像有很可怕的东西……
E: Y—You guys need to be careful, too! There seems to be something real scary in that house up on the hill...

C: ——等会儿，难道，在那之前……
E: Wait, unless, before that...

C: 克拉拉有帕金斯陪着，不会有事的。我收拾好这批止痛剂就会走啦。
E: Perkins is protecting me. I'll be alright. I'm going to leave after I gather up these painkillers.

C: 虎克也一起来找，肯定能找到的。
E: I'll look with you. We'll definitely find it if we work together.

C: 这是什么呀？上面好像还写了字…「给<unbreak>50</unbreak>年后的尤利安」？
E: What's this? Looks like something is written on it... "For Julian <unbreak>50</unbreak> years in the future"?

C: 哔嘟…「家用寻物仪」查宝为你服务。请使用语音输入目标物件关键词。
E: Beep, beep, beep... Findie the Home-Use Object Finder at your service. Please say the target object you want to search for.

C: 坚持锻炼…听老巫婆的话…这样就能变得比你们更强吗？虎克知道了！
E: Training every day... listening to the old witch... Will that really make us as awesome as you guys? In that case... deal!

C: 解析完成，仍维持原有判断。该个体为裂界生物，危险等级评估为——极高。
E: Reanalysis complete. The original assessment stands. This is a Fragmentum creature, and is thus extremely dangerous.

C: 呃…现在该做什么？
E: Erm... what's next?

C: 唔，总之…大概是有人一直在修缮这里吧？可到底是谁呢……
E: Anyway, someone must be looking after this place. But who?

C: 天地可鉴，我桑博真是一片热忱——
E: My legacy will prove that Sampo Koski was nothing but a willing and devoted servant of—

C: 行了行了！我们信你还不行嘛，快点带路吧。
E: Ugh, enough! Jeez! We believe you, okay? Show us the way already.

C: 回答错误。认证结果——失败。
E: Incorrect answer. Certification result: Failure.

C: 重新评估中——个体威胁指数：高。战斗模组启动，准备清除威胁。
E: Reassessing... Subject threat index: High. Initializing combat module. Threat elimination activated.

C: 这都答不上来？垃圾，多上几年学再来吧！
E: You don't know the answer? That's lame. It's back to school for you!

C: 你信巴列维可就完蛋了，这老笨蛋，上次这么做他就被电了个人仰马翻的。
E: If you believe a word that senile idiot Balaway says, you're done for. The last time he acted on his own advice, he electrocuted himself.

C: 这不是跟着克拉拉的机器人吗？
E: Isn't this the robot that was following Clara around?

C: 克拉拉…受到威胁……
E: Clara... in danger...

C: 总会有办法的。现在，首先要说服克拉拉。
E: There's always a way. But first, we have to convince Clara.

C: 但是——你为什么要带他们来？
E: But... why have you brought them?

C: 布洛妮娅？你还好吗？
E: Bronya? Are you okay?

C: 但现在，虽然史瓦罗不再封锁炉心，地下的人还是不能贸然涌入上层区。
E: However, even though Svarog is no longer sealing off the Furnace Core, there's no way that we undergrounders could go pouring onto the surface.

C: 机器人的…家人？
E: Family... of a robot?

C: 身份就像是面具。人更换身份的时候，也会更换自己对外展示的形象。
E: Our identities are like masks. When we switch between them, we change the way the world perceives us.

C: 你在谎言里活得够久了，布洛妮娅。现在就是冲破牢笼的机会。
E: You've spent long enough living in lies, Bronya. This is your chance to break out of the cage.

C: 啊，鼹鼠党的荣誉队员！虎克正打算去找你呢！
E: Ah, honorary member! I was just about to go see you!

C: 老爹已经订好生日宴会了，但虎克的「菌菌」还没有卖出去…而且，送给老爹的礼物也没有准备好。
E: Daddy's already planned his birthday party, but I haven't been able to sell Junjun... or buy a gift for him.

C: 别来和我搭话！这拍卖会上的人我一个都不信！
E: Don't try making conversation with me! I don't trust anyone here!

C: 那玩意就是垃圾，千万别竞价。
E: The bear is garbage. Don't bid on it.

C: 所有「技术性调整」都是借口…
E: "Technical glitches" are always excuses...

C: 就是就是，「地火」怎么一点防范意识都没有！
E: Yeah, why wasn't Wildfire keeping a lookout?

C: 我劝你们识趣一点，老大他可是费了很大力气才打听到这玩意的，万一……
E: You two better think twice. The boss put in a lot of effort to find this item. If you even...

C: 今天是特别的一天——除了鼹鼠党的小朋友们以外，虎克还请到了这位亲切勇敢的新朋友，{NICKNAME}。希望你也能在聚会上玩得尽兴！
E: Today is an extra special day. In addition to The Moles, Hook has invited a dear and brave new friend. {NICKNAME}, I hope you have a wonderful time at the party today!

C: 没错没错，荣誉队员可是帮了大忙了！
E: That's right, this honorary member helped Hook a lot!

C: 我听娜塔莎说了，是你护送着虎克去把她的大熊玩偶给拿了回来。哎，以前虎克不抱着那个玩偶就睡不着觉呢。
E: Natasha told me that you helped Hook retrieve her teddy bear. It used to be that Hook could only fall asleep when she held that bear in her arms.

C: …啊！那虎克的礼物不是也…派不上用场了？
E: ...Ah!? So my gift is also... useless...

C: 侦、侦探？我知道了，你、你是来帮忙抓小偷的，对吧？
E: D—Detective? I see. You're here to help catch the thief, right?

C: 那家伙应该是往那个方向跑的——现场没人动过，痕迹应该都还在…那、那就拜托这位{F#好姐姐}{M#好哥哥}帮忙抓贼了。
E: I think he ran that way. No one has touched the crime scene, so any traces he left behind should still be there... P—Please catch the thief for us.
█I███human. ██injured? ██no████hurt! ██please don't██.

C: …总之，我们先把这个小家伙和零件带回去吧。克拉拉有把握…不对，克拉拉一定会修好它。
E: I guess we should return this little fella and the parts. I think I can... I'll repair it.

C: 评估结果：无法彻底复原。建议——抛弃原有外部装甲，将核心模组及芯片移入新外壳，保留表层电路及相关传动装置。
E: The assessment concludes that a total recovery is impossible. It is recommended that the robot's external shell be removed and replaced while keeping the outer circuitry and related transmission devices.
█████Incompatible████in-████!

C: 嗯…正好，克拉拉也需要些时间，做好心理准备。
E: Okay... I need some time to emotionally prepare myself anyway.

C: …帕斯卡，我们回来啦。
E: ...Pascal, we're back.

C: 帕斯卡，乖乖，等待！等待，进一步，指令！
E: Pascal, good, waiting! Waiting, further, instructions!

C: 戒备森严啊…想溜进去怕是没戏了。希露瓦，是你智取的时候啦。
E: They've jacked up security alright... how the heck are we gonna sneak in? Serval, we need one of those brainwaves.

C: 没错。筑城者认为地狱在每个世界都可能存在，是一种若不介入则必然降临的状态。
E: They do. The Architects believe that hell can exist on any world — a plight that will inevitably come to be without intervention.

C: 破釜沉舟…
E: They cut off their only retreat...

C: 不行！没有警卫队长的密钥，谁也不能接近能源中枢。
E: Haha, no, no, no, no... No can do! No one gets near the energy hub without the security captain's encryption key.

C: 弗朗兹说，来的人是杰帕德戍卫官的亲姐姐……
E: I heard from Franz that it's Captain Gepard's sister...

C: 哨卫向我报告的时候，我还在想这其中是不是有什么误会。也许是入侵者挟持了你，也许你进入禁区和警报完全无关。但……
E: When the sentry reported to me, I thought there must have been a misunderstanding. The enemy alarm had to be unrelated to your entry into the restricted zone — perhaps the intruders had taken you hostage. And yet...
Uhh...
