C: 要我说，这都是迟早会发生的事。你们只是给了我一个提前行动起来的理由罢了。
E: Honestly, this would have happened sooner or later. You just gave me an excuse to bring everything forward.

C: …唉，佩拉长官教训的是。这次是我没有考虑清楚后果就擅自行动了…而且那些家伙说的也没错，只凭我一个人的信念，什么都改变不了。
E: *sigh* You are right, Officer Pela. I didn't think carefully enough about the consequences of my action. And those goons weren't entirely off the mark when they said I couldn't take on the whole world just on my own.

C: 是。而布洛妮娅很可能就是诱饵。
E: ...Yes. And Bronya may well be the bait.

C: 我不明白…假如真相如你所说，可是过去的几百年里，在位的每一任守护者都在抗拒星核的召唤……
E: I don't understand... Even if the truth is as you say, every generation of guardian has resisted the call of the Stellaron...

C: 外表再像，裂界复制出来的始终是赝品。打倒她！
E: It may look like her, but the Fragmentum can only create forgeries. Bring her down!

C: 我本打算说些多余的灰心话，想想还是算了。跟你们搭伙冒险，总觉得再大的困难都不在话下。
E: I was about to bore you all with my gloomy reflections... but on second thought — not today. Adventuring with you guys by my side has made me feel like no obstacle is too big.
You...

C: 我会赐予你安宁。
E: I will give you the peace you deserve.

C: 哎哟，梅姐求求你了，俺记不住事儿，全靠笔记了。
E: Oh, please help old Mei here. I can't remember things anymore. My notes are all I have.

C: 您对自家保姆也太好了。
E: You treat your housekeeper so well.

C: 我没看到什么，只能说结论是「星槎确实比人跑得快」。
E: I didn't really see anything. My takeaway was that starskiffs are faster than humans.

C: 我记得我追到一个十字航道之后，就什么都看不到了，你看到它去哪儿了吗？
E: I remember that it disappeared after I pursued it to a crossroad. Did you happen to see which way it went?

C: 有些迷糊的女士说了什么。
E: The clumsy lady's testimony.

C: 能帮到你们就好。
E: Glad to help.

C: 忘了那些狗屁要求吧。我用我倍加珍惜的学术声望起誓：
E: Forget about those darn requirements! I swear with my invaluable academic reputation—

C: （转述陶德的请求）
E: (Recount Todd's request)

C: 我拿到你要的东西了。
E: I got what you want.

C: 我还得继续清点库存，没什么事的话回头再聊吧。
E: I still need to continue making inventory. If there is nothing else, let's talk another time.

C: 你怎么了？
E: What's wrong?

C: （上报希拉的学习成果）
E: (Reporting the results of Sheila's studies.)

C: 阿兰，艾丝妲很担心你…
E: Arlan, Asta is worried about you...

C: 更何况是一朵失败的蘑菇。
E: Let alone a failed mushroom like me.

C: （拖着忧郁诗人走）
E: (Drag Gloomy Poet away)

C: 噢。我好悲伤。
E: Oh, I'm so sad.

C: 「万壑千岩水自流，云深何处觅蓬丘。回首骁骑征途路，鳞渊境里试身手。」
E: "Rugged rocks and gorges winding through, where clouds hide the peaks from view. A glance back at the journey true, in Waterscape Gorge, I test anew."

C: 总之，把「灵感玉兆」交出来吧。
E: Anyway, hand over your Inspo Jade Abacus.

C: 是韵律与格式。
E: It's about rhythm and style.

C: 我还得再去找找。
E: I'll continue my search.

C: …怎么还有点小聪主人的风格。
E: ...Why does that sound like Master Cong's style.

C: 为什么会不顺利呢？
E: Why?

C: 我、我……
狗屁不通，赶紧拿回去！
E: This is rubbish. Take it back!

C: 尘寰相见，好礼相送。
E: Acquaintance from the mortal coil, luxurious gifts from beyond.

C: 我从一开始不该骗你说「我是经纪人」，但那也没有办法的事。
E: I shouldn't have told you that I was her manager, but what would you have me do?

C: 很多人都信任着「狐仙黛青」，你们要是出去告诉别人，「狐仙黛青」其实是躲在集装箱里的大汉……
E: So many people have been believing the fantasy of the Foxian Beauty Daiqing. If you go out there and tell them the Foxian Beauty Daiqing is actually a dude hiding in a container...

C: 不行，他们应该知道真相。
E: No, they should know the truth.

C: …但是，这个。
E: But this...

C: 光是保证没有用，我们会监督你的…等等，这听上去有很多工作量，{F#她}{M#他}会监督你的。
E: Guarantees mean nothing, we will keep our eyes on you... Wait, this sounds like a huge workload, {F#she}{M#he} will keep watch on you.

C: 长生种和短生种不会有好结局。
E: It is ill-fated for a long-life species to be bonded with a short-life species.

C: 以我的观点来看，时间的长短不足评价爱情的质量，毕竟这里是宇宙呀。
E: The way I see it, the love between two people isn't less valuable because life is short. After all, everything is short-lived compared to the universe.

C: 是的，是的。但请不要把这当作是一种推诿辛苦劳动的借口。
E: Yes, but please don't get the wrong idea that I'm trying to avoid physical work.

C: 老夫也不知道啊。不过既然留下了标识，就意味着线索和指示。贝尼尼老师发现了什么呢？
E: I have no idea. Since they were left there, they're meant to be clues. What did Bernini discover?

C: 你们学士的心眼可真多啊…
E: You scholars are so convoluted...

C: 大毫耐心听完你的讲述，面不改色。
E: Dahao patiently listens to you recount the story, expressionless the whole time.

C: 不过，这次情况不太一样，星核灾变一生，人力问题就成了无底窟窿。而且，就算我们抓住龙女大人，也暂时没法送她回去。
E: But, this time is different. Because of the Stellaron crisis, we're constantly short of manpower. Besides, even if we catch the Dragon Lady, we can't take her back anytime soon.

C: 现在突发危机，魔阴身的处置方式更该谨慎，不能儿戏。
E: Seeing as we're already dealing with one crisis, we need to be extra vigilant when dealing with the mara-struck. This is not something that can be taken lightly.

C: 我这身体的情况，白露大人你最清楚了。广场上要是有十王司的人，我可就……
E: You know full well about my situation, Lady Bailu. If there are people from the Ten-Lords Commission present in the plaza, then—

C: 通常说这种话的人都不值得信任。
E: ...Said no trustworthy person ever.

C: 你先帮我们藏起来！事情等会儿再说！
E: You — help us hide first! We'll talk later!

C: 他偶尔察觉到你的存在，好奇地看向你，但很快却无法集中注意力，又被奇异的景观夺去了心神。
E: Every now and again, he seems to notice you and he looks on with curiosity. But before long, he can no longer concentrate as he's distracted by the fantastical landscape.

C: 你来了啊。
E: There you are.

C: 嘿嘿，语气没拿捏好，没办法，老夫我不当小孩太多年，说话难免有些不习惯，你体谅下吧。
E: Hehe, I can't help putting on this tone. I haven't been a child for so long that I'm not really used to speaking. Forgive me.

C: 还有吃喝不停的宴会之星！
E: And Banquet Star, where you never stop eating!

C: 你还好吧？
E: Are you all good?

C: 大海似在呼唤着孩子。
E: The sea seems to be calling for the child.

C: 可是，他、他没在这里，我们还得找到他……
E: B—But he's not here. We still need to find him...

C: 报告，雪衣大人，在流云渡西南方发现了药王秘传的残党！
E: Madam Xueyi, the remnants of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus have been found in the southwest of Cloudford!

C: 我一点也不意外。那么，丹鼎司的要求是？
E: ...I'm not surprised in the slightest. What does the Alchemy Commission want, then?

C: 这些人多半不会善罢甘休吧。
E: These folks aren't the type to just let it go.

C: 你这就要让他离开了。
E: You're... asking him to stay here?

C: 重建封印时，有想起些什么吗？
E: When the seal was re-established, did you recall anything?

C: 这股力量…就像鳞渊境的潮动般充满力量。是你，丹枫…你回来了？
E: This power... it rivals the tidal forces in Scalegorge Waterscape. Is that you, Dan Feng... Have you returned?

C: 根据报案人的说法，我们找到几个特点——「异象与怪物都是突然出现的，异象结束之后，随星槎带来的食物却不见了。」
E: According to the statements of the witnesses, we have come to several conclusions regarding the incident: "The phenomenon and the monsters appeared simultaneously. When the mirage was gone, so did the food brought by the starskiff."

C: 食物很令人在意…
E: The part about food is really concerning...

C: 开始吧。
E: Let's begin.

C: 好可爱的老大…
E: Cutest boss I ever saw...

C: 我要吃至味盛苑！
E: I want a full Garden of Gourmet feast!

C: 这个顺序…真能对得上吗？我看看……
E: Is this order really correct? Lemme see...

C: 二三一四
你知不知道我是什么来路？竟然还敢威胁我？
E: Oh, you dare threaten me? Do you know who I am?

C: 对不起，我是地衡司的卧底。
E: My apologies. Truth is, I work undercover for the Realm-Keeping Commission.

C: 您好，这位执事，我们想找一个人。
E: Excuse me, officer — we're looking for someone. Can you help us?

C: 我听天舶司的人说起过，驭空大人是罗浮数一数二的飞行士，云骑军中的王牌，上一回瞧见您挽弓的模样，便知道传言不假。希望未来能再有幸目睹您驾驭星槎的神技。
E: Well, I'd heard from members of the Sky-Faring Commission that you were a top-tier pilot, Madam Yukong, and an ace among the Cloud Knights. Now that I've seen you in action, I know the rumors were true. I hope to witness your flying ability for myself one day.

C: 看来恩公也遇到过类似的事情吗？真是太好了！不是不是，我的意思是，终于给我遇上了一个有共鸣的人。
E: So you've experienced it yourself, benefactor? That's great! I—I mean... I'm happy I finally found someone who can understand me.

C: 不不，这次是风味特产。
E: No, no, it's a local specialty, trust me.

C: 遗落在迴星港吗？嗯…那我们陪你走一遭，一起找找看吧。
E: In Stargazer Navalia? Mm... Let's go with you and have a look.

C: 我们列车的宗旨就是乐于助人。
E: The goal of the Express Crew is to help other people.

C: 还有一些问题…
E: I have a few other questions...

C: 不是…这是夕葵小姐的工作日程…她可真是个大忙人。
E: No... this is Miss Xikui's daily schedule... she's super busy.

C: 这桌子里哪有地方放东西？
E: This desk has space to put stuff?

C: 这款办公桌的卖点就是这样啊。极简的设计配合超大容量的暗格，很多文职人员都用这一款。
E: That's the selling point of this desk: Super simplistic design with super spacious hidden compartments. Lots of office staff use this desk.

C: （看得出来，驭空在那场惨烈的战役之后，承受了巨大的痛苦。难道她正是因此才不愿让晴霓成为斗舰飞行士的吗？）
E: (It's clear that Yukong suffered greatly after that terrible war. Is that why she doesn't want Qingni to be a fighter pilot?)

C: 那一刻你有没有想过，要是你不在了，我会是什么样的心情？
E: Did you at any moment think about what I would feel if something happened to you?

C: 我还没有决定。
E: I haven't made my choice yet.

C: 离开——这是我自己的选择。
E: I'm leaving — this is my choice.

C: （问我的话，当然是……）
E: (As for whether I'd want to, it seems obvious to me...)

C: （「刃」的事情）
E: (Ask about Blade)

C: 星核猎手…将军大发慈悲放你们一条生路，你们倒是一点都不领情啊。
E: Stellaron Hunters... The general was merciful enough to let you live, but you haven't shown the slightest bit of gratitude.

C: 嗯，「魔阴身」暂时压制住了，别受太大的刺激，别见熟悉的人，应该没什么问题。
E: Yes, the mara in you is temporarily suppressed. So long as you avoid over-stimulation and familiar faces, you shouldn't have a problem.

C: 这是……？
E: Huh...?

C: 呵呵，恩公又说笑话～
E: Hehe, am I really such a nuisance~?

C: 不、不要吓唬帕姆！为什么老是有怪东西闯进列车里？帕、帕姆要提高列车的安保等级帕！
E: Wh—What!? Don't scare Pom-Pom like that! Why are there always strange things sneaking onto our train? P—Pom-Pom is going to upgrade the security level around here!

C: 饮月，你来啦。
E: Imbibitor Lunae, you're here.

C: 不一会儿，星槎流水线开始运作了起来…
E: Before long, the starskiff assembly line started to operate...

C: 不必心急，这里离鳞渊境不过一程之遥，你家将军交代的任务，快要结束了。
E: Patience, young man — we're not far from Scalegorge Waterscape. The mission the general tasked you with is about to come to an end.

C: 小吃摊的话，在那边儿。
E: The food stall is over there.

C: 若有人发现，请将它送往神策府，以便云骑军及时策应。
E: If anyone finds this tracer, please take it to the Seat of Divine Foresight so the Cloud Knights have the necessary intel to act swiftly.

C: 打扰啦，队长。
E: Captain, could you spare a moment?

C: 看来星核邪祟的影响在逐渐加深……
E: Looks like the influence of the Stellaron spirits is growing...

C: 在获得绝对的力量前，你一定也是渴望永远活下去的吧？但仙舟联盟不在乎短生种的福祉！他们固执地禁绝走向长生的光荣之路。
E: Before you can grasp absolute power, you must yearn for immortality, don't you think? The problem is that the Xianzhou Alliance doesn't care one bit about the well-being of short-life species! They stubbornly blockade the glorious path to immortality.

C: 看来只能灭口了…
E: Looks like I'll have to make sure no one finds out...

C: 已经抄完了？这么快？我检查一下…嗯…嗯…嗯…还真是都抄完了，还抄得又快又好。看来你是颇有仙缘的。
E: You're finished? So soon? Let me see... Hmm... Hmm... Yes, it would appear you are finished — a fast and accurate transcription. It seems you are destined for immortality.

C: 给你这张药方，只要服下这副药，就能够像我一样，斩断妖弓祸祖施加在你灵魂上的枷锁，获得极致的力量与自由。
E: Here, take this prescription. Through this medicine, you will become like me. You will be able to break the shackles that the Devilish Archer Author has used to chain your soul. You will gain unbridled power and freedom.

C: 并不是不信任你啊，灰牡丹。这是为了大家的安全着想。
E: It's not that I doubt your loyalty, Gray Peony. It's like I said — security.

C: 而且，她喜欢帮助别人。经常免费为穷苦人配药。
E: She's no stranger to helping others, either — always prescribing medicine to those in need — and free of charge.

C: 这次受灾波及太广，云骑就算有再多人也分不过来啊。
E: The extent of the disaster means the Cloud Knights are short on manpower...

C: （再等等）
E: (Wait)

C: 好久不见啊，三月姐，欢迎来到桑博宾馆！
E: Miss March, long time no see! Welcome to the Sampo Hotel!

C: 三月七，不要回忆过去，那对你无益有害。请你相信我。
E: March, don't dwell on the past, it won't do you any good. Trust me.

C: 你的父母怀着绝望将襁褓中的你送入寒冰的航船，又怀着希望目睹你没入浩瀚星海的惊涛巨浪中。
E: Filled with despair, your parents swaddled you in warm clothing and placed you into an ice ship. As they watched you sink into the turbulent waves of the starscape, they felt a newfound hope.

C: 那就穿过这节列车，找到你的房间吧。
E: Then let's pass through this carriage and find your room.

C: 有你这句话…我大概能安心一些了。只希望她能在列车上住得顺心，不要被我们这些怪人吓到……
E: Thanks... I feel more at ease now. I just hope she'll have a good time on the Express and not feel too alienated from the rest of us...

C: 看来想寻回记忆，已经超出大衍穷观阵的能力范围了。
E: It seems like retrieving memories is beyond the operational spectrum of the Matrix of Prescience Ultima.

C: ——很幸运，我正是一位优秀的医生，虽然是精神科的，哈哈！让我们开始吧。请您闭上眼睛，将额头抵在梦泡上。
E: ...Luckily, I just so happen to be an excellent doctor, albeit a psychiatric one, haha! Let us begin. Please close your eyes, and rest your forehead on the dream bubble.

C: 唐突打断二位实在抱歉。只是刚巧听两位谈起演武仪典，{NICKNAME}又是老熟人了，我才过来打个招呼。
E: I apologize for interrupting your conversation. I happened to hear you discussing the Wardance, and since {NICKNAME} is an old acquaintance, I thought I'd come and say hello.

C: 交给我吧，不会让她惹事的。
E: Sure thing. I'll make sure she doesn't get into any trouble.

C: 那好，我们先砸了这些铁罐子，有话一会再说！
E: Fine, let's smash these metal cans first, then we can talk!

C: 这我哪知道啊？
E: How am I supposed to know?

C: 我还活着，可村子里那些年轻人……
E: I'm alive, but all the young people in the village...

C: 我将这柄追随我征战多年的剑留给你们。用我这些年所教方法，你们必能将这世间最后一只怪物斩杀。
E: I'm entrusting you with this sword that's been with me in countless battles. Use the skills I've taught you over the years, and you'll surely defeat that last demon.

C: 不，你见识过无名的剑士如何决定自己的命运，孤云，当然你也可以。
E: That's not true, Guyun. That Nameless Swordmaster shaped his own destiny, so you can too.

C: 虽然岁月侵蚀了碑文，但它看起来似乎还能辨认——
E: While the inscription is pretty worn with age, perhaps you can still make out some of it...

C: 雇佣你来匹诺康尼的那位，应该不希望你和其他势力暗中来往吧？
E: The one who hired you to come to Penacony probably doesn't want you secretly linking up with other forces, right?

C: 走了，替我向乔瓦尼问个好。
E: Go. Tell Giovanni I said hi.

C: 等等，我给绕晕了…这左中右都是啥来着？
E: Hang on. I'm confused here... Lefton... Wright? Is this some kind of joke?

C: 又是花火？她就这么热衷于把自己写死？
E: Her again? Sparkle really is obsessed with scripting her own death.

C: 想再听听嫌疑人信息。
E: I'd like to hear about the suspects one more time.

C: 记得「钟珊」是<color=#dbc291ff>把脸摔破相了</color>，没错吧？
E: Remember Zhongshan's face was <color=#dbc291ff>disfigured</color> after the incident at the cliff, right?

C: 哦…您已经找到答案了吗？
E: Hmm... Have you solved the case?

C: 不能！演这么多角色很累的。
E: No! Playing so many roles is tiring.

C: ——是为了你们。
E: ...We're here for you.

C: 我只想告诉你一些曾经发生过的事：那些陨落星神的故事。
E: I just want to tell stories from the past: Stories about Aeons that have fallen.

C: 将军要我们去往「工造司」…
E: The general wants us to go to the Artisanship Commission...

C: 这种小事儿，搁我手底下那不是一刻钟就搞定了。
E: A simple task like that is only fifteen minutes' work for me.

C: 他们的传统便是隔三差五捅几个篓子——要么将洞天楼阁凭空变走，要么是机巧人偶暴动什么的。
E: Periodically stirring up trouble is part of their tradition... entire buildings vanishing into thin air, puppet riots — you get the picture.

C: 我倒不是吓唬恩公。是建议您去工造司匠人处打听，看看能否像造访太卜司那样，找个青雀妹妹那样的司内人。
E: I'm not trying to scare you — I'm simply suggesting you ask the craftsmen to see if they can provide an insider like Qingque to guide you.

C: 公输先生有什么想法吗？
E: Any thoughts, Master Gongshu?

C: 丹枢？等等？丹鼎司的丹士长怎么也滞留在外？
E: Dan Shu? Wait — why would the Alchemy Commission's chief alchemist be away from her post?

C: 还好有{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}在这儿，要不然他们才不会这么轻易放过我。
E: Th—Thank goodness you were here... Otherwise they wouldn't have let me off so easily...

C: 这算是安慰吗？
E: Is this supposed to be comforting?

C: 没办法治好吗？
E: Is there no cure?

C: 对于短生种来说，这些都可以靠人造器官和植入物来解决。但对于长生种来说，这些都是「天缺」。
E: For short-life species, all these problems can be solved with artificial organs and implants. For long-life species, however, they remain as incompletions.

C: 不过，你最好在不碍事的地方看。不要挡住其他客人。
E: All we ask is that you find a quiet spot away from the browsing areas!

C: 在下将它定名为「餐云承露丹」，想送给{NICKNAME}。
E: I call it the Brumedew Concentrate Pellet, and I'd like you to have it, {NICKNAME}.

C: 我明白了，这就去找她。
E: I see. In that case, I'll go look for her now.

C: 我的棺材本…
E: My savings...

C: 今天您来地衡司有何贵干呢？
E: What brings you to the Realm-Keeping Commission today?

C: 在带走这些废铁前，我必须提个问题，就当是提前支付的报酬好了——你们为什么会对贝洛伯格的科技感兴趣？
E: Before taking these scrap metals with you, I must ask you a question, and I'll take your answer as the advanced payment. Why are you two interested in the technology of Belobog?

C: 他们能接受放生机兵吗…
E: Will they be able to accept the idea of releasing automatons?

C: 我…呃，你好像…说的也对……
E: I... um... think you've got a point...

C: 「放生帮」？哦，您是来谈那件事啊。怎么样？您顺利加入「放生帮」了吗？
E: The Unshackled? Oh, you're here to talk about that. How did it go? Have you joined them?

C: 您办事我们一向是放心的。现在整个地衡司都等着您的好消息呢。
E: We've always had confidence in you. Everyone from the Realm-Keeping Commission is waiting to hear about your success.

C: 行了，热闹也看够了，剩下的放心交给我就好！你赶紧去地衡司领赏吧！
E: Okay, we've seen enough of the action. Please leave the rest to me! Go ahead and collect your reward at the Realm-Keeping Commission!

C: 这下他们应该会明白，自己一直以来到底在做些什么。
E: Now they should be able to realize their mistake.

C: 啊？谁告诉你她是放生帮的人了？
E: Huh? Who told you she was one of us?

C: 嘻嘻，看来你已察觉，此处万径如谜…
E: Hehe, you've noticed it, no? All roads are but puzzles in this place...

C: 呵呵，去找那些纸符小人吧，那是你判官朋友留下的多余线索。
E: Hehe, go — find all those clues your judge friend left behind. Find the talismans...

C: 他们是仙舟上最神秘的机构！办案人员也总是神秘出现、神秘消失。但凡他们出现的地方必有大案要案发生！
E: They're the most mysterious organization on the Xianzhou! Their investigators always pop up out of nowhere, then disappear without a trace. If they show up, you know something serious is going down!

C: …家、家人们，听我解释啊！
E: ...Wh—What's up guys, hear me out!

C: 岁阳到底是什么？
E: What exactly are heliobi?

C: 算是我求你了，能再靠近一些吗？我好害怕……
E: Please, I'm begging you! Can you please come closer? I'm so scared...

C: 刚才那些话都不是我说的！
E: I didn't say that!

C: 对喜好刺激人类情绪的岁阳来说，这可太有意思了。
E: For a heliobus that enjoys provoking your weak human sentiments, I can assure you there is nothing more amusing.

C: 当然了，你不会以为你能看见我在这里，就没有附身于你了吧？天真！
E: Of course. Surely you don't think I've left you just because you can see me? So naive!

C: 不怪你，都是那个坏家伙在挑拨离间。呜呜呜……
E: It's not your fault... It was that bad heliobus making us fight...

C: 明白了，等汝考虑清楚。
E: I understand. Take your time.

C: …也就是说，要启用「束形却邪阵」？
E: ...So we'll need to activate the Evil Binding Matrix, right?

C: 不过，这厮失去了它敛聚的大部分力量，暂时不足为惧。可它一日存在，就有一日的隐患……
E: Cirrus lost most of their power and poses no danger for the time being. But they will remain a threat for as long as they exist...

C: 去调查其他铜镜。
E: Investigate other mirrors.

C: …虽然，我不想再走回头路，但是咱们还得问些与藿藿有关的问题，确认一下！
E: ...I don't wanna go back the way we came, but I need to ask some questions about myself to make sure!

C: 呕…呕……
E: *Barfs*... *Barfs*...

C: 柯柯娜接过唱片，徒劳地拂去唱片上的污渍，却怎么也擦不干净。
E: Cocona takes the record and fruitlessly tries to clean up the grime on the record, but to no avail.

C: 嘀嗒——{NICKNAME}，我觉得很不对劲！
E: Tick-tock, {NICKNAME}, I think something's very wrong!

C: 嗯，不能丢下柯柯娜。
E: Yes, we can't leave Cocona alone.

C: 我们不会丢下你的。
E: We will not abandon you.

C: 对呀…这里不就我们两个人吗？
E: Yeah... There are only the two of us here, aren't there?

C: 您真是一位乐观的人…我很羡慕。
E: You really are an optimistic person... I truly envy you.

C: 报、抱歉，普莱佐先生——我这就换一张唱片……
E: M—My apologies, Mr. Prezzo. I'll swap out a record right away...

C: 店长啊，我和您说…
E: Shopkeeper, let me tell you...

C: 这种事故一般很难有生还者。
E: Survivors aren't common in incidents like this.

C: 你、你们想做什么？
E: Wh—What are you doing?

C: 敲门。
E: Knock.

C: 我…其实并不存在？
E: I... don't actually exist?

C: 真的假的？他从哪搞到的？清晰吗？
E: For real? Where'd he get that!? Is it hi-def?

C: 我们——啊……
E: We... Gah!

C: 又要给人家添麻烦了……
E: Causing trouble again, I see...

C: 虽然是垃圾桶，但是在梦里，越是反常，反而越能抓人眼球。
E: Even though it's a trashcan, the more unconventional something appears in dreams, the more captivating it becomes.

C: 此外，我还收到了船员们的一个反馈——他们想在长廊摆放您的雕像，以示敬意。
E: Also, I've received feedback that the crew members wish to honor you by placing your statue in the promenade gallery.

C: 或许随着时间的流逝，这尊雕像会成船上的一个话题，进而演化成乃至一个传说。你不敢想象你在传说中会有怎样荒腔走板的事迹。
E: Perhaps, as time passes, this statue will become a topic of banter on the ship, eventually evolving into a fable. You dare not even imagine how absurd your story will end up in these tales.

C: 这态度就对了！嚯嗬嗬嗬…这位尊贵的客人，我该怎么称呼你？
E: That's the right attitude! Ohhohoho... Esteemed guest, how may I address you?

C: 等待下一位宾客到来。
E: Wait for the next guest to arrive.

C: …您运气真好！现在正值旅游淡季，白日梦酒店有很多空置的房间。
E: ...What fantastic luck! It's the off season and The Reverie Hotel has plenty of free rooms.

C: 我没记错的话，你手下P<unbreak>30</unbreak>以上的得力干将可不少吧？相比之下，我这里才正缺一位有能力、有胆识的项目经理。
E: If I'm not mistaken, you have quite a few capable workers above P<unbreak>30</unbreak>, right? Compared to you, I'm currently in need of an industrious and bold project manager over here.

C: 知更鸟挥手同你道别，同时露出了一个如海报上的写真照一般——不，是比照片上更加灵动、鲜活的完美微笑。
E: Robin waves at you, revealing a smile that seems straight out of a poster — no, it is a perfect smile that looks more vibrant and livelier.

C: 骗子！伪善！真正的「四尺神子」根本不需要被巨人拯救！
E: Liar! Hypocrite! A true Four-Foot Follower doesn't need the help of a giant!

C: 你奋力模仿自己全盛时期挥动棒球棍的模样，并在心中大声默念：「规则，就是用来打破的！」
E: You make an all-out effort to mimic the way you swung the bat in your prime and recite loudly in your mind, "Rules are meant to be broken!"

C: 挚友——我们收到了你的求救消息，然后便以骑士之速赶来了。
E: My friend, we got your call for help and rushed over here at the speed of a knight.

C: 很好很好，快过来坐下吧！那个丹什么的，你可以闪了！
E: Awesome! Just come over and take a seat! That "Dandy" guy can leave now!

C: 我刚才是开玩笑的。
E: I was just joking.

C: 不久之后，朱明的客人就登上星槎离开了港口，灵砂大人也回到了丹鼎司。
E: And just like that, the Zhuming guests boarded their starskiff and left the port, and Lingsha returned to the Alchemy Commission.

C: 列车组的各位，一路顺风。
E: Safe travels, friends.

C: 恭喜符玄大人在玉阙仙舟的出差工作中的出色表现和勇敢拼搏！特此，热烈庆祝罗浮仙舟太卜司唯一的光——太卜大人、暨罗浮仙舟神策将军候补，符玄大人凯旋回归！
E: Congratulations to Lady Fu for your outstanding performance and courageous efforts on the Xianzhou Yuque! I would hereby like to celebrate the triumphant return of Master Fu Xuan, known as the only light in the Xianzhou Luofu Divination Commission and the Divine Foresight's candidate!

C: 去把手稿找回来不就解决了？
E: Just find that manuscript, and you'll be fine, right?

C: …青雀小姐？
E: ...Miss Qingque?

C: 只是让合适的人做合适的事情罢了，你要是没有云骑军保护就自己回去，那也太危险了。
E: Just let the right people handle the right things. Besides, it's too dangerous for you to go back alone.

C: 上一份。
E: Previous one.

C: 这都是什么声音啊……
E: What noise is that...?

C: 关于这件事，我想稍微、详细地说明一下。
E: About that, I'd like to explain a bit more in detail.

C: 不，我只要拿起工具，就会想到师傅教授了我这些技艺，只要回想这些技艺，就会想到我弄丢了他最后的手稿…我、我做不下去的。
E: But every time I pick up my tools, I can only think of my master teaching me these artisan skills. And as soon as I think of these skills, I'll remember that I lost his final manuscript. I—I can't go on like this.

C: 你说的对，要不，我们再去别处转转？
E: You're right. How about we go elsewhere for a walk?

C: 二十年！你跟他学了这么久？
E: Twenty years! You've been learning from him for that long?

C: 这种心情和同情是不一样的。在他的心里，帮助了你，就如同帮助了过去的他自己一样。你是他的徒弟，也是他最理解的朋友。
E: This feeling is not the same as sympathy. Deep in his heart, helping you is like helping his past version of himself. You were his apprentice, and his best friend.

C: 那我们就赶紧出发吧。
E: Then let's get going.

C: 是啊，这个培养舱也帮我拍个照吧。
E: Yeah, help me snap a shot of this incubator here.

C: 对呀，我见你第一面的时候，就觉得你这个人责任感也太重了，放轻松吧。
E: Yeah, when I first met you, I could feel the heaviness of your burden. Please take it easy.

C: 没想到你真的在等我。
E: I didn't think you would really wait for me.

C: 「莱恩•玛斯特隆佐，曾为工造司匠人，因年老心力衰竭而逝」…我这边将信息输入进去了，阵枢的事情就交给你了。
E: "Ryan Masteronzo, once an Artisanship Commission craftsman, died of old age and heart failure." I've entered the info on my side, and I'll leave you to do your part at the base terminals.

C: 可这是您最后的手稿，也是我出师的最后机会——
E: It's your last manuscript and my last chance at mastering craftsmanship...

C: 不错，要是将军没有看错人的话，本座还得多卖点人情给你才是。
E: Great. If the general is right with his judgment, I shall do more favors for you.

C: 就按雪衣判官所说的照办吧，本座就在阵心等待你们回来。
E: Follow Judge Xueyi's instructions. And I shall be waiting for you here at the Matrix core.

C: …能想明白才怪吧？
E: ...I don't think anybody gets it.

C: 哼，每天净想着不劳而获，没事就干些小偷小摸的勾当…过得能不好吗？
E: Hmph, shying away from honest work, indulging in petty crime — of course you're "doing just fine."

C: 怎么样，我没说大话吧？「地火」的干部向来说到做到。
E: See? I kept my word, right? Wildfire's senior members always deliver what we promise.

C: 我渴望战斗！
E: I THIRST FOR BATTLE!!!

C: …咱们都跟到这儿了，可不能让这小鬼把事情搞砸！
E: ...We've come this far, we can't let this kid ruin everything!

C: 去绥园吧。
E: Why not visit Fyxestroll Garden?

C: 演武仪典召开在即，星槎海的客流吞吐连上了几个台阶。云骑的安全工作也比过去忙上了好几倍。
E: With the Wardance coming up, there's a huge number of visitors pouring into the Starskiff Haven. The Cloud Knights are working hard to keep the security tight.

C: 谁是负责这支队伍的长官？我需要个解释。
E: Who's in charge here? I need some answers.

C: 拜见怀炎将军。
E: It's an honor to meet you, General Huaiyan.

C: 好个「奇景」。我来给你翻译翻译，景元，这小子是在阴阳怪气你呢。
E: A "spectacular" view? Hah! Did you hear that, Jing Yuan? This person is being sarcastic.

C: 难怪咱们被叫回来观礼。
E: No wonder we were called back for the ceremony.

C: 吵什么呢？
E: What's all this arguing about?

C: 如你所知，朱明使节舰救下了这艘被步离人袭击的公司运输船，然后知会云骑军辇道卫，将它带回港口完成修复与检查。
E: As you know, this IPC transport ship was attacked by the borisin and rescued by the Zhuming's diplomatic ship. Then the Cloud Knights were instructed to bring it back to the dock for repairs and inspections.

C: 哎！我们只负责保护货物的完整性，防止有心觊觎的人染指。比如…咳咳。
E: Well! We only protect the integrity of the goods and prevent anyone with ill intentions from getting their hands on them, for example...

C: 你的逻辑太混乱了，我听都听不懂。你能不能先随便找只猴子，和它学学说话的艺术，再回来和我讲这些废话？
E: Your logic is too confusing for anyone to follow. Maybe you should learn the art of communication from a monkey before you continue spouting nonsense.

C: 够了。夕葵小姐，麻烦你领几个云骑，先把这几位公司的客人护送到天舶司吧。
E: Enough. Miss Xikui, please escort our IPC guests to the Sky-Faring Commission.

C: 按照规矩，涉及危险生物的囚犯与武器都应当运往幽囚狱收容，再做进一步处理。毕竟那里是整个罗浮最安全的地方。
E: According to our rules, all prisoners and weapons involving dangerous creatures must be taken to The Shackling Prison for further sentencing. After all, it's the safest place on the Luofu.

C: 静候佳音。
E: Then I shall wait with anticipation.

C: 我一向射得很准！
E: Hey, I've never missed my target!

C: 不知是否是幽囚狱的气氛过于沉肃压抑，教他连开口说话的兴致也欠奉。
E: Perhaps the stifling and somber mood of the Shackling Prison has gotten to him, that's why he's neither up for chatting nor humoring you.

C: 云璃师父对我真好！
E: You're awesome, Master Yunli!

C: 战阵强弱并不总靠长处，还要看短处。双剑的短处恰恰在于发力。双臂乏力，步法灵活又有什么用？这又不是跳舞。
E: Instead of focusing on her strengths, we should address her weaknesses. The drawback of wielding two swords is not generating enough force. What good is being quick on your feet if you don't have strength? It's not like we're dancing here.

C: 走吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 所以说…你是将军的厨子？
E: So... you're the general's cook?

C: 好了，迴星港兜兜转转一遍，「竞锋舰」也瞧过了。是时候要和各位暂时道别了。
E: Well, we've seen the Skysplitter and toured the Stargazer Navalia. I guess it's time to say goodbye for now.

C: 脚步要轻，呼吸要浅…
E: Tread softly, breathe quietly...

C: 以<unbreak>4.0</unbreak>倍率拍摄到清晰证据
E: Take a clear photo of the evidence using <unbreak>4.0</unbreak>× zoom.

C: 可疑的狐人甲
E: Suspicious Foxian A

C: 在与你们一行同路时，她以天舶司某位接渡使的身份示人，而后又蒸发得无影无踪。这祸首倒是来去自由，拿来戴罪背锅也忒方便了。
E: She disguised herself as an amicassador of the Sky-Faring Commission and traveled with you, only to vanish without a trace later on. It seems too convenient to label her as a scapegoat.

C: 列车的客人，久等了。问字部判官寒鸦见过两位。
E: Welcome, dear guests from the Express. Judge Hanya of the Interrogation Division, we've met before.

C: 这儿不会有十八层吧？
E: So, are there really eighteen floors here?

C: 谨遵您的命令。
E: As you wish, my Lord.

C: 眼下不不不是说笑的时候！
E: Now is not the time for j—j—jokes!

C: 三位都不是十王司属僚，断没有为此牺牲的理由。我身为判官，把守幽狱是分内之责。若有人能阻止呼雷逃离为害，这个人也应当是我，而不是你们。
E: None of you are part of the Ten-Lords Commission, so sacrificing yourselves isn't the right move. As a judge, it's my responsibility to guard this prison, and if someone should step up to stop Hoolay from escaping, it should be me, not you.

C: 退下吧。
E: I see. You're dismissed.

C: 怀炎大人，天舶司已完成了相关准备。不知您是否另有指示？
E: General Huaiyan, the Sky-Faring Commission has finished its preparations. Do you have any other instructions?

C: 这些家伙的伪装身份是由谁提供的？借着演武仪典，还有多少相同的伪装者混进了仙舟？
E: I wonder who provided them with those disguises, and how many more borisin have taken advantage of the Wardance to infiltrate the ship?

C: 那场大战的尾声，队伍里仅剩下了寥寥数人。「赤月临照，血光飞射」…当时眼前所见的一切，只剩下满目殷红。
E: By the end of the battle, only a few of us remained. "The crimson moon casts the sheen of blood on all"... Everything I saw was painted dark red.

C: 对曜青的狐人而言，「呼雷」不仅仅是步离人的战首，也是怪物，是他们的研究对象。他成了腐蚀人心却不自知的剧毒。
E: To the foxians of the Yaoqing, Hoolay was not only the Warhead of the borisin but also a monster that could be the subject of much research. Hoolay thus became a poison that corrupted people's minds without their knowing.

C: 自「饮月之乱」结束后，身为骄傲的龙脉族裔，面对日益颓败的局势，却无力回天。灵砂小姐出身罗浮，应该明白我的意思。
E: Since the Sedition of Imbibitor Lunae, the once-proud dragon race has been powerless, watching their influence wane. Being a native of the Luofu, Miss Lingsha, I believe you understand the implications.

C: 你这么说也没错…在下考考你，如果现在有一个小儿吃饭挑食不吃青椒，你有什么办法能让这小儿吃下青椒呢？
E: Well, you have a point... Let me ask you this: If there's a fussy child who refuses to eat green peppers, what's the best way to make him eat them?

C: 呼雷大人，杀了他，杀了这个拨弄是非的贱畜！我向您保证，接应的星槎很快就会到来！
E: Let me kill this unruly lowly beast, Lord Hoolay! I assure you that our starskiffs will soon arrive.

C: 你尽可以嘲笑它野蛮疯狂。但只有我知道，它真实不虚。
E: Laugh all you want, but only I know the truth behind every word.

C: 我还想活下去…大夫……
E: I want to live... Doctor...

C: 从这边走能够看到演武仪典的正式会场。
E: If we walk through here, we'll be able to see the Wardance's official venue.

C: 都给我退开……
E: All of you, get out of my way...

C: 你这位大名鼎鼎的天击将军，步离人的死敌，有没有能耐陪他一同进行…这场狩猎游戏？
E: ...if you, the great Merlin's Claw, mortal enemy of the borisin, are able to join him in a little... hunting game...

C: …椒丘必须活着。
E: ...He has to be.

C: 三月，祝你宝剑常锋，登擂夺胜。
E: March, may your blade be sharp and your victory glorious.

C: 吓、吓死我了，我还以为你差点就要栽在呼雷手里。幸亏那位将军赶到了。
E: I—I was so scared! I thought you were a goner there! We're so lucky the general made it in time!

C: 你这个人心思还真多啊，这么瞻前顾后干什么啊？管他为什么落了下风，只要最终结果是咱们几个赢了就好！
E: You really are an overthinker! What's the point of worrying about these things? Who cares why he started to weaken? All that matters is that we won!

C: 当仙舟弱小时，他们将自己伪装成受害者来博取你的同情；当仙舟强大时，他们却封你为复仇者要你秉持正义。
E: When the Xianzhou is weak, they play the victim so they can win your sympathy. When they are strong, they make you their avenger and have you fight in the name of justice.

C: 所以，向天祈愿吧——尽管祂们从不回应。愿「巡猎」的锋镝，贯穿怪物的心脏！
E: So, I shall pray to the heavens... even if THEY do not respond to me. I pray that the arrows of The Hunt will pierce the heart of every monster!

C: 不错。
E: That's right.

C: 恰恰相反，我所行之事，一旦功成，联盟将视持明为救星。因为联盟与持明的最终的利益是一致的。
E: Once my plan succeeds, the alliance will see the Vidyadhara as their saviors, because both parties ultimately share the same interests.

C: 你要的六御公审，自是逃不脱的。除此之外，我会致函方壶的{RUBY_B#玄全}伏波将军{RUBY_E#}，以她嫉恶如仇的性子，想必会做出更加公允的处置吧。
E: The public trial you seek with the Six Charioteers is inevitable. In addition, I'll write to {RUBY_B#Xuanquan}the Seiche Queller{RUBY_E#} of the Fanghu. With her hatred for evil, I'm sure she will make a just decision.

C: 对了，听貊泽说起他们这队人马被狼卒围困，打了一场苦战。{NICKNAME}，你和貊泽并肩作战，有没有受伤？
E: I heard from Moze about the tough battle against the Wolftroopers. {NICKNAME}, you fought alongside Moze. Did you get hurt?

C: 哈，听脚步声…这不是飞霄将军吗？怎么不听医嘱好好养伤，一个人又跑出来了。
E: The sound of those footsteps... They must belong to General Feixiao. Out and about despite the doctor's orders?

C: 这话说的，当真是我认识的那个飞霄吗？难不成是步离人的刺客，佯装成你的声音来取我性命？
E: The way you're speaking, is this really the Feixiao I know? Or could it be a borisin assassin, imitating your voice to take my life?

C: 你们到底要朕记得什么！？
E: What exactly do you want me to remember!?

C: 你有办法？你能有什么办法……
E: You do? What idea could you possibly have...

C: 这是「帕斯德鲁克市」市民活动中心的一部分。
E: This is a piece of the community center in Pasdrak City.

C: 不是我天真，是我要让陛下觉得我天真。
E: No, I'm not. I just want His Majesty to think I am.

C: 真是的，你怎么把车停在离花店那么远的地方？啊不对…「少开车，多走路」，好像是我自己的馊主意…唉！
E: Gosh, why'd you park the car so far away from the florist? Oh wait... I think it was my terrible idea to "drive less, walk more"... Bah!

C: 灰骑士，快去开车吧！这里到处都是叛军，我们没时间闲逛了！
E: Gray Knight, quickly go get the car! There are rebels everywhere, now's not the time to potter about!

C: 如果留存在这里的善意无人承继，那很快就会消失，被人忽视、被人遗忘、被人践踏。
E: If the remaining kindness here is not inherited, it will soon disappear. It will be neglected, forgotten and trampled on by people.

C: 「先皇」似乎是个暴君。
E: The late Emperor was apparently a tyrant.

C: 是是是…朕知道她是个暴君，朕知道她杀了很多人。
E: Yes yes yes... I know she was a tyrant, and many have died by her hand.

C: 暂时没什么需要。
E: There's nothing at the moment.

C: 嘀嗒！那位老爷爷，他身上有些不对劲！
E: Tick tock! There's something fishy about that old man!

C: 这也是我的荣幸。
E: Likewise.

C: 我们每一次的相逢都被赋予了非凡的意义，对此我感到庆幸。
E: Each of our encounters bore an extraordinary significance, and for that I am grateful.

C: 螺丝咕姆缓缓将右手探进入梦池中……
E: Screwllum reaches his hand slowly into the Dreampool...

C: 我来帮你。
E: Let me help.

C: …我们已经试过太多次了。很明显，按照原样走下去也不会有进展。
E: ...We've tried too many times. It's clear that we won't make any progress if we go down the same road.

C: 但请允许我提出疑问——和有机生命相同，好奇心有时会驱使我打破礼仪的界限——您为什么会同意参与研发「虚数坍缩脉冲」这种武器？
E: Please allow me to ask you some questions, as curiosity sometimes compels me to ignore the decorum, just like what organic life experiences. Why did you agree to take part in the development of a weapon as destructive as the Imaginary Implosion Pulse?

C: …为什么，杜德利？！我们不止一次，推心置腹地谈过这件事…我每天都在警告你们！滥用它可能导致的后果，你心知肚明！
E: ...Why, Dudley!? We've talked about this more than once... I've been warning you guys every single day! You know very well what could happen if it is misused!

C: …弹道轨迹预计算已经完成。命中误差区间：±<unbreak>0.08%</unbreak>。
E: ...Ballistic trajectory precalculation is complete. Margin of error: ±<unbreak>0.08%</unbreak>.

C: 按下起爆按钮。
E: Hit the detonate button.

C: <size=28>三……</size>
E: <size=28>Three...</size>

C: 再后来，他们接受了我已变成一个无用老人的事实。自某个时刻开始，他们的策略变成了静候我的死亡。
E: Much later on, they accepted the fact that I had been reduced to a useless old man. Starting from some point in time, they changed their strategy and decided to just wait for my death.

C: 忆质…正在…消散……
E: Memoria... is... dissipating...

C: 或许可以先四下看看。
E: Perhaps we should look around first.

C: 那是一个无数梦想萌发的时代。费歇尔先生曾跟我讲述过那个年代——
E: That was a time when countless dreams sprouted. Mr. Fischer once told me of that age...

C: 谢谢你的帮助，你是…？
E: Thank you for your help, you are...?

C: 为了防止他们的故事再被篡改，这里需要一位监督者。
E: An overseer is required to prevent their story from being altered yet again.

C: 不要。我见过钟表小子那套玩意儿…让别人钻进自己的脑子？太恶心了，我不要。
E: No. I've seen what Clockie does... Letting someone into your brain? That's disgusting. No.

C: 据我所知，白日梦酒店的设计图中并没有规划这片区域…如果我没猜错，这个房间大概是那孩子自己做出来的。
E: To my knowledge, The Reverie's blueprints did not map out this area... If I'm not wrong, this room was probably made by the child himself.

C: …如果我拒绝呢。
E: ...And if I refuse?

C: 停停停！我知道了，配合你就是了！
E: Stop stop stop! All right! I'll go with your plan!

C: 怎么不是？要不是他们带了坏头，奥赫玛人怎么会这么贪心！
E: Are they not? If they hadn't started the trend, Okhemans wouldn't have learned to be so greedy!

C: 我们救不了所有人…
E: We can't save everyone...

C: 听起来这些人的命运全靠我们了。没想到我一介学徒，居然也有当英雄的一天…想想还有点激动呢！
E: It sounds like these people's fates are relying on our success. I never thought a lowly apprentice like me would get a chance to perform such heroics... Sounds awfully exciting!

C: 刻法勒在上，欧洛尼斯保佑，扎格列斯显灵…哪位都行，帮帮我们吧。
E: By Kephale, may Oronyx protect us, may Zagreus grace our presence... Any of them will do. Please help us.

C: 食物？当然，我这就把压箱底的货都拿出来招待您。
E: Food? Of course. I'll have only my most premium goods brought out to you.

C: 干瘪的蔬菜、诡异的肉类、硬如武器的面包…种种迹象表明，这箱食物是次品中的次品。
E: Shriveled vegetables, strange meats, bread hard as steel... All signs indicate that this crate of food is obviously inferior beyond all atrocity.

C: 好。你要把这些食物带到哪儿去？我帮你送一程吧……
E: Okay. Where do you want the food delivered to? I can help you with that...

C: 怎么样？我说过这是全奥赫玛最好的。当然，价格不算便宜，<unbreak>8000</unbreak>利衡币。
E: What'd you think? I told you I'd give you Okhema's finest. Of course, they cost quite a bit: <unbreak>8,000</unbreak> Balance Coins.

C: 苏克提瑞斯被抓走了…不排除误会的可能，但还是跟他当面问清楚比较好。
E: Soctires has been captured... A misunderstanding's not beyond possibility, but it'd be better if I asked him in person.

C: 好好好…换个话题，换个话题总行吧？
E: Fine, fine... Let's change the subject. We can do that, can't we?

C: 你该不会以为，只要对外邦人冷眼相待，公民的生活水平就不会下降了吧？
E: You aren't presuming that as long you treat the outlanders coldly, the citizens' livelihoods won't be affected, are you?

C: 要说对付黑潮，我和我的黄金裔朋友们才是专家——还记得我们从疯王眷属手里拯救圣城的故事吗？那里面可没有外邦人出场。
E: If we're talking about defeating the black tide, my Chrysos Heir friends and I are the experts — do you still remember how we saved the holy city from the clutches of the Mad King's kins? There are no outlanders in that party.

C: 我要补充的就是这些，各位可以开始投票了。
E: This is all I have to add. Everyone, please begin voting.

C: 阿格莱雅脸上闪过一丝不易察觉的笑意，仿佛她一直在等待这句话。
E: A faint smile crosses Aglaea's face, as if she has been anticipating this question all along.

C: 帕…里斯……
E: Pa... ris...

C: 去了…阿卡迪亚……
E: He went... To Arcadia...

C: …愚蠢。
E: ...Foolishness.

C: 又出现了，阿卡迪亚！
E: There it is again, Arcadia!

C: 等等…
E: Hold on...

C: 对哦，你可以用「欧洛尼斯祷言」来修好这个东西吧！
E: You're right! We can fix it with Oronyx's Prayer!

C: 命运有什么好害怕的，那抬秤的泰坦糊涂，拉帘的泰坦盲目，开路的泰坦自己也迷路，执掌命运的就是这么三个迷糊虫而已！
E: What is there to fear about fate? The Titan that bears the scales is themself confused. The Titan that pulls the curtain is blind, and the Titan that guides the way is lost. They are no more than three blind mice that guide the strings of fate!

C: 雅努斯的机关好没意思！
E: Janus' mechanisms are boring!

C: 呃，什么丝儿？
E: Uhhh... What nas?

C: 前去纷争吧。
E: Go to the Strife.

C: 她会在哪里呢…如果是人家，或许会找个视野开阔的地方吧……
E: Where could she be? If I were her, I might look for a place with open views...

C: 帕西提亚。
E: Pasithea.

C: 唱得再顺溜我也不给钱哈。
E: I'm not paying a dime, even if your singing is fantastic.

C: 我晚上睡觉会踢被子！
E: When I sleep at night, I kick away my blanket!

C: 不过，我应该没做什么让人误会的事才对。
E: But I don't think I've done anything for anyone to misunderstand.

C: 可我担心，万一她也逃了怎么办？又或者，情急之下，逃进{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的手下……
E: But my concern is... what if she also escapes? Then what? Or, in a moment of desperation, she escapes into the hands of {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}...

C: 你们会中了它的诡计吗？
E: Would you have succumbed to its trickery?

C: 就像欧洛尼斯那样，以沉默应对这些贪婪的祭司，如同被割下喉咙的鸟雀。
E: Just like Oronyx, reply these greedy priests with silence, like a bird with its throat slit.

C: 我们可以去田里耕种。
E: We can go into the fields and farm.

C: 没过一会儿，帕西提亚的周围就回归了不久前的冷清。
E: Shortly after, the area around Pasithea returns to the quietness it had moments ago.

C: 真相，就在我们的面前，我已经听到了它的声音，可……
E: The truth is right before our eyes. I can already hear their voice, but...

C: 我们总要向前的。
E: We have to move forward.

C: 嗯…你就当作是真的，别太在意细节。
E: Hmm... Just take it as the truth. Don't worry too much about the details.

C: 老…娜塔莎医生，我把人带来了！那本书在哪？里面的细节我记不住。
E: D—Dr. Natasha, I brought them! Where's that book? I can't remember all the details in it.

C: 我不会让贝洛伯格消失。
E: I won't let Belobog disappear.

C: 爻光将军说笑了。留在罗浮，本座定能继承将军之位；调职玉阙，就只能一辈子做个小小的太卜。哪边更有前途，我岂会分不清？
E: General Yao Guang must be joking. If I stay on the Luofu, I'm sure to inherit the position of General. If I transfer to the Yuque, I'd be nothing but a mere Master Diviner for life. How could I not see which path holds more promise?

C: 我的建议是：继续旅程，做好准备，也心怀希望。你知道，翁法罗斯这个世界，最不缺的就是奇迹。
E: My advice is: continue the journey, be prepared for the worst, but keep hope in your heart. You know that if there's one thing the world of Amphoreus isn't short of, it's miracles.

C: 千万次轮回留下的遗产，如模拟宇宙提供的数据般珍贵。泰坦与泰坦造物的有机构成、黄金裔参与下的城邦机制、叙述者与文本互动关系……
E: The legacy left behind by countless cycles is as precious as the data provided by the Simulated Universe. The organic composition of Titans and their creations, the city-state mechanisms involving the Chrysos Heirs, the interactive relationship between narrators and texts...

C: 那当然！再怎么说，翁法罗斯也是咱们仨一起开拓的。本姑娘可是一阵好跑。
E: Of course! After all, we three trailblazed through Amphoreus together. I ran my heart out for this!

C: 那是一个诞生自阴谋和罪恶，却与「毁灭」一同燃尽的世界。在冰冷而沉重的命运前，它没有倒下，倒下的是命运。
E: It was a world born of conspiracy and sin, yet burned away alongside "Destruction." Before the cold and heavy destiny, it did not fall. But destiny itself did.

C: 米哈伊尔也好，历任领航员也罢，每个时代的「开拓」都有其意义。而阻挡在你面前的迷雾，似乎越来越清晰……
E: Be it Mikhail or any Navigator before, each era's Trailblaze has its own significance. And the fog that stands in your way seems to be getting clearer...

C: 谢谢你，看来不需要多说什么了。
E: Thanks, I guess that's all that needs to be said.

C: 呃，老师你还有什么事吗？我还有几份卷子要从终端机上申请下载，没什么事的话我先去做题咯？
E: Uh, {M#mister}{F#miss}, is there anything else? I still have several papers to download from the terminal. If there's nothing else, I'll leave and do some exercises.

C: 好了，不要像根木头一样伫在这里。今天的课就上到这里吧？古恩老头说，让你教完了就去找他，老师要记得去哦。
E: Alright, don't just stand there like a log. Let's call it a day. The old fart Gunn said he wants to talk to you after the lesson. You better go.

C: …这和我的期望结果有些出入，唔…重置数据前要不要备份一下呢……
E: ... It's a little different from what I expected. Um... Should I back this up before resetting the data?

C: 所以，能不能帮我……
E: So, can you help me to...

C: 你在空间站待的这阵子，有没有感觉这里…有点怪怪的。
E: Now that you've spent some time on the space station, don't you feel this place is... a little abnormal?

C: 有些实验成果，就这样「留存」在空间站中，以它们自己的方式，实现了与科员的共生……
E: Some of the experimental results were "left behind" in the space station, and live symbiotically with the researchers in their own way...

C: 可是我的朋友很少…所以这次就拜托你了！
E: But I don't have many friends... So please! Please help me!

C: …呃，不写又挺可惜的。算了，就这样吧谢谢你这么久以来一直帮我哦！
E: ...Well, it'd be a pity not to write anymore. Anyway, thanks for having helped me for so long!

C: 过几天我要和老姐妹们聚会，这么多年没见，我担心我这样会被她们笑话。
E: I'm catching up with some old girlfriends in a few days. It's been years since we last met up. I wonder... would they laugh at me for being out of touch with fashion?

C: 哎，你别看我的样子平平无奇，但我姐姐可是个设计师，耳濡目染得多了，我敢说空间站没人比我更懂潮流！
E: C'mon, I may look plain, but my older sister is a designer. After having watched her for so long, I'm willing to bet that no one on the space station understands fashion more than me!

C: 感谢你的帮助，年轻人。这是答应你的报酬——下次我再需要帮忙的时候，希望你还在。
E: Thank you for your help. This is the payment I promised. I hope you can still help me the next time I need your help.

C: 我听说有个名叫费尔多的法官在亚历珊德拉广场一带转悠——我一直希望能拓展自己在法律界的人脉。你能否带着照片去帮我问问，看看他愿不愿意和我做朋友？
E: I heard there's a judge named Furdo at the Alexandra Plaza, and I've always wanted to expand my connections in the legal industry. Could you show the photo to him and ask him if he's willing to be my friend?

C: 他是莱姆士汀家的公子。
E: He's a Limestein.

C: 你看看这张照片。
E: Look at this photo.

C: …什么？他看过照片了吗？他有说什么吗？
E: What...? Has he seen the photo? Did he say anything?

C: 我需要帮助？有这回事吗…你等等啊，让我仔细回忆一下……
E: Help? Do I... Give me a minute, let me see if I can remember...

C: 我看看哦。这是埃里克的，这是罗密欧的，还有这封，再加上之前尤利安的…大家的「信」都在这里啦。
E: Let me see. There's one from Eric, one from Romeo, now this one, plus the previous one from Julian... We've got everyone's "letters" here.

C: 我就告诉你吧，鼹鼠党要抢在「地火」发现之前，把那箱药物送到需要的人手上。
E: Here's the deal. The Moles is going to deliver the medicine to those in need before Wildfire finds out.

C: 「鼹鼠党」？啊…我明白了！谢谢你，尤利安，鼹鼠党真是一群乐于助人的孩子。
E: The Moles? Ah... I see. Thank you, Julian, The Moles' members are all very good kids.

C: 这次的行动也完美收官咯，{NICKNAME}！真不愧是虎克大人亲自任命的荣誉队员，不但跑得很快，战斗起来也很拉风嘛！
E: Good job, {NICKNAME}! You're really worth your salt as an honorary member appointed by Boss Hook — you act fast, and fight well!

C: 让我看看，这里有两箱物资，分别要送到<color=#dbc291ff>机械聚落</color>和<color=#dbc291ff>歌德大饭店</color>……
E: Let me see, there are two boxes of supplies to be delivered to <color=#dbc291ff>Robot Settlement</color> and <color=#dbc291ff>Goethe Grand Hotel</color> separately...

C: 呃，不了吧。
E: Er, no thanks.

C: 喔喔，我看看。
E: Ooh, let me see.

C: <unbreak>28</unbreak>辆。
E: Twenty-eight.

C: 放马过来吧！
E: Bring it on!

C: 不过…你确实蛮聪明的，下次再来挑战吧。…不不不，你还是别来了，怪麻烦的。
E: But... you really are quite smart. Let's give it another try next time. No... no no, actually don't come back. It's too much hassle.

C: 哎呀，答错也没关系，能活动活动脑筋总是好事，对吧？能帮上您的忙是教育部的荣幸。回见！
E: Ah, it's okay to get it wrong sometimes. Just giving your brain a workout is good, right? It's an honor for the Ministry of Education to serve you. See you next time!

C: 塞琳最近的烦恼…
E: Celine's recent troubles...

C: 这样一来，小女子，就可以像塔米拉小姐一样，在舞台上熠熠生辉。
E: And with that, I'll be able to be like Tamila and shine brightly onstage.

C: 那本小说…《歌德宾馆的夜与雾》，老实说，小女子现在还不是很能读透……
E: That novel Evening Ember at the Goethe Hotel... to be honest, I'm not sure I really get it completely...

C: 还有别的事…
E: There's more?

C: 你好像有事想找人帮忙？
E: You seem to need help with something?

C: 帮忙？哈哈，像你这样热心肠的年轻人在贝洛伯格可真少见。
E: Help? Hahaha, it's rare to see helpful kids like you in Belobog.

C: 哦？挺会挑嘛，这是歌德宾馆的爆款呢。黑面包汽水特有的麦香和酸奶的酸甜口感融合在一起…吃一次就会上瘾。
E: Oh? You've got good taste. That's the most popular beverage the Goethe Hotel has on offer. A fusion between the unique aroma of the rye bread soda and the sourness of yogurt... One bite is enough to get people hooked.

C: 难道爸爸妈妈…真的把我丢掉了吗…？
E: Did my Mom and Dad... throw me away?

C: 你只是裂界模拟诞生的产物。
E: You're just a creation emulated by the Fragmentum.

C: 不，你更像是幽灵。
E: No, you are more like a ghost.

C: 对不…起……
E: I... I'm sorry...

C: （将捡到的漂流瓶交给跃渊）
E: (You hand the drift bottle you picked up to Yueyuan)

C: 对了，不知道<color=#dbc291ff>漂流瓶的事</color>你还记得多少？我们护珠人派出了一队搜救人员，到波月古海上搜了一圈什么都没有找到。
E: By the way, do you still remember that thing with the <color=#dbc291ff>drift bottle</color>? We dispatched a rescue team to the Lunarescent Depths but found nothing.

C: 「你在那边也要好好吃饭，好好睡觉，一个人也要照顾好自己。人生路只能自己走，孤独是常态，你要学会习惯……」
E: "I hope you're eating and sleeping well over there. Even though you are alone, you should take good care of yourself. You are in charge of your life, and you need to get used to being alone..."

C: （很好，我来给你们讲讲，应不应该回到文明社会！）
E: (Alright, let me explain whether you should rejoin civilized society!)

C: 既然你已经发现，我就告诉你吧——我放生原创故事！
E: Since I've been discovered, I shall tell you — I unshackle original stories!

C: <unbreak>98</unbreak>、<unbreak>99</unbreak>、<unbreak>100</unbreak>。
E: <unbreak>98</unbreak>, <unbreak>99</unbreak>, <unbreak>100</unbreak>.

C: 愿望要是这么容易实现，那就不是愿望了。你将漂流瓶扔回了大海里。
E: If a wish were that easy to make true, it would not be called a wish. You threw the drift bottle back into the ocean.

C: 我刚刚说了啊，就叫「忘情茶」啊。
E: I just told you — Unsen-tea-mental Tea.

C: 你怎么回事，问你半天反应这么奇怪。该不会是喝完茶有什么不良反应了吧？
E: You're acting weird. Is everything okay? Did the tea give you any side effects?

C: 说好的报酬你收好，今日这茶不太行，等我研发出靠谱的新品了再喊你。
E: Here's the compensation I promised. This tea isn't up to par today, it seems. I'll give you a call once I've come up with something new.

C: 你自觉沉浸在分析手指计数的数学理论中不可自拔……
E: You become completely absorbed in your finger-counting mathematical theories...

C: 感觉好像很容易上头…
E: It's a little overwhelming...

C: 那回头再研究看看，哦对了，说好的报酬你收好，我得调整下配方了，回头出新品了再喊你。
E: I'll look into it later. Oh, and here's the compensation I promised. I'll give you a call once I've come up with something new.

C: 最近我偶然得到些灵感，先连以滋补药材和新鲜蔬果为配料，栽了好些跟头，好不容易才捣鼓出新的配方。
E: Lately, I've been trying to make something new with fresh herbs, vegetables, and fruits. After some setbacks, I've finally developed a new recipe.

C: 你找我是有什么事吗？
E: Did you want something?

C: 这茶似乎没什么特殊的，入口有些辛辣，但喝起来也就那回事。不甜也不酸，不苦也不咸，有色且透光，仅此而已。
E: It appears that this tea lacks any distinctive features. It has a mildly spicy taste at first, but then it fades away. It's not too sweet, sour, bitter, or salty — not much else to say about it.

C: 在房檐上摆放如此多的杂物，当真不存在安全隐患吗？
E: Placing so many knick-knacks along the eaves of the house... are they not a safety hazard?

C: 这条楼梯向上延伸，一路通往废墟的更深处…或许没必要走那么远？
E: A stairway that extends upwards, all the way into the depths of the ruins... Maybe it's not really necessary to go that far?

C: 半圆形的阳台向外延伸，将整片山景尽收眼底。远处的大地兽在青草间穿行，留下蜿蜒的足迹。
E: A semicircular balcony that extends outward, overlooking the entire mountain view. Dromases in the distance gambol across the meadows, leaving serpentine trails.

C: 此处能供黄金裔涤净黑潮的侵染，考虑到入浴的时长，这些设施的布置理所应当——罚站可招人记恨。
E: The Chrysos Heirs can be cleansed of the black tide's corruption here. Considering the amount of time you need to spend in the bath, the facility's layout is appropriate — being forced to stand would only earn the ire of its users.

C: 这地方还挺凉快…以后可以常来坐坐，整理下思绪什么的。
E: This place is pretty refreshing... It would be a great place to come and reflect on my thoughts.

C: 再见。
E: Goodbye.

C: 夜幕中的斗技场
E: Eventide Arena

C: 「哎，让我们再来一遍…歌耳戈之子，告诉我，是军锋，铁卫，还是射手？」
E: "Let us try... one more time, child of Gorgo. A vanguard, an aegis, or a marksman?"

C: 结束劳作的工人登上层旋的石阶，爬出矿井，在喟叹间熄灭火把的照明。
E: At the end of their shift, workers ascend the spiral staircase to exit the shaft and extinguish their torches as they sigh.

C: 书桌上笔墨未干，烛光照亮未解的神谕。
E: The ink on the desk remains wet, and candlelight illuminates the unresolved prophecy.

C: 莫错过雅努萨波利斯最后的日出。」
E: Do not miss the last sunrise of Janusopolis."

C: 古城遗迹
E: The Ruins of the Ancient City

C: …我理解你的心情，少主。你刚刚才亲手杀死了你父亲，心情复杂沉重，这无可厚非。
E: ...I understand how you feel, young master. You just now killed your own father. It is to be expected that your emotions are complicated and heavy.

C: 你记住了「曾在浴场畅饮过秘酿」
E: You remembered "Drinking Ambrosia in the Baths."

C: 你凝视着残破的环形阶梯，上面的每一块石阶都被打磨得发亮。据说那是历代学者们在此漫步、争论与求知的痕迹。
E: You look upon the crumbling circular staircase, each step polished smooth. It is said that this sheen is the result of generations of scholars pacing, debating, and seeking wisdom here.

C: 我是绳结学派的学者，致力于追求语言的精确性，你感知到的*陌生*便是来源于此，这和我的预期一致，而至于这位……
E: I am a scholar of Nodism, dedicated to the pursuit of linguistic precision. The unfamiliarity you sense stems precisely from this, as expected. As for this one...

C: 高耸入顶的雕像线条流畅而富有韵律，三道火焰般的纹路从底座一直蜿蜒至顶，在兜帽处诡异地交汇。
E: Towering toward the ceiling, the statue's flowing lines are both rhythmic and elegant. Three flame-like patterns spiral from the base to the top, converging eerily at the hood.

C: 下一次，我要做一副…小手套！这样妈妈打磨红石头的时候，就不会伤到手啦！
E: Next time I want to make... a pair of gloves! That way, you won't hurt your hands next time you're polishing rocks, mommy!

C: 的确，坚持师出有名，这才不会引起纷争…不过，如果元老们容易说话不算话，事情是不是就变得麻烦了……
E: Indeed, sticking to reason is what prevents disputes... But what if the elders are easily swayed and don't keep their word?

C: 他的身躯虽已湮灭，留下的话语却振聋发聩。这究竟会激发热血还是引起慌乱，如今仍是个未知数。
E: Though his body has long since crumbled to dust, his words still echo, powerful and unyielding. Whether they ignite a fire within you or sow confusion, the answer remains uncertain.

C: 答对了答对了！奥赫玛中最受公民们欢迎的生物，当然是本狮吼吼！
E: Yes, yes! The creature most beloved by the citizens of Okhema is, of course, this very lion!

C: 能多给我点提示吗？
E: Can you give me some hints?

C: 感觉有点不舒服…
E: I don't feel so good...

C: 为了让亡灵也能享乐…
E: For souls of the dead to also receive this joy...

C: 私人所有的木马，这可是头一次见…等等，里面好像有动静？
E: A private wooden horse, never seen before... wait, did you hear something inside?

C: 这样啊……这么说，是有位大善人一直在给大家送东西吗？
E: I see... So, is there a kind person who's been sending things to us?

C: 因为…我能治愈天空。
E: Because... I can heal the Sky.

C: 总之，冥河对黑潮怪物影响不大，再说了，这下面水太深了，你懂的。
E: Anyways, the River of Souls doesn't really do much to those monsters. And let's be real — this water runs deep.

C: 人群的兴致似乎格外高昂，为了不被拽去灌蜜酿，还是不要去打扰他们了。
E: The crowd's in really high spirits right now. Better not disturb them, or you'll definitely get dragged off and force-fed honey brew.

C: …闭嘴。
E: ...Shut up.

C: 鱼儿将会追逐你，在星间打捞的火光。
E: The fish will chase after you, the firelight salvaged among the stars.

C: 好神秘的女人…
E: What a mysterious lady...

C: 哈！不必急于给出答案，更不必对着你眼前的「长夜月」苦苦思考，这只是我离开前留下的一道「记忆」残影。
E: Ha! No need to rush for an answer, and certainly no need to rack your brain for the "Evernight" before you. This is merely a lingering shard of memory I left behind before departing.

C: 如果我也像他那样坚韧的话，还有什么困难不能战胜呢喀？
E: If I had their tenacity, what hardship could I not overcome, crrk?

C: [电量偏低]
E: [Low Battery]

C: 确实。你不记得列车上曾经有这么一面镜子。
E: You don't remember there being such a mirror on the Express.

C: （瓦尔特先生好像真的看不见它……）
E: (Looks like Mr. Yang really can't see it...)

C: 你这样上车跟小偷有啥区别？
E: So you're just smuggling yourself on board the express?

C: 别担心，它应该已经走了——异问魔一次只问一个问题，得到答案后，它就会去另一个地方。
E: Don't worry, it should be gone by now — Inquisition Spirits only ask one question at a time. It will go elsewhere once it gets an answer.

C: 向你致敬，{NICKNAME}教官。
E: I salute you, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}.

C: 你确定要再参与一次演练吗，{NICKNAME}教官？
E: Are you sure you want to do another round of drills, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}?

C: 你拿出棒球棍，冲着金属大门哐哐猛砸，震得你虎口发麻，大门却不为所动。
E: You whip out a baseball bat and start flailing at the metal door with reckless abandon. The rebounding reverberations cause your whole body to go numb, but the door does not budge.

C: （这是最近的迫降点了，{NICKNAME}，等会儿可千万要小心些，别再被它们逮到了。）
E: (This is the nearest landing point. {NICKNAME}, you must be super careful later. Don't get caught by them again.)

C: 关于管家，你还知道什么？
E: What do you know about the butler?

C: 说什么<color=#dbc291ff>「怪物破坏了大门的锁，门开不了。」</color>
E: It said something about <color=#dbc291ff>monsters destroying the door's lock and causing it to get stuck.</color>

C: 压根就没有怪物袭击一事！
E: There never was a monster attack!

C: …不用了，我已经彻底输了。
E: ...No need, I have already lost.

C: （这是什么？上面这个身影是「管家」？还是它们一伙的？）
E: (What is this? Is that figure the butler? They are working together?)

C: 这样啊。那看来，翁法罗斯的忙碌日子也要暂时告一段落了。有空就在浴宫泡泡澡吧！香喷喷的！
E: It seems like Amphoreus' hectic days are winding down. Why not take a moment to unwind in the bath chamber? It's really relaxing!

C: 来一场不眠之夜，做结尾~
E: A white night we shall observe, adieu.

C: 我与天地同寿。
E: As old as the world.

C: {NICKNAME}…怎么了？看起来好累…是生病了吗？快让人家碰碰额头！
E: {NICKNAME}... what's wrong? You look so tired... are you sick? Let me check your forehead!

C: 是吗？可在人家看来，喜欢是很单纯、自然的行为哦？如果{NICKNAME}也有喜欢的人，无论亲情、友情还是爱，人家也会支持你，全部表达出来。
E: Oh? But to me, liking someone is a simple and natural part of life. If {NICKNAME} has got someone special: family, friend, or romance, I'll cheer you on to express yourself freely.

C: （看来这些就是我的小费了。）
E: (Looks like these are my tips.)

C: 货运星槎里面一般都会装着给工人的小费。卸货之后，这些小费就都是你的了。哎呀，你不会吃亏的。
E: The freight starskiff is usually filled with tips for the workers. After unloading, these tips will all be yours. Come on, you will not lose out.

C: 开始施工~
E: Let the construction begin!

C: 例行占算并不复杂，让阵法的星纹与昭示图案一致即可。
E: Routine divinations are not complicated at all. Just match up the star pattern on the matrix with the prompt.

C: 占算结果已经拿到，辛苦了{NICKNAME}啦。
E: Results obtained. Thanks for your hard work, {NICKNAME}.

C: 您只管启动阵基，别担心。咱们既不会干涉那地方的司法，也不会让罪犯逍遥法外。
E: Just focus on starting the base terminal up, and don't worry about it. We're not interfering with their justice system, and we're not sending any grievous criminal on the run permanently.

C: 我真的不知道你在做什么……
E: I really have no idea what you're up to...

C: 下一题，下一题我一定会难倒你。
E: Next time! The next puzzle will be your end.

C: 那就开始吧。
E: Then let's start.

C: 败了就是败了，说再多也没有用。
E: Losing is losing. Words can't change that.

C: 总之您就是咱们破圈的希望，只要您能在车水马龙的竞锋舰玩「寻径指津」，一定能引起很多人对这款游戏的关注。
E: In short, you're the "Pathfinder" community's only hope. If you play Pathfinder in a busy place like the Skysplitter, you're sure to draw attention to the game.

C: 你这玉兆是什么原理？
E: What's going on with your jade abacus?

C: {NICKNAME}哪里走！快来与我大战八百回合，看谁真正有资格做「寻径指津」的意见领袖。
E: {NICKNAME}! Where do you think you're going? Come and face me! We'll see which one of us is more qualified to lead the "Pathfinder" community.

C: 所以，你是架设私服…
E: So, you set up a private server...

C: 这不是无聊嘛！
E: I'm just bored!

C: 滴、滴、答答答答滴、滴…
E: Tick, tick, tocktocktocktock tick, tick...

C: 仿佛受到某种引导般，褔坛自顾自地播放着泰坦的符号。
E: As though guided by something, the Altar of Blessings plays the Titan's symbol on its own.

C: 嗯…有位织者醉心于黄金血的甜美，就像悬锋战士沉迷于蜜酿。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>褔坛的金池中央</color>，似乎有些神志不清了。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who is mesmerized by the sweetness of Golden Blood, like a Kremnos Warrior addicted to honey brew. The golden thread brings tidings: They now reside <color=#dbc291ff>in the center of the Golden Pond at the Altar of Blessings</color>, seemingly disoriented.

C: 或许它是某种图案？又或者对某个地点的暗示…如果你有兴趣的话，不妨也试着解读看看。
E: Could it be an image? Or perhaps a clue to a specific location... If you're intrigued, you can try solving it.

C: 这就是那则预言所指向的目标？倒是稀奇。
E: So this is what the prophecy was pointing to? How unexpected.

C: 嗯…我以前倒也见过这样的预言。它就像一块分裂成两半的陶片，必须拼凑完整才能解读。
E: Yes... I have encountered a prophecy like this before. It resembles a shard of pottery that has split in half, requiring it to be pieced together to reveal its true meaning.

C: 不给~
E: I'm not giving it to you.

C: 是啊，你已知晓火焰的真谛…啊，火焰，它还能燃烧多久呢喀？
E: Yes, you already know the essence of flame... Ah, flame, how long still will it burn, crrk?

C: 那你现在应该吃饱了？
E: Sounds like you're getting a good meal finally?

C: 「不要相信奥赫玛人，即便他只是住在奥赫玛城郊。」
E: "Do not trust Okhemans, even if they only live in its outskirts."

C: 您想听哪一类，是最有惊无险的、还是我最引以为豪的？
E: What do you wish to hear? The most harrowing heist, or my proudest feat?

C: 哦…对了对了，说到{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}——你知道吗，它最早其实是{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的一缕头发……
E: Speaking of {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}, did you know they originally came from a strand of {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s hair...?

C: 啊？有吗有吗？巴特鲁斯不懂那种高深的学问，你应该是听错了吧！
E: What? Did I? Bartholos doesn't comprehend such advanced concepts — you must have heard wrong!

C: 但一百多天之后，或许是看不惯他这样公开收买民心，又或是纸醉金迷的生活产生了什么纠纷，元老院里有人刺杀了他。富商既死，人们自然好奇他留下了多少遗产——
E: Yet after a hundred days, perhaps out of disdain for his public way of buying people's hearts, or due to conflicts arising from the decadent lifestyle, someone from the Council of Elders assassinated him. With the merchant dead, people naturally wondered how much wealth he had left behind—

C: 我诞生的唯一目的就是在这里等待您的到来…啊，多么沉重的承诺，多么自作多情的遗产……
E: I was created for one purpose: to wait here for you... ah, what a heavy obligation, what a self-important inheritance...

C: 咳咳。开玩笑的。如果您不喜欢伦理哏，就忘了刚才这个笑话吧，桀桀。
E: Ahem. Just kidding. If family jokes aren't your thing, feel free to erase that one from your memory. Heh heh.

C: 你偷窥我的记忆？
E: You're flipping through my memories?

C: 总之，既然你向我打听起了「黄金替罪羊」——这是我自己秘密给它们取的名字——你也已经通过了最基础的4关，是这样没错吧？
E: Anyway, since you asked me about the Golden Scapegoat — a name that I came up with secretly — that means you've cleared the four basic stages as well, right?
Um...

C: 而在下是个恋旧的人，颇不习惯这面墙就此空出…正好，第欧根娜和我说起了你们调查「黄金替罪羊」的活动——
E: But I'm quite sentimental and dislike leaving the walls empty... So, when Diogena mentioned your investigation of the "Golden Scapegoat" —

C: <unbreak>177</unbreak>号房…不不不，那是我老朋友的住处，我连她的脸都看腻了。我们之间绝对没可能。
E: Room <unbreak>177</unbreak>... No, no, that's my old friend's place. I've seen her face too often. There's no way it's her!

C: 你瞧，球在这里——
E: Look, the balls are here—

C: 哇哇，这浮台是载人的，不是投石机啦，举不起来的！被球压住就动不了啦，哗啦——
E: Whoa, this platform is for carrying people, not a catapult! It can't lift off when the ball's pressing down on it. *whoosh*

C: 有人托我来救你。
E: Someone sent me to find you.

C: 还是跑路保命要紧！
E: Forget that! Survival comes first!

C: 开启火种匣需要欧洛尼斯的祷言，凯妮斯女士已死，元老和祭司也四散逃走，现在能打开它的只有您了——
E: Opening the Coreflame Casket requires Oronyx's prayer. Lady Caenis is dead, and the elders and priests have scattered... You're the only one left who can do it —

C: 目前统计在册的火种匣共有三百二十个，我依据档案中的信息排除了大半…余火一定在剩下的这些火种匣里！
E: There are a total of <unbreak>320</unbreak> registered Coreflame Caskets. I've managed to eliminate most of them based on archival records... The ember must be in one of the remaining ones!

C: 呃啊…时间不多了，拜托您抓紧时间看下一个匣子吧！
E: Ugh... Time is running out. Please, let's move on to the next Casket!

C: 虽然惭愧，但这确实是我们重要的收入来源。
E: Embarrassing as it is, this is one of our main sources of income.

C: 我明白，我明白…现在谁也顾不得谁了。天父啊，但愿他去了别的避难地……
E: I know. I know... No one can afford to worry about anyone else right now. O, sky father, I hope he made it to another shelter...

C: 里面藏了什么宝贝？
E: What kind of treasure's inside?

C: 没想到有一天，我也能触碰到天父的火种。
E: Never thought I'd live to touch the sky father's Coreflame...

C: 吊坠微颤，将你引向更下方。
E: The pendant quivers slightly, leading you further down.

C: 之前不是说都交给你就好吗？
E: What happened to "us letting you handle it"?

C: 俱乐部动用了大量资源和关系来做这件事情…我们现在模拟出的虚假星神与本质具有联系，因此你可以理解为我们创造出了不具有力量的迷你神明。
E: The Society has pulled a lot of strings and diverted a lot of resources to make this project happen... The false Aeons we have simulated are connected with real Paths, so you can say we have basically created a bunch of powerless mini gods.

C: 按螺丝咕姆的设计，模拟的是整个「宇宙」。不过现在这台终端机只开放部分场景，这就够用了。螺丝咕姆经常设计些大而无当的东西，那家伙有一整颗星球，所以毫无顾虑……
E: It is a simulation of the entire universe according to Screwllum's design. But right now, only limited locations are open for access in this terminal. It's enough for us. Screwllum likes to design big useless things. He has a whole planet to himself, so he doesn't care about spatial limitations...

C: 我还有别的问题…
E: I still have some questions...

C: 你很快就可以再进入「模拟宇宙」，新的版本变化还挺多的。
E: You'll be able to re-enter the Simulated Universe soon. The update has quite a lot of changes.

C: 适应。
E: Yes.

C: 一种强烈的困意席卷了你…这种空虚像失恋后的第一个清晨。
E: A strong wave of lethargy washes over you... The emptiness feels like the first morning after a breakup.

C: 斯蒂芬•劳艾德。
E: Stephen Lloyd.

C: 他骂骂咧咧地把被你踢掉的*半个头颅*安了回去。
E: He curses vehemently as he attaches the *half of his head* you just kicked back to its original position.

C: 「这就结束了？」黑塔带一丝无奈，「我想我和螺丝咕姆都不太了解你…不过无所谓，实验结束了！至于诺巴蒂III型…就交给螺丝咕姆呵护吧，嗯，螺丝总会礼待它的。」
E: "Is this the end?" Herta's voice carries a hint of reluctance. "Well, I don't think either Screwllum or I know you well... but it doesn't matter. The experiment is over! As for Norbati III... Screwllum will be taking care of him. Well, those screws will take good care of him."

C: …他的牺牲结束了这场无稽的纠缠。
E: ...His sacrifice marked the end of this farcical dispute.

C: 「什么声音？」黑塔的形象突然出现，「{NICKNAME}，你遇到什么了？」
E: "What is that voice?" Herta's figure suddenly appears, "{NICKNAME}, what did you see?"

C: 应当是第一个清晨？还是第二个？你的脑海有些混沌不清。你已经分不清过往的一切是想象，还是切实发生过的——那些杏仁香的苦涩味道无处不在，游戏的快乐也无法盖过它。接着，████████……连你的手指也█████……███渐渐变得沉重……
E: This should be the first dawn? Or the second? Your brain is a little addled. You can no longer tell if everything in the past was an imagination or actual occurrences — That almond-scented bitterness is everywhere, and even the joy of gaming cannot overtake it. Then, ████████... Even your fingers █████... ███ gradually grow heavier...

C: 应当是第一个清晨？还是第二个？你的脑海有些混沌不清。你已经分不清过往的一切是想象，还是切实发生过的——那些杏仁香的苦涩味道无处不在，游戏的快乐也无法盖过它。接着，████████……连你的手指也█████……███渐渐变得沉重……
E: This should be the first dawn? Or the second? Your brain is a little addled. You can no longer tell if everything in the past was an imagination or actual occurrences — That almond-scented bitterness is everywhere, and even the joy of gaming cannot overtake it. Then, ████████... Even your fingers █████... ███ gradually grow heavier...

C: 祂的气息扑在你的脸上，祂的声音变成了虚空。
E: THEIR scent wafts over your face, and THEIR voice turns into the void itself.

C: 一种纯粹的「仇恨」突然涌现。你打量着身边的芸芸众生：这些该受审的「罪名」…欺诈者、双面性的背叛、彻头彻尾的虚伪，以及无知的狂妄……
E: A pure kind of "Hatred" suddenly manifests. You take in the crowd around you. These "crimes" that should be judged... deceivers, two-faced betrayal, absolute hypocrisy, and ignorant egotism...

C: （向斯蒂芬打招呼。）
E: (Greet Stephen.)

C: 「神秘」迷思！祂的身躯折射出世间不存在的*色彩*与*光芒*；光线将祂包裹成三角形的圆，接着祂化作彩色的纤维在空中飞转。祂留下了隐秘的光辉…或许是故意的！那些闪烁着斑点的符号，互相编篡着自身，在真空中跳跃着、沸腾着，变成形如灰质的图案，化作无数水母的触须，用隐喻和幻觉的叠嶂抹去路上所有的「行迹」。
E: The Enigmata Mythus! THEIR body refracts colors and radiance that are out of this world. The rays envelop THEM in a rounded triangle. THEY then turn into kaleidoscopic fibers that dance about in the sky. THEY leave behind secreted light... Maybe it was intentional! Those speckled, shimmering symbols, intertwine around THEMSELF, prancing about in the vacuum, boiling, becoming ashen drawings, turning into countless jellyfish tentacles, and erasing all traces on the path with THEIR metaphors and illusive, layered mountain peaks.

C: 「起点：公司。」螺丝咕姆扭着眼镜上的齿轮，「这是我们能追溯到的最早的历史。」
E: "The starting point is IPC." Screwllum twists the gear on his glasses. "It is the earliest point in history we can trace matters back to."

C: 开端•星际和平公司
E: Beginning: Interastral Peace Corporation

C: 你知道，这将是你一生中出人头地的最好机会。无论你原先的信仰是什么，此刻都应该相信*机遇*…你知道，成为柯拉帕乌的合伙人需要通过「吻手礼」。
E: It is clear to you it is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to be successful. No matter what faith you previously believed in, this *opportunity* should override it... You know you must go through the hand-kissing ceremony to be Korapao's associate.

C: 判定「自我认知」- 我是雇佣兵人类。
E: Intra-Cognition Assessment — I am a human mercenary.

C: 极致无机：「血色吊唁」•其三
E: Supreme Inorganic: Sanguine Condolences (III)

C: 「我叫『安达吐尔•扎扎罗』，来自信仰『假面愚者』的戈尔康达-7。」这位智械抬起了手掌，为你挡起了雨，「我将陪伴您接下来的旅程——现在请选择你的自我认知——你是什么样的『机械』？」
E: "My name is Andatur Zazzalo, and I'm from Golcondar-7, where the people believe in the Masked Fools." The Intellitron raises its arm to shield you from the rain. "I'll be your company for the rest of your journey. Now, please choose your type of Intra-Cognition. What kind of machine are you?"

C: 边星贸易战争结束后，一些事让你嗤之以鼻。你的*卧底*身份自始至终没有暴露…你得以目睹<color=#dbc291ff>特劳拉•法恩莎正在做的好事</color>。
E: After the Borderstar Trade War is over, you are contemptuous of some of the things that have happened. Your identity as the *undercover* remains hidden, so you get to witness <color=#dbc291ff>Telora Farnsha</color> carrying out her schemes.

C: 但那和普通人的生活无关。你楼上的年轻人——一位有机生命。他生活、进食、休息，一如既往。
E: But it has nothing to do with the life of a normal human. The youngster upstairs is an organic life. He goes through life, eats, and rests as usual.

C: 为了铭记。
E: For remembrance.

C: 拼命地证明自己，到底有什么意义呢？你不断地尝试留下存在的痕迹，却渐渐把自己给弄丢了。
E: What's the point of going all out just to prove yourself? You keep trying to leave behind traces of your existence, but gradually end up just losing yourself.

C: 你从血泊里再度站起，犬齿不受控制地往前突出，腿骨与肌肉自丰饶的力量中生长，你的目光不由自主地落下，俯视着眼前的羸弱生灵。
E: You stand up from a pool of blood, your canine fangs baring forward uncontrollably. Your leg bones and muscles grow with the power of Abundance, and your gaze cannot help but descend to gaze down upon the feeble lifeforms before you.

C: 「月亮」出来了。
E: "The moon" is out.

C: 第二件收藏是紫水晶的权杖，来自塔拉克立宪国的首相。他用自复制机群软禁了君王，却也赶走了工厂的劳力，高大的金属鞭笞无能的人类，唯有去恒星矿场采集日冕，才能体现他们最后的价值。如何泯灭众人的抱怨？男人问道。
E: The second collection comprises an amethyst scepter from the prime minister of the constitutional state of Taraka. He used self-replicating clones to put the king under house arrest but also drove away workers at the factory. The almighty metal whip lashed at powerless humans, and only by mining solar corona in the star mines could people demonstrate their ultimate value. He asked: How can the complaints of the people be eradicated?

C: 循着记忆里的航线，你看见那片纯粹而美丽的天地向你敞开。它剥下你遭受侵染的外衣，将它们封存，心中的潮汐一次一次地冲刷你的存在本身，洗涤去污秽，只留下一缕本真，你的原初。
E: Following the route in your memory, you see that pure, beautiful stretch of the world unfold before you. It peels off your corrupted exterior and seals it all away. The tide inside your heart washes over and over your existence, cleansing away all the filth and leaving behind a thread of authenticity: Your pure self.

C: 恭喜恭喜。
E: Congratulations.

C: 「而现在，有人给我寄了封预告函，说，会在我的眼前把它偷走。」
E: "Yet now, someone has sent me a calling card declaring that they will steal it from before my very eyes."

C: 「导师，咱们学派就不能分一点『权杖』的份额么，你看『星际能源学派』，用『权杖』搞出了多少研究成果。」
E: "Teacher, can our school not get our fair use of the Scepter? Just look at the results that the School of Interstellar Energy Resources has achieved with that Scepter..."

C: 好在你有充足的时间，何况你的体内储存了整颗星球的文明史，其中一定存在答案。
E: Fortunately, you have plenty of time. What's more, you contain all of the history of civilization on this planet, and the answer must be inside.

C: 法官制止了他的聒噪，随后看向你。「其他情绪稳定的原告提出，只要你能证明吃下人造奇物后你的身体产生了有价值的变化，你就能改判无期。」
E: The judge silenced his ramblings and turned to look at you. "Other, more emotionally stable plaintiffs have proposed that if you can merely prove that your body has undergone some form of valuable change after ingesting the synthetic Curio, then your sentence can be life imprisonment."

C: 终极智慧的样貌？
E: True ultimate intelligence?

C: 「而『孤波算法』。作为我学术成就的发轫之处，它是我最引以为傲的成就。」
E: "But the solitary waves theory — as the starting point of my academic achievements, it can be considered my proudest accomplishment."

C: 你登录进申请界面，课题与项目被衡量以价值。以它为基准，你将获得瓜分「权杖」算力残渣的资格。「请输入可查询的课题编号，根据权杖管理委员会第<unbreak>21</unbreak>条规定，将给定您所能支配的算力。」
E: You log into the application interface, where topics and projects are evaluated. Using this as a benchmark, you will be granted an opportunity to own a piece of the Scepters' computational power. "Please enter your topic number. According to Article <unbreak>21</unbreak> of the Scepter Administrative Committee, you will be assigned the computational power corresponding to your eligibility."

C: 这病不会有后遗症吧？
E: Does this illness have after-effects?

C: 「我见寰宇本没有完美学者，亦或满大街都是完美学者！」在伊格莱振聋发聩的吼声里，吞噬弹炸毁了学会驻地的外墙。你们一拥而上，要让他们也体会到应得的苦难。现在，每个人都可以是相对认知学派的学士。
E: "If you ask me, either there are no perfect scholars in the cosmos, or everyone is a perfect scholar!" Through the sound of Eagleye's deafening roars, a devouring bomb obliterates the Guild hold's outer wall. You all charge forward as one, ready to make them feel the suffering they deserve. Now, everyone can become a scholar of the School of Relative Cognition.

C: 「烛墨学派居然没把这么重要的东西记下来，他们是瞎子吗？！」星船因她的情绪变化上下颠簸。
E: "How could the Candelagraphos not record something as important as this? Are they blind!?" The ship began to shake under the turbulence of her emotions.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「权杖」系统</color>，由鲁珀特二世打造的无机仿生神经元集群，天体级的计算干涉装置，广布在帝国疆土的各个星域，完成帝皇交付的观测、演算与干涉指令。
E: The <color=#dbc291ff>Scepter system</color>, inorganic neuron clusters and celestial-level computational interference devices created by Emperor Rubert II, are widely distributed across various quadrants in the imperial domain to complete the observations, extrapolations, and interference orders passed on by him.

C: 对黑塔女士来说，她也许另有目标。黑塔女士一直希望能拓宽宇宙的知识总量。而她个人的研究，起于「学派战争」时代留下的{RUBY_B#孤波算法}一道难题{RUBY_E#}。
E: Madam Herta may have another objective. Madam Herta has always hoped to amplify the total knowledge throughout the universe. As for her personal research, it originates from {RUBY_B#solitary waves theory}a conundrum{RUBY_E#} left over from the era of the "Scholars' Strife."

C: 你很难得看到阮•梅的嘴角没有带上那抹笑意，「看起来，你们为模拟宇宙找来了一位不得了的舞伴。」
E: It is rare for you to see Ruan Mei without a smile curled at the corners of her lips, "It appears that you've found a terrifying dance partner for the Simulated Universe."

C: 又一群蠢货。
E: You are all fools.

C: 变化不大。
E: I don't see much difference.

C: 现在是黄昏时分，你站在热浪里。矿地令你一阵晕眩，矿脉烧得像融化的黄油。
E: It's dusk, and you're standing amid the heat waves. The atmosphere at the mines makes you dizzy, the mineral veins burning like melted butter.

C: 她睁开眼，看见你时，她身边瞬间冒出一团彩色的火焰，火舌沿着皱壁蔓延，很快触到你的脚掌，你顷刻被火焰包围。
E: When she opens her eyes and sees you, a colorful flame instantly materializes next to her, spreads along the wall, and soon reaches your feet. You're surrounded by fire in an instant.

C: 计数器缓慢跳转到「<unbreak>150</unbreak>」。玩偶内嵌芯片启动，传来一首颂歌「毁灭像个疯子，存护是个呆子；星神都一根筋，阿哈真没面子！阿哈真没面子！阿哈真没面子！……」
E: The number on the counter slowly reaches <unbreak>150</unbreak>. The chip embedded in the doll is activated to play a song: "The Destruction is crazy, and the Preservation is dumb. All the Aeons are stubborn, and Aha is embarrassed! Aha is embarrassed! Aha is embarrassed..."

C: 你获得了1个奇物。
E: You have obtained 1 Curio.

C: 你未能抵抗得住这股睡意…等到醒来后，身边目光炯炯的窃贼已经消失了。
E: You fail to resist the urge to sleep... By the time you wake up, the thief with her dazzling eyes is already gone.

C: 出乎意料——你的神之一脚让机器电压猛烈升高！「抓夹」哐当一下把一只*黏土玩偶*的头夹了起来，接着它不受控制地旋转、扭曲着扭蛋人的脖子！
E: Surprisingly, your powerful kick gives the voltage of the machine a surge! With a clank, the claw grabs a trendy *clay doll* by its head. It starts spinning out of control, twisting the figure's head!

C: 你的太空美虫蠕动着，你等待着它对着你的脸蛋「啪嗒」一口…
E: Your space worm is wriggling. You wait for it to spurt a mouthful of saliva at your face...

C: 你看着博士在两种形态间不断转化，最后在绝望与苦恼下自尽，他在两面性的旋转中变成一枚*机械陀螺*，最终在永恒的旋转中终结了自己矛盾的一生。
E: You watch the doctor constantly shift between two states and ultimately kill himself in despair and frustration. He has transformed into a *mechanical spinning top* in the spiral between polar opposites, and his conflicted life ends in an eternal spin between his two facets.

C: 「我们卖东西，在埠口价格会实惠些。就这样。」机械职员懒得说太多，示意你自己选。
E: "We sell our stuff cheaper at the port. That's it." The mechanical staff doesn't bother to explain too much — a signal for you to make your own choice.

C: 后来呢？
E: What happened next?

C: 「是因为奖励吧？」她莞尔一笑，缓步走到你的跟前。
E: "Are you here for the rewards?" Smiling gently, she approaches you slowly.

C: 你的手指不老实地探进苍猿的肚子，它的毛发是那样深邃，仿佛能够吞没一切的悲伤，就连「虚无」的黑洞也要相形见绌。
E: You eagerly dip your fingers into the ape's tummy. The fur there is so long and lush, as if it could swallow up all sorrow — even the black hole of Nihility pales in comparison.

C: 「就这点儿？我养的卡蒂亚蜘蛛都比你们懂投资，」主持人狂热的呼喊几乎让你们融化，「再加注一倍，稳打稳扎的黑马选手，让你从此成为星际人上人！」
E: "That's it? Even my pet Katyan Spider has more financial know-how than you." The host's passionate cries almost liquefy you. "Double the stakes. This steady dark horses will make you interstellar elites!"

C: 「想要的话，拿走便是。当然，你也可以留下什么，一些用不着的废品。我敢相信，等你再看到它们的时候，一定会大吃一惊。」
E: "You can take them if you want it. Well, you can also choose to leave something here. Trash that you no longer have any use for. I promise you that you'll be very surprised when you see them next."

C: 你拾起一百分的耐心，替工匠们维护现场的秩序与安定。
E: Fully patient, you maintain order and stability for the craftsmen on-site.

C: 艾格勒的学者举起手中的图纸，与装置的半成品相互对照，不时指指点点，勾画出需要改进的地方。
E: A scholar of Aquila raises his blueprint in the air, comparing it to the half-finished device's form, at times pointing and gesturing at the areas that need improving.

C: 你身处一场庆典的中心，多洛斯城的广场热闹非凡，故作神秘的国王将要展示他的发明。
E: You stand at the heart of a celebration. The city square of Dolos bustles with excitement as the king prepares to unveil his invention with feigned mystery.

C: 比起一帆风顺，还是时有波折的未来更适合你。
E: A future with occasional turmoil suits you far better than a smooth-sailing one.

C: 你的丑闻成为了树庭内的一大谈资，但至少，未来的学者再也不会被这样的错误刁难了。
E: Your scandal has become a hot topic within the Grove, but at least future scholars won't be obstructed by such blunders again.

C: 博识尊在上，也许是阮•梅的存在感太过强烈，也许是你根本无法忽视她，本不应出现的天才也来到了商店——当然，只是模拟。
E: By Nous above, perhaps Ruan Mei's presence is too strong or perhaps you simply cannot ignore her, but the genius that should never have appeared is in the store too — Only as a simulation, of course.

C: 拟造的螺丝咕姆站在商店前，饶有趣味地看着眼前的世界。看来，他没有在意差分宇宙被你和树庭联合复刻这件事。
E: The simulated Screwllum stands before the shop, observing the world with keen interest. It seems he's not bothered by the fact that you and the Grove have recreated the Divergent Universe altogether.

C: 它的机运足以腐蚀人心。
E: Their fortune could corrupt the purest hearts.

C: 所以，请不要厌恶塞纳托斯，它虽沉寂，却也温柔。
E: Therefore, do not despise Thanatos. They are silent yet gentle.

C: 多半是诡计作祟，王妃听闻，用冥河的河水作为染料，任何被描摹出肖像的人，都将坠入死亡。
E: It's probably a trick. The queen, having heard the rumor, drew upon water from the River of Souls, believing that any portrait painted with it would cause the subject's death.

C: 它藏在醉客的酒杯里，与众人一同参与对自己的祭祀。它吞下远征的航船，邀水手们在肚子里纵情豪饮，又在迷醉后连人带船吐上岸去。
E: They hide in the drinkers' cups, participating in the ritual made to them along with everyone else. They swallow expeditionary ships, inviting sailors to revel in their belly, and after the humans get drunk, the god spews them and the ships back onto the shore.

C: 如破碎的门径。
E: Like a shattered pathway.

C: 也许是冒险家的进取精神支撑着你，又或许单纯是因为不愿回到地上烤棉花糖，你义无反顾地冲向了头顶的雷网。
E: Maybe it was the relentless drive of an adventurer pushing you forward — or maybe you just couldn't stomach the idea of returning to the ground to spin cotton candy. Either way, you throw caution to the wind and surge straight into the heart of the thunderstorm above you.

C: 身为树庭学者的你，即使还没有去掉「实习」两个字，也拥有资格阅读这里的任何一本书，那先从哪本开始呢？
E: As a scholar of the Grove, even if the title still bears the "intern" prefix, you have the privilege to read any book in this library. So, where do you start?

C: 当时的世界没有任何变数。
E: At that time, the world had no changes.

C: 很久以前，在法吉娜最肆无忌惮的时代，即使是最伟大的临海城邦，也得祈祷不会得到她随性的垂青。
E: Long ago, in Phagousa's most unrestrained era, even the greatest coastal city-states could only pray not to attract their fickle favor.

C: 当艾格勒向欧洛尼斯夸耀完美的眷属，引来的却是不屑一顾的轻蔑。
E: But when Aquila boasted to Oronyx of their perfect Kin, they were met with nothing but a dismissive scoff.

C: 所以，是艾格勒赢了？
E: So, Aquila won?

C: 「…就这样，故事结束了。死去的英雄们从冥界归返，受损的村庄也得以修复。大家手拉着手，围在篝火前唱歌跳舞，直至暮色尽头……」
E: "...And so the story ends. The fallen heroes returned from the nether realm, and the ravaged villages were restored. Everyone joined hands, singing and dancing around the bonfire until twilight's end..."

C: 等我看看报告…唔，你不是空间站的啊？那权限是…喔，站长加的。这个结果嘛，有几个指标异常……
E: Let me see... Well, you're not from the space station, are you? So you were approved by... Oh, lead researcher. These results show several abnormalities...

C: 你仔细地思考了下那条神秘规则，你认为这毫无道理，你决定就此停手。
E: You think carefully about the mysterious rule, decide it doesn't make any sense, and stop hitting it.

C: 「外露王霸之气的光锥」
E: Domineering King's Aura Light Cone

C: 不错，不错！不愧是老朽看中的小年轻。诚实就是你最可贵的地方，老朽要好好奖励奖励你……
E: Not bad, not bad! This old one knew you had it in you. Honesty and candor are your best virtues, and naturally, a reward is in order...

C: 温馨提示：佩佩与空间站已签署正式员工合同。
E: Friendly Reminder: Peppy has signed a formal employment contract with the space station.

C: 你感到手指关节有些隐隐作痛，这或许就是「打榜」的副作用吧。这首歌的排名一跃而上，从末端飞向了顶部，甚至力压了《黑塔女士乃世界之光》一票。
E: You feel a vague pain in your finger joints, which is probably a side effect of clicking "Upvote" so many times. The song jumps up in the rankings, flying from the bottom to the top, even edging out "Madam Herta is the Light of the World" by one vote.

C: 一套《星神的失落——银河民俗考》丛书，一本《社会生活中的星神崇拜印痕》，《银河神话举隅：神话中的星神内涵叙略》，以及《星神之下：作为意志与表象的低维世界》。
E: There's a copy of The Fall of The Aeons – A Discussion on Cosmic Traditions series, a copy of Marks of Aeon Worship in Society, a copy of Cases of Cosmic Myths: The Meanings Behind Aeons in Myth, and a copy of Beneath the Aeons: The Low-Dimensional World As A Will and A Surface Phenomenon.

C: 咖啡固然提神，却也令人失眠。显然，你不想错失任何一场美梦。
E: Sure, coffee can add some pep to your step, but it also will make you lose sleep. You clearly don't want to miss a single lovely dream.

C: 空气中悬浮着一丛气泡，七彩的光华流溢其中，恍惚间形成似有深意的画面。靠近时，一个像是黑塔的女声不带感情地低语：瑰丽的星球。
E: Bubbles are floating in the air with a colorful glow gliding on their surfaces. For some reason, they form an image that seems to carry a profound meaning. As you approach them, a female voice that sounds similar to Herta's murmurs monotonously, "a splendid planet."

C: 你决定——
E: You decide to...

C: 我听说你们一伙人早早就飞出地表，回太空里行侠仗义去了——这不还没走嘛？
E: I thought you lot already left this planet for more chivalrous adventures in space, but you're still here!

C: 粉丝不都是靠成绩积累赢来的吗？别急，我打赌，你很快也能拥有自己的后援会了！
E: You get more fans by accumulating achievements! Don't worry, I bet you'll have your own fan club soon!

C: 空气中悬浮着一丛气泡，七彩的光华流溢其中，恍惚间形成似有深意的画面。靠近时，一个像是黑塔的女声不带感情地低语：赎罪之人。
E: Bubbles are floating in the air with a colorful glow gliding on their surfaces. For some reason, they form an image that seems to carry a profound meaning. As you approach them, a female voice that sounds similar to Herta's murmurs monotonously, "The redeeming man."

C: 你踏步向前，高举充盈剧毒的金杯。「异质的诸位生命啊，请务必铭记！」你扬起头颅环视：「思想不会*畏惧*死亡——思想绝不会死亡！」
E: You step forward and lift the golden cup that contains lethal poison. "Foreign-based lifeforms, remember this!" You hold your head high and look around. "Thoughts do not fear DEATH. Thoughts will never die!"

C: 你望向方桌右边。希尔德贝尼娅是你最宠爱的长女。她是一名无畏的战士，有着如火焰般炽烈的鲜红卷发。临近星系的将领们都畏惧地称她为「王国的烈焰」。
