E: Then, you look to the right side of the table. Hildebenia is your eldest daughter and your favorite. She is a fearless warrior with flaming red curls in her hair. Generals in neighboring star systems fearfully call her "The Kingdom's Flame."

C: 会喷射闪亮气流的钢块、被关在铁笼子里的大火球、酥酥脆脆的岩屑盘…你吃过好多好多有趣的东西！但你已经吃腻了…你想吃*更好吃的*，吃*更多*！
E: You've devoured so many interesting items: A chunk of steel that shoots bright gas currents, a massive ball of fire trapped in a cage of iron, a crunchy rock debris disk... but you've grown tired of eating all that. You want is something TASTIER, and MORE of it!

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>轮到我了……</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>It's my turn... </color>

C: 所以本虫就勉强先顶替一下，绝对不是在偷懒喀！
E: I guess my hand is forced, and I'll take over things from here. Absolutely no time for slacking off!

C: 古人云，事不过三…
E: They say the third time's the charm.

C: 多谢了，慷慨大方的{F#姐妹}{M#兄弟}！等小青龙的周边涨价了，我们肯定会念得你的好的。
E: Thank you, my generous {F#sister}{M#brother}. When the price of Cold Dragon Young's merchandise goes up, we will be sure to remember your kindness.

C: 你开的价还挺公道的…等小青龙的周边涨价了，我们会念得你的好的，{F#姐妹}{M#兄弟}。
E: You gave us a fair deal... When the price of Cold Dragon Young's merchandise goes up, we'll remember your kindness, {F#sister}{M#brother}.

C: …喔，原来如此，你是为这个来的啊！
E: ...Oh. I see. That's what you're here for!

C: 准备好了吗？我会先倒数三个数，然后开始计时——记住，得在<unbreak>20</unbreak>秒内吃下5盘炸岩居蟹才算挑战成功！
E: Are you ready? I will count down from three, then start the clock. Don't forget. The challenge is only considered complete when you eat five plates of Deep-fried Rock Crabs in twenty seconds!

C: 多谢惠顾，伙计！
E: Thanks for your business, pal!

C: 集中精神，{NICKNAME}！
E: Focus, {NICKNAME}!

C: 茶水服务——一般。
E: Tea: Average.

C: 房间的采光正是你喜欢的程度，不太亮也不太暗，十分舒适。
E: The lighting in the room is exactly how you like it: Not too bright, not too dark. Very comfortable.

C: <size=36>藏在哪里了呀？</size>
E: <size=36>Where in the world were you hiding?</size>

C: 「亲爱的，那只是个噩梦……」女性的声音稍显柔和，可男人却有些歇斯底里：「你根本不知道我梦到的东西有多恐怖！我拿着斧子，然后……」
E: "My dear, it was just a nightmare..." The woman says somewhat gently. The man is hysterical. "You could have no clue how terrifying my dream was! I was holding an ax! And then..."

C: 总之…这位粉丝想要我的照片，对吧？
E: So basically... this fan wanted a picture of me. Did I get that right?

C: 总之，多亏了你，这场比赛是我的胜利喀！
E: Anyway, I won this contest all thanks to you!

C: 这个世界有许多秘密…
E: This world has many secrets...

C: 再加入一点刚毅！
E: Just a little more oomph!

C: 我是谁喀！我在哪喀！今天吃什么喀！
E: Who am I!? Where am I!? What shall I eat!?

C: 传说酣醉时的法吉娜喜欢掀起巨浪，引领海洋生物翩然起舞，就像这幅壁画上的巨鲸…要是我也能去大海一趟就好了喀！
E: They say when Phagousa had a little too much to drink, they'd create massive waves and lead sea creatures in elegant dances, like the giant whale in this mural... oh how I wish I could see the ocean!

C: 何人胆敢上前！
E: Who dares approach!

C: （适当的沉默）
E: (Remain silent)

C: 你再一次站在地髓矿脉的面前——它哪儿也没去，就这么默默地等着你回来。令人感动。
E: Once more, you stand before the Geomarrow vein — it's right where you left it, silently waiting for your return. How touching.

C: 「叮」——这就是全部了，没有下文。你在期待些什么？
E: "Ding." That's it. There's nothing else. What were you expecting?

C: 真不错呀，真不错…拿着，{NICKNAME}——很高兴跟你做生意。
E: That's nice, real nice... Take this, {NICKNAME}. It's been a pleasure doing business with you.

C: 我要再考虑考虑。
E: Let me think about it some more...

C: …算了，这次也继续写「今日晴，无事」好了喀！
E: Forget it. I'm going with my usual "Nothing to report, business as usual"!

C: 这里、看这里——
E: Hey, over here—

C: 不是。
E: No.

C: 呃~你该不会有什么奇怪的受虐癖吧嘤？
E: Uh~ don't tell me you have some sort of weird masochistic tendencies, eep?

C: 一即是全，全即是一！见证吧嘤——
E: One is all, and all is one! Behold, eep—

C: 「用于劳作的双手最先消失」……
E: "The first to disappear were his hands that worked tirelessly"...

C: 请允许我占用一点时间…
E: Please, allow me a moment of your time...

C: 万物本是一，一生二，二生三；太阳为父，月亮为母；父母在，不远游……
E: All things are one, from which comes two, which splits into three. The sun is the father, the moon the mother. Wander not from filial duty...

C: 这样才算一场完美的逃生之旅嗡~
E: Now this is what I call a perfect escape!

C: 但是无妨——我将秉承吾主的意志，和邪祟势力战斗到底嗡！
E: But it doesn't matter — I shall uphold my master's will and fight against the forces of fiendlings to the very end!

C: 扯足帆，左满舵。打起精神来水手，别让桅杆碰着你的头——我们要迎向那浪潮！
E: Full sail, hard to port! Chin up, sailor, and mind your head — we're heading straight into the waves!

C: 为了证明自己能逆流而上，我这一生都在这条小小的瀑布里挣扎。现在看来，我错过了多少鲜花、多少蜜汁啊。
E: To prove I could swim against the current, I spent my whole life struggling in this tiny waterfall. Now I wonder how many flowers I've missed and how much nectar I've overlooked.

C: 身体根本不由我自己作主，我连自毁都做不到，做鸟还有什么意思呢？你说，你们人类如果总是身不由己，你会不会对生活感到失望？
E: Without any bodily autonomy, I can't even decide when I can end this life. Is there any meaning to living such life as a bird? What would you say? If you humans had no autonomy over your own bodies, wouldn't you feel hopeless about life?

C: 要始终对生活保持好奇与热情！
E: You must always maintain a curiosity and a passion for life!

C: 可能是不愿意跟你说话吧。
E: Or maybe it isn't willing to speak with you.

C: 捉迷藏是吧？那就来吧！
E: Is it Hide-and-Seek? Then let's go!

C: 这是重点吗？你应该惊叹于我的智慧无人能及。
E: That's not the point! You should be impressed by my matchless wisdom.

C: 没错，老大如果不回来，我们就不会让它从这里走出去。
E: That's right, we won't be letting boss leave unless we know for sure that they're going to come back.

C: 而这位当然也不是刺穿天目的「阳雷骑士」，而是守护我们的吾主太太喀！
E: And of course, this is not the "Daythunder Knight" who pierced the heavens — it is none other than our lady, the guardian of us all!

C: 好吧，其实我根本没有头绪。
E: Alright. I have absolutely no idea what's going on.

C: 来人啊！快叫丹鼎司的医士来！！！
E: Help! Somebody call the Alchemy Commission and get a healer here!

C: 我希望你能以「机巧鸟捕手」的身份去写一封信问问那个人。当然，出于保护用户隐私，我们不会透露用户的个人信息…但是信是能寄过去的。
E: As the ace cycrane catcher, I'd like you to write them a letter asking why. Of course, we'll protect any private information from being disclosed... But for sure we'll send the letter over.

C: 虽然总是作为陪衬存在，但大难临头，已经顾不上去想谁是主角、谁是配角了。只有同心协力，才能赢得一线生机！
E: I've always been a background figure, a mere supporting role... but when calamity strikes, does it really matter who's the lead and who's the extra? Survival demands unity — nothing else matters now.

C: 这上面的颜文字说要去<color=#dbc291ff>网上发帖</color>…是在暗示什么吗？
E: The emoji here says to <color=#dbc291ff>make a post online</color>... is that supposed to be a hint?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「凡人唯能窥见其一，其三需问与天外」</color>…难道说它们不能靠常规手段获得？
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Mortal eyes can only see one — the other three lie beyond the sky."</color> Does that mean the other parts can't be obtained through conventional means?

C: 别碰这东西，它有bug！
E: Don't touch that thing, it's got bugs!

C: 发生了什么？
E: And what happened?

C: 不对啊，卦象明明说「纯路人」此时此刻定在附近。
E: That's not right. The hexagram said Pure_Passerby will definitely be around here during this time.

C: 那没事了，我还以为你就是那个扬言要揍我的家伙呢。
E: That's good then. I thought you were the person who threatened to beat me up.

C: 他说工造司项目多，挣的钱也多。哼，说是这么回事，可跑项目的，成天派驻在外，常年离家，这钱挣了有啥用啊？
E: He said the Artisanship Commission oversees a lot of projects and earns a lot of money. That part is accurate, but those who are in charge of projects are always stationed away from home. What's the point of earning so much?

C: 不用太羡慕，或许某天你也能拥有这样一把帅气的武器呢。
E: Don't be too jealous now — one day, you might be able to get your hands on such an awesome weapon.

C: 《光荣之梦》，以群像剧的形式，展现了五大家系将监狱星改造成盛会之星的壮阔历史。
E: Dreams of Glory is an ensemble drama that tells the magnificent history of how the five lineages transformed a prison world into the Planet of Festivities.

C: 他是想让你仰望美梦的美好？是在嘲笑美梦的虚伪？还是在指引你向上寻找此处的秘密？
E: Does he want you to look up in admiration of the beauty of the dreams? Or is he mocking their hypocrisy? Or, perhaps he's guiding you upwards in search of the secrets of this place?

C: 该死，成色上好的货，被那群家伙半道截了。
E: Darn it, those were darn good products and the robbers took 'em all!

C: 坐会儿吧。
E: Sit for a while.

C: 悬锋城的事，你应该知道吧。
E: You know what happened in Castrum Kremnos, right?

C: …可是我好想爸爸。
E: ...But I miss Daddy.

C: 信仰能驱散黑潮！
E: Faith can dispel the black tide!

C: 这是命运泰坦的神谕吗？
E: Have the Fate Titans ordained this journey?

C: 难道全是假的？
E: Was all of this just a lie?

C: 危险？不扔才危险呢！星槎能翱翔于天际，就是凭借着星神的注视啊。唉…懒得和你解释，让开让开，让我再投一次。
E: Dangerous? It's dangerous if I don't throw it! Starskiffs are only able to soar through the skies thanks to the blessing of Aeons. *sigh* I can't be bothered explaining it to you. Just get out of my way, I'll do one more try.

C: 分头跑就想甩掉我？我这么多年执事是白干的？谛听！分头追！
E: Think you can shake me by splitting up? Did you think I was born yesterday? Diting! Let's go!

C: 颜色、颜色只是巧合帕！
E: Color — color is just a coincidence!

C: 这种事还是让三月乘客来吧。等等，帕姆又不是小孩子，才不需要什么摇篮曲！
E: Pom-Pom thinks March 7th is better when it comes to that. Hang on. Pom-Pom's not a kid, so Pom-Pom doesn't need any lullaby!

C: 你发现了一枚圆圆的小东西，凑近一看…是瓶盖，不是纽扣！
E: You discover a round thing and draw closer to inspect... It's a bottle cap, not a button!

C: 这就是我想的办法。
E: This is what I came up with.

C: 帕姆已经站好了！{NICKNAME}乘客如实记录数据就行，不需要顾及列车长的颜面，给我虚增几厘米什么的……
E: I'm on my feet and ready! Just record the data truthfully, {NICKNAME} — you don't need to take into account my ego or think about adding a few inches of slack on...

C: 都行，我没什么禁忌。
E: I'm fine with anything. I don't really have a preference.

C: 啦啦～啦～呃，怎么突然没声音了？
E: La, la... La... Eh? Why did the song stop?

C: 呜哇！你怎么回事帕！
E: Whoa! What's wrong with you?

C: （告知你的见闻）
E: (Tell Pom-Pom your observation)

C: 帕…帕姆也觉得有点眼花了。今天就到这里吧……
E: M—My vision is getting blurry. I guess that's all for today...

C: 我再想想…
E: Let me think...

C: 向你致敬，{NICKNAME}教官。哈！哈！哈！
E: I salute you, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}. Bwahaha!

C: <color=#dbc291ff>找到能源核心，启动照雪灯炉，在它们的加持下干掉敌人吧。</color>记住，扫荡要彻底，裂界里的杂碎一个不留！
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Find the energy core and activate the Snowshine Lamp. Then, get rid of the enemies with the help of the light.</color> Remember to do a thorough job and spare none of the Fragmentum monsters!

C: （次元扑满在危急时刻能够跨维度逃跑，必须要赶在离开前击败它。）
E: (Warp Trotters will escape to other dimensions in times of distress. I must defeat them before they get away.)

C: …还有很多次元扑满的意思？
E: ...So, there are more Warp Trotters out there?

C: 谁不急啊，我也急。不止是工人，现在迴星港封锁，罗浮上的物流系统也会大面积停摆，多耽搁一天都是几千万的损失……
E: Everyone's antsy. I'm anxious, too. It's not just about the workers. With the Stargazer Navalia sealed, the logistics system on the Luofu will also come to a massive halt. A single day's delay costs tens of millions in losses...

C: …哎，这不是那位英雄吗…队长，您还说我做梦呢，救星这不就来了吗！
E: ...Hey! Isn't this the hero? Captain, do you still think I'm dreaming? Our savior has come!

C: 那熟悉的、清脆的响声…姐姐，是您回来了吗……
E: That familiar, crisp chime... Big Sis, are you back...

C: 那么，一桩贝洛伯格缆车站的闹剧就此落幕——
E: Then that will be the end of this farce at Belobog's cable car station.

C: 调查
E: Investigate

C: 调查
E: Investigate

C: 当然，这个古董星球仪上没有直接标识出「贝洛伯格」几个大字——你之所以能找到它的确切位置，全凭此前在列车上看到的雅利洛-Ⅵ全景资料。
E: Of course, "Belobog" is not inscribed anywhere on the surface of this antique armillary sphere. The only reason you can pinpoint its exact location is that you've once seen Jarilo-VI's panoramic view on the Express.

C: 不得不说，这喷泉里真是什么都有，当然也包括硬币。你就是来干这个的——一枚脏兮兮的硬币——你最珍贵的宝藏！
E: It begs saying that this fountain really does have everything in it, including coins of course. That's what you're here for — one filthy coin, your most precious of treasures!

C: 我要离开了。带着碧翠丝一起…去哪儿？我不知道，也不会告诉你。但总之不是这里……
E: I'm leaving and taking Beatrice with me. Where to? I don't know and won't tell you, but I won't stay here anymore...
Three.

C: <unbreak>5000</unbreak>信用点！
E: <unbreak>5000</unbreak> Credits!

C: 「每晚定时，大姐带队。新区战斗随便打，装备高价回收，巡镝马上到账。」
E: "Each night, your queen leads her army. We fight through the new zone for epic loot, and pay out in strales immediately."

C: 此时，一个声音顺着手臂的骨骼直冲冲地蹿进你的脑内：「访仙需择礼，礼到门自开。」
E: Right at that moment, a voice rushes straight into your brain through the bones in your arm: "Provide a gift, and the path to visiting the celestial will open."

C: 你抽回手。罐子伫立在眼前，沉默地存在着。
E: You pull out your hand. The vase stands before you in silence.

C: 你曾轻易地将手臂伸进罐中，取出了罐中仙的谢礼。可这一次，你的手却卡在了罐口。这是理所当然的事情——人的手怎么可能塞进那么窄的罐口呢？
E: Last time, you easily reached into the vase and took out the Immortal's gift. But this time, your hand gets caught on the mouth of the vase. That's normal — how could a human hand hope to fit into such a small vase?

C: 进不去吗…哈哈，那是因为你尚有凡骨在身。参得虚妄蜕俗尘，千化变千妙脱骨。
E: Can't fit? Haha... That's because you still have mortal worries inside of you. Embrace the formless and shrug off thy mortal shell, then change into a thousand forms as thy mind desires.

C: （警惕地盯着罐中仙。）
E: (Stare in suspicion at the Immortal in a Vase.)

C: 这门面似是停了有些时日，台面上的积灰如此表示。但你并不清楚它缘何阖门，也不知道在那之后过去了多少个仙舟的自然日。
E: This shop front seems like it had been closed for some time, judging from the thick build-up of dust. But you don't know why it's closed down, nor how many Xianzhou days have passed since its shutdown.

C: 于是你掀开了门帘，瞧见扬尘正在晦暗的屋檐下游动自如——哦，还有一个脏兮兮的小盒子，周围还附了笔墨纸砚。
E: You roll up the curtain and see dust floating about in the gloom — oh, there's also a filthy little box with some pens, ink, paper, and an inkstone around it.

C: 可悲的陌生人…
E: Pitiable stranger...

C: 第一站先去<color=#dbc291ff>太真丹室</color>吧，那里似乎有咱们鹤运物流遗失的货物。
E: Let's stop by the <color=#dbc291ff>Aureate Elixir Furnace</color> first. I think we will find some missing items from Heron Express there.

C: 梓桥小姐，你们都在啊…现在发生了一点意外状况……
E: I see everyone is here. Miss Ziqiao. There's been a mishap...

C: 哼…他们逃不掉的。
E: Hmph... They won't get away.

C: 返航
E: Back

C: 还有别的事…
E: I have other things to do...

C: 这个小零件给我又何妨？
E: Why not just let me have this small component?

C: 我应该没有说错吧？
E: I'm right, aren't I?

C: 这不是我的那枚零件。
E: That's not mine.

C: 你去星槎海找梓桥，告诉她这个取货码，就能拿到我原本准备好的「宝箱」了。
E: Go and see Ziqiao in Starskiff Haven and tell her this code. She'll be able to give you the chest that I was going to give you.

C: 今天也是，我正在研究能否用宇宙际玛姬诺夫理论来论证费尔盖=邵宇猜想，一边思索着就一边出门散步了……
E: Today's no difference. Right now I'm looking into whether or not the interstellar Maginov theory can demonstrate the Felgay-Shaoyu hypothesis, so I've decided to take a walk and ponder things...

C: 的确， 原本我来匹诺康尼也是为了放松。但我对游戏…根本就一窍不通啊。
E: Indeed, I first came to Penacony to relax. But when it comes to gaming... I'm completely clueless.

C: 你瞧，我积攒了这么多艾迪恩代币，却压根没有用的机会……
E: Just look — I've saved up this many Aideen Tokens but haven't had any chance whatsoever to use them...

C: 呼——得、得救了…我这小身板，差点就塞了怪物的牙缝了，哈哈！
E: Whew... S—Safe and sound... I'm so small that I almost got stuck between its fangs, haha!

C: 至于具体怎么鼓励嘛——「鼓励师会主动发现并找到出现异常情绪波动的人群，通过沟通疗法缓解其负面情绪」——起码他们是这么宣传的。
E: As for how exactly they encourage people — "Motivators actively seek out people experiencing abnormal mood swings, and alleviate any negative emotions using communication therapy" — at least, that's what they say themselves.

C: （持续的哽咽与抽泣声）
E: (more choking and sobbing)

C: 您先冷静一下，再这样下去很危险……
E: Please calm down. It's dangerous if you go on like this...

C: 她在现实中的「白日梦」酒店当<color=#f29e38ff>前台接待</color>。面对那种无聊的工作，我猜她每天肯定都过得愁眉苦脸的吧？嘻嘻……
E: She works <color=#f29e38ff>as a receptionist</color> out in The Reverie in reality. Such boring work should leave her feeling utterly miserable each day, right? Tee-hee...

C: 我们星穹列车应该可以？
E: What about us aboard the Astral Express?

C: 最终，我按计划把坐标发送给公司，然后一脚油门离开了这里——应知晓的故事我已铭记，这些密文还是留给专业人士来伤脑筋吧。
E: In the end, I sent off the coordinates to IPC as planned, then put the pedal to the metal to hightail it out of there — I'd learned the lesson I was supposed to, and the secret of the glyphs should be left to professionals.

C: 好呀，科琳船长的故事多到说不完。你喜欢听什么样的故事？
E: Alright, Captain Colleen's got many a story. What kind of stories do you like best?

C: 可惜我自己就在公司享有一笔悬赏，这钱怕是赚不到了——但不耽误我在周围逛一圈，万一能遇到什么宝贝呢？
E: It's a shame IPC had a bounty out on my head, so that money's out of my reach for now — but that doesn't stop me from taking a stroll around there. Who knows what treasure I might find?

C: 嗯…一般来说，这片宇宙发生的一切都只是巧合的堆砌，人类很难从中学到什么道理。
E: Well... generally speaking, everything that happens in this universe is just a pile of coincidences stacked up, and it's difficult for humans to learn anything from that.

C: 是吗，你能给多少？
E: Really, how much is that?

C: 笑死，公司愿意得罪家族？
E: Hilarious! The IPC is willing to risk a fallout with The Family for this?

C: 这办法真粗暴。
E: What a crude solution.

C: （保持沉默）
E: (Keep silent)

C: 我不想过度深入细节，只不过……
E: I do not wish to go into the details, however...

C: 这样下去绝对不行，我得去找家族的人评评理。有什么不满意的地方就不能直说吗？暗搓搓地在背后等着看你的笑话，这叫什么事？这可是他们自己的项目！
E: No way. I need to talk to them and sort things out. Why can't they speak up forthrightly if there's something they aren't happy with? Are they secretly waiting to see me making a fool out of myself? Have they forgotten this is also their project?

C: 这么…大…怎么、怎么就容不下我那点小愿望呢……
E: Since it's so... big... H—How come my small wish can't fit in it...

C: 你想聊什么？
E: What do you want to talk about?

C: 员工的闲聊？
E: Employees' chitchat?

C: 哈…你怎么不问我为什么今天出门先迈左脚呢？
E: Ha... Why don't you ask me why I stepped out of my house with my left foot first this morning?

C: 所以你就坚持自己的道路，继续当个谁都懒得多看一眼的穷酸{F#姑娘}{M#小子}吧？我向你保证，这样所有人都能收获最大程度的乐子。
E: Why don't you stick to your own path and continue to be a poor {F#lass}{M#lad} that no one cares about? I promise you, That would be the most fun for everyone.

C: 这事压根和钱无关，它关乎公正、规矩、还有…还有名声，懂吗？
E: It's not about the money. It's about justice, rules, and... reputation, you know?

C: 你猜怎么着——这小子一炮走红！但自从他有点名气之后就开始做白日梦了，说什么自己的梦想是为宇宙带来快乐，嚷着要演那种吵吵闹闹的喜剧片。
E: And guess what? The kid was a hit! But as soon as he tasted fame, he started daydreaming about being in those noisy comedy pieces, thinking that was his ultimate goal.

C: 唉，本人身处行业之中，却无力改变现状，真是不甘心！
E: It's frustrating for me, working in the industry but too powerless to change the status quo!

C: 拉洛丝，你来了！我有个好消息要告诉你！
E: You're here, Larose! I have good news for you!

C: …确实，凭她的资质，只要延续之前的风格演出下去，一定就能获得成功——但这真的是她想要的吗？
E: ...Indeed, with her talent, I'm sure she'll rise to the top as long as she carries on with her current performance style. Yet, is it really what she desires?

C: 知更鸟前辈？「百年一遇的音乐天才」、「希佩亲吻过她的歌喉」、「谐乐的公主」…您肯定也听过这些盛名，应该不用我多加赘述了。
E: Robin? You mean the "once-in-a-century musical genius," the "voice kissed by Xipe themselves," and the "Princess of Harmony?" I don't think I need to elaborate on her reputation.

C: 听过你的话后，女人主动退回了安全地带。
E: The woman steps back to safety after hearing you.

C: 真是粗暴的救援方式…
E: That's some rough hostage-rescue tactics you employed there...

C: 是故意的还是不小心？
E: Did you do it on purpose or was it an accident?

C: 我无法原谅这样的自己，便申请从公司离职——不过上头的领导比我快一步。在递交辞呈之前，我就已经被开除了。
E: Unable to forgive myself, I decided to leave the IPC. But my boss was a step faster. Fast enough to fire me before I could tender my resignation.

C: 梦里真是什么都能发生…
E: It's true that anything can happen in a dream.

C: …从这…鬼门关前…走了一遭，我…呼…突然就领悟了人生的真谛。
E: ...After... going through... that narrow escape, I... phew... have had an epiphany on the true meaning of life.

C: 你往前小心翼翼地挪了几步，皮皮西警惕地瞥了你一眼，却似乎并没阻止你的打算。
E: You carefully step forward, and the Pepeshi person shoots you a warning look, but doesn't seem to be stopping you.

C: 好好想想吧，只要你愿意为我工作，事后好处必然少不了。
E: Take your time to think it over. As long as you're willing to work for me, you'll be rewarded handsomely.

C: 我向当地的统治者提出意见，请求取缔这些重污染产业。可他们的反应是什么？讽刺和挖苦！
E: I reached out to the rulers of the planet and requested for actions to be taken against the industries that caused heavy pollution, but guess how they reacted to me? Sarcasm and degradation!

C: 我向当地的统治者提出意见，请求取缔这些重污染产业。可他们的反应是什么？讽刺和挖苦！
E: I reached out to the rulers of the planet and requested for actions to be taken against the industries that caused heavy pollution, but guess how they reacted to me? Sarcasm and degradation!

C: 可以聊聊吗？
E: Are you up for a chat?
(Huh? This is...)

C: 你是怎么做到的？
E: How did it happen?

C: 所谓万人之上，五人之下……
E: Though I stand above the many, there are still five that stand above me...

C: 奥科萨娜那布道者般的浅笑突然咧开，把你吓了一跳。她试图收敛自己的笑意，可似乎不太成功。
E: Oksana's muted saintly smile suddenly breaks out into a grin, startling you. She tries taking it back, but it doesn't seem to work.

C: 假如把你放到我这个位置，你会怎么做？那可是真金白银的钱，如果把银行里的数字换成纸钞，可以铺满一座山，不，铺满一片山脉。
E: If you were in my shoes, what would you do? That's cold hard cash we're talking about. If I pulled it all out of the bank, the stacks would cover up a mountain — no, make that a whole mountain range.

C: 跑得还挺快，但凡放在其他星球，没准儿就真给她溜了。
E: She's pretty fast, but if it were on any other planet, she really might just get away.

C: 你永远也猜不到人们会把什么东西放进这些木桶里。
E: One could never know what people might stash away in these barrels.

C: 你的余光瞥见<color=#dbc291ff>天花板上好像有什么东西</color>垂了下来。
E: Out of the corner of your eye, you notice <color=#dbc291ff>something dangling from the ceiling</color>.

C: 啊呀呀呀我的脸怎么这么烫，不行了我要回去把头埋在羽毛下。
E: Oh no, I can feel my cheeks burning. I'm going to bury my head underneath my wings for a while.

C: 你怎么不说话了？
E: Cat got your tongue?

C: 必须是我！
E: It has to be me!

C: （为它指引回家的路）
E: (Point out the way home for it)

C: 就它了。
E: This one.

C: 我听说在旧世界，人们会把花瓣装进加压容器里，在举办庆典时引爆。
E: I heard that in the Old World, people would place flower petals into a pressurized vessel and blow them up at festivals.

C: 这颗星球上最不缺的就是极端地形。一旦遇到常规手段无法翻越的区域，造物引擎就会寸步难行。
E: One thing that this planet has in excess is extreme terrain. As soon as it reaches an area that traditional methods of traversal are insufficient, the Engine of Creation will be stopped in its tracks.

C: 再想想。
E: Let's keep thinking.

C: 取走里面的东西。
E: Take the items inside.

C: 算了，还是得去问问妃色夫人的意见啾！
E: Never mind. I still have to ask Lady Vermilion what she thinks, tweet!

C: 不过客人赢了该得到什么奖励呢，让我想想啾……
E: But what kind of prize should you get for winning? Let me think, tweet...

C: 这是本鸟的雕塑，可惜雕刻的时候忘记加上秀发了，真是唯一的美中不足啾。
E: This is a statue modeled after me. A pity they forgot my lustrous hair when they sculpted it — that's the only blemish to this picture of perfect beauty, tweet.

C: 啾啾！不要过来啦啾……
E: Tweet tweet! Don't come over here, tweet...

C: 我是来找你回去的。
E: I'm here to bring you back.

C: 人家要去找一个更安静的地方啾……
E: I have to look for another quieter place, tweet...

C: 吼吼？你要听哪一部分啾？
E: Hehe... Which part do you want to listen to, tweet?

C: 嘿呀——让我想想，有个到处乱跑的小家伙很喜欢钟表小子，一直在蹲在<color=#dbc291ff>房门口</color>等他回来啾！
E: Hi-yah! Let me think: There's a rambunctious little one who loves Clockie, and is always squatting by the <color=#dbc291ff>house entrance</color> awaiting his return, tweet!

C: 这是小镇最外围的「筑巢区」啾，里面是施工工地，很危险的啾——
E: This is the town's farthest nesting zone, tweet. There's a construction site inside, and it's really dangerous, tweet!

C: 在下名为「草绿经理」，也是小镇中黎明工坊和朝露小屋的负责人啾~
E: I'm called Verdant Manager, the person in charge of the Dawn Workshop and Dawndew Hut in the town, tweet!

C: 啾啾啾——！君子动喙不动爪啾！
E: Tweet tweet tweet! Gentle birds battle with their tongues, never their talons, tweet!

C: 呼哇，助手们居然都回来了，这下广场很快就能修好了啾~
E: Wow, the helpers have all returned. Now the plaza will be fixed in no time, tweet!

C: 比如…比如宝石！还有折纸小鸟！
E: For instance... for instance, gems! And origami birds!

C: 呜呜，礼物被你拆开，我的计划全打乱了啾……
E: Waaa, you already opened it. My plans are ruined, tweet...

C: 咦，屏幕变好了…？难道是我看错了啾？
E: Huh? The screen is fixed...? Was I just seeing things, tweet?

C: 啾…啾啾……啾啾啾啾……对了！有个已经长大的小鸟说要回来帮忙，结果喝了几口饮料就不见踪影了啾！它应该躲在面前的<color=#dbc291ff>「小镇模型」里面</color>…请帮忙把它叫出来吧！
E: Tweet... Tweet tweet... Tweet tweet tweet... Oh yeah! There's one birdie that has already grown big and strong, they said that they'd come back to help us. In the end, they had a few sips of a drink and we never saw them again, tweet! They must be hiding <color=#dbc291ff>in the model town</color> right in front of you... Please call them to come out!

C: 哼哼…没错，我上次聊到「画鸟点睛」，没想到有个脑筋不太灵活的小助手真的相信了啾…估计它现在还在<color=#dbc291ff>「某张海报」上</color>尝试呢啾？
E: Hmm... That's right, I was talking about "the early bird catching the worm" before and there was one slightly slow assistant that took it literally, tweet... I imagine he got up early and sat on a <color=#dbc291ff>poster somewhere</color>, tweet?

C: 嘿！有没有被我的超级无敌霹雳闪光晃到眼睛啾？
E: Hey! Did I blind you with my super awesome radiance spark, tweet?

C: 猫啊，你为什么是猫呢？如果你是一只折纸小鸟该多好……
E: O cat, cat, wherefore art thou a cat? It'd be much better if you were an origami bird...

C: 再见，我要回去看看，自己是不是最后一个被找到的啾。
E: Goodbye, I'm going to return and see if I'm the last birdie found, tweet.

C: 呼，你别光盯着我不说话呀，说一句吧啾。
E: Hmph, don't just stare at me. Say something, tweet.

C: 啾，我是看守剧场的小鸟，所有路过的朋友都要回答我的谜题啾。
E: Tweet, I'm the birdie that guards the theater. Everyone that passes by has to answer my riddle, tweet.

C: 苏乐达！
E: SoulGlad!

C: 一…二…三…四…一…二…三…四…啾？
E: One... Two... Three... Four... One... Two... Three... Four... Tweet?

C: 什么？我是什么？
E: What? Am I what?

C: 没错，{NICKNAME}大人，我就是你最最忠实的粉丝啊！
E: That's right, great {NICKNAME}! I am your most loyal fan!

C: 永仁……
E: Yongren...

C: 他的保密机巧鸟和玉兆在我手上，那几份文件，自然也……嘿嘿！
E: This is where you're mistaken. His encrypted cycrane and jade abacus are now in my hands, along with your documents... Hehe!

C: 如果确实是这样…那这书在坏人手里时没酿成任何大祸，实属不幸中的万幸了。
E: If this is the case... we were really lucky that it didn't cause any disasters while it was in the wrong hands.

C: 小鱼知道，小鱼不该听到丹枢大人说话。小鱼不是什么都不懂的傻孩子。
E: I know... I shouldn't be able to hear her voice. I'm not naive, and I know what has happened.

C: 下次别偷东西了。
E: Don't steal anything ever again.

C: 你眼前一黑，全身肌肉无法控制地紧绷在一起，几乎跌坐在地。
E: As everything goes black, your muscles tense up uncontrollably and you nearly stumble over.

C: （卜算命运）
E: (Divine your fate)

C: 那我就不客气了。
E: Then I'll gladly accept it.

C: 何不把另一半也给我呢？
E: Split it in half? Why don't you just give it all to me?

C: 不好意思，我好久没和人说过话了……
E: I'm sorry. It's been so long since I've talked with someone...

C: 坏了，我的任务完不成了…
E: Darn it. I won't get to complete my mission...

C: 唉…说实话，在这里对着空气唱戏，也挺没意思的。你有没有兴趣和我学唱朱明花鼓戏啊？
E: *sigh* To be honest, singing to nobody in here is really boring. Have you got any interest in learning Zhuming flower-drum opera with me?

C: 你翻开了唱本。
E: You open up the libretto.

C: 人类会因为说了一句别人说过的话就被判官抓走吗？人类社会也太窒息了吧！
E: Will a human be arrested by a Judge merely for saying something that someone else said? Human society, how suffocating!

C: 总之，下次别这么登场了！
E: Whatever — just don't make an appearance like that next time!

C: 我虽然没有本事，但是有这样的志向。
E: I may not have the capability, but I've got the aspiration.

C: 瞧瞧我车上的大坑，真是心疼死了……
E: Just look at the size of the dent on my car. I'm just distraught...

C: 据说家族把这件事定性为智械主责，还让他赔了车主不少钱…真惨。
E: I heard The Family found the Intellitron at fault and made him pay out a huge sum to the owner... brutal.

C: 「绘梦的夏洛特」——不知道您入梦的这段时间有没有听过这个名字？
E: "Charlotte the Dream Artist..." I don't suppose you've heard this name at all since you've been inside the dream, have you?

C: 走吧，去<color=#f29e38ff>酒店大厅</color>看看吧！或许那边的<color=#f29e38ff>猎犬</color>能够给予你一些帮助与建议。
E: Let's go and check the <color=#f29e38ff>Hotel Lobby</color>! Perhaps the <color=#f29e38ff>Bloodhounds</color> there can give you some help or suggestions.

C: …发生什么事了？
E: ...What happened?

C: 别说五次了，就算五十次我都能给你抽出来。碰上我是你的不幸。
E: Just five? Give me a chance and I'll pull it off fifty times for you! You were unfortunate to come up against me.

C: 难得相识一场，还是送你份礼物吧。不是什么贵重品，但意义丰富。
E: It's rare to meet a friend of his, take this gift. It's nothing of value, but it has a lot of meaning.

C: 这…赌神要输了吧？
E: Well... Is the Ace Gambler going to lose?

C: 你瞎编的吧？
E: Hey, you made that up, didn't you?

C: 在先前的落脚处，小女子曾遇到许多…和我有着相同遭遇的兄弟姐妹们，他们同样身世悲惨，或是家遭不幸，或是患有重疾，生活困苦，难以为继。
E: In the place where I was kept, I met many... many brothers and sisters who had shared my experiences. They had encountered tragedy, their families had met with misfortune, or they were stricken with illness. Their lives were hard, and they struggled to make a living.

C: 请允许我先行离开去通知各位兄弟姐妹。稍后与您在此会面。
E: Please allow me to first inform my siblings. I shall meet you here again shortly.

C: 它现在看上去与其他取款机别无二致，正常到有些无聊了。
E: Appearance-wise, it is no different from other ATMs. There is nothing special about it, so much so that it is a bit dull.

C: 真遗憾，那位水晶杯没有选择我…不过这就是生活吧？总会有那么一两件事不会照着你想要的方向发展，倒也正常。
E: It's a shame that the crystal chalice didn't choose me, but c'est la vie, right? Sometimes, things just don't turn out the way you want them to. It's pretty normal.

C: 你想起一句不太文雅的流行用语：*某种动物**某个动作*到最后一无所有。但你不好评价什么，因为从某种意义上来说，这确实也是一种伟大爱意的体现。
E: You recall a rather inelegant popular saying: A simp always ends up with nothing. You don't want to make any comments about the rum's action. In a sense, it's an expression of great love.

C: 都是过命的交情了…
E: We've been through so much together...

C: 方便的话…能帮我带点东西过、过来吗？
E: If you have time... Can you bring me something? Bring it here?

C: 啾，朋友，东西你找到了吗？快快快快给我！
E: Tweet, my friend, did you find what I wanted? Quick, quick, quick, give it to meeee!

C: 你把两位「大侦探」的推理转述给侦探。
E: You share the "great detectives' deduction" with the detective.

C: 别查案了，去玩吧。
E: Don't worry about the case. Just go and play.

C: 卡芙卡，你生命中既熟悉又陌生的那个女人…也许她会答应你的请求。
E: Kafka, the lady in your life that you are both familiar with and yet don't know at all... Perhaps she will agree to your invitation.

C: （大家都回去了…列车组难得能在这种场合聚在一起，真好。）
E: (Everyone has gone back... It's not often that the Express Crew gets to get together like this, that was lovely.)

C: 我才是桶王。
E: I am the King of Cans.

C: 那是什么玩意儿，听着就感觉不如铁桶贤者霸气。
E: What kind of nonsense is that? It certainly doesn't sound as mighty as my Sage of Iron Cans.

C: 回头客就是爽快，这次还是信用点支付可以吧？
E: Return customers are the best. Are you okay with a credit payment this time?

C: 不得不说，作为一个守法公民，重新得到尊重的感觉可真好。
E: I gotta say, it feels real good bein' a law-abidin' citizen n' winnin' back the respect of others.

C: 你发型不错。
E: I like your haircut.

C: 让我看看时间——糟糕，要开场了！顾不上气泡够不够了，在台上失败总比来不及上场强。
E: Let me check the time... Oh no, the competition is starting! I've got no time to worry about whether I'm bubbly enough... Failing on stage is better than missing the competition!

C: 她神情赧然，以一个不甚完美的微笑向你致歉，便低头掩面匆匆离去。
E: Her face flushes red, and with a less-than-perfect smile, she excuses herself and leaves in a fluster with a bowed head.

C: 你的选择是——
E: You decide to...

C: 对了，你是知更鸟小姐的粉丝吧？这张新专辑就送给你做奖励好了。我们去和鸢尾花家系说明，相信他们不会吝啬这点资产。
E: That's right — you're a fan of Miss Robin, aren't you? Take this album of hers as a little reward. We'll explain everything to the Iris Family. I'm sure they won't be tight-fisted about this.

C: 哎！这就对喽，要不怎么说老板就是老板呢！
E: Yep! That's absolutely right! That's why you're the boss, eh?

C: 「那里也会有梦吗？」
E: "Will there be a dream there too?"

C: 正所谓「做兄弟，在心中」…如此为他着想的好意，你相信砂金一定会心领的。
E: Given that people say that there is an unspoken bond between true pals... you believe that Aventurine will understand your thoughtfulness without you expressing it.

C: 一位侍从急匆匆地朝你跑了过来，将某个东西放在你身旁。
E: A frantic attendant comes running toward you and places something down next to you.

C: 可你认为相识一场既是有缘，你决定将活动邀请发送给她。
E: Still, you believe there must be a reason for every encounter. You decide to send her an invitation.

C: 唔…你还真是喜欢垃圾桶啊，满脑子都是垃圾桶……
E: Mm... You really like trashcans, huh? Your mind is just full of trashcans....

C: 那你们快去抓住它呀！
E: Then what are you waiting for? Go and catch it!

C: 我当然知道…吗？你这是什么问题？
E: Of course, I know...? What kind of question is that?

C: 你觉得我回答了这个问题能证明什么？
E: Even if I can answer that question, what can it prove?

C: 哈哈哈，其实我才是假扮的。
E: Hahaha, actually, I was the fake.

C: 因为它可能并不是一本*落在监狱的书*，而是*被关在监狱里的书*。
E: Because there's a possibility that this book isn't lost in the prison but it's locked in the prison.

C: 您不正是为了满足好奇心才来找我的吗？
E: Didn't you look for me to satisfy your curiosity?

C: 你回过神来，发现判官雪衣与此地的司狱赤衣正在商谈要事……
E: Just as you regain your senses, you notice Judge Xueyi discussing an important matter with the Jailer of this part, Chiyi...

C: 将逃犯悉数拿回之后，十王司绝不会亏待汝。
E: The Ten-Lords Commission will treat you well if you subdue every single one of the fugitives.

C: 魔阴发作时，我就是另一个人了。
E: When the mara strikes... I become something else.

C: 不过，这次来绥园一趟也算收获了不少创作灵感，这些素材用来做噩梦也不错！放心，我们会尽量让这样的体验控制在适度娱乐的程度……
E: But I've also gained quite a bit of inspiration during this trip to the Fyxestroll Garden. These materials will be ideal for a Nightmare! Don't worry, we'll do our best to ensure that the experience remains suitably enjoyable still...

C: …我只有你了。
E: ...You're the only one who can help me now.

C: 所以，*老前辈留下的路线指示*是重要的！我只能靠你了，那就是个纸条，估计是被什么多事的冥差给带到勘录舍了，你能帮我取回来吗？
E: ...Which is why the directions left behind by past explorers are so important. Please, you're my only hope now. The directions have been written on a piece of paper, but someone — a meddling spiritfarer, I reckon — has taken it to the Scriptorium. Can you retrieve it for me?

C: 密文和密钥随时可以查，别担心！那…「认路的」，我出发了？
E: Don't worry, you can check the cipher and encryption key again anytime you want. Well, it's time for me to set off, my "pathfinding" friend.

C: 密文是：嗯呢呢，呢嗯嗯，嗯呢呢，嗯呢呢。
E: The code is "Ehn-nah-nah, Nah-ehn-ehn, Ehn-nah-nah, Ehn-nah-nah."

C: 我好像没有什么行李？
E: I don't seem to have a lot of luggage.

C: （哪个领导啊？）
E: (Which leader?)

C: 注意到了。
E: I have.

C: 你放心，我不要钱，我只要你抬头看。
E: Relax, I don't want your money. I just want you to raise your head.

C: 这是你应得的报酬，再见！
E: These are your much deserved rewards. Farewell!

C: {F#她}{M#他}要来了，你准备好…
E: {F#She's}{M#He's} coming. Get ready...

C: 不过不劳烦您出手，老夫那几位孙子都是来参加演武仪典的种子选手，还望您给年轻人一些表现自我的机会。
E: There is no need for you to get involved in this. My grandsons are all seed competitors that came to take part in the Wardance. Please give these youngsters a chance to prove themselves.

C: 没错。
E: Exactly.

C: 没错。
E: Exactly.

C: 你天雷别把爷爷霹成老熟人…
E: Don't shock your grandpa into smithereens...

C: 你不免为门后的劫匪感到担心，从两人身上的斗气中，仿佛能感受到惊雷与海啸的怒意。
E: You cannot help but feel concern for the kidnapper behind the door. As you sense the fighting spirit of the two siblings, you feel as if you can sense the rage of pure lightning and roaring waves.

C: 在紫色武者身旁的虚空中，突然传来一个略显不满的声音。
E: Suddenly, a slightly displeased voice starts to call out from the void behind the purple-clad warrior.

C: 好吧，是你僭越了。黑板上的图画你倒是姑且能看明白，但「定位轴线」是什么？「标高符号」是什么？「引出线」又是什么？
E: All right, you vastly overestimated your own abilities. You understand the drawing on the blackboard, but what's a "positioning axis"? Or an "elevation symbol"? And what's an "outlet line"?

C: 没有可以分给我的钱吗？
E: So, I don't get a cut?

C: 小金选手思考许久，终于得出了结论：她拥有的，只有从内心深处*迸发*出的热情。
E: Goldie thinks for a while, finally coming to her own conclusion: What she has, is a surging passion that *sprays* forth from deep in the crevices of her desire.

C: 点燃它。
E: Ignite it.

C: 正当你认真观察顶部「火炬」重燃的变化之时，脚下忽然传来强烈的震动——
E: Just as you carefully observe the changes as the "torch" at the top is reigniting, you feel strong vibrations coming from beneath your feet...

C: 没想到传闻中的事情被我亲眼目睹…真是三生有幸。
E: I just didn't expect to witness the legends with my own eyes... I am truly fortunate.

C: 点燃试试。
E: Ignite it.

C: 因此，你乐意接受一场「心理测试」的挑战！
E: Hence, you are willing to accept the Psychological Assessment challenge!

C: 谜底就是——
E: The answer is...

C: 嘿！你识破了狮子的谜语，现在，你是它的「破壁者」了！
E: Ha! You've solved the lion's riddle. You are now its "Wallbreaker"!

C: 居然是白厄大英雄！快回答，快回答吧！
E: It's the great hero Phainon! Quick, what is your answer?

C: 没错，你就是精打细算的数学小天才，欠债还钱，多一分都不行。
E: That's right, you are genius at calculating. For matters like debt settlement, precision is right up your street.

C: 吼吼吼！问答时间结束，这道题的答案是——没有标准答案。
E: Ho-ho-ho! You're out of time. The answer to this question is that there is no standard answer.

C: 再想想？
E: Think again?

C: 穷人可以既没钱也没有时间。
E: The poor can have no money and time.

C: 匠人阿吉。
E: The bridge builder Aji.

C: 还有别的事…
E: There's more?

C: 呼呼！危险啊，摇摇欲坠的小火苗，差点就扑灭在这种不见天日的地方了。
E: *crackle* That was close. The dim flame was almost extinguished in this dark place.

C: 呼呼。你找到我了，小火苗在闲逛，想寻个清净的安身地方。不喜欢这里，满是奇怪的味道，别停下，别回头，灵火会熄掉的。
E: *crackle* You found me. This dim flame wants to find somewhere pure to call home and it doesn't like this place because of the strange smell. Don't stop and don't turn back, or the spiritual flame will be extinguished.

C: 是嘛…既然你认为我不是个废桶，那就说明我肯定存在有价值的地方。
E: Well... if this is the case, then I must possess value in some way.

C: 你是白痴吗？学过数学的人都知道，1加1当然等于2啊！
E: Are you an idiot? Everyone knows that 1 plus 1 equals 2!

C: 你、你竟敢顶撞王驾，口出狂言？哪怕身边没有护卫，本王也能亲自教训你！
E: H—How dare you! How dare you offend your king!? Even in the absence of my guards, I'll teach you a lesson myself!

C: 又是修复、修复，现在的家族碰上坏人难道只会忍让吗？
E: Fix, fix, fix... Does The Family just put up with bad guys when they run into them?

C: 夜已经深了，空无一物的车站也将被神秘笼罩——听，是什么东西在角落里躁动？
E: In the dead of the night, the empty train station is also shrouded in mystery... Wait, you hear something rustling in the corner?

C: 住嘴！你竟敢心怀不敬，口出狂言，禁地会吞噬你！
E: Silence! How dare you utter disrespect from your heart and mouth! The forbidden ground will devour you!

C: 维持现状只会越来越糟，必须要重建帮派…路过的，我问你，建立一个帮派最重要的是什么？
E: Maintaining the status quo will only exacerbate the situation. We must rebuild the gang... You there, let me ask you — what's the most important thing to rebuilding a gang?

C: …抱歉，是在下失礼了！师傅在上，请受徒儿一拜！
E: I sincerely apologize for my rudeness! Master, please accept me as your disciple!

C: 先看看你有没有办法通过我的考试吧！
E: Let's see you crack my test first!

C: 问问它需要什么？
E: Ask it what it wants?

C: 可能很多人都没有意识到，你手里的羽毛笔除了战斗外还有个出人意料的用途，那就是写字。好久没写字，你简直有点按耐不住了。
E: Most don't realize your quill pen isn't just for battle. There's one surprise usage of it — it writes. You haven't written in ages, and honestly? You're kinda itching to start.

C: 这只小妖精似乎很烦恼的样子， 既然都和它做了那么久的笔友，还是帮忙帮到底吧。
E: This little fairy seems troubled. You've been pen pals this long, might as well see it through.

C: 你取出昔涟准备的蔬果，眼前的麦田守望者 / 神圣呜呜伯 / 好好奇美拉 / 黄豆粉糍粑 / 奇美啦迷吃得相当欢快。
E: You offer the fruits and veggies Cyrene prepared. Guardian of the Wheat Field / Holy Wubbaboo / Curious Chimera / Soy-Dusted Mochi Cake / Chimeramem digs in happily.

C: 嘻，没想到吧？比起摆好姿势，抓拍到的意外才更令人惊喜呢。{NICKNAME}刚才的表情很棒哦。
E: Hehe, didn't see that coming, did you? Candid shots are way more fun than posed ones. That expression was perfect, {NICKNAME}.

C: 嘻，那我就一直一直一直找下去。
E: Hehe, then I'll just keep looking... and looking... and looking.

C: 呀，意外收获，空气里充满了别人家的炊香呢。
E: Oh, an unexpected discovery. The smell of cooking is in the air.

C: 她是…红色头发，穿红色衣服的年轻女性…说话的态度很凶……
E: She... She is a young woman. She has red hair and wears red clothing... She speaks with a ferocious attitude...

C: （描述悬锋教官的外观）
E: (Describe the appearance of the Kremnos drillmaster)

C: 他是…头发和胡子都全黑的男性，中等年纪，穿红色的衣服……
E: He... He is a man with black hair and a black beard. He's middle-aged, and he wears a red outfit...

C: 我就是雅努斯本人！
E: I am the great Janus!

C: 我走完了该走的路，是时候歇息了。愿未来的门扉…呼…始终…向你敞开……
E: I've walked the paths I must walk. It's time to rest. May the door of tomorrow... *yawn* remain... ever open to you...

C: 呼呼…呼呼……
E: Zzz... Zzz...

C: 留在这里保护我们，下一世你想要什么我都给你！你也不想出去拼命吧？
E: Stay here and protect us, and in the next life, I'll give you whatever you desire! You don't really want to risk your life out there, do you?

C: 我早想问了，开启密径前到底为什么要多此一举！
E: I've been meaning to ask, why go through all that unnecessary trouble before opening the Hidden Passage!?

C: 我告诉你，宝贝儿…过去这儿可不是这样的…鱼儿们…起舞…醉客们…纵欲、起舞、纵欲……
E: Let me tell you, my dear... It wasn't like this in the past... The fish... they dance... The drunks... frolicking, dancing, frolicking...

C: 作为法政科的向导，我的工作自然也会比平日要繁琐一些。
E: As a guide of the Department of Galactic Geopolitics, I am even busier than usual.

C: 你需要帮助吗？
E: Do you need help?

C: 当你对那些非人奇物施以过量外部刺激，只为看一看它的特有反应的时候，有没有想过它也会痛苦？
E: Did it ever occur to you that the non-human Curios can also feel pain when you cast excessive external stimulation to it just to see its unique response?

C: 科室与科室之间本就研究方法不同，有些时候发生学术冲突很正常。但总是有人喜欢对人不对事，阴阳怪气不说还跑过来欺负人。
E: Different departments adopt different research methods. Academic conflict is normal. But some people just take things too personally and come harass other people.

C: 你看，绩效考核会推迟，这就意味着我不用熬夜去思考怎么做汇报了。看你的样子像是新来的，肯定不知道咱们这里的汇报流程有多烦琐……
E: Look, the performance review is postponed, which means I don't have to work late thinking about the report. You look like a newbie. You've no idea how cumbersome our reporting process is...

C: 见了外了。这酒就和水没区别，咕咚咕咚从嘴里流到胃里，一下子全身热乎了就对了。其实也就比喝热水要辣喉咙点，没区别的。
E: No worries. Wine is no different from water. It flows from your mouth to your stomach and then your whole body warms up. It's just slightly spicier than hot water. They are nearly the same.

C: 莱斯莉不仅仅是一个明星那么简单。她是一个天才学者，是前期的基因与后期的努力共同作用出来的成果，即便是她的妹妹埃美丽，也绝对不会有她的成就。
E: Lesley is more than a celebrity. She is a gifted scholar. She's the combined result of her genes and her own efforts. Even her sister Emily won't be able to achieve anything like that.

C: 这次也是要多谢佩佩，才能让小姐找到解决问题的方法。看来之后也得多多感谢它才行啊。
E: Peppy saved the day again this time. Thanks to him, Lady Asta was able to work things out. I'll have to give him a treat.

C: 哦，知道了。
E: Okay.

C: 听说空间站就在我们头顶上，不知道空间站的生活会是什么样的呢？真想和萍萍姐一起去看看……
E: I heard the space station is just above us, I wonder what life there is like? I really wanna go take a look with Wenfry...

C: …你、你跟我说话就想打听这个？
E: ...D—Did you approach me just to ask me that?

C: 有点急气鼓鼓地，腮帮子都鼓起了一大块。
E: Bit Busy puffs its cheeks in frustration.

C: 您想问的是不是「机器人命名」功能？空间站的科员享有自定义我的姓名的权限，但请在一个自然月后及时维护，否则会失效。
E: Are you inquiring about the robot naming feature? Space station researchers are authorized to change my name. Please update me after one natural month, or the changes will not take effect.

C: 我记得你我之间所有的片段，微小的信息像涓涓细流一样，它们「构成」了世界。
E: I remember all the snippets of memories we shared. Tiny details that flow like little streams make up the world.

C: 这盾牌保真吗？
E: Is this shield the real deal?

C: 再来！有本事你打三面！
E: Again! Let's see how you do against three of 'em!
...Ahhh!!!

C: 人总是倾向于那些宏大而虚幻的理念，又不愿去思考其中的含义。
E: People are always drawn to these grand and fantastic ideals, yet they are unwilling to reflect on their implications.

C: 覆灭前的阿卡索斯停留在你的记忆中，被黑潮吞没的阿卡索斯却可以随时前往。早已不存在的东西，如何与现今仍存在的东西是同一物？
E: The Icatus that existed before its destruction remains in your memory, yet you can go to the Icatus that has been devoured by the black tide at any time. How could something long since gone be the same as something that exists currently?

C: 宁芙的父母在奥赫玛的势力范围很广…这下麻烦了。
E: Nympha's parents have a very wide network of influence in Okhema... This is big trouble.

C: 哎哎哎，冷静！我只是开个玩笑，何必拿出吉奥里亚的神杵来对付我呢。
E: Hey hey hey, chill out! I was just kidding around, no need to bash me around with Georios' scepter.

C: 咳咳…我是看见了那孩子，而且我很清楚她一直以来追求的东西。
E: Ahem... I saw that kid, and I also know exactly what she's looking for all this time.

C: 现在，你想再重温一遍那时的情景吗？
E: Would you like to revisit that moment now?

C: 万一哪一天，我遭遇不测…你和「小宝」至少还能靠这笔钱好好活下去。
E: In case something ever happens to me one day... at least you and our Little Precious can use this to keep on living.

C: 一看就知道是智商税。
E: Looks like it's just gonna fool the foolish.

C: 那有什么用？
E: What's the point of that?

C: 你想好怎么表白了吗？
E: Have you figured out how to express yourself?

C: 我年轻的时候，做石蜡切片的手艺可比他们差多了。
E: When I was their age, I was far worse at paraffin sectioning than they are.

C: 主控舱段是没问题了，接下来的呢？都检查完了吗？
E: The master control zone is looking good. What's next? Have you checked everything?

C: 然后我并没有听到笑话，反而是听到一个声音不断挖苦我。我怀疑是有什么东西躲在门后…总之事情就是这样了，非常恐怖！
E: Well, instead of hearing a joke, all I could hear was this voice roasting me. I thought there might be something hiding behind the door... Anyway, that's how it happened. Totally freaky!

C: 我寻思着这大地兽也不是什么地里的作物，怎么能凭空出现的。可它来都来了，我也不好赶出去，就这么先喂着了。但事情没这么简单……
E: I figured, this dromas wasn't exactly a crop from the field, so how could it appear out of thin air? But now that it was there, I couldn't just drive it away, so I've been feeding it for now. But it's not that simple...

C: 懂了，你们是在找代餐。
E: Got it, you're just looking for a substitute.

C: 我不知道，我只是{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}祝福的诗人。
E: I don't know... I'm merely a poet blessed by {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}.

C: 「一日塔兰顿」？
E: One-Day Talanton?

C: 将由，「一日塔兰顿」{NICKNAME}公平裁决。各位，请庄严宣誓——
E: —will be fairly judged by One-Day Talanton, {NICKNAME}. Everyone, please commit to a solemn oath...

C: 后来{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}垂怜他，神明用奇迹为那座雕像赋予了生命，并让他们二人结为夫妻，过上了幸福的生活。
E: Moved by his passion, {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#} blessed the statue with life, and they became a happy couple.

C: 这么说，您很懂刻法勒？
E: So you know Kephale well?

C: …告辞。
E: ...Farewell.

C: 现在我心里暖洋洋的，一点也不害怕了！
E: Now, my heart feels all warm and fuzzy. I'm not scared at all!

C: 第二天清晨，我才得知，父亲在昨日的圣城保卫战中牺牲了。
E: The next morning, I found out... my father had fallen in battle defending the holy city.

C: 如果是{NICKNAME}阁下您一起…您的实力，我自然信任。
E: If it's you, {NICKNAME}, going with him... I naturally trust your strength.

C: 呃，真、真让我来？
E: Uh, really, me?

C: 黑色乱流沿着街巷汹涌而来，又一次袭击来临了。
E: Black turbulence surges violently through the streets. Another attack is upon you.

C: 我是膝盖上中了一剑…下回摆摊被卫兵大人撵，会不会影响逃跑的速度啊？
E: I took a blade to the knee... Will it affect how quickly I can escape the next time Mr. Guard chases after me for peddling?

C: 虽然奥赫玛现在面临危机，但天父刻法勒还在庇护着我们所有人，是这样的，对吗？
E: Okhema's struggling, but Sky Father Kephale's still got us. Yeah?

C: {F#女士}{M#先生}，我恳求你，能和云崖的其他守卫通融一下，带上我、亚森、拉缇娜我们三个，去到刻法勒的巨像前，再祈祷一回吗？
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, I'm begging you. Can you come to some kind of agreement with the other Dawncloud guards and bring me, Yason, Lathena to perform one last prayer at the Colossus of Kephale?

C: 今天执守的卫兵换人了吗？
E: Did today's guard rotation get changed?

C: 这次要问些什么好呢？
E: What should I ask this time?

C: 你举着信件，在人群中寻找着阿波罗尼的身影，忽然有人拍了拍你的肩膀。
E: Holding the letter, you search for Apollonius in the crowd, when suddenly someone taps you on the shoulder.

C: 选择卷二
E: Select Volume 2

C: 我不理解……
E: I don't understand...

C: 喔，不知修好了没有？救世主阁下，您再做一瓶看看？
E: Oh? I wonder if it's working now. Great Deliverer, could you try making one more bottle?

C: 应该能观测到吧……
E: I should be able to observe...

C: 咦，你也在啊？
E: Oh, fancy seeing you here!

C: 要是有机会，真想把我的望远镜搬到列车上。
E: If I get the chance, I'd love to bring my telescope onto the Express.

C: 虽说宇宙中遍布着各式各样的星体，但我们究竟能观测到什么，这谁也说不准。
E: There are all kinds of wonders in the universe — you never know what you might find with a telescope.

C: 趁有空，我就来列车上转转，顺便给你带了点小礼物，不是什么贵重物品，只是一点心意啦！
E: I was due a visit, so I thought I'd bring you a gift. Nothing too precious, just my way of saying thank you!

C: {NICKNAME}，我记得你们曾提起过，列车可以穿梭整个宇宙，造访银河各处不同的星球……
E: {NICKNAME}, I remember you once said that the Express travels across the universe and visits all kinds of different planets...

C: 我懂，歌太好听了吧？
E: I understand. The music here is pretty good, huh?

C: 朗道家是个大家族，家里经常有人来来往往。
E: The Landau family is big — there are always people around at home.

C: 很久以前的一位天才，听说超距遥感和心灵通感信标都是他的发明，只是署名让给了博识学会。
E: A genius from long ago. It is said that he invented ultraremote sensing and the telepathy beacon, only he signed them over to the Intelligentsia Guild.

C: 没有。
E: Nope.

C: 我才不信你，我肯定长高了～
E: I don't believe you! I've definitely grown taller.

C: 你说的倒也没错，毕竟，我甚至梦见自己会飞。
E: *sigh* You're right, I dreamed I was flying after all.

C: 我还有些事情需要问你…
E: I've got something to ask you.

C: 但我的眼中，只看到了粉丝们恐惧的脸庞——被泪水打湿的玫瑰固然有别样的韵味，但倘若馥郁的香气变为了苦涩的愁郁，那岂不是末日的光景？
E: However, I only see the horrified faces of my fans. Though roses moist with tears hold a special scent, it would be apocalyptic for such thick and sweet aromas to turn sour with sorrow.

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 大家总之会被我的一些肢体语言或者是眼神所吸引注意，这一点我也十分困扰。
E: People always get attracted by my body language and my eyes. I find it really frustrating.

C: 虽然波少粉丝后援会解散了，但还是有少部分粉丝留了下来，成立了新的后援会。有了他们的支持，我肯定可以更快在空间站改头换面，让大家感受到我的决心的！
E: Though the Master Capote Fan Club had disbanded, a small number of fans stayed behind and formed a new club. With their support, I can definitely start all over again on the space station and let everyone feel my conviction!

C: 我还有些事想问你…
E: There's something else I want to ask.

C: 查拉图斯特…什么？
E: Zarathustra what now?

C: 难道雅利洛-Ⅵ上有帕姆的同胞？
E: Are you saying Pom-Pom's kin are on Jarilo-VI?

C: …真期待以后的天外探险啊。
E: ...I can't wait to explore beyond the sky.

C: 你们列车上那种域外的象棋，你玩过吗？
E: Have you tried the strange chess game you have here on the Express?

C: 账账，饿了吗？
E: Numby, you hungry?

C: 虽然我还没亲身经历过，但我觉得，任谁都没法拒绝一场完整的太空旅行吧？
E: I've yet to experience it myself, but no one in their right mind would turn down a chance to journey through space.

C: {NICKNAME}，有空吗？我…我从贝洛伯格给列车组带了些小礼物，你能代大家收下吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, are you free right now? I, umm... I brought some presents from Belobog to give to the Crew. Could you take them on their behalf?

C: 你说的这个人是谁？
E: Who are you talking about?

C: 根据判官的专业判断，无形之物…或者说不祥之物就在列车里，就、就在我的正前方。
E: There was a moment when I felt the invisible thing was r—right in front of me...

C: 唔，现在各个星球上好像都在流行一种「海水熔岩」味的点心。据说是取了海中的水，以及苦血山脉里的熔岩。
E: Hmm... Everyone's talking about this "seawater magma" flavored snack — it's becoming all the rage on quite a few planets. I've heard they extract seawater and combine it with magma from the mountains.

C: 最重要的是…这里人不少，但笨蛋却不多。
E: Perhaps the best part... is that even with so many present, there's a delightful scarcity of simpletons.

C: 多次造访星穹列车，我也理应带些谢礼。
E: Having visited the Express so many times, it's only fitting I bring a token of my appreciation.

C: 闭上眼睛，好像下一秒，就会抵达它们的所在。
E: When I shut my eyes, I get this feeling that I'm among the stars.

C: 嗯嗯！一想到还有大家在银河里坚持着「开拓」的旅途，我就对未来充满了期待！
E: I will! Just thinking of all of your trailblazing throughout the Cosmos fills me with hope for the future!

C: 感谢列车上的大家，米沙已经很久没有这么开心过了！
E: I'm so grateful to everyone, I haven't had this much fun in a long time!

C: 很多人说咖啡提神。所以有段时间，我每解决一个小可爱，就会找个地方来几杯振奋振奋精神，好迎接下一个。
E: Many people say coffee keeps you awake. So for a while, whenever I had to take care of a lil' fudgehead, I'd look for a spot and have a few cups to keep my energy up for the next one.

C: 干瞪眼的感觉可不好受。要不…今晚我们过招到天亮，怎么样？
E: I hate staring into space at night. How about... tonight we spar until daybreak. What do you think?

C: 对于惩恶，一击毙命才是最好的收场。
E: When it comes to evil, the best way to end it is a single fatal blow.

C: 刚才留声机里放的那首曲子，有股动人心魄的力量。
E: The song that played from the Phonograph just now had a breathtaking power.

C: 可即便如此，还是有很多人宁愿永远在梦中沉沦下去……
E: Even so, there are still many who would rather be forever immersed in the Dreamscape...

C: 那位活泼的小姑娘方才同我说了一些关于「你」的事……
E: That lively young lady told me some things about you...

C: 三月小姐方才带我去了她的房间，很温馨的布设，我很喜欢。
E: Miss March took me to her room just now. It was quite cozy. I liked it very much.

C: 三月很热爱生活。
E: March just loves life that much.

C: 逆位有时也会是表象。说不定在风浪过后，会有意外之喜呢。
E: Foreboding signs can also be superficial. You may have good fortune after riding out the storm.

C: 嗯？难不成咖啡还能消黑眼圈吗？怪不得这个味道…闻上去和丹鼎司熬制的汤药一样苦……
E: Huh? Can coffee get rid of dark circles under your eyes? No wonder it smells like... medicine brewed by the Alchemy Commission...

C: 列车行遍诸界，难免有遭遇困境的时候。多身技能，总归是能多份保障。
E: The Express travels to so many worlds, it's hard to avoid running into difficult situations. Having more skills can give you more protection.

C: 太好了！那就…请你收下它们吧。
E: Awesome! Then... please take them.

C: 太好了，看来我没记错。是那种更加短促清脆的笑声，对吧？不少外邦人都被吓到过，还有很多，貘馍卷其实是…哎呀，恩公见谅，那些画面好像一下子涌上了心头。
E: Oh, good! It seems like my memory is still sound. It's a kind of short and crisp laugh, no? Many outworlders have been scared by that sound. And there are other foods, too, like the tuskpir wrap, which is actually... Ah, forgive me. I'm suddenly remembering everything.

C: 有什么好吃的糕点吗？
E: Any yummy cakes?

C: 你怎么也在？
E: What are you still doing here?

C: 我在干什么，我不能再这么思考了……
E: What am I doing, I really have to stop thinking...

C: 我初来乍到。
E: It's my first time here.

C: 没有，等我见到了再跟你说。
E: Not yet. But I'll let you know when I see one.

C: 我还是觉得你在骗人…
E: I still think you are a scammer...

C: （假装没看到）
E: (Pretend you didn't notice her)

C: 不要气馁，努力提高自己！
E: Don't give up just yet. Pull yourself up by your bootstraps.

C: …难道是你的歌声？
E: ...You mean that was you singing?

C: 这种人也配叫「台柱」？
E: Then why is she considered the mainstay of the theater?

C: …所以，也许是小女子多想了，我们可能只是观念不同而已。
E: ...maybe I'm just overthinking it. It's probably just because we have different perspectives.

C: 我不打扰了，再会。
E: I've got to go. Bye.

C: 你要成为大明星了？
E: Are you going to be a big star?

C: 好啊，想聊什么？
E: Okay. What do you want to talk about?

C: 在机械屋工作感觉如何？
E: How is the workshop treating you?

C: 尽管嘲笑我吧，但你一定要记住我的教训…总之，警惕「平行世界」！
E: Laugh at me if you want, just remember what I told you... Be careful with anything related to parallel universes!

C: 为什么是布洛妮娅？
E: Why Bronya?

C: …啊！不好意思，读书太入迷了没注意到你。想看看书吗？
E: ...Ah! Sorry, I was so caught up in my reading that I didn't notice you. Do you need help with some books?

C: 再自我介绍一下，我是大矿区的承包商、矿队工头安东尼娜。如你之前在矿区所见，这地底有不少人跟着我混口饭吃。
E: I'd like to introduce myself again. I'm Antonia, the developer responsible for the Great Mine and the supervisor for the mining teams. As you saw in the mine, a lot of people in the underground count on me to make a living.

C: 自己顶不住不会找我解约吗？实在不行就去别的地方找个班上啊，矿队不就喜欢收那种五大三粗的家伙吗？
E: They are welcome to end their contracts and find a job somewhere else if they can't take it anymore. The mining team would love one of these big, burly guys.

C: 他们会送什么礼物呢？
E: What kind of gifts do they give you?

C: 这么点钱怎么生活？
E: How can you live on such a small amount of money?

C: 对吧，确实不是啥大事，但是件好事。
E: It isn't important, but it's good.

C: 噢…好像是这么个道理。
E: Ooh... You're right.

C: 小小一捆，就能净化你周边的环境，帮你提高记忆力与专注力——
E: A small bundle is enough to purify your surroundings, improve your memory, and help you focus —

C: 你这不是已经说了嘛…
E: You are the one talking to me...

C: 没事啦。
E: I'm okay.

C: 这就是我、我们「地火」最、最想看到的。但、但是，各种麻烦事又、又层出不穷……
E: This is what the W—Wildfire wanted m—most. B—But, plenty of troubles h—have risen...

C: 这附近有什么景点推荐吗？
E: Any recommendation on sightseeing around here?

C: 你真是太热情了。
E: You are very nice.

C: 对，这道菜的主要食材是洞穴里的苔藓，清爽酸甜，特别推荐用来下饭。虽然卖相不好，但据大家反映口感确实没问题。
E: Yes, moss in the cave is the main ingredient. It is refreshing, sour and sweet, and especially good to open your appetite. Although it doesn't look too appealing, the taste is just fine according to our customers' feedback.

C: 哎呀，你别急！这不就快要讲到了嘛。
E: Be patient! I was about to talk about that.

C: 落实到具体的行动上，我认为排在第一位的莫过于重新梳理贝洛伯格的经济环境。
E: As for specific actions, I think the number one priority is to reorganize the economy of Belobog.

C: 我不知道她是从何时开始踏入了歧途，但一直以来，她倾注在我身上的只有纯粹的爱…我不相信那也是「星核」干涉的结果。
E: I don't know when she started going astray, but this whole time, all she's ever done has been to shower me with love... And I don't think that's the Stellaron's influence.

C: 我将和公司相关的一连串事件背景都告知了民众，并呼吁他们拿起身边的工具，跟随铁卫一同前往北方，投入重铸造物引擎的工程。
E: I told the citizens everything behind the events surrounding the IPC, and urged them to pick up their tools and join the Silvermane guards northward, to direct their efforts toward the rebuilding of the Engine of Creation.

C: 以前的裂界攻势可没这么凶猛。啊，是说我还在铁卫任职的时候。
E: The previous Fragmentum attacks were nowhere near this vicious. *sigh* I mean back when I was still in the Silvermane Guards.

C: 哈哈，那可是我亲生弟弟啊，怎么会舍得扔下他一个人走呢？不过…我也别无选择就是了。
E: Haha, he is my brother by blood after all. How can I leave him all alone? But... I don't have any other choice.

C: 趣事？实话说，这禁区里的活计就那么些——该上前线的上前线，该搞后勤的搞后勤…内容基本都没啥变化。
E: Interesting? Honestly, nothing. Apart from logistics and front-line battles, there is not much going on in the restricted zone... Every day is basically the same.

C: 听听，多么慷慨激昂的演讲！赞美这位筑城者，他的言语给我黯淡的生命重新注入了信心……
E: Hear that? What an impassioned speech! Praise the Architects, as his words have reinvigorated my lust for life...

C: 离开。
E: Leave.

C: 你来了！虽然我们之前交过手，但还是请允许我重新自我介绍一下吧。
E: You came! Even though we've faced off against each other before, please allow me to re-introduce myself.

C: 你在军队里是做什么工作的？
E: What kind of job did you do in the military?

C: 没事了。
E: That's all.

C: 三百零一、三百零二……
E: Year <unbreak>301</unbreak>, Year <unbreak>302</unbreak>...

C: 小机器人的状况如何了？
E: How's the Little Robot doing?

C: 根据观测结果，该装置向外散逸的长波辐射之逆辐射仅占前者约<unbreak>5.2%</unbreak>。
E: According to observational results, counter-radiation of this device's longwave radiation only accounts for approximately <unbreak>5.2%</unbreak> of the former.

C: 我，同时也代表克拉拉，向你表示感谢，{NICKNAME}。
E: I, and on behalf of Clara, convey our gratitude, {NICKNAME}.

C: 找我有什么事吗，荣誉队员？
E: How can I help you, honorary member?

C: 你以前是银鬃铁卫？
E: Were you part of the Silvermane Guards?

C: 对，你听说了？
E: Yes, you've heard?

C: 「公司」那样的组织里，居然也有和布洛妮娅姑娘抱有相同理想的人……
E: There is actually someone in the IPC who shares the same ideals as Miss Bronya...

C: 八十八度矿底的名声不会被你一个带臭
E: We got <unbreak>88</unbreak> Degrees Bedrock. Respect the name

C: 嘿，亲爱的——我知道你早已听说
E: Yeah, baby – I know you heard the news

C: 伊妮丝的表演结束了。
E: Eunice's performance ends.

C: 这些…请你不要告诉他们——尤其是姐姐，她会膨胀的。
E: Please... don't mention this to anyone, especially not Serval. She'd get all puffed up.

C: 没出场费的比赛我不打。
E: I don't fight for free.

C: 我们可以聊聊天。
E: We can have a chat.

C: 我不是为了争夺什么荣誉才参加搏击比赛的…嗐，听着是不是有点故作谦虚的意思？但我真的是这么想的，你得信我！
E: To be honest, I didn't join the tournament for fame or recognition... Sounds a bit deliberately modest, huh? But trust me, I mean it!

C: 虎克这孩子，自打呼吸到上层区的新鲜空气后，简直比以前还要活泼了。
E: Well, she has been livelier than ever since she breathed in the fresh air of the Overworld.

C: 再见，记得留心那些黑衣人。
E: See you next time. And watch out for those shady guys in black.

C: 您想要了解相关信息吗？又或者是前来办理相关手续的？
E: Need any information? Or just signing up?

C: 不论您需要什么帮助，都请随时告诉我——身为星际和平公司员工兼《以太战线》资深玩家，我随时有求必应！
E: Anything you need, just let me know! As an IPC worker and a veteran player of Aetherium Wars, I'm always ready to help!

C: 扑满没有听从命令。可能是它找不到目标，或者单纯在耍个性。
E: The Trotter does not listen to your command. Maybe it could not find a target, or maybe it's just showing you some attitude.

C: 这曲子可真熟悉……
E: This tune sounds familiar...

C: …那你说它干什么？
E: ...Then why do you bring it up?

C: 这不就一股苦味儿吗？
E: Isn't that just bitter?

C: 我们是时候站出来了！
E: It's time for us to stand strong!

C: 跟着虎克老大有肉吃！
E: Follow Hook for some yummy meats!

C: 哎，又被流浪者敲诈了……
E: Ack, blackmailed by vagrants again...

C: 可惜看不懂。
E: A pity I can't understand it.

C: 哎，惟利是趋！我看这贝洛伯格是要完啊……
E: Ah, the cupidity! It's the end of the road for Belobog...

C: 不是，我说…咱整天在这儿数有多少人经过，有意思吗？
E: No, I mean... Does it make any sense by standing around all day and counting people passing by?

C: 可是他没有扑满…
E: But he doesn't even have a Trotter...

C: 我是来参观博物馆的。
E: I'm just here to visit the museum.

C: 哟，这不是{NICKNAME}嘛。怎么，你也是来找我要签名的？
E: Hey, isn't this {NICKNAME}? Why, are you here to get my signature as well?

C: 您好，您是{NICKNAME}大人吧，我是负责这片幽囚狱的司狱赤衣。判官雪衣大人已经向我打过招呼了——她说为了查案需要，您可以自由出入幽囚狱的大部分区域。
E: Greetings, you must be {NICKNAME}. I am Chiyi, the Jailer overseeing this unit of the Shackling Prison. Madam Xueyi has informed me that you're here to investigate a case. You are free to enter most areas of the Shackling Prison.

C: 简而言之，就是确保幽囚狱内的犯人待在监禁区域。一旦有犯人敢越雷池半步，我会动用一切手段让他回去。
E: To put things simply, my duty is to ensure all prisoners in The Shackling Prison remain within the prison area. If any one of them were to take even half a step beyond the boundaries of the prison, I am expected to employ any possible measure to force them right back.

C: 没想到您仪表堂堂，还有着如此震耳威名。
E: I wouldn't have known that one with such elegant flair as yours would have such a resounding name.

C: 老板您有所不知，名字是最短的咒语，如果您遭遇危急关头，请大声叫出你的名字——二狗，定会对你有所帮助。
E: You may not be aware, but a name is the shortest form of a spell. If you're ever in peril, just yell out your name "Noob," and it will surely be useful to you.

C: 咳咳…有一件事告诉了您，您可千万别跟人说啊，免得害我到地衡司走一遭…先前有些人卖旧物的时候故意往「建木生发」的事上蹭呢。
E: Well... I'll tell you a secret, but don't tell anyone, okay? Otherwise I might end up in hot water with the Realm-Keeping Commission... Some curio sellers were using the Ambrosial Arbor's sprouting as a gimmick to attract customers.

C: 写诗可能还是需要一些素养。
E: I think writing poetry requires some training.

C: 没什么区别，就是虚拟现实。
E: There's really not much difference. It's basically just VR.

C: 我是觉得没什么创作的必要，我们一是不知道内情，二是又申请不到实地拍摄的机会，牵强附会的东西真没人爱看。
E: I don't think it's a good idea. Firstly, we don't know the inside story. Secondly, we won't have the chance to shoot on-site. No one would like to watch such contrived stuff.

C: 执事官是公廨中的领导者，负责统筹这个辖区的内勤外务——这都是明面上的说法，实际上主要工作是去地衡司总务处开会，传达会议思想。
E: Officers are managers in the Chancery, responsible for coordinating all local internal and external affairs — that's the surface definition. Actually, the main job involves going to meetings at the Realm-Keeping Commission's General Affairs Office and spreading their ideas.

C: 怎么想到在幽囚狱做生意？
E: What made you start doing business in The Shackling Prison?

C: 说来也讽刺，建木生发之后，罗浮的治安大不如前，倒是让我的拳馆愈发红火。毕竟有点武功傍身，行走江湖也安全些～
E: Ironically, after the Ambrosial Arbor's growth, the Luofu became a more dangerous place. This situation made my boxing gym more popular than ever. After all, it's always best to know some moves that can help you defend yourself.

C: 我知道！干杂活的呗。
E: I know! More chores, right?

C: 你不会就靠骗人营生吧？
E: Do you only rely on swindling people to make a living?

C: 外表就这样吧…重要的难道不是三公忠诚的精神吗？
E: They all look the same from the outside... But isn't it what's inside Snowmoon — its loyal spirit — that matters most?

C: 景元还需要别人保护？
E: Does Jing Yuan really need someone else to protect him?

C: 域外有一世界，为了遵循遍智天君的道路，燃烧生命以追求智慧。他们一个个都聪明绝顶，却也都只能活十几年。
E: There's another world out there where they self-immolate in the pursuit of knowledge by following the path of the Wisdomwalker. They represent the highest classes of intellect imaginable, but only live for a dozen years or so.

C: {NICKNAME}小友，又来工造司了？今天有什么事吗？
E: Ah, if it isn't young {NICKNAME}! What are you doing back here at the Artisanship Commission?

C: 想问你些事情。
E: I would like to ask you some questions.

C: 您请问吧，我尽可能回答。
E: Ask away. I'll do my best to answer.

C: 今天有什么需要吗？
E: What can I do for you today?

C: 赛博诈骗？我们这里不用将赛博诈骗和传统诈骗分得那么仔细。
E: Cyber-scammed? We don't differentiate between scams happening online or offline here.

C: 毕竟，我们只负责一个区域嘛。
E: After all, we only look after one zone.

C: 最近有什么烦恼吗？
E: Any trouble going on recently?

C: 有机会下次再聊吧。
E: Catch you again next time.

C: 所以你明白了吗？「决斗」可不是什么「野蛮的习俗」！而是我们彰显尊严的方式！
E: So do you get it now? Dueling isn't a barbaric custom at all! Rather, it's our display of human dignity!

C: 灾难发生之后我就悟了，世界上从来就没有什么「稳赚不赔的生意」，按照仙舟的俗语来说就是「时也，运也，命也」。
E: After the disaster, I came to realize that there's no such thing as a steady and stable business out there in the universe. Or as a common Xianzhou saying puts it, "It's a matter of time, luck, and fate."

C: 大人您玩笑了！您这种大侠怎么会做坏事呢？
E: You jest, esteemed friend! How can a noble hero like you do anything vile?

C: 卜算，依旧是卜算。具体内容，请恕我不能透露。
E: Divinations. Still more divinations. Please forgive me for not divulging any further details.

C: 你这个态度不像卖药的……
E: You don't seem to care much about making sales at all...

C: 我只是随口一提，你紧张什么。
E: I was just making conversation. Why so serious?

C: 上面的人说了，这建木虽然已经不再生发，乍看是危机解除了，但风波之后还有许多琐事要处理呢。
E: According to the higher-ups, there will be a lot of trivial matters to be handled even though the Ambrosial Arbor has stopped growing and the crisis is over.

C: 好的，再见。当下时局尚不安定，请阁下务必注意安全。
E: That's good. So long. The current situation is not a stable one, so please take precautions.

C: 你到底是做什么生意的？
E: What exactly do you do?

C: 蜕生的人都留了什么东西？
E: What do people leave behind when they undergo hatching rebirth?

C: 蜕生后就是新的「我」？
E: So after hatching rebirth you're a new "you"?

C: …你问我？我、我也不知道啊！
E: ...Are you asking me? I—I have no idea too!

C: 收到消息之后，这会我都开不下去了，赶紧收拾行李回来交接，结果一回来，就连安排交接的人都见不着。
E: I left the conference halfway and quickly packed my bags. When I got back, not a single soul was there to arrange the handover.

C: 别白费力气了。
E: Don't waste your energy.

C: 是说你看起来不像犯人。闲着也是闲着，就陪你聊聊吧。
E: I didn't think you looked like a criminal. Well, I've got nothing else to do. We may as well chat for a while.

C: 如果当时司部收到了报告，又会是怎样的结果呢？哎，卜者不应谈论「如果」。
E: What would happen if the commission received her report back then? Alas, I shouldn't be talking about the what-ifs as a diviner.

C: 拿下金人巷，根本不需要奇技淫巧，实力差距决定了结果。正如克里珀的锤子终将下落！
E: We don't need any underhanded tricks to claim Aurum Alley. The sheer difference in strength we bring will guarantee our victory, just like Qlipoth's hammer is guaranteed to fall!

C: 还真是和「攻略」中说的一样，不枉我费了这么多功夫……
E: It's just like what the guide said. It's totally worth the time...

C: 狐人睡觉的时候，尾巴尖总是朝向一个相同的方向。
E: When foxians sleep, their tails always point in the same cardinal direction.

C: 仙舟上很少有传家宝…或者说，传家宝大多不是什么常用的物件。因为常用的物件寿命总是比仙舟人短很多。
E: There are hardly any heirlooms aboard Xianzhou... Or, to put it another way, our heirlooms aren't gonna be everyday items. Ordinary goods would never survive the long-lived Xianzhou people.

C: 有你帮忙，真是金人巷之幸。
E: It's a blessing to have you here in Aurum Alley.

C: 我原本不想说得太直白。
E: Fine, I didn't want to be so blunt at first...

C: 这就是匠人吗？
E: Are all craftsmen so dedicated to their work?

C: 我想问…
E: I'd like to ask...

C: 你好像很讲究「眼缘」？
E: You seem to pay particular attention to "destiny."

C: 将军还擅长其他的棋类？
E: Are you good at any other chess?

C: 剑啊…最近没买什么剑…或者说，彦卿不得不暂时放缓了买剑的爱好。唉……
E: Swords... I haven't bought any recently... Or rather, I had to temporarily cut down on my sword purchases. *sigh*

C: 怎么听到领导名字就叹气啊？
E: Why did you sigh at the mention of your boss?

C: 好呀，你要是想打牌的话，我们下次再约个时间吧。
E: Sure. Just drop me a line if you're up for a round of tiles.

C: 「我们」真诚的祝福对有机体应遭毁灭的文化而言，显得较为特别。补充：因为「我们」的逻辑回路无法构建谎言。
E: To intelligent organic lifeforms whose civilizations are condemned to destruction, our well-wishes would certainly seem unusual. Addendum: This is because our logic circuits are incapable of constructing lies.

C: 「我们」被不同的有机体制造，被设计于不同的用途。「我们」唯一的共同点，便是为消灭有机体而存在。
E: We were formed from different intelligent organic lifeforms and designed to serve different purposes. The only thing we have in common is that we exist to destroy intelligent organic lifeforms.

C: 我还算能应付得来，不知道丹鼎司里其他人能不能应付得来。
E: I can manage, but I'm not sure about others in the Commission.

C: 被镇伏的岁阳会继续在塔中，直到…唉，直到找到逃离的机会。
E: Subdued heliobi will remain inside the pagoda until... Well, until they find a chance to escape.

C: 不错吧？我差不多也解闷了，给您一个好东西，您就原谅刚才的小闹剧吧。
E: Not bad, right? That saved me from my boredom a little, let me give you this as an apology for my little trick.

C: 十王司都做什么？
E: What does the Ten-Lords Commission do?

C: 普通成衣？最受化外民欢迎的是「仙舟经典花纹」成衣系列，目前已经断货了哦。
E: The ready-made ones? The most popular among Outworlders is the "Classic Xianzhou Floral" series. But we're sold out right now.

C: 给我介绍一下吧。
E: Tell me about it.

C: 我还有些问题想问。
E: I've still got some questions.

C: 不瞒您说，注意到刚才离开的客人了吗？我就没告诉他咱这里有什么好东西。
E: Let me be frank — see that customer who just left? I didn't mention any of those trinkets to him.

C: 饮茶青年缓缓吐出「这里还不是最深处」，便消失在阴影之中。
E: The tea-drinking youth evenly muttered, "This is not the lowest depths," and disappeared into the darkness.

C: 我…我不小了！这本就是该当家作主的年龄了。虽然世人常道「狐人天生会行商」，但事实上是这都是磨砺出来的。
E: I'm... not young! I'm just at the right age to take over the family business. People may always say we foxians are naturals when it comes to business, but really it's all practice.

C: 谈不上不顺利吧。我从小就是坐不住的性格，十二岁时拿到「狐人大鼓一级演员」资格，十八岁成为「特级厨师」。
E: I wouldn't say that. Since young, I've always had a hard time sticking around. I was a certified "Foxian Grade 1 Grand Drum Actor" when I was twelve, and then an "S-Ranked Chef" at eighteen.

C: 好巧啊，又见面了，看来我们颇有缘分呐。
E: What a coincidence; we meet again. It looks like our fates might be intertwined.

C: 这就难听了？我还有更难听的。
E: THAT'S harsh? I've got even worse comments.

C: 也不算大罪吧？要不然十王司的审查怎么会排了三个多月都没轮上我。可见我也没做什么大不了的事情。
E: I haven't committed a major crime, have I? It's been over three months and it's still not even my turn for the Ten-Lords Commission's investigation. It's obvious that my misdeed was insignificant.

C: 想听你们再说一段。
E: I'd like to hear another skit.

C: 合着您这儿就一道菜啊？
E: So your shop only has one dish?

C: 啊？不是，{F#姐}{M#哥}，您拿我俩逗闷子呢？
E: Huh? Hold on, {F#miss}{M#mister}. Are you making fun of us?

C: 我曾经阅读过学者们对「命途」的讨论，他们说，总有凡人于有意或无意间踏入由「星神」执掌的命途，被称为「命途行者」。
E: I once read a scholarly discussion about Paths. They postulate that there will always be mortals that, intentionally or otherwise, set foot on Paths presided over by Aeons. These people are known as Pathstriders.

C: 仙舟茶饮有历史有文化、有礼仪有规矩，要是随随便便畅饮一杯，总感觉有点「焚琴煮鹤」之嫌……
E: Xianzhou tea drinking is steeped in history, culture, decorum, and rules. If one were to glug it down like some common ruffian, it would sully the tea's heritage...

C: 我也好奇，不对，打住打住！
E: I'm also curious about that... Wait! Stop right there!

C: 其他神仙？
E: Other celestials?

C: 咱们村紧挨着一个叫赤泉山的地方。大家的日子都过的苦哈哈的，一年里吃不到一次大鸡腿。
E: Our village is next to a place called Redspring Peak. Our lives were really hard. We'd go an entire year without eating a single chicken drumstick.

C: 你怎么说话跟我读书时的导师似的？哎，搞得我又想起以前，每次都要给我关心的学术课题编一个实际作用……
E: You sound just like one of my tutors! *sigh* That reminds me of school and having to find a practical purpose for every academic topic I wanted to write about...

C: 咳咳，哼…不过，研究仙舟史当然是有用的。毕竟我们都知道，仙舟上藏着永生的秘密。即便仙舟人可以守口如瓶，但「历史」始终是不会沉默的。
E: Cough, ahem... but of course, it's useful to study the history of Xianzhou. After all, we all know that the secret of immortality lies hidden somewhere here. The Xianzhou natives might be able to keep their secret, but history shall never be kept silent.

C: 没别的事情了，辛苦了。
E: That's all. Keep up the good work.

C: 我这份工作，算是执法部门里比较安全的了吧。没什么恶性犯罪，也不会面对什么真正的坏人……
E: In law enforcement circles, my job is pretty safe. There's no violent crime, and no truly bad crooks...

C: 危机过去了，你找到工作了吗？
E: Now that the crisis is over, have you found a job?

C: 我就不一样了，唰唰唰地把工作完成，到了点我就走。「准点下班」和「早点睡觉」才是女孩最好的化妆品。
E: Me? I'm different. I'll finish up my tasks in a jiffy, and I'm gone when it's time to leave. "Leaving on time" and "sleeping early" are a girl's best friends to looking good.

C: 呃，我只能告诉你我已经足够老了，具体的数字不重要。
E: Uh, I'll tell you I'm old enough. The specific age isn't important.

C: 只顾着眼仙舟一处，却没能放眼整个银河。我真的很失望，仙舟不应该止步于此，仙舟应该肩负更大的责任。
E: They only see Xianzhou instead of looking at the whole cosmos. It's quite the disappointment. Xianzhou should be doing greater things.

C: 你是怎么跟他们说的？
E: What did you say to them?

C: 我可没有直说啊。
E: That's not what I said.

C: 啊？！恕我直言，仙人快乐茶毁掉了仙舟人的味觉，是真正的业界毒瘤。
E: Huh? No offense, but Immortal's Delight is the reason why Xianzhou folks can't tell yummy from yucky anymore. That beverage is the scourge of the industry, if you ask me.

C: 要不你们试着改变下营销策略？
E: Try changing your marketing strategy?

C: 苏乐达之所以能够风靡银河，就是因为它能提供独一无二的口味，现在给它加了乱七八糟的口味，岂不是丢掉了核心竞争力，说真的，我不理解。
E: SoulGlad owes its universe-spanning popularity to its one-of-a-kind flavor. By messing up its flavor profile with random additions, it's no different from forsaking what makes SoulGlad sell in the first place. The notion absolutely boggles my mind.

C: 好吧，我知道你觉得这种说法很敷衍，但是我也不能骗你，说什么我是为了热爱苏乐达文化，所以想让它走进千家万户里。
E: I know, I know... It's a disappointing answer. I could spin a grand story about how much I love SoulGlad's culture and how I dream of it becoming a beverage that everybody in the cosmos knows and loves, but I don't want to lie.

C: 好便宜啊…
E: That's cheap...

C: 你好脏，我要走了。
E: You're filthy, I'm leaving.

C: 织机好大！
E: What a massive loom!

C: 你听说了吗？那个！
E: Did you hear the news? You know!

C: 啊！你说那个，我听说了。
E: Oh yeah, that old chestnut. Yup, I heard.

C: …不过话又说回来，若不是您是星穹列车的无名客，一想到列车引擎还完好无损，我对您还是充满了信任的。
E: ...But on the other hand, you're a Nameless on the Astral Express. The fact that the train's engine is still in pristine condition means I can completely trust you.

C: 那您来这儿干嘛？
E: Then what are you doing here?

C: 无限制格斗流是什么？
E: What is the "Lawless Brawler Style"?

C: 我就随便哼几句吧，唱完全曲我怕你听哭了。
E: I'll hum a few lines, but I'm afraid ye'll cry if I sing the whole thing.

C: 真是的！何况老夫又不止精通剑术一道，我知道你擅用球棒，老夫也可以指点你一二！只要你能给老夫找来一具形骸……
E: The gall of some folk! Besides, I'm more than just an elite swordfighter. I see you've got a bat over there, and I can give you a few tips on how to swing that, too! That is, as long as you can find a body for me...

C: 没别的事，告辞。
E: I'm all done, goodbye.

C: 我特别欠打…
E: I've been aching for a good beating...

C: 曾经有人这样评价我——「沧汐从不考虑赢下冠军，只管碾压新人。」
E: I was told this once by someone: "Cangxi has never coveted the champion's title, only the crushing of newbies."

C: 一定是寿瘟祸祖干的！
E: This must be the work of the Plagues Author!

C: 我明天有事，拜托你了。
E: Please, I have something on tomorrow.

C: 太卜大人！
E: Master Diviner!

C: 他们水平还挺高的，况且仙舟乐本身的魅力也不可小觑。
E: They're quite skilled. And besides, the charm of Xianzhou music cannot be underestimated.

C: 一想到这里，我瞬间就不累了！还能再加班两个通宵！不，五个通宵！
E: As soon as I think about it, I'm not tired anymore! I can work two more overnight shifts! No, five more!

C: 心态实在是受不了了。
E: This is so demoralizing.

C: 我前世是个怎样的人啊？
E: What kind of person was I in my previous life?

C: 没有，只是他影响销量…
E: No, but he affected our sales...

C: 江湖郎中只是他的伪装。
E: The "traveling healer" is just his disguise.

C: 十王司的判官来过…
E: The Judge of the Ten-Lords Commission came...

C: …怎么着你们俩，菜单上可没有「……」啊，禁止沉默！
E: ...What's with you two? "..." isn't on the menu, don't just say nothing!

C: 不过嘛…我向您保证，我的英雄事迹可都是有目共睹的，先从哪段讲起呢？
E: But well... I can assure you, my heroic deeds are well-documented. Now, which story should I start with?

C: 不！今天，就要见！
E: No! We'll see her TODAY!

C: 当说出「明天见」的时候，不仅仅意味着*我们*希望能够在明天相见，也会为了能在明天相见而努力。
E: When we say "see you tomorrow," it means not only that we hope to meet tomorrow, but also that we'll make an effort to make sure that meeting happens.

C: 嗷呜嗷呜，奇拉拉也多吃红土，能变得腿更长，更好追上荒笛大人的脚步吗？
E: Awoo-woo! If Chirara eats more redsoil, will my legs grow longer so I can keep up better with Master Terravox?

C: 上吧，维吉妮娅。
E: Your time to shine, Verginia.

C: 好熟练的发言，看来灰宝对问诊流程也很熟悉呢。
E: Such a practiced response, looks like Grayie is well-versed in the examination routine too.

C: 没准会有新灵感？
E: Might it spark some new inspiration?

C: 好啊，小灰鱼。这次可不要让我等太久。
E: Gladly, Little Gray Fry. Don't keep me waiting too long this time.

C: 吾等的努力，并没有白费。事到如今，终于可以下此论断了哪。
E: Our efforts have not been in vain. At long last, I can finally say that with certainty.

C: 再犯者就地正法！
E: Repeated offenders will be executed on the spot!

C: 但我上个室友没疯啊。
E: But the previous one did not go crazy.

C: 怎么了嘛，不喜欢还不让我说了吗？
E: Hey, c'mon, I have a right to say that I don't like something.

C: 演武仪典不算什么。想老夫二十岁那年参加过剑首大会。
E: The Wardance ceremony is nothing. Truth be told, I once participated in the Sword Champion Summit when I was twenty years old.

C: 罗浮室外温度这么暖和！
E: The Luofu outdoors is so warm!

C: 那您高寿?
E: How old are you, sir?

C: 这是自动木人桩的战斗，你无权插手
E: This is a battle with an Automatic Wooden Dummy. You have no authority to intervene

C: 星历<unbreak>8099</unbreak>年
E: Star Calendar Year <unbreak>8099</unbreak>

C: 错误进化的佩佩。
E: A failed evolution of Peppy.

C: 两条线一起剪。
E: Cut both wires together.

C: 你很冷静，要是保持航速，应该还有拆除炸弹的时间！
E: You're very calm, if you can maintain cruising speed, there should still be time to disarm the bomb!

C: 行，你随时可以回来。
E: Sure, you can return anytime.

C: 「竞锋舰，前进四！」
E: "Skysplitter, advance four!"

C: 开炮——！
E: Fireeeee!

C: 你误会我了伙计，我说的是咱们这一辈子的终极目标。归根结底，活着是为了什么？
E: You've got me all wrong, buddy. I'm talking about the ultimate goal of our lives. Ultimately, what are we living for?

C: 没有准备冰柜，这是苏乐达在仙舟销量不好的主要原因。
E: There are no refrigeration appliances prepared — this is the main reason that SoulGlad sales aren't doing well on the Xianzhou.

C: 家长、学校都在教孩子积极向上，远离游戏，你们把这些乱七八糟的东西贴在眼皮底下，你们这是在犯罪啊！试想一下，你自己的孩子看到了，该怎么办！
E: Parents and teachers are trying to teach kids to be more positive and stay away from games, yet you lot dare plaster such rubbish right in front of us. It's a crime, I say! Think about what you would do if your own child saw that!

C: 那个波提欧还挺酷的。
E: That Boothill is pretty cool.

C: 游侠才是极致的浪漫！
E: The Rangers are the epitome of romance!

C: 我也想加入后援会！
E: I also want to join the support group!

C: 只见卢卡一记上勾拳…
E: I only saw Luka make that uppercut...

C: 位于边角的小字提示你，此画描绘了星槎龙骨培育的全部过程。
E: The words in the corner inform you that the painting depicts the entire cultivation process of the starskiff's keel.

C: 与成型的星槎作比较，它的面貌反倒显得更加苍老，非常适合那些喜欢坐在船头举杯邀月的文学家。
E: Compared to a completed starskiff, it has an even more worn-out appearance. It is perfect for scholars who like to enjoy the view of the moon while having a drink on the deck.

C: 「就在罗浮最近发生的星核灾变后，联盟已判明上述事件均由名为『幻胧』的绝灭大君一手操纵。」
E: "Since the Stellaron incident that recently took place on the Luofu, the alliance has concluded that the disaster was orchestrated by a Lord Ravager named Phantylia."

C: 「反物质军团留下的最骇人听闻的罪行之一，是雅梵娜之链星区熄灭了三分之一的恒星。」
E: "One of the most appalling sins committed by the Antimatter Legion is the extinction of a third of the stars in the Yvanna chain."

C: 「根据过往的交战记录，我们暂时将此判定为某位大君的能力所致。」
E: "Based on the records of past engagements, we deduce that the phenomenon is caused by the power of a Lord Ravager."

C: 你看到石狮子的底座上沉积了一层厚厚的灰尘，下面隐约有一行小字。你将尘埃拂去，看到了那行娟秀的篆刻——
E: You notice a sentence engraved on the base of the stone lion underneath a thick layer of dust. After brushing the dust away, you see a beautiful inscription:

C: 这…能行吗？
E: Will... this work?

C: 我必须得打开它看看。
E: I have to open this up and see.

C: 再往下则是一台游戏机，和几盘游戏卡带。
E: Further on down, there's a gaming console plus several game disks.

C: 打开看看。
E: Open it.

C: 不看，就不用平添烦恼。
E: Out of sight, out of mind.

C: 信纸末尾还附有友情提示，内容是离职手续的办理程序，语气十分欢快。看来裁员也可以令人感到身心愉悦——但收件人显然还没有理解到这一层。
E: A friendly reminder that touches on the dismissal procedure is included toward the end of the letter. The cheerful tone used makes the layoff sound like an uplifting event. However, it is apparent that the recipient doesn't feel that way.

C: 「既如此，就派你去宣读判罚，只你一人，如何？」龙尊的声音一如她的冰山龙座，没有丝毫温度。
E: "In that case, how about I send you to read out the sentence? Just you. Alone." The high elder's voice is as cold as her icy throne.

C: 耳畔的声音不容拒绝。「我族传承因罪人而断绝，眼下有个万载难逢的好机会。」长老的声音虽然年轻，却带着难以负荷的沧桑和麻木。
E: An authoritative voice comes by your ears. "Our line of succession has been broken because of a sinner. Now, here is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity." The elder's voice is youthful, but it sounds weary and emotionless.

C: 不错的选择。于是，你俯下身去，想要仔细看看那数字单据上的签收地址究竟指向何方，以便履行你身为开拓客的崇高职责。
E: Good choice. You crouch down to check the recipient's address on the digital label so that you can fulfill your noble duty as a Trailblazer.

C: 据说她要结束这只乐队！
E: Apparently she wants to end this band!

C: ——缭乱！缭乱！缭乱！
E: ...Dazzling! Dazzling! Dazzling!

C: 桌上的两个投影正在卖力地说着相声。它们举手投足间的做派和真正的阿往与阿来一模一样。
E: Two projections on the table are performing a crosstalk comedy animatedly. Their performance style is exactly the same as the real Back'n and Forth.

C: 你能不能陪我聊聊天？
E: Can you stay a while and chat with me?

C: 我也遇到一个家伙…
E: I also met someone...

C: 咱这叫「岁阳融聚」…
E: You mean heliobic homogenization...

C: 宿主整天想着成为棉花糖…
E: My host spends their days dreaming about becoming a marshmallow...

C: 我到家了。
E: I'm home.

C: 我不知道，传说这个巷子的商铺编号是动态变化的，很多人都在找呢。不过要我说，你还是小心些吧，仙舟人个个都是奸商，咱们要是去了肯定都是被吃骨头不吐皮的命。
E: I don't know, but rumor has it that the store in the alley changes its location every time, so many people are still searching for it. But my advice to you is to be careful. On the Xianzhou, everyone is an unscrupulous merchant. We'll be skinned alive if we had any.

C: 「飞翔的岱舆人号」——传说中永远无法返乡的幽灵船，担负着押送星海中遇难亡灵抵达冥界的使命，注定永远漂泊星海，无法靠岸。
E: "Flying Daiyuman" — a legendary ghost ship that can never return home. Its mission is to bring the lost spirits in the sea of stars to the underworld. It is doomed to sail the sea of stars forever, allegedly never able to make port.

C: 只工作不玩耍，聪明的孩子也变傻~
E: All work and no play make the smart child stupid...

C: …继而是死一般的静默。
E: ...Followed by a deathly silence.

C: 客房的内线电话，可以向酒店要求各种服务。
E: An internal hotel phone. You can request various services from the hotel staff.

C: 你四下张望，却找不到一个可以抱怨的对象……
E: You look around, but can't find anyone to vent to...

C: 突然，深渊中睁开了一只眼睛，也开始凝视着你……
E: Suddenly, an eye opens in the abyss and begins to stare at you...

C: 黄金时刻随处可见的文化杆，化用了匹诺康尼第一人气IP钟表小子的形象。没有指路和报时功能。
E: The cultural poles that are all over the Golden Hour are made after the image of Penacony's top intellectual property, Clockie. It does not provide directions or tell the time.

C: 梦境特制的灭火设施——里面装的可不是苏乐达。
E: The Dreamscape's specialized fire extinguisher. It's not filled with SoulGlad.
