C: 好久不见！
E: Long time no see!

C: 虽然和公司的相处有些不愉快，但我们还是不希望影响到百姓们的娱乐生活……
E: I know we've had our run-ins with the IPC, but I'm hoping we can set aside our differences for once, if not just for the sake of the people...

C: （好好整备一下，或者和大家聊聊天放松心情吧……）
E: (Do I take some time to prepare, or chat with everyone to ease my nerves a bit...?)

C: 也就是说，接下来就是决赛了吗？
E: Wait a sec, does that mean we've reached the grand final?

C: 这捉鬼小队是怎么回事？
E: What's this ghost-hunting squad all about?

C: 藿藿大人，咱们开始行动吧？
E: Captain Huohuo, should we start the ghost hunt now?

C: 对喔！那些岁阳在同一个单间里被关了那么久，肯定很了解这些狱友的脾气。
E: That's right! Those heliobi were locked up in the same space for ages! They probably got to know their fellow prisoners like the back of their... Huh, I guess they don't really have hands...

C: 之后的事之后再说吧。
E: We'll get to it sooner or later.

C: 龙女大人！出来一起玩儿啊！
E: Lady Bailu, come out and play with us!

C: 也就是说，现在的咱们被它当成了自己人，可以进到那家伙创造的幻境里去了？
E: In other words, we'll be able to enter the heliobus's illusion?

C: 给我豁出去了是吧。
E: Why, how generous of you...

C: 等等！
E: Wait!

C: 我无话可说。
E: I'm speechless.

C: 似乎也没人征求过我的同意…
E: I'm not sure I was given the choice...

C: 所以我们就去鸟窝里抓鸣蜥。那家伙被抓住后，会用尖锐的叫声示警浮鼬回巢保护幼崽。不过这样一来，它也就落入了咱们手里。
E: So we used to go to sky mink nests to catch shrieking lizards, instead. When a shrieking lizard gets caught, it calls to the sky mink with a loud shriek to warn it to return to the nest and protect its young... which of course, led the sky mink right to us.

C: 被大哥训斥、被要求干这干那、被要求成熟一点，接下来是反抗和逃跑，为了证明自己离开家人也能过得很好…所以，我在仙舟安顿了下来。
E: My big brother used to boss me around... He'd give me chores, constantly telling me to grow up, that kind of thing... Then one day, I decided to rebel. I ran away to prove that I could get by without my family... and eventually settled on the Xianzhou.

C: 青雀小姐如果想离开，也不必为难…不对，难不成你要和我们一块进去吗？你也看到太卜司的情况了，咱们这一队人是专为解决此事而来的。
E: I mean, you could leave, but... Wait, are you thinking of coming with us? Didn't you see how bad the situation was...?

C: 我在书里读到过，「能自在幻化的星火之精，喜好操弄凡物的梦想和欲望」。你是说太卜被那种东西控制了…？
E: I read about them in a book. "Starfire Essence that can transform itself — enjoys manipulating the dreams and desires of mortals." You mean the Master Diviner is being controlled by something like that...?

C: 这个宇宙总会走向终结，什么长生种短生种都要一起完蛋。这个是不可动摇的事实。
E: Eventually, this universe will be over, and all the species — long and short-life together — all of them will end up in the same place. It is inevitable.

C: 浮烟神游物外，不再回应你的提问。
E: Cirrus seems lost in thought, not answering any more questions.

C: 我看透了！我看透了！
E: I see through your trickery! I see through every bit of it!

C: 你的武器想收那个孩子为徒？
E: Your weapon wanted to take the child as your apprentice?

C: 算来算去，只有我一个留下最妥当嘛。
E: After weighing things up in my head, it made the most sense for only me to stay put.

C: 不是素裳小姐的问题…我在想，失去了尾巴后，像我这样的普通人又能在十王司的事务里坚持多久呢？
E: It's not your fault Miss Sushang, it's just... I've been wondering — how can someone average like me keep up with the affairs of the Ten-Lords Commission without my tail?

C: 开门见山地说吧，小女子不知道藿藿到哪儿去了。不过，聚在一处，我们至少可以梳理线索——你们几位走得很近，还记得昨日藿藿有什么异常吗？
E: I'll get straight to the point — I have no idea where Huohuo may be. However, if we combine our efforts we may be able to piece together some clues. Each of you are close to Huohuo, did you notice anything unusual about her yesterday?

C: 你怎么说话跟我娘似的。
E: You sound just like her...

C: 哦，原来这是解谜…是我搞错了…难道我其实是「谜鬼」？
E: Oh, it's actually answering riddles... My mistake... Does this make me the "Riddle Ghost"?

C: 这个事情，我怀疑是闹鬼…
E: That thing. I suspect it's haunted...

C: 你要去十王司吗？可以的话，你把我一起带走吧？把我也带去吧…求你了，求你了……
E: Are you going to the Ten-Lords Commission? If so, take me with you. Take me with you... I beg you, please...

C: 不必了。我已经得而复失过一次了，但我勉强撑住了…可若是连失去她这份痛苦，都要被夺走的话，我恐怕真的会崩溃吧。
E: No thanks. I lost what I'd barely regained, but still managed to hold onto things... Now if even the very pain of losing her is taken away from me, I'm afraid I really would break down.

C: 好的，藿藿会在太卜司里一边联系发帖人，一边等你。
E: Okay, I'll contact the person who made the post at the Divination Commission and wait for you there.

C: 就像路易斯•弗莱明的那句豪言一样——「我不在乎信用点，因为我就是信用本身」。
E: Just as Louis Fleming once said: "I do not care about credits, because I AM credit!"

C: 等等，我再准备一下。
E: Wait, I still need to prepare.

C: 看不出来我这么招人疼吗…
E: I bet you didn't realize I was so popular, did you?

C: 想必你也是听说了我的成功，前来加入我向银河推广帝垣琼玉的伟大事业的吧？
E: I imagine you've heard of my success and have decided to join us in promoting the great cause that is Celestial Jade across the galaxy?

C: 好家伙，差点被你给唬住了。
E: Nice work, I almost fell for your bluff!

C: 我看了反馈，改不了！
E: I've looked at the feedback and I can't change anything!

C: 我们虽然不是十王司，但都挺有本事的，有什么不能告诉我们的吗？
E: We may not be members of the Ten-Lords, but we're all pretty capable! Is there something that you cannot tell us?

C: 我可不是嫌弃你们，「罗浮杂俎」上怪事甚多，但大多都是捕风捉影、无凭无据的假消息，根本经不起推敲…但这次不一样，我遇上了真家伙！
E: It's not that I am looking down on you. It's just that there are so many strange stories on the Ghostly Grove, and so many of them are just baseless made-up stories... But this time, I've met the real thing!

C: 简单，交给我们好了！
E: Easy enough! Leave it to us!

C: 如果使用<color=#dbc291ff>强磁性的磁石</color>，也许能将箱子里的东西取出来……
E: If you use a strongly <color=#dbc291ff>magnetic stone</color>, you may be able to remove the item from the box...

C: （使用道具）
E: (Try using an item)

C: 你们回来了，怎么样，我的房产证找到了吗？
E: You're back! Well, did you find my deed?

C: （还是埋头自己找到答案）
E: (Keep your head buried and find the answer yourself)

C: 我担心是岁阳作祟，因为帖子里的细节很真实，尤其是专门选在深更半夜打过来这一点。
E: I'm worried that the heliobi are up to no good, because the details in the post are true — especially the part about deliberately choosing to call in the middle of the night.

C: 她想见玉兆里那个紧急联系人最后一面，说声再见。
E: She wants to see the emergency contact in her jade abacus one last time to say one final goodbye.

C: 我正准备回去呢，…是你…这么多年，你居然想到回来了？
E: I'm about to go back right now... It's you... After all these years, you're finally thinking of coming back?

C: 听寒鸦大人说藿藿以前就很擅长整备十王司的道具，不愧是专家呀。
E: Heard from Hanya that Huohuo has been very good at organizing the props of the Ten-Lords Commission, so she's no less of an expert.

C: 再等等。
E: One sec.

C: 啊哈哈…这是我跟{NICKNAME}做的一个小测试，恭喜列车长，你合格啦！
E: Oh haha... I'm doing a small test with {NICKNAME}. Congratulations, Pom-Pom! You've passed the test!

C: 不好，它要动手了！
E: Oh no. It's attacking!

C: …我知道这个愿望很难实现。所以，不管你打算如何处置我，都请先让我见识一下那些照片中的景色。
E: ...I know it's hard to fulfill this wish. So, no matter what you plan to do with me, please allow me to see the scenery in those photos first.

C: 顺着人类的念头飞到这儿来，原本以为能尝到些什么，平息我的渴望……
E: Following the trails of human thought, I was hoping to taste some flavor to quell my hunger...

C: 它们吸收了那些人类的情绪、被人性沾染，变得狡猾、变得贪婪、变得凶残了。
E: They absorbed the emotions of the humans and were influenced by their humanity. They became cunning, greedy, and ferocious.

C: 抱歉，公事公办。
E: I'm sorry. I need to follow the rules.

C: {NICKNAME}，你准备好拿它怎么办了吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, have you decided on what to do with them?

C: 嗯！那我们这就行动吧。
E: Great! Let's get to it then.

C: 就这么决定啦！
E: That's it then!

C: 我以前坐星槎就喜欢聊天，和计程槎飞行士们聊着聊着就忘了时间，还好人家没多收我钱，嘿嘿！
E: I used to love chatting on the starskiff and I'd lose track of time while chatting with the pilots. Luckily they never charged me extra, teehee!

C: 我单身。
E: I'm single.

C: 真的假的！？啧啧，我已经闻到了恋爱的酸臭味啦！
E: Really!? Tsk tsk, I can smell the sour scent of love from here!

C: 接下来该去金人巷了…那里的每一家店铺我都出过探店视频。
E: Next up is the Aurum Alley... I've done store tour vlogs in every single shop there.

C: 上去问问就知道了，流云渡平日里人不多，我们在这里东翻西找的惹人注目也很正常。
E: Just go and ask, you'll soon find out. The Cloudford is usually pretty quiet on weekdays, and we're out here ransacking the place. It's natural to attract a little attention.

C: 走吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 真闲啊，有空写点小说不好吗？
E: They must be bored. You know what? You should write novels.

C: 所以你要我怎么帮你？
E: So how do you want me to help?

C: 你就直说吧。
E: Go on, say it.

C: 别急，听我说完，免得你一知半解的还拖累了我的研究。
E: Don't worry, just listen to this, so your ignorance doesn't impede my research.

C: 大家总是很想念她，还有造物会小声喊我「妈妈」…但很遗憾，我并不是阮•梅。
E: Everyone misses her so much, and I even hear some creations whimper "Mommy"... But unfortunately, I am not Ruan Mei.

C: 还有别的事。
E: Something came up.

C: 它和我对话了。
E: It chatted with me.

C: （好像不太对，再想想吧。）
E: (No, that doesn't seem right. Think again.)

C: 锵锵！即将上演的是——复仇的戏剧！
E: Ta-da! Here comes... the drama of vengeance!

C: 「对我们而言，情况或许并非如此。」
E: "However, for us, it might not be the same."

C: （我的选择是……）
E: (My choice is...)

C: …选「大冒险」。
E: ...I'll go with "Dare."

C: 问我大还是小？你脑子抽了吧！不会看桌上的局势？多数宾客在大的那边投注，就给我出小，在小的那边投注就给我出大，教你的都忘了？！
E: You're asking me big or small? Are you really that stupid!? Can't you see the situation on the table? If most guests bet on the big side, you roll small. Otherwise, roll big! Have you forgotten what I told you!?

C: 每四轮让输最惨的那个人赢一次，遭到质询就谎称肚子痛，庄家可以不赢钱，但不能有任何宾客亏大钱。真是，看到你这欠揍的模样就来火。记住了吗？！
E: Let the most miserable loser win once every few rounds, and if someone questions us, find an excuse about having a tummy ache. The banker doesn't have to win all the time but must ensure nobody loses too much money! Do you remember now, you buffoon!?

C: 从现在起，你就叫「司令」好了！
E: From now on, your name is "Mr. Bigwig"!

C: 但同样，只要是「美梦剧团」，就没有安全的地方。
E: But similarly, as long as someone's part of the Sweet Dreams Troupe, there's no actual safe place for them.

C: 更何况，忧郁并非是情绪，而是与这个世界相处的态度。
E: Besides, melancholy encompasses more than just an emotion: It's an attitude towards the world.

C: 不开玩笑，我从这酒吧刚建好的时候就在光顾了，当时连张像样的桌子都没有，柜台还是随便拼出来的，稍微使点劲就会散架，材料的种类也不全。
E: I'm not kidding when I say I've been a patron of this lounge since it started. Back then, there weren't even proper tables. The counter was just thrown together and would fall apart if you put any weight on it. This place didn't even have the full range of ingredients.

C: （用饮料泼它。）
E: (Pour the drink on it.)

C: 唉，趁还在的时候多喝几杯吧。麻烦给我来杯<color=#dbc291ff>破碎感，特别清爽的饮料，再放个知更鸟小姐的装饰上去</color>，谢谢。
E: Eh, might as well have a few more while I'm here. Please give me a glass of something <color=#dbc291ff>that exudes brokenness and is very refreshing. And add the decoration of Miss Robin to it</color>, thank you.

C: …我好像有印象。
E: ...I think we've met before.

C: 咦，您不知道吗？在正门附近有那群穿黑西装的人把守，我们都没法离开这里。
E: Oh, you don't know? A bunch of guys in black suits are guarding the front gate, and we can't step out of this place.

C: 哎，人家发现了，您就喜欢打听这些说出来会害羞的事， 弄得人家都有些过热了。
E: Well, it seems you enjoy discussing embarrassing topics. It's making me a bit flustered, to be honest.

C: 我欺骗了那个发狂的蠢货，谎称舒翁呼唤它前来酒吧，相信很快就会到！
E: I lied to that frenzied fool and told him that Siobhan had called them to the lounge. I believe they will show up any minute now!

C: …装饰物？
E: ...Decorations?

C: 我点相同的饮料，是因为舒翁记得这里所有怪物的喜好。
E: I ordered the same drink because Siobhan remembers the preferences of all the monsters here.

C: 把怪物的事透露出去可以吗？
E: Is it really okay to tell others about the monsters?

C: …别看它好像很有想法的样子，其实内心仍然是个离不开人的孩子，只不过顾虑得太多，没法完全信任你罢了。别太往心里去。
E: ...Don't be fooled by their mature look. Deep down, they're still a dependent kid. They're just too wary to completely trust you right away. So, don't take it personally.

C: …我过来没给您添麻烦吧？要是有时间的话，麻烦给我调杯<color=#dbc291ff>超级甜，口感浓厚的饮料，颜色就分两层</color>好了。万分感谢！
E: ...I hope I'm not troubling you by coming over? If you have time, please make me something <color=#dbc291ff>super sweet and thick. Colors in two layers please</color>. Many thanks!

C: 错了，不是这个。哎，还是让舒翁多教教你吧。
E: Wrong. This is not it. *sigh* Get Siobhan to teach you more.

C: 汪！荷官先生经常胡言乱语，到处捣蛋，精神不太正常哇。酒吧里的怪物都不喜欢它。
E: Woof! Mr. Dealer is often pulling things out of thin air and causing trouble wherever he goes. He's kind of off, you know. No one at the lounge likes him.

C: 汪  汪  汪汪汪
E: Woof  Woof  WoofWoofWoof

C: 重复佩佩的节奏，在恰当的时候<color=#f29e38ff>按下按键</color>。
E: Repeat Peppy's beat and <color=#f29e38ff>press the button</color> at the right time.

C: 现在，来试试翻译佩佩的另一句话吧。
E: Now, try to translate another one of Peppy's sentences.

C: 说唱节奏再次发生变化了，先感受下新的风格吧。
E: The beats of the rap changed yet again. Let's try out this new style first.

C: 现在是「雪原留影」的进阶试炼。
E: This is the Advanced Trial for Snow Plains Photography, tweet.

C: 这是啥？还是我舌头出问题了？再尝一口……
E: What's this? Or is there something wrong with my taste buds? Let me taste it again...

C: 三月小鸟
E: March Bird

C: 呼…终于清净了，啾~
E: Phew, finally, some peace and quiet, tweet~

C: 不，托帕小姐，我非常信任你的善意。我们交过手，所以我很清楚你是否值得信任。
E: No, Miss Topaz, I deeply trust your intentions. Having clashed against you before, I can confidently say you are trustworthy.

C: 你看，那就是卢卡吧！
E: Look, that's definitely Luka!

C: 分明是你在用盘外招，特意来这里挑衅我，怎么变成我不讲武德了！
E: It's obvious that you're using dirty tricks to provoke me. How did it end up being my lack of sportsmanship?

C: 如果我接受了托帕小姐的帮助，那就欠了你一个大人情。到时你再提起商务合作的事，我可不好拒绝了。
E: If I accept your help, Miss Topaz, I'll owe you a favor. It would be hard to say no to you later about any business matters.

C: 卡美丽，{NICKNAME}，还有卢卡，你们好啊，我来看看卢卡选手的状态如何。
E: Hello, Miss Carmella, {NICKNAME}, and Luka. I came to check on how Luka is doing.

C: 各位稍安勿躁…接下来，则是即将上演复仇大戏的勇士，同时也是「次世代动力战斗装甲ARMS」的代言人，仙舟古武术传承者，星际和平公司产品代言人——铄金！
E: Everyone, please calm down... Coming up next is the warrior set to perform in this revenge play, the spokesperson for ARMS — Advanced Reinforced Mechanized Suit, the inheritor of Xianzhou's ancient martial arts, and the IPC's product ambassador — Shuojin!

C: 我之前还在网上看他直播表演肉身击破公司机甲的绝活……怎么这会儿又来给公司的武器代言了？
E: I remember seeing him livestream his skills, breaking IPC mechs with his bare hands. How is he endorsing the IPC's weapons now?

C: 看起来很吓人，仔细想想也还好。
E: They seem scary, but if you think about it, not so much.

C: 这一次对「学派战争」的演算，正是为了这个目标。为此，我打算<color=#dbc291ff>为模拟宇宙引入第五位合作者</color>了。
E: The current extrapolation of the Scholars' Strife is precisely for that purpose. Therefore, I've decided to <color=#dbc291ff>add in the fifth collaborator for the Simulated Universe</color>.

C: 复述：「再也不用担心被人看见了。」
E: Reiteration: "No more worries about being seen by others again."

C: 情况紧急，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，请务必尽快出发。
E: The situation is urgent, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, please depart immediately.

C: 有什么疑惑？
E: What kind of questions do you have?

C: 好的，如您所愿。
E: Of course, as you wish.

C: 我看{NICKNAME}还挺乐在其中的？
E: {NICKNAME} seems pretty happy with the current arrangement, though!

C: 嗯嗯，既然你决定成为…什么？！你竟然拒绝了！好吧…那，{NICKNAME}乘客，如果不做无名客，你想做什么？
E: Great! Since you've decided to become... Wait, what!? Pom-Pom can't believe you said no! Okay, fine... Then, if you don't want to be a Nameless, what do you want to do, {NICKNAME}?

C: {NICKNAME}乘客，请与我一起背诵开拓者的信条。
E: Let's recite the Trailblazer Creed. Now, {NICKNAME}, please repeat after Pom-Pom:

C: 我其实明天就打算收拾的…
E: I was planning to start cleaning up tomorrow...

C: 再采购一些家具，就能邀请大伙来玩了。
E: Just a couple more pieces of furniture and we can invite everyone over to hang out.

C: 不能放在你自己的房间吗？
E: Can't it be placed in your own room?

C: 嗐，我那不是…太激动嘛。这次肯定不会出乱子——探险可是我的老本行！
E: Aye, can you really blame me...? I was just too excited back then. But no one's getting into hot soup this time, because adventuring is what I do!

C: 的确，看看那复杂的道路…想要通过这里，恐怕不像之前那么容易。
E: Alright... In any case, do you see these complicated paths? It seems that progressing onward won't be as easy a task as before.

C: 怎、怎么能叫偷懒呢？这是分工，分工！
E: H—How can this be considered as slacking off? This is just a division of labor!

C: 希望那时的我们还能造出穹顶。
E: I pray that when that day arrives, we will still be able to construct a dome.

C: 嗯…灰宝的意思是，那刻夏老师将这颗蛋托付给了你，他去闭关寻找孵蛋的方法？
E: So Grayie, you're saying Professor Anaxa left you with this egg while he went into seclusion to research hatching methods?

C: 我看这只幼兽骨骼精奇，不如让它加入旅团，和我们一起成为圣城的璀璨新星吧！
E: This young beast has a remarkable bone structure and strong potential. What do you say we let it join the troupe and become the next shining star of the holy city?

C: 呜嗡！（离人越远，离大地兽越近！）
E: Grumph! (The further from humans, the closer to dromas!)

C: 呜嗡，呜嗡嗡（清蒸房梁，选用硬质红土打造。）
E: Grumph, grumph. (Steamed ceiling beam, made of solid redsoil.)

C: 呜…（原来{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}也一样啊……）
E: Grumph... (So even {F#Mama}{M#Papa} feels that way...)

C: 你对他有何评价？
E: What's your take on him?

C: 呃…你知道的，有大地兽的地方就有我——这点咱俩谁也别说谁。
E: Uh... you know, wherever there is dromas, I'll be there. We're both guilty of that one.

C: 吉奥里亚都没了还能发祝福？
E: Can Georios send blessings even when they are gone?

C: 呜嗡？（啊？啊？）
E: Grumph? (Huh? What?)

C: 呜？（怎么了，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}？啊，是不是{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}最近又闯祸了？好啦好啦，我会替{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}去道歉的啦。）
E: Grumph? (What's wrong, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}? Oh, did {F#Mama}{M#Papa} get into trouble again? Alright, alright, I'll go apologize on {F#Mama}{M#Papa}'s behalf.)

C: 既然顺利结束了…
E: Since that's all done...

C: 桀桀桀，早就跟大哥说过了，此子天赋恐怖如斯，必须为我们所用……
E: Hehehe, I told you already, big bro. This kid's talent is terrifying. We need them on our side...

C: ——最，最后，有请我们今天的主角，驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大上台呜嗡几句吧！
E: —L-lastly, let's welcome our star of the day, Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas, to come up and say a few words!

C: 不过，还是希望它别造成什么破坏才好。
E: Still, you hope it won't cause any trouble.

C: 稍等一下。
E: Just a minute.

C: 喵。都说不是「训练」，是大家共同举办的「赛跑」，是自发的比赛！
E: Meow. I told you it's not "training," it's a "race" we're all holding together. A spontaneous competition!

C: 得益于你的配合，世界离均衡又近了一步。
E: Thanks to your cooperation, the world has taken another step closer to the Equilibrium.

C: 嗯…我有许多故事可以讲述。但它们与「均衡」的关联，需要你自行参悟。
E: Hmm... I have many stories to tell. But their connection to the Equilibrium is something you'll need to figure out for yourself.

C: 说来听听。
E: I'm all ears.

C: 迷！好、好好吃！大家都开心，喜欢！谢谢你们！
E: Mem! So yummy! Everyone's delighted. We really love it! Thank you!

C: 感谢各位的辛苦付出。
E: Thank you all for your hard work and dedication.

C: 迷！谢谢你们，谢谢店长！我们还会来光顾的迷！
E: Mem! Thank you all, and thank you, manager! We'll definitely be coming back, mem!

C: 妖精对待美食的态度非常严格，都说食品质量无小事嘛。
E: Fairies hold food to the highest standards. As we all know, there's no matter too trivial in food quality.

C: 没有…为秉持公平原则，评审结果将由我与两位妖精代表投票得出。
E: No... To keep things fair, the results will be jointly decided by me and two fairy judges.

C: 其一，随着客流量提升，服务员的数量明显不够，顾客等候上菜的时间太过漫长。
E: First, with the increase in customers, we clearly don't have enough servers. The wait time for food has gotten way too long.

C: 有任何意见，都可以写信告诉*我们*。放在门口的小邮箱里就好，谢谢。
E: If you have any suggestions, write us a letter and drop it in the little mailbox by the door. Thanks!

C: 缇宝、缇安还有缇宁，三位活动负责人辛苦啦！
E: Big shoutout to Tribbie, Trianne, and Trinnon, our three event leads! Great job!

C: 安提灵花的香气？
E: The scent of Antila flowers?

C: 拿「锅」作主题怎么样？都说战士手中的剑比生命更重要，对厨师而言，一口称手的锅也是他最忠诚的伙伴。
E: How about we center it around "pots"? Just like a warrior treasures their sword, a chef's pot is their most loyal companion.

C: 迷！到我们登场的时候了！我们的胃如巨渊似深海，吞得下任何食物迷！
E: Mem! That's our cue! Our stomachs are like bottomless pits. We can handle anything, mem!

C: 去找赛飞儿多进点货？
E: Couldn't we buy more from Cipher?

C: 她说…<size=28>餐馆所有菜品大促销，走过路过不要错过！！！</size>
E: And it goes... <size=28>"Everything on sale at this restaurant! Come one, come all!"</size>

C: 像这样躲在一旁，远远地看着，时间反而会慢下来，甚至停下来。
E: When you stand quietly at a distance like this and just watch, time seems to slow... Sometimes it feels like it stops altogether.

C: 你怎么成了评审员？
E: How did you become a culinary judge?

C: 是受到炼金药的影响吗，还是纯粹的偶然现象呢？
E: Could it be due to the alchemical solution? Or perhaps just a fluke?

C: *我们*知道该怎么做，下次，就让小凯撒来当监督，绝对能管住小妖精们！
E: We know what to do! Next time, we'll ask the little Imperator to be the supervisor. She'll definitely keep little fairies in line!

C: 凯撒似乎很享受这场宴会，作为剑旗，我只需站在暗处，随时待命即可。
E: The Imperator seems to be enjoying the feast quite a bit. As the Gladius, it is my duty to remain in the shadows and stay always ready.

C: 下次再聊吧！
E: Let's catch up another time!

C: 说不定，会有什么意想不到的事呢？
E: Who knows? Something unexpected might happen!

C: 等你回来，给我们做好多好吃的迷！
E: We'll wait for you to come back and make us lots of yummy food, mem!

E: Open the chest and see what's inside.

C: 就像翁法罗斯的每一位黄金裔…\n是写作<color=#9e5738>「诅咒」</color>的祝福。
E: As with every other Chrysos Heir in Amphoreus...\nA blessing, yet also his <color=#9e5738>curse</color>.

C: 那遥远的天地开阔无边，\n而开阔的天地，也愈发遥远。
E: The distant heavens and earth stretched vast and boundless,\nBut their endlessness felt ever more remote.

C:
凶手自认谋杀天衣无缝，
却不知死者自愿踏入门径的死窟。

祭司赴死前，
眸中轻闪着弃蔑。
E:
The culprit thought the murder had no flaws,
But was unaware that the lamb willingly stepped into the passage's dead end.

Before the priest met her demise,
The only thing her eyes contained was spite.

C:
几经辗转，
我仍是寻得了她的破绽——

无论思绪何等多变，
对于人们易逝生命的价值，
字里行间，她始终没有失去信心。
E:
I still found her weakness
After many twists and turns —

No matter how fickle her thoughts,
She never lost faith, in those words,
Regarding the value of fragile mortal lives.

C: 「依我看，世界是个葫芦！」 「不骗你，我们都是鬼魂。」 骗子们轮番挑战， 却无人令王中意。
E: "I think the world is a gourd!" "In truth, we are all already dead!" The liars take their turns in the challenge, But no one pleases the king.

C:
世人已经忘记那场盛宴——

无数诳语，
淹没了幽灵之日；
万千诡计，
燃烧为一夜狂欢。
E:
The world has already forgotten that feast —

Lies unnumbered that drowned the day of souls,
Schemes uncounted,
Burning for a night of revelry.

C: 在被火舌拽回罪业的回环之前，\n她为你留下一个故事——
E: Before being dragged back into the sinful loop by tongues of fire,\nshe left you a story...

C:
在所有光行向宇宙尽头的旅程里，
星辰渐次熄灭，
残骸冷却化为，
均一、稳定、洁净的尘埃。
E:
Along light's final journey to the edge of the universe,
the stars fade into silence,
their wreckage settling, cooling,
into uniform, still, and pristine dust.

C: <color=#9e5738>翻开这本书吧，\n我会在过去等你。</color>
E: <color=#9e5738>Open it.\nI'll be waiting for you in the past.</color>

C: 梦中有它熟悉的众神，\n它们庞然依旧，\n却失了自由。
E: The gods they were familiar with were in this dream,\nAnd they were as immense and imposing as ever,\nYet had lost their freedom.

C: 「他是同类……」\n巨龙抬睑，注视那青色的龙裔，\n它知晓那具龙身背负着守护的誓命。
E: "He is one of our kind..."\nThe Giant Dragon lifts their eyelids, gazing at the azure-colored Long's Scion,\nKnowing that dragon's body bears the sworn duty of protection.

C: 而开山者眼中只有决绝。\n「那是『不朽』！」
E: But in Mountainbreaker's eyes, there is only resolute determination.\n"That is the Permanence!"

C: 在那里，我度过了愉快的练剑时光。\n话说回来，弓和剑到底哪个更厉害呢？
E: I had some wonderful times there practicing swordplay.\nBy the way, which is stronger — the bow or the sword?

C: 「无妨，那的确是我亲自宣读的判决。」 凯撒坦然道出， 「吾师是遭我父兄幽禁的敌邦人质。」
E: "No matter. That was indeed the criminal sentence I read out." The Imperator stated evenly, "My teacher was an enemy hostage whom my elders had imprisoned."

C: 耳畔萦绕着海洋的低语，\n公主一次又一次醉倒在宴会的序曲……
E: The whispers of the Ocean filled her ears\nAs the princess fell drunk again and again at the prelude of a feast...

C: 身为鱼儿，生来只能随波逐流，\n无论是随恶浪翻涌，\n抑或投身星海的洋流。
E: As a fish, she was destined to drift with the waves,\nWhether amidst the surging tides of evil\nOr immersed in the currents of the starry sea.

C: 故地重游的患者睁大眼睛——
E: The patient returns here and opens their eyes wide —

C: 「到处都在发光…好温暖的地方。」
E: "There's light everywhere... What a warm place."

C: 「你已学会医术，参透祝福。」\n「但疗愈世界，需要更亮的光辉。」
E: "You have learned the craft of healing and understood the blessing,"\n"But a light more radiant still is needed to heal the entire world."

C:
庭院迎来两名客人——

悬锋的将领，为索凶寻仇而断了筋骨；
圣城的贵族，因金织陨落而生了心魔。
E:
Two figures step into the courtyard's gate —

A general of Kremnos, her body torn, by vengeance bound, by fury swayed.
A noble of the holy city, once wrapped in gold, now haunted by a fate betrayed.

C:
他数次重返圮废树庭，
黑潮循迹而来。
败多胜少…
他拒绝开口求助。
E:
He returned to the scourged Grove many times,
And the black tide followed.
Despite his defeats...
He never sought help or permission.

C: 助讲细数学士的遗愿，\n字字如山，强人所难。
E: The assistant recounts all of the scholar's final wishes.\nEach mighty as a mountain, asking what seemed impossible.

C: 她开出的条件……\n「足够尖锐的美，和对美的追求。」
E: Her conditions are...\n"Beauty sharp as a blade, and the pursuit of beauty."

C: 「我想让她心动…」\n是脸泛红晕的少年。
E: I want to stir her emotions...\nThe voice of a blushing young boy.

C: 耳聪的仆从羞愧垂首，细语致歉： 「小姐，我丢了您的脸面。」 而那主人却将她带入宴会中央， 用这丑陋的模特将她的新作呈现。
E: The maidservant apologized in embarrassment, lowering her head: "My mistress, I have brought you shame." Yet her mistress brought her to the middle of the ball, Having her garbed in the latest dress, as the model.

C: 那衰颓的神明沉默不语。
E: The dying god remains silent.

C: 律法之泰坦塔兰顿正巧于「幽灵日」陨落，诡计泰坦遂趁虚而入，强夺神权。它向世人们公布了它的律法——「赌博」。
E: The Law Titan, Talanton, happened to fall on the Spirit Day, and the Trickster Titan seized this opportunity to usurp divine authority. They proclaimed their laws to the world — "Gambling."

C: 一阵风吹来，轻轻撩起了阿格莱雅的破布裙摆，伴着嬉笑之声——「那我赌『不会』。」
E: A gentle breeze lifted the hem of Aglaea's tattered dress as a giggle was heard, "Then I bet it won't happen."

C: 「没有赌注的赌局，赢了又如何？」赛法利娅甚至不屑于指出女孩的「作弊」。
E: "What's the point of winning a gamble with no stakes?" Cifera didn't even bother pointing out the girl's "cheating."

C: 「母上，我已经抵达神悟树庭，一切安好，勿念。」金发的少年认真收拾完自己的新住所，提笔写下一封家信。
E: "Mother, I have arrived at the Grove of Epiphany. All is well, please do not worry." The blonde youth wrote a letter home after meticulously arranging his new living quarters.

C: 「这是一封挑战信。」
E: "This is a challenge letter."

C: 未被记录的电信号。\n依附于外部变量{NICKNAME}，通过「记忆」命途成长。\n实为失去记忆的「德谬歌」。
E: An unrecorded electrical signal.\nIt is attached to the external variable {NICKNAME} and grows through the Path of Remembrance.\nIn actuality, it is the amnesiac Demiurge.

C: 甘饴•忍徒！甜品就是你的忍道，用你最擅长的忍法来让大家变得更加幸福吧！我支持你！
E: Ninja Initiate Patissier! Desserts are your Nindō! Use your dessert ninjutsu to spread happiness everywhere! Cheering you on!

C: 很满意
E: Very satisfied.

E: \n• Albus – A righteous man, passed away in prayer.\n

E: \n\n

C: 哀丽秘榭社区食堂
E: Aedes Elysiae Community Canteen

C: 自从我出生起便紧握的爱意。
E: That love which I've been holding onto since I was born.

C: 不被欢愉和逆境触动的爱意。
E: The love that is untouched by joy, by adversities.

C: 采矿钻
E: mining drill

C: 飞翔时针号
E: The Soaring Clock Hand

C:
这次我们要讲的是钟表小子信赖的好伙伴——哈努兄弟的故事！

很久很久以前，哈努兄弟曾是「野狼小镇」的一只野狼，这里的镇民们都生活在鳄鱼商人们的管理之下，商人把镇民当作拉货的奴隶，大家的生活苦不堪言。
哈努兄弟只是条狼，他帮不上啥忙。

后来，忍无可忍的镇民一把火烧掉了野狼小镇的工厂，掀起了狼与鳄鱼的战争。
最后鳄鱼们赢下了这场战争，即将清算野狼小镇的主犯。害怕背负责任的镇民想了个办法——让这只狼背大锅！

「嘎？你们确定是这只狼干的？」
「千真万确，不然你就继续让其他鳄鱼调查吧——浪费的又不是我们的工时！」
哈努兄弟只是条狼，他没法给自己辩护。

鳄鱼们把哈努兄弟丢给了凶狠的鳄鱼商人——石头老板。石头老板决定把哈努兄弟丢到环境恶劣的噩梦小镇里，让他挖一辈子石头，以儆效尤。
但哈努兄弟只是条狼，他没法挖石头。

后来，噩梦小镇的镇民不忍石头老板的压迫，他们团结起来开始反抗。
但哈努兄弟只是条狼，他顶多跟着咬两口。

当噩梦小镇的镇民陷入困境时，远道而来的「罗盘号」船员帮助了他们。钟表小子、镜子公主与左轮队长打败了鳄鱼，噩梦小镇才没有因失败重蹈野狼小镇的覆辙。

但钟表小子发现，长期被奴役的镇民之中没有能成为领导者的人才，作为外来者的自己也没有让大家信服的威望。于是，他将目光投向了不会说话的哈努兄弟……

钟表小子给这只小狼穿上了衣服，编造了他的故事——镇民们居然都信了，因为这只穿西服的狼真是太*酷*了！
哈努兄弟只是条狼，他觉得这样很爽。

而之后，噩梦小镇改名美梦小镇、美梦小镇在危机中挣扎、木头老爷前来援助……这些事情都与哈努兄弟无关，哈努兄弟只是条狼，一条又听话又酷的狼而已。

（注：本篇内容与正传不处于同一世界线，相关故事请以《钟表小子》与《美梦往事》正传为准）
E: This time, let us narrate the story of Clockie's trusted companion — Brother Hanu! Once upon a time, Brother Hanu was a wolf living in Wolfsville, a place ruled by the crocodile merchants. The townsfolk, being treated as slaves that manually transported goods, lived in agony. Being just a wolf, Brother Hanu couldn't do much to help. Some time later, the fed-up townsfolk set fire to a factory in Wolfsville, declaring war between the wolves and the crocodiles. The crocodiles ended up triumphant in the war and were determined to hold the mastermind behind the turmoil accountable. The townsfolk, who wanted to shirk the responsibility, came up with a solution — making Brother Hanu their scapegoat! "Huh? Are you sure this wolf is the culprit?" "We assure you he is. If you don't believe it, you can get your fellow crocodiles to continue the investigation. After all, you're the one paying their wage!" Brother Hanu was just a wolf, so he couldn't defend himself. The crocodiles handed Brother Hanu over to a ruthless crocodile trader — Boss Stone. Boss Stone was set to send Brother Hanu to the harsh environment of Nightmareville, making him dig for stones for the rest of his life as punishment. Yet, Brother Hanu was just a wolf and could hardly do any digging. As time went on, the townsfolk of Nightmareville grew sick of Boss Stone's oppression. They put up a united front and staged a rebellion. Being just a wolf, Brother Hanu could only chip in by making a few bites. Just as the townsfolk of Nightmareville found themselves being overwhelmed, the crew of the Compass came to their aid. Clockie, Mirror Princess, and Captain Revolver defeated the crocodiles, preventing Nightmareville from suffering the same fate as Wolfsville. Clockie found no leader material among the townsfolk who had long been enslaved. As an outsider, he lacked the prestige to be a convincing leader either. So, he set his sights on Brother Hanu, who couldn't speak... Clockie helped the wolf get dressed and made up a story about him. Surprisingly, the townsfolk bought the story as they thought the wolf in a suit looked *cool*! Brother Hanu was just a wolf, and he enjoyed the attention. Later on, Nightmareville was renamed to Dreamville, and Old Man Wood came to help with the struggles the town was facing... None of these occurrences had anything to do with Brother Hanu, because Brother Hanu was just an obedient and dashing wolf. (Note: The content of this passage does not exist in the same timeline as the canonical events. For canon, please refer to Clockie and Dreamjoy Memoir.)

C:
原著名星际建筑设计师，出身于艾普瑟隆星系的艺术世家。作品强调外形的曲线与美感，与其中艺术性的表达。
<s>其代表作品白日梦酒店设计涉嫌抄袭，原告方由于证据不足而落败，但乔伊本人名声也一落千丈。</s>
<color=#dbc291ff>白日梦酒店的真正设计者，也是为隐夜鸫家系寻找筑梦人才的温柔筑梦学家。
于梦境拓荒时遭遇忆域迷因袭击，不治身亡。</color>
E:
Formerly a famous galactic architectural designer born into an artistic family from the Epsilon system. Her designs emphasize external curvature and aesthetics, as well as the artistic expressions of the exterior.
<s>Her iconic work, The Reverie, was accused of plagiarism. Although the plaintiff lost the case due to insufficient evidence, Joey's reputation was still ruined.</s>
<color=#dbc291ff>The true designer of The Reverie and also a gentle Dreamweaving scholar who sought Dreamweaving talents for the Nightingale Family.
Passed away after being assaulted by a Memory Zone Meme while exploring the Dreamscape's wilderness.</color>

E: It's love at first sight between you and the Golden Hour. Who wouldn't fall in love with a place like that?\nMost people feel as you do, which is how Penacony managed to draw so many Dreamchasers.\nForget all the troubles that have ever ailed you and enjoy the charms of this city of festivities to its full. Though, do remember to keep some wits about you, lest the city swallows you all.

C: 一个活生生的卡通形象出现在你面前，它简直就像…你的专属朋友。\n你已经习惯了被当做那个「特殊」的人——毕竟从「出生」的那天起，你就一直处在漩涡的中心。这次，你也一定能成为一个合格的主角。
E: A living cartoon character has manifested right before you. It's like... your special friend.\nYou are already used to being regarded as someone "special." After all, you've been at the heart of a maelstrom since the day you were "born." This time, you'll certainly become a fitting protagonist as well.

C: 如果有得选，你愿意将自己的未来托付给名叫黑天鹅的忆者。\n无论何时，人总要依赖自身的经验和记忆来做出选择。她的眼睛仿佛能看穿你的一切——哪怕你失去了所有记忆，她也会替你记得。
E: Given the choice, you'd rather entrust your future to the Memokeeper called Black Swan.\nPeople must always rely on their experiences and memories to make choices, no matter the place and time. Her eyes seem capable of looking through everything about you — Even if you lose all your memories, she'll remember.

C: 「哟，{NICKNAME}，你也是来寻宝的？唉，要是每个跑进来的家伙都有你的本事，头儿也不至于让我来救人——『地火』要把这里的麻烦清理掉，方便的话就搭把手吧。」
E: "Yo, {NICKNAME}. Are you here for the treasure too? If everyone who stumbled in has your ability, the chief wouldn't have asked me to rescue people here... Wildfire intends to eliminate the troubles here, so lend me a hand if you can."

C:
欢迎您来到匹诺康尼。
自您入住白日梦酒店的一刻起，一段瑰丽的梦幻之旅便已揭开帷幕。
放下纷纷扰扰的现实绝非易事，做出全心全意拥抱梦境的选择势必也需要非凡的勇气。
我们有自信做出承诺，在家族的精心厝置下，等在您旅程前方的只有甜蜜的滋味和悦耳的音律。
愿您抛下俗世的一切烦忧，开上一瓶经典款苏乐达，静心醉享匹诺康尼的梦境奇迹。
E:
Welcome to Penacony.
From the moment you set foot in The Reverie, a splendid and dreamlike journey had already lifted its curtains.
It is not easy to put down the hustle and bustle of real life, and extraordinary courage is also needed to make the choice to full-heartedly embrace the dream.
We have the confidence to promise that — thanks to The Family's most meticulous management — only sweet nectar and melodious tunes await you ahead.
We wish for you to leave behind all the worries of your mortal life, open a bottle of classic SoulGlad, and settle down to immerse yourself in the enjoyment of Penacony's dreaming miracle.

E: Added to Team With Phainon

E: Character Ascension

E: About Cipher

E: Annoyances

C: 【往昔的涟漪】轻受击
E: Hit by Light Attack (Ripples of Past Reverie)

C: 秘技
E: Technique

C: 「同谐」无法战斗
E: Downed (Harmony)

C: 「存护」回合待机
E: Turn Idling (Preservation)

C: 「同谐」回合开始•二
E: Turn Begins 2 (Harmony)

C: 彦卿师父的教学风格非常严谨，也一直把「将军当年是这么教我的」挂在嘴边…看来，景元将军教给他的，他都记得清清楚楚。
E: Master Yanqing has very rigorous teaching style. He's always saying "that's what the general taught me back in the day," ...Looks like everything General Jing Yuan taught him he knows by heart.

C: 嗯！看着比用指挥棒的时候厉害多了！
E: Yeah! This looks way cooler than when you were using a baton!

C: 海瑟音女士的琴声简直比蜜酿还要醉人，难道优雅美丽的秘诀就是学会一门乐器？嗯，咱也该学习提升一下自己了！
E: The sound of Lady Hysilens's violin is more intoxicating than honey brews... Could it be that the trick to becoming elegant and beautiful is to learn a musical instrument? Hmm. It's time for me to learn something as well and improve myself!

C: 昔涟对所有记忆的呵护，对未来的守望…这一切我都不会忘记，这样，所有的付出才会有意义！
E: I won't forget how Cyrene protected all the memories and kept watch over the future... because that's how we make all the sacrifices worthwhile!

C: 都是我找到的~
E: Finders keepers~

C: 到就寝时间了么…谢谢提醒。资料室内，对昼夜的感知薄弱，时常一坐就是一晚…明天见。
E: Time to turn in already...? Thanks for the reminder. It's easy to lose track of time in the archives — before you know it, a whole day's gone by... See you tomorrow.

C: 可要仔细地修理修理。
E: Time for a detailed overhaul.

C: 强敌在前，也不妨一试。
E: Enemy ahead... No harm in trying.

C: 倘若命运无法将我推动，便由我来推动它。
E: If destiny can't propel me forward, I'll be the one to push destiny.

C: 这还…不是结局。
E: This... isn't the end.

C: 要想这么久？
E: It took you that long?

C: 这感觉真不错，像找回了失去的东西。
E: This feels pretty good. Almost like finding what I had once lost.

C: 别想跑。
E: Don't think of running.

C: 我还想再散散步…就在附近，不用担心，明天见。
E: I'd like to walk around a bit more... Don't worry, I won't go far. See you tomorrow.

C: 我小时候？差不多有十个虎克的破坏力吧。
E: Me as a child? Hook times ten.

C: 观众都等不及啦。
E: The audience is waiting!

C: 准备好了么？那就开始今日的记录。
E: You ready? Let's start the records for the day.

C: 输入指令……
E: Inputting commands... Oh!

C: 史瓦罗先生的记忆库中有许多有趣的东西，比如「电影」…就像很多人在一起过家家！
E: There are lots of interesting things stored in Mr. Svarog's memory bank, like... movies! It's like watching lots of people playing house together!

C: 嘿嘿。
E: Heehee~

C: 诶？好货啊，放着让我瞧瞧！
E: Whoa. That's good stuff! Let me take a look.

C: 四肢发达，头脑也不简单。
E: Brawn's good and all, but what would it be without brains?

C: 嗨，好久不见！最近怎么样？工作忙不忙，加班多吗？
E: Long time no see! How have you been? Clocking in a lot of overtime?

C: 那首歌怎么唱的来着？「回不去的名字叫家乡」——嗯，词是写得夸张了点，但我的确很久没回家看看了…老实说，我也不太想回去。
E: How does that song go again? "The place you can't go back to is called home." Well, that might sound dramatic, but I really haven't been back home for a long time... and frankly, I don't want to.

C: 市场波动很正常，该出手时就出手吧~
E: The market always fluctuates. Whenever you're ready~

C: 谋而后动不符合你的个性，对吧？
E: Planning before acting doesn't quite fit your personality, does it?

C: 原来有如此玄机。
E: There was more than met the eye.

C: 死亡何时而至？我等得有些心焦了。
E: When will death come for me? My patience is wearing thin.

C: 最近来到仙舟的化外民，个个张嘴就来「仙舟古语有云…」，可我这样的仙舟本地人却讲不出三言两句，这是什么道理……
E: All the Outworlders arriving at Xianzhou these days start their sentences with "There's an old saying in Xianzhou..." but a local like me can't think up any. How can this be...

C: 和她母亲一样，晴霓选择了自己向往的道路，没有什么可遗憾与痛苦的…感到遗憾的人，究竟是谁呢……
E: Qingni picked the road she yearned for, just like her mother. There's no reason to feel remorse... It makes me wonder, who's really grappling with regrets?

C: 本座先卜上一卦。
E: Allow me to make a divination.

C: 阴阳变转，生生不绝。
E: Yin and Yang, life and death.

C: 今日晨起占得一卦，涨落在坎、离之间，变数颇多…啧，不宜行公务，不宜加班，真教人浑身不自在。
E: Early this morning, I performed a divination reading. There were undulations between the water and fire trigrams, with multiple fluctuating variables... The reading said that it would be best to not conduct official business or work overtime today. Hmph, how tiresome.

C: 没钱的下次一定！
E: Forget your wallet? Hmph...

C: 你无处可逃！
E: Nowhere to run!

C: 一切借由形体施展的技法不过是末流小道。而今我抛弃凡铁，盗来一线月光，遍照尘世万川。这便是我掌中生灭由心，无处不在的「剑」。
E: Techniques relying solely on the physical form are but second-rate disciplines. Similarly, swords forged with mortal steel don't serve me well. I have stolen a sliver of moonlight that can shine over the earthly world — a "sword" I control with ease.

C: 谨慎，但也无需胆怯。
E: Caution does not mean cowardice.

C: 回棺前，看看有什么新东西罢。
E: I'd like to take in something new before returning to the coffin.

C: 我会记下您的善举。
E: I will remember your kindness.

C: 炎老如此老谋深算，带出来的孩子却如此直率…可惜我没时间一心一意收徒弟了，估计这辈子都琢磨不明白。
E: Old master Huaiyan is so shrewd, yet the child he brought up is so forthright... It's a shame I can't devote myself entirely to mentoring a disciple, and I probably won't ever get it in this lifetime.

C: 师父和景元将军之间有些…不愉快的过往。但对于成年人来说，所谓「私人恩怨」可实在是太奢侈了！
E: My master and General Jing Yuan have an... unpleasant history with each other. But personal grudges are a luxury that adults cannot afford!

C: 功亏…一篑……
E: So... close...

C: 有的人沉默是无欲望，有的人沉默是没思想，而我只是不想说话。
E: Some people are silent because they have no desires. Some are silent because they have no thoughts. I am silent only because I do not wish to speak.

C: 调饮是一门关乎感性的技术，在梦中调制汽水需加入当下的心情，如果烦闷，就浓郁一点；如果快乐，就甜蜜一些…调制饮料，也是调制人生。
E: Making a drink is a sensory skill. In dreams, creating fizzy concoctions requires adding a bit of your mood. Heavier if you're troubled, a touch sweeter if you're in high spirits... It's not just about mixing beverages. It's about mixing the experiences of life.

C: 三月七女士拥有纯粹的内心，这样良善的天性与行为难能可贵。我希望对这类天性给予更多爱护与尊重——在银河中，本性庸俗逐利、弄拙花言巧语之人太多。
E: Miss March possesses a pure heart, and such purity is rare and precious — there are far too many people who are inherently vulgar, profit-driven, and adept at flattery. I wish to extend more compassion and esteem towards people like her.

C: 你们仍有值得研究的价值。
E: You hold some academic value, I suppose...

C: 方才的交易愉快么？目光放长远些，这会是一次双赢的选择。
E: Satisfied with our transaction, I trust? Cast your eyes to the future, and you'll realize we both stand to gain from a little mutual understanding.

C: 这里的过去很有趣…要找个地方聊聊吗？
E: This place holds such fond memories... Care to reminisce?

C: 聆听生命的终曲。
E: Listen to the final song of life.

C: 万籁，再次共鸣。
E: All together, resonate once more.

C: 切换预案。
E: Recalibrating.

C: 萨姆，重返战场。
E: Returning to battlefield.

C: 这次的工作也圆满完成了…
E: Another job in the bag.

C: 别被过去束缚…我们都应当如此。
E: Don't be shackled by the past... That goes for the both of us.

C: 悦耳的响声，令人感到平静。
E: A melodious sound that soothes the soul.

C: 放轻松，我最擅长的就是等待。
E: Relax, patience is my middle name.

C: 哼，这奖励还没我脑袋赏金的零头多。
E: Hmph, this reward's not even a fraction of the bounty on my head.

C: 永远不要为了黄金狂喜…哼，尤其是公司给的。
E: Never go crazy over money... Heh, especially if it's from the IPC.

C: 缭乱•忍法•万彩绽！
E: Dazzling: Myriad Colors Burst!

C: 锵锵——大变活人！
E: Ta-Da! How's this splitting magic?

C: 完全没有长进啊。
E: Still as hopeless as ever.

C: 小白呀，总觉得他背负了太多东西，不止有自己的愿望，还有仇恨与别人的仇恨，期待与别人的期待…虽然我们有各自的使命，但还是很担心…一个人扛下所有真是坏习惯呀。
E: Snowy... It always feels like he's carrying too much. Not just his own wishes but also the hatred and expectations of others... Though we all have our own missions, I still get worried... Bearing everything alone is not a good habit.

C: 小灰，你还记得缇里西庇俄丝受到的指引吗？原来，那是三月小姐给予*我们*的帮助呀！「开拓」的伙伴，果然名不虚传！
E: Little Gray, do you still remember the help Tribios received? It turns out that it was Miss March helping us! Your Trailblazing companions really live up to their reputation!

C: 小涟，我们要一起飞往明天，飞向更远~
E: Reney! Together, we're gonna fly toward tomorrow and even further beyond~

C: 这个归缇宝，这个归缇安，这个归缇宁~
E: This one's for Tribbie, this one's for Trianne, and this one's for Trinnon~

C: 成色尚佳，能炼。
E: Not too shabby. Useful for alchemy.

C: 再寒冷的彼岸，也会有花香。
E: No matter how cold the other side is, there will still be the scent of flowers.

C: 生命并非如蝶翼般易折。
E: Life is not as fragile as butterfly wings.

C: 妹妹为我留下生的机会，斯缇科西亚城的人们给予我生的祝愿，哀地里亚的传统第一次赋予我生的意义…我希望能将这些祝福传递给更多人——毕竟「活着」，从来不是一人的祈望。
E: My sister gave me a chance at life, the people of Styxia gave me the blessing of life, and the traditions of Aidonia gave me the meaning of life... I wish to pass these benedictions to more people. After all, "staying alive" is not merely the hope of just one person.

C: 不好对付的家伙…我先去试试深浅。
E: That looks like a tough one... Let me test the waters first.

C: 阿格莱雅女士，光明一定会再次照拂翁法罗斯。
E: Lady Aglaea, light will definitely shine upon Amphoreus again.

C: 她就像一首…美妙的暖洋协奏曲，融汇所有的冰川和泥泞。若有这只小海兔的陪伴，想必连深海也不愿增加一丝寒意吧。
E: She's like... a wonderful warm-ocean concerto, blending glaciers and silt into harmony. With this little sea hare by your side, even the deep sea would hesitate to turn cold.

C: 关于「如何护理大地兽的毛发」，智哲爵兴致勃勃为我写了不下万字的谏言，其中最有效的一条，莫过于「红土拌鱼油」。托他的福，我的御驾终于不会再将毛发沾满我的裙袍了。
E: Dux Sagax was so excited to write about "how to manage a dromas's fur" that he wrote me a ten-thousand-word essay. The most effective recommendation in there was to "mix redsoil with fish oil." Thanks to him, my noble mount will no longer shed its fur all over my dress.

C: 欢欣吧，但莫遗忘远大征程。
E: Rejoice, but never stray from the greater cause.

C: 要拍照吗？
E: Wanna take some pictures?

C: 命运般的邂逅，不是么？
E: A fateful encounter, wouldn't you say?

C: 浑然天成的设计。
E: As effortless as instinct.

C: 无论是「长夜月」还是我和{NICKNAME}你，都将成为三月七的「过去」，但也会与她一同走向未来。
E: Be it Evernight, or the two of us, {NICKNAME}, we'll become memories of March 7th's past... yet walk beside her as she moves forward.

C: 枪若有半分犹豫，便刺不穿命运的铜墙。
E: If my spear shows even a sliver of hesitation, then it won't pierce destiny's indomitable wall.

C: 嗯…想荡秋千了呢。
E: Hmm... I want to go on a swing.

C: 是想好好准备一下，还是…想听我多说说话？
E: Are you making more preparations? Or... do you want to hear me talk more?

C: 绝佳配合。
E: Great teamwork.

C: 我马上跟上。
E: I'll catch up.

C: 未曾设想的画面…但这也是「开拓」的意义。
E: An unexpected sight... but this is also what it means to Trailblaze.

C: Herta Space Station
E: Herta Space Station

C: 在与「示死祸源：深魇蝗灾」的战斗中，在尚未消灭所有「幼蛰虫」时击破「示死祸源：深魇蝗灾」，且在未退出【基因复制】状态时恢复韧性
E: During the battle with Harbinger of Death: Swarm Nightmare, break the Harbinger of Death: Swarm Nightmare before defeating all Juvenile Stings, and it recovers Toughness before exiting "Gene Duplication" state

C: 终末任务开启
E: Finality Mission Available

C: 高大的橡木已然蛀空，徒留关于梦的枯枝败叶。
E: The mighty oak now stands hollow, leaving only withered leaves and dead branches of dreams.

C: 遥远地平的长音
E: Horizon's Echo From Afar

C: 【幼蛰虫】处在【速效进化】状态，选择一名角色及其召唤物进行对抗
E: "Juvenile Sting" is in "Rapid Evolution" state. Select a character and their summon to fight against it

C: 完成噩梦难度挑战
E: Complete the Nightmare difficulty challenge

C: 我方全体角色在战斗过程中【负载生命值】均不超过<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>并通关
E: Clear the stage without any ally character's "HP Overload" exceeding <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> during combat.

C: 完成简单难度挑战
E: Complete the Easy difficulty challenge

C: 即便如此，我还是会一如既往，
E: Even so, I will still do as I've always done,

C: 请假狂
E: Absentee Freak

C: 收集狂
E: Compulsive Hoarder

C: 胶糖卷
E: Gummy Roll

C: 绿荚豆
E: Green Pea

C: 雅努斯的火种
E: Janus' Coreflame

C: 尼卡多利的火种
E: Nikador's Coreflame

C: 刻法勒的火种
E: Kephale's Coreflame

C: 无妨，再来比试一番。
E: No matter. Let's have another round.

C: 嘿，是大家共同的胜利！
E: Woohoo, a victory for everyone!

C: 同伴攻击时：与前1格同伴交换位置，并使自身<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>，<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>生命值+<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>
E: When a companion attacks: Swaps positions with the companion 1 tile ahead, its <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK increases by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>, and its <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>HP increases by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>

C: 不会在商店中出现。队伍中最强的蜜果羹被击倒时：有<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>的概率以满<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>生命值</color>复活，并使下一次攻击造成的伤害提升<unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>。每次成功复活后，复活的概率减半
E: Not available in Store. When the strongest Fig Stew in the team is knocked out: There is a <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> chance to revive with full <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>HP</color>, and allows the DMG dealt with the next attack to increase by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>. Each successful revival halves the chance of further revivals.

C: 对战开始时：队伍中最强的蝶糕糕为<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力</color>最高的我方奇美拉施加【祝福】。拥有【祝福】的奇美拉被击倒时会以<color=#dc6f33><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>点<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>生命值</color>重新对战，最多生效1次
E: At the start of battle: The strongest Butterfly Cake in the team grants "Blessing" to the ally chimera with the highest <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK</color>. When a chimera with "Blessing" is defeated, it will rejoin the battle with <color=#dc6f33><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>HP</color>. This effect can trigger up to 1 time.

C: 对战开始时：队伍中最强的努努斯会召唤大地兽。每回合开始时：大地兽使紫色稀有度及以上的我方奇美拉<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>
E: At the start of battle: The strongest Nanus in the team will summon a dromas. At the start of each turn: The dromas causes all ally chimeras with purple rarity and above <color=#dc6f33>have their <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK increased by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>.

E: At the start of turn or when summoned: Gurgling Fish deals <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> DMG to the opponent with the highest <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>HP</color>.

E: After this unit attacks: If <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>HP is lower than <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>, launches a Follow-Up ATK, dealing <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> DMG to all opponents.

E: When knocking down an opponent: This unit's <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK increases by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> and <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>HP increases by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>.

C: 对手专属奇美拉首次攻击时：自身移动到队伍的最前排，并使自身<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>
E: When the opponent's exclusive chimera launches its first attack: This unit moves to the front of the team, and its <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK increases by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>

C: 剑术练习
E: Swordplay Practice

C:
我自靛石中诞生，带着火焰的气息。
熔炉与岩浆锤炼了我的身躯，
荣耀与硝烟为我披上战衣。
我的臂膀可以扼断咽喉，
我的石板可以砸碎头骨。
「弱肉强食，成王败寇，这是世界的底层原理。」
我向凡人宣扬这份教义，
呼吁他们放下锄头，拿起武器。
而我也将亲自践行纷争的真谛。
当尼卡多利将长矛举起，
我会随大军一同开拨，向远方扬起铁蹄，
散布假名为哲学的疯病。
E:
I was born from an indigo stone, bearing the breath of flames.
Furnace and magma have malleated my form,
while glory and gunsmoke have draped me in battle garments.
My arms can crush throats,
and my stone tablets shatter skulls.
"The strong devour the weak. The victors write the history. These are the fundamental laws of our world."
I preach this doctrine to mortals,
urging them to lay down their hoes and take up weapons.
And I shall personally embody the truth of strife.
When Nikador raises his spear,
I will march with the army, raise iron hooves toward distant horizons,
and spread a madness that masquerades as philosophy.

C: 速度强化
E: SPD Boost

C: 橡木鸣蛀之梦，梦主实行一切阴谋的地方——当然，律令所说的话不能尽信。既然阴差阳错来到了这里，想办法获取更多关于梦主的线索吧。
E: The Dream of Gnawing Oak, the place where the Dreammaster executes all his schemes... Of course, the words of the laws can't be taken at face value. Since I've ended up here by a twist of fate, I'll see if I can find more clues about the Dreammaster.

C: 继续探寻梦主的阴谋
E: Continue to investigate the Dreammaster's schemes

E: Try opening the lock of memories

E: Uncover the secrets of this place

E: Assess the situation

C: 追忆：「太一之梦」
E: Recollection: "Ena's Dream"

C: 没能到来的明日，换言之，就是「不存在的记忆」。
E: It's a tomorrow that never came. In other words, it's a "nonexistent memory."

C: 「我不理解……」
E: "I don't understand..."

C: 最好是。也可能类似迷因，是根植在阿斯德纳人心底的恐惧，跟噩梦似的。
E: Ideally, yes. But it might also be more like a meme: A fear buried in the Asdanians' hearts like a nightmare.

C: 即便是「同谐」自身的影子，也不行。
E: Not even the shadow of Harmony itself.

C: 舒翁离开了……
E: Siobhan has left...

C: 您是在找人吗？还真没印象…要不，我帮您留意留意？
E: You're looking for someone? I don't really recall seeing them... but I can keep an eye out for you if you'd like?

C: 形势比我记忆中更复杂…
E: Things are more complicated than I remember...

C: 别急，此时贸然穿越梦境，要比之前危险许多。
E: Hold on, recklessly crossing through the dreamscape now would be far more dangerous than before.

C: 甚至…在这片梦境中，我们有机会找到反击他的手段。
E: In fact... within this dreamscape, we might find a way to strike back against him.

C: 可以再拜托你一件事吗？或许有一个两全其美的办法，但我必须先一步找到「死亡」。
E: Can I ask you for one more thing? There might be a way to have the best of both worlds, but I need to find "Death" before them.

C: …就像是被谁抹去了？谁做的……
E: ...It's like it's been erased? Who's done this...

C: 当然，匹诺康尼的一切，比你认为的还要重要。
E: Of course, everything about Penacony is more important than you think.

C: 但这都是生者们的故事，与此同时，「死者」的世界又会如何？
E: But that's all about the living. In the same moment, what became of those within the world of the "dead?"

C: 哥哥的话，我不明白…对小鸟来说，飞翔…也需要问「为什么」吗？
E: Brother, I don't understand... For a bird, does flying... also need a "why"?

C: 为「永恒乐园」奠基？这……
E: Laying the foundation for "Eternal Paradise?" This...

C: 哦，因为你正忙着…<color=#dbc291ff>假装成一位「星核猎手」</color>？
E: Oh, because you're busy... <color=#dbc291ff>pretending to be a Stellaron Hunter</color>?

C: 对你可以网开一面——大多数人，我当然不希望他们记得。
E: I can make an exception for you. But most people? I certainly don't want them to remember.

C: 在独自等待时，她迎来了自己真正的合作者——并因此知晓，在匹诺康尼，遗产不止一份，「钟表匠」也不止一位。
E: While waiting alone, she met her true collaborator... and thus learned that there was more than one legacy in Penacony, and more than one Watchmaker.

C: 嗯…现在，轮到我们开辟前路了。
E: Yes... And now, it's up to us to forge ahead.

C: 因为其中一行写着…我会在梦想之地经历三次「死亡」。
E: Because one of the lines said... I'll experience "death" three times in the land of the dreams.

C: 或许，是阻止我。
E: Or maybe... stop me.

C: 橡木公馆，曾是朝露公馆的一部分。成为「梦主」前，他常常在此举行家系议会，但如今已废弃多年，沉入了原始忆域。
E: Oak Manor, once part of the Dewlight Pavilion. Before becoming the Dreammaster, he used to hold family councils here, but it's been abandoned for years now, sinking into the Primordial Memory Zone.

C: 你已自行坦白了罪状。
E: You've already confessed to your crimes.

C: 而这，往往被称作最高等的谎言。
E: And that... is often regarded as the highest form of deception.

C: 是啊，别忘了，在这美梦之中，仍有许多人正在渴望，正在博取，正在奋力前行。
E: Indeed. Don't forget that, even within the sweet dream, there were still many people yearning, striving, and pushing forward with all their might.

C: 不光匹诺康尼，整个阿斯德纳星系全完了。
E: It's not just Penacony. The entire Asdana system is done for.

C: 有个多管闲事的焚化工，她在你身上留了个小玩意儿，想要用它烧掉美梦给你的幻景，让你能从太一之梦里醒过来——但现在看来，你也用不上嘛。
E: A nosy Cremator left something on you. She wanted to use it to burn down the illusions you received from the sweet dream, allowing you to wake up from Ena's Dream... Buuut it looks like you don't need it anymore.

C: 星核猎手。
E: A Stellaron Hunter.

C: 静止永远无法带来幸福。走吧，为十二时刻，安上罗盘的指针——
E: Standing still never brings happiness. Come on. Let's set the compass needle for the Twelve Hours...

C: 「梦主」
E: "Dreammaster"

C: 这是我承诺给你的…关于「终末」的真相。
E: This is what I promised to give you... The truth about the Finality.

C: 没关系，我就是要那样做。
E: No worries. That's exactly what I'm going to do.

C: 可流萤已经看不见了……
E: But Firefly can't see it anymore...

C: 你回忆起记忆中的烟花，流萤接住正从空中坠落的你，带你飞上天际。在那时，她曾说过的话，给故事留下了完美的注脚——属于她，也属于夜空下的所有人。
E: You recall the fireworks in your memory, where Firefly caught you as you fell from the sky and carried you up into the heavens. At that moment, the words she spoke left a perfect footnote for the story, one belonging to her, and to everyone under the night sky.

C: 确定要从梦中醒来吗？
E: Are you sure you wish to wake up from your dream?

C: 自那以后，你再不曾见过洞外的蓝天。
E: Since then, you've never seen the blue sky outside the cave again.

C: 身为神悟树庭的优秀辩手，你很快便指出了小奇美拉的问题所在——
E: As a skilled debater from the Grove of Epiphany, you quickly point out the issue with the little chimera:

C: 「抱歉，我来迟了。从今往后，生与死将不再分离。」她抬起手，那股幽香指引你向前。你终于落入了甜蜜的死亡。
E: "Sorry I'm late. From now on, life and death shall never part." She raises her hand, and that ethereal fragrance guides you forward. At last, you fall into sweet death.

C: 我啊，还真是高高在上呢。
E: Well, look who's all high and mighty.

C: 走吧。赛事报名点就在不远处，我来带灰宝过去。
E: Let's go. The registration point is not far from here. I'll take Grayie there.

C: 定级赛是吧？这个我熟。
E: Placement matches, huh? I'm familiar with that.

C: 都准备好啦，开始对决吧！
E: All set! Let's get this showdown started!

C: 烛光摇曳…你的呼吸乱了呐。
E: The candle flickers... You're breathing fast.

C: 他的野心被一场暮雨扑灭，那{RUBY_B#纳努克}恩主{RUBY_E#}的目光也从未降临…无人会铭记他的死亡——唯有我会记得，并非因为歉疚，抑或悲伤…只是有些难忘他得知真相时的眼神，仅此而已。
E: His ambitions were doused by a sudden rain, and the glance of the {RUBY_B#Nanook}savior{RUBY_E#} never descended. None will remember his death... except me. I do not remember him out of guilt or sorrow. I just... can't forget the look in his eyes when he finally learned the truth.
